overview_en: Mouse compatible  strategy  game set in 16th Century Japan.                Take on the role of a Lord in several different times in Japanese history and expand your territories by managing people and armies.
overview_zh: 支援滑鼠操作的策略遊戲，背景設定在16世紀的日本。玩家將扮演日本歷史上不同時期的大名，透過管理人民與軍隊來擴張自己的領土。
comment_en: Presentation is great in 1552 Tenka Tairan. There is a classy opening sequence, funny animated history segments and even a large amount of designers' notes. Graphics are highly attractive given the nature of the game, although the small map screen could have been better, and it looks like it could be a lot of fun. I say 'could be' because the game is chock full of Kanji and fairly impenetrable if you can't understand what is going on. I'd love to have a translated version but as it stands, if you can't read the lingo then you'll have to pass this by - and for that reason the game remains unrated. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 1552 Tenka Tairan 的呈現方式相當出色。遊戲有風格典雅的開場動畫、趣味十足的歷史動畫片段，甚至還有大量的設計師筆記。考量到這款遊戲的性質，圖像表現非常吸引人，雖然小地圖畫面還可以再做得更好，整體看起來應該會很好玩。我之所以說「應該」，是因為遊戲中塞滿了漢字，如果看不懂內容就會覺得相當難以理解。我很希望能有翻譯版，不過以目前的狀態來說，如果你看不懂日文就只能放棄這款了——因此本作暫不評分。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Following on from Capcom's 1943, 1941 - Counter Attack this time is SuperGrafx only, and the conversion is handled by Hudson Soft rather than Naxat. The World War II setting will be instantly familiar with fans of the previous game and gameplay remains similar, with a few little tweaks. You still get a range of weapons, although less varied now, and this time you have the ability to charge up and blast out a super attack which changes according to the firepower you have at the time. Fortunately, this game retains the 'multiple hits before you die' and you will need it as the screen often gets very busy with craft approaching frequently from behind. You certainly can't say there isn't enough to destroy, with background objects including cranes and even cliffs not safe from your hail of bullets.
overview_zh: 承接 Capcom 的 1943，1941 - Counter Attack 這次是 SuperGrafx 獨佔，移植工作由 Hudson Soft 操刀而非 Naxat。二戰的背景對前作的粉絲來說會感到相當熟悉，玩法也大致相同，只做了些小幅調整。武器種類仍然不少，不過變化性比之前少了一些，這次玩家還可以蓄力發動超必殺攻擊，攻擊型態會隨當下的火力狀態而改變。幸運的是本作仍保留「被擊中多次才會陣亡」的設計，而且你會很需要這項設計，因為畫面常常擠滿敵機，還會頻繁地從背後偷襲。你絕對不會覺得可以破壞的東西不夠多，背景物件包含吊車甚至懸崖都難逃你的彈幕轟炸。
comment_en: 1941 is like a beefed up version of 1943. Graphics are more chunky and very faithful to the arcade version, and there's plenty of action on screen at all times which the SuperGrafx handles very well. Sound fares less well. The tunes are certainly above average, but the actual sound itself is a little too soft and 1943 sonically beats this game hands down. It's certainly a more skillful game than 1943 and gameplay feels like it has a slightly better balance to it but somehow I still feel I enjoy 1943 just a little bit more (no doubt due to the music). Nevertheless, with the 2 player mode it's a blast and although it could probably have been done on the standard CD-Rom with only a few differences, it's still one of the few great games on the SG. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 1941 就像是強化版的 1943。圖像更加厚實，也非常忠實於大型電玩原版，畫面上隨時都有大量動作演出，SuperGrafx 處理起來游刃有餘。音效方面就比較遜色一些。音樂水準確實在平均之上，但實際音色稍嫌軟弱，聲音上 1943 大勝本作。操作上這款遊戲比 1943 更需要技巧，玩起來的平衡感也稍微好一點，不過不知為何我還是比較喜歡 1943 多一點（毫無疑問是因為音樂）。話雖如此，加上雙人模式後玩起來非常過癮，雖然這款理論上在標準 CD-ROM 上稍作修改也能做出來，但仍然是 SG 上少數的佳作之一。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en: 1941: Counter Attack is a 1990 vertically scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Capcom for arcades. It is the prequel to 1942, and the third game in the 194X series. It was ported to the SuperGrafx in 1991 and to GameTap. It was released on Capcom Classics Collection Remixed for the PlayStation Portable and Capcom Classics Collection Vol. 2 for PlayStation 2 and Xbox. It was followed by 19XX: The War Against Destiny in 1996.

overview_en: Taking a break from the usual futuristic settings, 1943 is a war-time shoot 'em up converted from the arcade. Choosing to dump the one-hit-kill of many games of this genre, 1943 gives you an energy bar that depletes as you take damage - and the swarms of planes mean that you will need all you can get. Find yourself in a sticky situation? Just hit the button for a quick barrel-roll to take you out of harm's way. The weapon system is fairly unusual for a shoot 'em up of this type - instead of frequently powering up your weapon systems, you collect different weapons that have a countdown timer. The timer can be topped up by collecting the weapon again, but if it runs out you are back to your conventional guns. Occasionally you also get the aid of wingmen who sit along side you until they are destroyed. The PC Engine version has two modes - Arcade and Original, which switch over half way through the game. The Original levels bring in more powerful weapons, more varied levels, better music and a whole load more enemies to wipe out.
overview_zh: 跳脫常見的未來風格設定，1943 是一款從大型電玩移植的二戰射擊遊戲。本作捨棄了同類遊戲常見的「一擊必殺」設計，改採能量條會因受擊而減少的機制——由於敵機滿天飛，你會用到每一分能量。遇到緊急狀況？只要按一下按鈕就能來個快速翻滾躲開攻擊。武器系統對這類射擊遊戲來說相當特別——不是經常性地強化既有武器，而是收集不同的武器，每種武器都有倒數計時器。再次拾取同種武器可以補充時間，但如果時間歸零就會回復到普通機槍。偶爾還會有僚機相助，它們會陪伴你直到被擊落為止。PC Engine 版本有兩種模式——大型電玩模式與原創模式，遊戲進行到一半會切換。原創關卡帶來更強力的武器、更多變化的關卡、更好的音樂，還有大量的敵人等著被消滅。
comment_en: 1943 starts out as a fair shooter. The arcade levels are fun, if a little simple, and the music is nice enough. But this completely changes when you hit the Original mode. This is just plain awesome. The music is suddenly fantastic, with my favourite sampled drums of any Engine game, and the graphics are turned up a notch too. At times there are so many sprites on screen that you can barely keep track of things, and while this does make the game a little more luck than skill in many places, it's still a whopping big bag of shooting fun. It may have aged compared to later titles, but it remains one of the most frantic and sonically pleasing shooters on the system. Buy it. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 1943 一開始只是款普通的射擊遊戲。大型電玩關卡雖然略顯簡單但很好玩，音樂也不錯。但進入原創模式後一切完全改觀，簡直精彩絕倫。音樂突然變得超讚，鼓聲取樣是我所有 Engine 遊戲中最喜愛的，圖像也提升了一個等級。有時畫面上的角色精靈多到讓你幾乎難以掌握狀況，雖然這讓遊戲在許多地方更偏向運氣而非技巧，但它仍是一大包超豐富的射擊樂趣。跟後期作品相比或許顯得老舊，但它仍是本機上最刺激、音效最過癮的射擊遊戲之一。買吧。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Naturally a manga/TV anime tie-in, 21 Emon is one of those Japanese style board games that have never really made a big impact in the west. Four players (any combination of human and computer) take it in turns to roll dice and move around the isometric board, landing on various event squares. The ultimate aim is to build as many hotels as you can and make more loot than your opponents.
overview_zh: 理所當然是漫畫／電視動畫的改編作品，21 Emon 是那種在西方國家從未真正流行起來的日式桌遊遊戲之一。四位玩家（人類與電腦任意組合）輪流擲骰子並在等角視角的棋盤上移動，踩到各種事件格子。最終目標是盡可能多蓋飯店，賺得比對手還多的錢。
comment_en: While it can be interesting if you've never played a game like this before, ultimately you really need two things to enjoy it: 1. A group of friends, and 2. Japanese language skills. Without those, and despite its adequate presentation and jolly music, it isn't likely to hold your attention, and there are better board games on the PC Engine to bluff your way through (Dragon Half on CD for example). As such, I haven't rated this game, feeling that would be a little unfair. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 如果你從未玩過這類遊戲，或許會覺得有趣，但要享受這款遊戲其實需要兩樣東西：1. 一群朋友，2. 日文能力。少了這些，就算呈現尚可、音樂也輕快，大概還是無法長時間抓住你的注意力，況且 PC Engine 上還有更多適合矇著玩的桌遊（例如 CD 版的 Dragon Half）。因此我覺得給這款遊戲評分會有點不公平，故不予評分。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Based on a manga, 3x3 Eyes tells the story of Yakumo who has been made immortal and is doomed to protect the 3 eyed girl Pai. Pai is seeking to become human, but until then if she dies, so does Yakumo.
overview_zh: 改編自漫畫，3x3 Eyes 講述八雲被改造成不死之身、註定要守護三眼少女佩的故事。佩渴望成為人類，但在變成人類之前，若她死去，八雲也會隨之死去。

overview_en: Urban development and railroad management game involving lots of strategy, lots of trains and lots of Japanese text. Build up your city with hotels, amusement centres, factories and the like while keeping a beady eye on statistics, budgets, the stock market and other very interesting factors. All this is presented in a competent isometric view and will keep any sim-lover occupied for hours, but if you don't understand Japanese then expect to get lost pretty quickly. Mouse compatible.
overview_zh: 都市開發與鐵路經營遊戲，內容包含大量的策略思考、大量的列車，以及大量的日文文字。你要興建飯店、娛樂中心、工廠等來發展都市，同時還要盯緊各項數據、預算、股市以及其他非常有趣的因素。這一切都以相當稱職的等角視角呈現，絕對能讓模擬遊戲愛好者投入數個小時，但如果你看不懂日文，很快就會一頭霧水。支援滑鼠。
no_intro_name: A.III. - A Ressha De Ikou III (Artdink) (Japan)[AKA Take the 'A' Train III]

title_jp: アドヴァンスドヴァリアブル・ジオ
overview_en: A pretty standard one-on-one beat 'em up in the Street Fighter vein, Advanced V.G. features a whole host of cute gals in short skirts. There aren't really any surprises in the gameplay, one button performs a kick and the other a punch, while various joypad movements pull off special moves in the way you would expect. As well as the standard pick-your-character mode, it also features 2 player versus and a story mode with a lengthy dose of nicely drawn visual scenes.
overview_zh: Advanced V.G. 是款相當標準、走 Street Fighter 路線的一對一格鬥遊戲，登場的是一大群穿著短裙的可愛女孩。玩法上沒什麼意外，一個按鈕出腳、另一個出拳，搭配各種搖桿方向輸入即可施展特殊招式，跟你預期的一樣。除了標準的選角模式外，本作還有雙人對戰，以及含大量精美手繪視覺場景的故事模式。

title_jp: アドベンチャーアイランド
overview_en: Life as a roaming adventurer is never easy. One minute you're shoving several feet of cold steel between the gaping jaws of some evil robot dragon, and the next thing you know, you've been transformed into a fire breathing lizard man. Such is the problem that you first encounter at the beginning of Adventure Island, Hudson Soft's conversion of the Master System game 'Wonder Boy III: The Dragon's Trap'. Taking more of its influence from the second game in the Wonder Boy series than the first, Adventure Island has a more balanced structure and more exploratory gameplay. The main game is centred around a small village which acts as a sort of 'hub' to the surrounding levels. Each of these levels are gradually accessed over time with the acquisition of keys or new transformations. As the game progresses, you will find yourself transforming into five different creatures, which can (and need to) be switched between in special rooms. The lizard is the basic transformation and does little more than breathe fire at any passing fauna. Mouse man is a tiny little critter and aside from being able to fit under small obstacles, he can also run up and around special chequered walls and ceilings. Next up is a green amphibian that gives you the power to swim around freely, followed by a tiger man who swings his sword around in a wide arc, allowing you to break blocks above and below. Finally, there is the bird transformation which lets you fly around by repeatedly tapping the jump button. As you progress, your quest will take you over many types of terrain from jungle to desert to the inside of a giant pyramid - but to help you out there is a password/backup save feature in a church in the main village. As you viciously hack up the cute little inhabitants of the island, you find that they considerately drop money and helpful items for you. The money is used in shops to upgrade your armour, or buy healing at the hospital, while the other items are special weapons that can be set from the pause menu. These include homing fireballs, ground based mini whirlwinds and arrows that shoot directly upwards (and are a blessing when you are trying to get rid of flame-dropping clouds).
overview_zh: 漂泊冒險者的生活從來不輕鬆。前一秒你還把長劍深深捅進某隻邪惡機械龍的大嘴裡，下一秒你就變成了一個會噴火的蜥蜴人。這就是你在 Adventure Island 一開始會遇到的狀況，本作是 Hudson Soft 對 Master System 遊戲《Wonder Boy III: The Dragon's Trap》的移植版。Adventure Island 的設計更多是參考 Wonder Boy 系列的第二代而非第一代，結構更為平衡、玩法也更具探索性。主要遊戲以一個小村莊為中心，作為前往周邊關卡的「樞紐」。這些關卡會隨著你獲得鑰匙或新變身能力而逐漸開放。隨著遊戲進行，你會依序變身成五種不同的生物，可以（也必須）在特定房間切換。蜥蜴是基本變身，除了對附近動物噴火外幾乎沒什麼能力。老鼠人身形嬌小，除了能鑽進狹小障礙物外，還能沿著特殊的格紋牆壁與天花板奔跑。再來是綠色兩棲類，讓你能自由游泳；接著是揮劍弧度很大的虎人，可以打破上方與下方的方塊。最後是鳥人變身，重複點按跳躍鍵就能飛行。隨著進度推進，你的旅程會帶你穿越叢林、沙漠，甚至巨大金字塔內部等各種地形——不過在主村莊的教堂裡有密碼／存檔備份功能可以幫助你。當你無情地砍殺這座島上可愛的居民時，你會發現他們會貼心地掉落金錢與各種有用的道具。金錢可在商店用來升級護甲，或在醫院買回血，其他道具則是可從暫停選單設定的特殊武器。這些包含追蹤火球、地面小龍捲，以及直射向上的箭（對付從雲朵丟火焰的敵人來說堪稱救星）。
comment_en: While not the hardest of games to complete, the platform action is very enjoyable while it lasts, and the wise move to give this a less linear feel works well - there is enough incentive to try and unlock the next level or transformation and this keeps you playing. While the graphics are a little sparse and not much of a step up from their Master System equivalents, they are well drawn and cute enough not to complain about. The sound is fine, if a little soft, but the tunes are catchy and easy to listen to. If you're looking for a platform adventure that doesn't start you from level one every time you play, then you could do a lot worse than this. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 雖然這款遊戲稱不上是最難破關的遊戲，但平台動作玩起來相當有趣，至少在進行期間是這樣；將遊戲設計得較不線性的聰明決定也很成功——足夠的動機讓你想解鎖下一關或下一個變身，讓你持續玩下去。雖然圖像略顯簡陋，跟 Master System 版本相比也沒大幅提升，但都畫得不錯，可愛到令人無從抱怨。音效還行，雖然有點軟，但旋律朗朗上口、聽起來舒服。如果你想找一款不用每次都從第一關開始玩的平台冒險遊戲，那這款絕對值得一試。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en:
Hudson's Adventure Island, known as Takahashi Meijin no Bōken Jima (高橋名人の冒険島; Master Takahashi's Adventure Island) in Japan and also known as Adventure Island, is a platform game produced by Hudson Soft that was released in Japan for the Famicom and MSX on September 12, 1986. It was released in North America for the Nintendo Entertainment System in 1988 and in the PAL region in 1992.
Adventure Island is an adaptation of the arcade game Wonder Boy, developed by Escape for Sega. It was followed by a series of sequels with no connection to the Wonder Boy series.

overview_en: Unreleased game advertised along with Hit The Ice. Images Section of a print advert.
overview_zh: 一款未發售的遊戲，曾與 Hit The Ice 一起在廣告中宣傳。圖像部分來自紙本廣告的片段。

title_jp: アドベンチャークイズカプコンワールドハテナ？の大冒険
overview_en: Converted from the arcade game, this consists of two standard multiple choice quiz games, Capcom World and The Adventures of Hatena, in which you make your way around a board game style landscape while testing your general and gaming knowledge. It also features special appearances by several Capcom characters from games such as Side Arms, Ghouls 'n' Ghosts and Forgotten Worlds. The game requires Japanese language to play.
overview_zh: 由大型電玩遊戲移植而來，本作包含兩款標準選擇題問答遊戲：Capcom World 與 The Adventures of Hatena。你要在桌遊風格的場景中移動，測試你的常識與遊戲知識。本作還特別請來多位 Capcom 的角色客串，包含 Side Arms、Ghouls 'n' Ghosts 與 Forgotten Worlds 等遊戲的角色。遊玩需要日文能力。
no_intro_name: Adventure Quiz - Capcom World + Hatena no Daibouken (Japan)

overview_en: A competent conversion of a B-list arcade shooter, Aero Blasters has all the standard elements that you have come to expect. Starting you off over a pleasant looking cityscape (with some nice parallax scrolling), you are out to blast everything in sight. Your ship is equipped with a standard front-firing weapon, but destroying a power-up craft gives you a whole range of add-ons that fly out of the wreckage at you. None of these are particularly impressive to look at, and some even seem like more of a curse than a blessing so choose wisely. Also to help you is a power up meter at the top of the screen. When you hold down the charge button, this powers up the ship until you are able to release a quick flash of energy, destroying bullets and most of the smaller enemies in one shot.
overview_zh: Aero Blasters 是一款 B 級大型電玩射擊遊戲的稱職移植作品，具備所有你期待的標準元素。遊戲開場是令人愉悅的城市景觀（搭配不錯的視差捲動），你的目標就是把眼前一切都打爆。你的戰機配備標準的前方射擊武器，但擊落補給機後會從殘骸中飛出一整排附加裝備供你選擇。這些附件的外觀都不算驚艷，有些甚至感覺比較像詛咒而非祝福，所以要慎選。畫面上方還有蓄力計量表協助你。當你按住蓄力鍵時，戰機會開始蓄能，直到你能釋放一次快速的能量閃光，一擊摧毀彈幕與大部分的小型敵人。
comment_en: For the most part, the level design is pretty standard stuff, but there are a few exceptions. One of the best parts in the game is having to navigate through some very fast moving tunnels - especially if you missed the barrier power-up. There is also the occasional nice effect, like the city being destroyed at the end of level one. In all the graphics are well drawn, nice to look at and there isn't any slowdown or flicker of consequence. Sound-wise, it could have been better. The tunes are inoffensive, but the sound is thin and weedy and this doesn't work in the game's favour. But despite this, it's reasonably fun and it's certainly professionally put together, even if it lacks a little personality. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 大體上，關卡設計相當標準，但也有幾個例外。遊戲中最棒的部分之一是穿越高速移動的隧道——如果你錯過了屏障道具就更刺激了。偶爾也會有不錯的特效，例如第一關結尾城市毀滅的場景。整體而言圖像繪製精良，看起來賞心悅目，沒有什麼值得一提的拖慢或閃爍。音效方面本可以更好。音樂不討喜也不討厭，但音色薄弱細嫩，對遊戲沒加分。儘管如此，本作玩起來還算有趣，製作也相當專業，只是少了點個性。sunteam_paul

overview_en: One of Sega's big arcade hits using their 'super scaler' technology, it was a bold move to try and convert this to any home machine. After Burner II is, quite simply, one of the most mindless shooters that you're ever likely to play: simply fly your F-14 into the screen, dodging missiles like crazy and letting all hell loose with your vulcan cannon. There is precious little strategy - even less than Space Harrier, and often luck plays more of a part than skill. The action is split up by the occasional bonus stage - a run through a canyon blowing up anything that dares to exist in front of you. Fuelling planes and landing strips also make a regular appearance.
overview_zh: Sega 運用其「super scaler」技術打造的大型電玩熱門作品之一，要把這款遊戲移植到任何家用主機都是一項大膽的嘗試。說白了，After Burner II 是你這輩子玩過最無腦的射擊遊戲之一：就是駕駛 F-14 往畫面深處飛、瘋狂閃躲飛彈、用火神砲大開殺戒。策略性極少——甚至比 Space Harrier 還少，運氣往往比技巧更重要。動作之間穿插偶爾的獎勵關卡——穿過峽谷、炸掉任何膽敢出現在前方的東西。加油機與降落跑道也會定期出現。
comment_en: After Burner II is not the kind of game you will play for hours on end, but one you will repeatedly stick on for a quick blast, and the conversion to the PC Engine is better than you would have ever expected. The arcade has been replicated very faithfully given the limitations of the machine, and thankfully it retains the furious pace of the original. It even has some points over the Mega Drive version, like the graded horizon and scaling of the refuelling plane. The control method is just a tad fiddly, with you having to reach for the Run button to kick in the speed, but you soon get used to it, but aside from that the actual controls themselves feel a little tighter and targeting is easier than other versions, including the arcade. The main thing that lets it down is the canyon sequence, which is blocky and ugly - but this is only a bonus stage and of minor importance. Sound is average, with the great tunes from the original tainted a bit by NEC Avenue's poor drum beats, but effects are full-on and satisfying enough. There's also a bonus 3D room in which you can play around with the shapes and colours of the balls on the title screen, which is a nice touch. Definitely one of the better NEC Avenue/Sega conversions and basically damn good fun. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: After Burner II 不是那種會讓你連玩數小時的遊戲，而是那種你會偶爾拿出來快速爽一下的遊戲；而在 PC Engine 上的移植品質遠超預期。考量到主機限制，大型電玩版已被相當忠實地重現，也謝天謝地保留了原作狂飆的節奏。某些方面甚至勝過 Mega Drive 版，例如漸層地平線與加油機的縮放效果。操控方式有點小麻煩，要按 Run 鍵才能加速，但很快就能適應；撇開這點，實際操控感比其他版本（包含大型電玩版）更紮實，瞄準也更容易。最讓人失望的是峽谷橋段，畫面粗糙難看——不過這只是獎勵關卡，無傷大雅。音效方面普通，原版那些好聽的音樂被 NEC Avenue 糟糕的鼓聲拖累了點，但音效飽滿、夠爽快。還有一個加碼的 3D 房間，可以讓你在標題畫面上玩弄球的形狀與顏色，是個不錯的巧思。絕對是 NEC Avenue／Sega 移植作品中較佳的一款，基本上就是超級好玩。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en: After Burner II is an combat flight simulator released as an arcade video game by Sega in 1987. It is the second game in the After Burner series, and was released for the Sega X Board arcade system. In the game, players fly an F-14 Tomcat jet fighter, gunning down enemies while avoiding incoming fire. After Burner II came both a standard arcade cabinet and a servo actuated, sit-down motion simulator version which moved according to the motion of the plane onscreen. The cockpit would bank in the same direction the on-screen aircraft was banking. It is an updated version of After Burner, with the addition of throttle controls. It was a commercial success, becoming Japan's highest-grossing arcade game of 1988.

overview_en: The sequel to the first Cho Aniki (Super Big Brother) game, this is very Japanese in its bizarreness. It’s a shoot ‘em up, with the player taking the role of an almost nude muscle-man (Adon) or his brother (Samson) in a 2 player game. Their main weapon is a ball of energy that grows over a hole in their heads and shoots out towards any advancing enemies. Other, more powerful shots are achieved by a combination of back-forward-fire, down-up-fire etc on the pad. Through the levels you will encounter all manner of nasties out to get you, but you are aided by a woman in blue that flies around and drops power-ups conveniently for you. Also, levels vary from the standard left-to-right to vertically scrolling.
overview_zh: 本作是第一代 Cho Aniki（超兄貴）的續作，日式怪誕風格十足。這是款射擊遊戲，玩家扮演幾近全裸的肌肉男（Adon）或他的兄弟（Samson，雙人模式）。他們的主要武器是頭上洞裡長出來的能量球，會朝前方敵人發射。按照搖桿上「後-前-射」、「下-上-射」等組合指令可施展其他更強力的招式。在各關卡中會遇到各種想對你下手的怪物，但會有一位藍衣女子飛來飛去，貼心地為你丟下強化道具。關卡型態也有變化，除了一般的左向右捲動外，也有垂直捲動關卡。
comment_en: Ai - Cho Aniki is visually a very nice game - there is plenty of variety and no small amount of imaginative design gone into the twisted look of the levels. It’s quite challenging at first (as you are getting used to the control method), but gets easier the more you play, showing a decent learning curve - and overall it is great fun. It has some well drawn, often perverse, but very amusing character and enemy designs and enough scenery changes in each level with some gorgeous parallax scrolling. Bosses are very inventive and often have you laughing. Sonically, there are a few samples in game and a variety of mostly excellent music tracks that are well worth more than just a casual listen. If you like Japanese weirdness and want a challenging, but different kind of shooter then this is highly recommended. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Ai - Cho Aniki 視覺上是很棒的遊戲——變化豐富，各關卡扭曲詭異的設計絲毫不馬虎，滿滿的創意。剛開始會有點挑戰性（因為要適應操作方式），但越玩越容易上手，學習曲線相當合理——整體玩起來非常有趣。角色與敵人設計繪製精良，常常變態但十分逗趣，每一關都有豐富的場景變化和超讚的視差捲動。BOSS 創意十足，經常讓你捧腹大笑。音效方面，遊戲中有些取樣音效，以及一系列多為優秀的音樂曲目，絕對值得認真聆聽。如果你喜歡日式怪誕風格，又想找款有挑戰性但不一樣的射擊遊戲，那強烈推薦本作。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Cho Aniki (超兄貴, Chō Aniki; lit. "Super Big Brother") is a Japanese video game series originally developed by Masaya and published by NCS Corp. The first game was released in 1992 for the PC Engine system. The game's sequels and spin-offs later appeared on the Super Famicom, PlayStation, Sega Saturn, WonderSwan, PlayStation 2 and PlayStation Portable. Mainly consisting of side-scrolling shoot 'em ups in the vein of Gradius, the Cho Aniki series is best known for its homoerotic overtones, wacky humor and vivid, surreal imagery. Most of the games have never seen release outside Japan.
For various reasons, the popularity of the Cho Aniki games has endured since the series' debut. Highlights of the various games include in-game music, innovative control schemes, or sheer kitsch value. In Japan, these games are examples of baka-ge, which literally means "idiot game" whose appeal lies in its campiness.
The rights to the series are currently owned by Extreme Co., Ltd., which had obtained the rights of NCS Corp. and Masaya products and trademarks.

overview_en: It's the year 2020 and, yet again, the earth has to defend itself against evil forces. So get into your spacecraft and plug some bad guys! One of the few games available for the SuperGrafx, this gives the machine the opportunity to show what it can do with a horizontally scrolling shooter. Gameplay is fairly familiar stuff - the occasional enemy drops an item for you to collect. These can be either speed ups, weapon power increases, gun pods that follow you and can be set to attack enemy craft, or weapon types. The weapons include a forward firing laser, a green ball spread shot and diagonal laser that powers up into a handy 'loop shot' that tracks the scenery above and below.
overview_zh: 時值公元 2020 年，地球又一次要對抗邪惡勢力。所以駕駛你的太空船、給那些壞蛋一點顏色瞧瞧吧！作為 SuperGrafx 少數的遊戲之一，本作給了這台主機一個展示其橫向捲動射擊能力的機會。玩法相當熟悉——偶爾擊落的敵人會掉落道具讓你收集。這些道具可能是加速、武器強化、可跟隨你並可設定攻擊敵機的砲莢，或是各類武器。武器包含前射雷射、綠色彈球散射，以及可升級為便利「環形射擊」的斜向雷射，會沿著上下場景軌跡追蹤。
comment_en: So. A horizontal shooter on the superior hardware of the SuperGrafx...and one by none other than Hudson Soft. Surely this has to be a winner? Unfortunately not. In terms of game design the levels are bland and the graphical style wavers from rough to good to poor in places - it's very uneven - and there is so little variety: once you've seen the first screen in a level, you can be sure that's all it's got to offer. If this was on the standard PC Engine and programmed by someone other than Hudson Soft I would look upon it more kindly, but I always feel pangs of disappointment at what Aldynes could have been. It fails to make full use of the SG hardware, and gameplay falls way short of many other shoot 'em ups on the machine. One small area of joy can be found in some of the bosses however, particularly the superb transforming level 1 boss which shows promise that is otherwise not to be found in the game. If you are desperate for SuperGrafx games then try it, but just be warned that there are plenty of shooters that match or surpass it in every respect. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 那麼——SuperGrafx 這款效能更強的主機上的橫向射擊遊戲……而且還是 Hudson Soft 親自操刀的作品。這肯定是神作吧？很遺憾地，並不是。論遊戲設計，關卡乏善可陳，美術風格則在粗糙、尚可與糟糕之間擺盪——整體很不穩定——而且變化性極少：一旦你看過關卡的第一個畫面，就可以確定這關能給的大概就這些了。如果這是標準 PC Engine 上的遊戲，而且不是 Hudson Soft 做的，我對它的評價會寬容許多，但我總是為 Aldynes 本可以成為什麼樣子而感到失望。它未能充分發揮 SG 的硬體實力，玩法也遠遠不及本機上其他許多射擊遊戲。唯一的亮點是某些 BOSS，尤其是第一關精彩的變形 BOSS，展現了遊戲其他部分看不到的潛力。如果你很想要 SuperGrafx 的遊戲，那不妨試試，但要提醒你，有很多射擊遊戲在各方面都能匹敵甚至超越它。sunteam_paul
no_intro_name: Aldynes - The Misson Code for Rage Crisis (Japan) (En)
wiki_extract_en: Aldynes (オルディネス), full title Aldynes: The Misson Code for Rage Crisis, is a horizontally scrolling shooter developed by Produce! and released on February 22, 1991, for the SuperGrafx only for Japan. The game was made available on the PlayStation Network on February 16, 2011.

title_jp: エイリアンクラッシュ
overview_en: When creating a pinball game, it would have been so easy for the game designers to stick with the conventional realism of the arcades. But what Naxat chose to do is throw out all the rules and make something unique. Obviously modelled around the Alien movies, Alien Crush is the first of the new breed of pinball games, supplying elements that a real life pinball game could never match. The play area is two screens high (using a flick-screen mechanism) and is littered with creepy organic visuals, with a liberal dose of colour-cycling to make it feel very alive. The standard pinball elements are here, but there are also moving bumpers and extra targets that wander about the screen at times. There are also single-screen mini games which involve destroying floating skulls or snake-like bugs.
overview_zh: 在製作彈珠台遊戲時，遊戲設計師本可以輕鬆地沿用大型電玩那種傳統寫實風格。但 Naxat 選擇打破所有規則，創造出獨一無二的作品。顯然是以異形電影為藍本，Alien Crush 是新世代彈珠台遊戲的始祖，提供現實中彈珠台永遠無法匹敵的元素。遊戲區域高達兩個畫面（採用翻頁切換機制），遍佈詭異的有機視覺元素，並大量使用色彩循環讓整體充滿生命感。標準的彈珠台元素都在，但還有會移動的障礙物與偶爾出現的額外目標。另外還有單畫面的小遊戲，要你摧毀飄浮的骷髏或蛇形蟲子。
comment_en: Alien Crush was a major step forward in pinball games. It looks fantastic, with the table both moody and colourful at the same time, making it a joy to play. As well as a fast/slow mode to choose from, there are also two tunes available from the title screen. One tune is great, the other inoffensive and considering that you may be playing a table for a long period, it's nice to be able to change between games. In all, it's hard to fault Alien Crush. The flick-screen method  can become a tad annoying on occasion, but it's a minor flaw and doesn't really cause any unfair lost balls. Also, it would have benefitted from a few more sub-games to break up the action, as games can begin to drag if you are doing well. It may have been surpassed by the amazing Devil Crash but is still well worth obtaining. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Alien Crush 在彈珠台遊戲領域算是一大躍進。畫面表現出色，檯面既有氛圍又色彩繽紛，讓人玩得很開心。除了可選擇快速／慢速模式外，標題畫面還能選兩首不同的音樂。一首很棒、另一首不吵人，考量到你可能要在同一個檯面上玩很久，能切換曲目真的不錯。整體而言，Alien Crush 很難挑毛病。翻頁切換機制偶爾會有點煩，但只是小瑕疵，並不會造成不合理的失球。此外，若能多幾個小遊戲來調節節奏會更好，因為如果你玩得順，一場遊戲可能會拖很久。雖然本作後來被驚人的 Devil Crash 超越，但仍然非常值得入手。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Alien Crush is a 1988 pinball video game developed by Compile for the TurboGrafx-16. The game is the first installment in the Crush Pinball series, and was followed by three sequels: Devil's Crush, Jaki Crush, and Alien Crush Returns. Alien Crush was later re-released via emulation on the Virtual Console for Wii, Nintendo 3DS, and Wii U, and for PlayStation 3 through PlayStation Network.
Alien Crush garnered generally favorable reception from critics, some of which reviewed it as an import title; praise was given to the unusual and original graphical design reminiscent of the Alien films, realistic physics, accessibility towards less experienced players and playability but some felt divided regarding its audio, while the transition between the two screens and lack of variety in gameplay aside from the bonus rounds were seen as negative points. Retrospective commentary has been mostly positive.

overview_en: A vast sci-fi role-playing game. You play Shion, a young boy whose girlfriend's father killed his own. Shion must find out what possessed him to do this in an adventure that involves traditional RPG elements and space combat.
overview_zh: 一款規模龐大的科幻角色扮演遊戲。你扮演 Shion，一位年輕男孩，他女友的父親殺了他的父親。Shion 必須查明對方為何做出此事，本作冒險中融合了傳統 RPG 元素與太空戰鬥。

overview_en: Converted from Sega's arcade original, Altered Beast is a side-scrolling beat 'em up where you take the role of a warrior who has been resurrected to fight an evil sorcerer. With a setting that mixes fantasy with Greek myth, you can easily see the influence of Ray Harryhausen movies like Jason and the Argonauts and Clash of the Titans. Your quest takes you over many areas from swamps to caves, and each is populated with the denizens of evil who are all out to get you. To aid you in your fight, there are white two-headed wolves. If you destroy one of these, it releases a power orb which, when collected, boosts your muscle power. These power-ups have two initial stages, with your sprite getting beefier with each one, but once three are collected you transform into a wild and powerful beast. These beasts vary from level to level, but range from a fireball-hurling wolf to a dragon with a powerful electric shock attack. At certain stages in each level the evil sorcerer appears (no doubt looking smug about the fair maiden of yours he has captured) and if you have reached the beast-stage of power, he grows huge and transforms himself into some monstrously frightening boss creature. After you've made short work of the boss, the sorcerer's spirit strips you of your power and vanishes, leaving you to face him again in the next level.
overview_zh: 本作由 Sega 大型電玩原版移植而來，Altered Beast 是一款橫向捲動的格鬥遊戲，玩家扮演一位被復活、要與邪惡巫師對抗的戰士。融合奇幻與希臘神話的設定，你能輕易感受到雷·哈利豪森電影的影響，例如《傑森王子戰群妖》與《諸神恩仇錄》。你的旅程會穿越沼澤、洞穴等多種場景，每處都充斥著邪惡的爪牙等著襲擊你。為了協助戰鬥，場景中有白色雙頭狼。若你擊倒一隻，會釋放出力量珠，收集後能提升你的肌肉力量。這些強化初期有兩個階段，每拿一次角色精靈就會變得更壯碩，但一旦收集到第三個，你就會變身成狂野強大的野獸。野獸型態因關卡而異，從能擲出火球的狼，到具有強力電擊的龍都有。在每關特定階段，邪惡巫師會出現（大概因為抓到你心愛的少女而得意洋洋），如果你已達到野獸形態，他會變巨並轉化為某種恐怖的 BOSS 怪物。擊敗 BOSS 後，巫師的靈魂會剝奪你的力量並消失，讓你在下一關再次面對他。
comment_en: As conversions go, this is better than I would have expected. The graphics are faithfully reproduced, with no reduction in sprite size or sprite clash/flicker. Although there is no sampled speech (aside from transformation howls) the music is great, with nice renditions of the arcade originals. Although graphically less accurate than Sega's own Mega Drive conversion, it does have a few elements that the latter lacked. But what ruins the game is its difficulty - it's stupidly hard unless you put in a lot of practice. Some of the frustration of the original can be found here - it's maddening when you are getting knocked about by an enemy on top of you with no opportunity to escape - but if you take time to learn the enemy attack patterns, then there should be a minimum of shouting at the TV. Altered Beast has always been a game that some people like and some don't. If you do, then this conversion might fill the gap, but the difficulty will drive most people away and therefore it is only recommended for the die hard fans (This review applies to the HuCARD version). The CD version of Altered Beast is a curious thing. It sports one of the cheapest visual scenes you've seen, masquerading as a 'story' but consisting of enlarged graphics from the game and a few digitized images from existing artwork, all with a nicely blocky border. This holds one hope - it uses the original arcade music behind some voice overs. However, when you enter the game, the arcade music is gone to be replaced with the standard chip music straight off the card version (with the exception of the 'game over' and 'level complete' jingle). Visually there is little difference between this and the HuCard, except the colour palette has been altered slightly. There are also speech samples from the arcade which add to the authenticity a bit. But what the CD version does have is the option for 'normal' and 'hard'. Considering the card version seems to be permanently on hard, this makes the game a tad easier to play and slightly more enjoyable too as the collision detection is more generous to the player. Sure, it's an appalling waste of the CD format, but I would just put this ahead of the card version if I had to make a choice of purchase. Be warned, it only works when using a System Card v1.0. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 作為移植作品，這款比我預期的要好。圖像忠實還原，角色精靈尺寸沒有縮水、也沒有精靈衝突或閃爍。雖然沒有人聲取樣（除了變身時的吼聲），但音樂很棒，完整重現了大型電玩原版的風格。雖然圖像精度不如 Sega 自家的 Mega Drive 移植版，但本作有幾項後者沒有的元素。可是遊戲的難度毀了它——如果沒大量練習，它難得離譜。原版的某些挫折感在此重現——當你被疊在身上的敵人反覆痛毆而無從逃脫時真的會抓狂——不過如果你願意花時間學習敵人的攻擊模式，應該就能減少對電視咆哮的次數。Altered Beast 一直都是有人愛、有人不愛的那種遊戲。如果你是愛好者，這款移植或許能滿足你，但難度會把大部分人勸退，因此只推薦給死忠粉絲（本評論針對 HuCard 版本）。Altered Beast 的 CD 版是個奇妙的東西。它搭載了你看過最廉價的視覺場景之一，假裝是「劇情」，內容卻只是遊戲圖像放大加上幾張沿用既有美術的數位化圖片，邊框還特別塊狀醜陋。這倒是留了一點希望——在配音下用了原版大型電玩的音樂。但進入遊戲後，大型電玩音樂就消失了，換成直接從卡匣版搬來的標準晶片音樂（除了「game over」與「關卡過關」的提示音）。視覺上跟 HuCard 沒什麼差別，只是色盤稍有調整。另外大型電玩的語音取樣也加入了，增添了些許原味。但 CD 版提供了「normal」與「hard」兩種難度選項。考量到卡匣版似乎永遠都是困難模式，這讓遊戲稍微好玩一點，碰撞判定對玩家也較寬容。當然，這對 CD 格式來說是糟糕的浪費，但如果一定要選，我會把 CD 版排在卡匣版之前。提醒一下，本作只能在 System Card v1.0 上執行。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Altered Beast is a 2005 beat 'em up video game developed by Sega Wow and published by Sega for the PlayStation 2. The game is a reboot of the 1988 arcade game Altered Beast. While the gameplay still involves the main character transforming into different kinds of beasts like in the original, the story, characters and setting are completely different, along with notable gameplay additions. The game was released in Europe and Japan in 2005, but was cancelled for North America.
Unlike the original Altered Beast which is set in the Greco-Roman world of Ancient Greece, the game features a modern setting unconnected to the previous installments. Altered Beast follows a man called Luke Custer who is a "Genome-Cyborg", a human whose DNA and other genetic make-up has been artificially altered by micro-chips containing the genetic make-up of other creatures to transform him into an anthropomorphic beast. After surviving a helicopter crash, Luke loses his memory and sets off to learn about the truth behind his past and the Genome-Cyborgs.

title_jp: アルザディック サマーカーニバル'92
overview_en: Available at one of the yearly competitions where gamers compete against each other, Alzadick is not a full game, but a brief score-based shooter in the style of the 5-minute caravan modes in  Hudson's 'Soldier' series. The usual collect-a-weapon system applies here, and there are also story modes which are nothing more than the score attacks with a bit of background text (in Japanese) to explain what is going on.
overview_zh: Alzadick 是在某個年度遊戲玩家競賽中使用的作品，並非完整遊戲，而是一款風格類似 Hudson「Soldier」系列中 5 分鐘 Caravan 模式的短版計分制射擊遊戲。同樣採用拾取武器的系統，還有故事模式——但其實就是計分挑戰配上日文背景文字說明一下情境。
comment_en: Alzadick does what it does well. Graphics are really nice, with some cool parallax and the game plays smoothly with no apparent issues. The main problem with it is that you are only getting 2 levels. If you are a big fan of the caravan stages in other games and love to play and replay to beat your score then you would certainly enjoy Alzadick. For anyone else, you'll find yourself wanting more and wishing that it had blossomed into a full release. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Alzadick 在它能做的範圍內做得很好。圖像相當漂亮，有些很酷的視差捲動，遊戲運行流暢沒明顯問題。主要問題是你只能玩到 2 關。如果你是其他遊戲 Caravan 模式的大粉絲、喜歡反覆挑戰刷新分數，那你應該會喜歡 Alzadick。但除此之外的玩家會覺得還想要更多，希望它能發展成完整作品。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en: Alzadick is a 1992 "time attack"-style vertically scrolling shoot 'em up video game released for the NEC PC Engine CD-ROM² by Naxat.

overview_en: A scrolling beat 'em up featuring a cast of women, albeit not stereotypical cute anime gals.
overview_zh: 一款橫向捲動格鬥遊戲，登場角色都是女性，不過不是那種典型的可愛動畫女孩。

overview_en: Horror Adventure game that was never released.
overview_zh: 一款從未發售的恐怖冒險遊戲。

overview_en: If you've ever had fantasies about being a bronzed barbarian warrior like Conan, travelling the lands to defeat your foes with a swift blow from your enormous weapon, then here's your chance to make them come true. Ankoku Densetsu is a platform hack and slash game, much in the vein of Rastan. You travel through various dark and gloomy settings, chopping the heads of green maggot-spitting zombies, skeleton warriors and other denizens of the evil realms that no self respecting barbarian could ignore. There are several types of weapons to collect - the sword is standard, the axe is quite powerful but short range, and the long chain weapon is less powerful but very useful at taking out the baddies at a distance. With the relevant power capsules, each weapon can be powered up several levels to inflict more damage. You also get a pretty little fairy star that you throw out in front of you to viciously incinerate all who dare oppose your will. While there is plenty of hacking action, there is also a platform element, with you having to navigate your way up a waterfall on falling blocks, and find your way out of an area with skull platforms that drop out from beneath your feet.
overview_zh: 如果你曾幻想過自己是個像 Conan 那樣古銅色肌肉的蠻族戰士，遊歷各地、用你巨大的武器一擊擊敗敵人，那你的機會來了。Ankoku Densetsu 是款平台砍殺遊戲，風格類似 Rastan。你穿越各種陰暗幽深的場景，砍下會吐綠蛆的殭屍、骷髏戰士等邪惡國度爪牙的腦袋，這些都是任何有自尊的蠻族都不會放過的敵人。可收集的武器有好幾種——劍是標準武器，斧頭威力強但射程短，而長鎖鏈武器威力較弱但很適合遠距離對付敵人。搭配對應的能量膠囊，每種武器都可以升級好幾級以提高傷害。你還會得到一個可愛的小仙女星星，能往前方丟出，無情地將任何敢反抗你意志的敵人焚成灰燼。除了大量砍殺動作外，也有平台元素，例如你要踩著落下的方塊沿著瀑布往上爬，或從腳下會消失的骷髏平台區域中找到出路。
comment_en: This is probably the closest thing to Rastan (the original, not the awful Rastan II) that you can get on the PC Engine. Graphically, the game is a mixed bag. The general atmosphere is well crafted, with dark, gloomy scenery, although lacking in imagination. The sprites and animation are poorer than I would have hoped for. There's something not right about the shading which makes your main character in particular look a little amateurish, and the walk cycle when holding the chain weapon, for example, just looks stupid. Some of the bosses are well done though and there are a few neat touches like the parallax scrolling on one of the later levels. Audio is excellent - it sounds just like an extension of Dungeon Explorer and sets the mood very well indeed.                 With a little more work (and maybe a little more ROM on the HuCard) this could have been a stunning game. As it stands, while the visuals are variable, it still holds up as a highly enjoyable action platformer and well worth putting some time into. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 本作大概是 PC Engine 上最接近 Rastan（原版，不是糟糕的 Rastan II）的遊戲了。圖像表現有好有壞。整體氣氛營造得很好，場景陰暗幽鬱，雖然缺乏想像力。角色精靈與動畫比我期待的差。主角身上的陰影感覺不太對，讓他看起來有點業餘；例如拿著鎖鏈武器時的走路動作就傻得可以。不過有些 BOSS 做得不錯，後期關卡也有些不錯的細節，例如視差捲動。音效非常出色——聽起來就像 Dungeon Explorer 的延伸，氛圍營造得極好。如果能再多下點工夫（或許讓 HuCard 容量再大一點）這款本可以是神作。以目前的狀況而言，雖然視覺表現不穩定，但它仍是一款非常好玩的動作平台遊戲，值得花時間投入。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review

title_jp: 蒼き狼と白き牝鹿元朝秘史
overview_en: Strategy game with a Mongol flavour. You have to trample your foes in battle and balance your economy by drafting and training soldiers, arranging your government and so on until you've taken over everything in your sight. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back
overview_zh: 帶有蒙古風情的策略遊戲。你要在戰場上擊潰敵人，並透過徵兵訓練、安排政務等方式平衡經濟，直到統一你所見之一切。Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back

title_jp: あっぱれ！ゲートボール
overview_en: OK. So croquet may not be a popular idea for a video game, but the Japanese being as Japanese as they are, they went and did it anyway. So what does Appare! Gate Ball have to offer? First up is the choice between action and simulation mode. The main difference that I can make out between the two is that in action mode you have to both aim the shot and set the power, in simulation only the shot aiming is required. Your game is played out in two teams, rather than two individuals, and the members of your team are chosen from a variety of weird and crazy looking characters with varying attributes. Shots are aimed in a simple overhead viewpoint, which then switches to a standard view for the execution of the shot itself. All this is accompanied by a jolly little tune that plays away in the background.
overview_zh: 好吧，槌球或許不是電玩遊戲的熱門題材，但日本人就是這麼日本，還是把它做出來了。那麼 Appare! Gate Ball 提供了什麼？首先可選擇動作模式或模擬模式。兩者主要的差異在於動作模式下你必須同時瞄準並調整力道，而模擬模式只需要瞄準。遊戲是兩隊對抗而非個人賽，隊員從多種怪異有趣的角色中挑選，每人屬性各異。瞄準採簡單的俯視視角，接著切換到標準視角執行擊球。整個過程伴隨一首輕快的背景音樂。
comment_en: While it's competently executed, if very basic looking, the main problem with this game is that it's just dead boring. It's the kind of game that's cute and jolly and you really want to like it, but even before your first game is complete, you'll be yawning and moving in for the off switch. And on top of that, the computer controlled players are guaranteed to be frustratingly better than you are, so you end up just not caring and as such it's difficult to recommend. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 雖然製作稱職，外觀卻很陽春，這款遊戲最大的問題是單純地無聊。它就是那種可愛歡樂、你很想喜歡的遊戲，但還沒玩完第一場你就會開始打哈欠、想伸手按關機鍵。更慘的是電腦對手保證比你厲害到讓人抓狂，最後你就會不想玩了，因此這款遊戲很難推薦。sunteam_paul

overview_en: A unique piece of software for the PC Engine, Artist Tool is a graphics program that allows you to draw and print your own artwork when combined with the 'Illust Booster', 'Print Booster' and 'Photo Reader'. The interface has a rudimentary set of tools to choose from, like freehand, straight line and circle, and also a few tunes to listen to while you draw.
overview_zh: 這是 PC Engine 上一款相當獨特的軟體，Artist Tool 是一款繪圖程式，搭配「Illust Booster」、「Print Booster」與「Photo Reader」使用時，能讓你繪製並列印自己的作品。介面提供一組基本工具，例如徒手畫、直線與圓形，還有幾首可以在作畫時聆聽的背景音樂。
comment_en: Artist Tool is just far too basic to have any real use. Computers years older than the PC Engine have far more flexible and powerful graphics utilities and the limits of Artist Tool are all too readily apparent. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Artist Tool 實在太基本，幾乎沒什麼實用價值。比 PC Engine 還老的電腦都有功能更彈性、更強大的繪圖軟體，Artist Tool 的局限性一目了然。sunteam_paul

title_jp: アルナムの牙獣族十二神徒伝説
overview_en: Overhead fantasy role-playing game.
overview_zh: 俯視視角奇幻角色扮演遊戲。

title_jp: アトミックロボキッド スペシャル
overview_en: More of an explorative shooter than the standard blasting affairs, Atomic Robo-Kid Special takes all the elements from the arcade version and jiggles around with them a bit for the PC Engine. The control method takes a little getting used to - pressing button I selects from one of four weapons collected along the way, whereas holding down button I will lock you to the direction you are facing, making backing-away and firing easier. It can be fiddly at first, but it's essential that you master it. The four weapons available are variable in quality. The forward shot and diagonal shot are both only useful when you've lost the other weapons, as the missile and full-fire are the ones that you will utilise most often. The missile is particularly useful as in some levels you are required to blast away areas of wall to progress. Levels are varied - some are horizontal, some are more like mazes and there are also two types of boss area: one with a small enemy over the opposite side of the screen protected by a barrier you have to destroy, and another with a huge mechanical monster that follows you relentlessly around an arena.
overview_zh: Atomic Robo-Kid Special 比起一般純射擊遊戲更偏向探索型射擊。本作擷取大型電玩版所有元素並為 PC Engine 稍作調整。操作方式需要點時間適應——按 I 鈕從一路上收集到的四種武器中切換；按住 I 鈕則能鎖定面對方向，方便邊後退邊射擊。起初會有點彆扭，但一定要熟練。四種武器品質不一。前射與斜射武器只有在失去其他武器時才有用，飛彈與全面射擊才是你最常使用的。飛彈尤其好用，因為某些關卡需要轟破牆壁才能推進。關卡變化多端——有些是橫向捲動、有些較像迷宮，還有兩類 BOSS 區：一種是對面有個被屏障保護的小敵人，要先破壞屏障；另一種是在競技場內，一個巨大的機械怪物會緊追不放地繞著你跑。
comment_en: Atomic Robo-Kid Special is an unconventional beast as far as shooters go. Gameplay is fairly unique, there is a nice learning curve and you'll enjoy the game all the more as you work out the little tricks and tactics in certain levels. There is plenty of graphical variety and although some stage graphics are often repeated, there are many one-shot levels to give you a bit extra to look at. Speaking of the graphics, they are generally excellent, especially the enemy sprites and bosses - all beautifully drawn mecha designs that look very solid and shiny. Some backdrops are a little basic in places, but most are very pretty to look at. There is some sprite flicker on bosses, but considering their size, I think we can forgive it. Sound-wise, the game is variable. Sound effects are great but the music is a little weedy at times - although the tunes are often pretty good. I really enjoy Robo-Kid, it has a feeling of exploration as well as finger cramping shooting action and it's certainly worth sticking with until you complete it. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Atomic Robo-Kid Special 在射擊遊戲中是個不按牌理出牌的怪獸。玩法相當獨特，學習曲線不錯，當你摸清特定關卡的小技巧與戰術後會越玩越有趣。圖像變化豐富，儘管某些關卡圖像會重複使用，但也有很多一次性關卡讓你多看點新花樣。說到圖像，整體表現極佳，尤其是敵機與 BOSS 角色精靈——這些機械設計都畫得很精美，看起來紮實又有光澤。某些背景稍嫌簡陋，但大多數都賞心悅目。BOSS 戰會有一些精靈閃爍，但考量到 BOSS 體積之大，這點可以原諒。音效方面表現不一。音效很棒，但音樂偶爾有點軟——不過旋律常常不錯。我真的很喜歡 Robo-Kid，它兼具探索感與手指抽筋般的激烈射擊動作，絕對值得你一路打到破關。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en: Atomic Robo-Kid is a 1988 horizontally scrolling shooter video game developed and published by UPL for arcades. The game was published in North America in February 1989 by Nikom as its only released arcade title. The PC Engine version is an adaptation of the arcade original and published as Atomic Robo-Kid Special.

title_jp: オーロラクエスト おたくの星座 In Another World
overview_en: Foregoing the generic fantasy setting of most RPGs, Aurora Quest casts you as Otaku-chan, a man in a land controlled by a group of five women called Aurora (who would pass quite easily for a Japanese girlie band). Together with your fellow travellers, Jonjon and Nekketsu, you work your way through a humorous sci-fi story. The gameplay is very standard RPG stuff with towns containing shops, hotels and so on, and the world map throwing up random encounters every few steps. These battles are turn based with the usual mechanics of selecting your attacks and watching them play out - although you have to choose carefully, as you don't default to the next available target when one is destroyed, which will often have you shooting into thin air.
overview_zh: Aurora Quest 跳脫大多數 RPG 的一般奇幻背景，讓你扮演 Otaku-chan，一個生活在由五名女子組成的團體「Aurora」（外觀輕易會被當成日本女子偶像團體）統治之下的男人。與你的夥伴 Jonjon 和 Nekketsu 一起，你們將在帶有幽默色彩的科幻故事中冒險。玩法是非常標準的 RPG 風格，城鎮裡有商店、旅館等，在世界地圖上每走幾步就會觸發隨機戰鬥。這些戰鬥採回合制，機制也很傳統——選擇攻擊並看著它演出——不過要小心選擇，因為當目標被消滅時不會自動切換到下一個可攻擊目標，經常會白白攻擊空氣。
comment_en: If you're looking for an RPG without all the typical fantasy monsters and settings, then this is will probably fit the bill. Although, as you might expect, there is a heavy reliance on Japanese so to non-speakers the plot and humour will most likely pass you by. But the game looks fairly good, has an amusing range of baddies and the setting itself is different enough to keep your interest more than some other games of this type. Because the game is Japanese-heavy it will remain unrated, as your enjoyment will depend on how much you enjoy bluffing your way through. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 如果你在找一款沒有典型奇幻怪物與場景的 RPG，那這款或許符合你的期望。不過如你所料，本作大量依賴日文，對不懂日文的玩家來說劇情與幽默大概會完全錯過。但遊戲外觀尚可，敵人種類也有趣，設定本身也夠特別，比其他同類遊戲更能維持玩家興趣。由於本作日文負擔重，暫不評分，因為你的樂趣多寡取決於你多願意矇著玩。sunteam_paul
no_intro_name: Aurora Quest - Otaku no Seiza in Another World (Japan)

overview_en: Robot battle simulation game.
overview_zh: 機器人戰鬥模擬遊戲。

title_jp: AVポーカーワールドギャンブラー
overview_en: Unlicensed PC Engine release by Games Express. AV Poker is not a full poker simulator, but a simple gambling game. You choose from Normal, which is a standard game or Special Mode, where you travel around the world to show off your gambling skills. The poker part of the game is extremely simple. You place a bet, get a hand dealt to you, choose which cards to hold, and get a second deal to fill in the discards. If you match any of the standard poker hands, you win. You then get the options of taking the cash or playing a higher-lower game to increase your winnings significantly. Occasionally, you also get a fruit machine style mini-game which gives you the chance of winning 'special' cards that can be used during the game.
overview_zh: Games Express 發行的非授權 PC Engine 作品。AV Poker 並不是完整的撲克模擬遊戲，而是一款簡單的賭博遊戲。你可選擇 Normal（標準模式）或 Special Mode（環遊世界展示賭技的模式）。撲克部分極為簡單：下注、拿到一手牌、選擇保留哪些牌、再補發第二次牌來填補棄掉的牌。如果湊出任何標準撲克組合就贏了。之後你可以選擇拿錢走人，或玩比大小遊戲試圖大幅增加贏額。偶爾還會有水果機風格的小遊戲，可贏得能在遊戲中使用的「特別」卡。
comment_en: The problem with AV Poker is its simplicity. There are no players to play against, no bluffing, none of the usual poker thrills. It's just a case of bet, get lucky (or not) and bet again. This makes the game extremely tedious in the long run and even the added mini-games are not interesting enough to keep you playing. And of course, because this is by Games Express, there are the obligatory images of women in various stages of undress - but you will get bored long before you get that far. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: AV Poker 的問題就在於太簡單。沒有對手、沒有虛張聲勢，完全沒有一般撲克的刺激感。就只是下注、碰運氣（或沒運氣）、再下注。長期玩會極度乏味，連加入的小遊戲也不夠吸引人讓你繼續玩下去。當然，因為是 Games Express 出品，少不了女性各種裸露程度的圖片——但在看到那些畫面之前你早就膩了。sunteam_paul

overview_en: AV Tanjō is a typically Japanese 'life-sim' in the same vein as Graduation, but with more explicit adult content due to it being an unlicensed Games Express release. You get to 'manage' the lives of three pretty young girls, Kotomi, Kyoko and Suzunu. You plan their month ahead by selecting various activities like aerobics, dating, showering, relaxing etc but must be mindful of the statistics on the right hand side of the screen. Certain activities can lower some stats while raising others, so choose with care. After each month, you get a girl chosen at random and can give them something extra (like a present) to keep them happy.
overview_zh: AV Tanjō 是一款典型的日式「人生模擬」遊戲，風格類似《心跳回憶之同級生》，但由於是 Games Express 的非授權作品，內含較露骨的成人內容。你將「管理」三位漂亮女孩 Kotomi、Kyoko 與 Suzunu 的生活。你要從有氧運動、約會、洗澡、放鬆等活動中為她們規劃未來一個月的行程，同時得留意畫面右側的數值。某些活動會提升某些數值但降低其他數值，所以要慎選。每個月結束後，會隨機選一位女孩讓你送點東西（例如禮物）討她開心。
comment_en: There isn't really much depth to AV Tanjō. Choose some activities at random, watch the little animations, see a dirty picture, rinse and repeat. But of course that's the point of this, and any other Games Express title - and to give them credit, the anime pictures are well enough drawn. There's nothing overly racy to be seen (just a lot of T&A) and even forgetting this, the game can amuse you for at least the length of your first play through it, especially if you've not played something of this type before. Lack of Japanese skills don't hamper you as such, but will reduce your enjoyment as you won't really know what any of the stats mean which does reduce the gameplay to selecting anything at random just to progress. So really, if you expect a short, watered down version of Graduation with lots of gratuitous hentai shots then you won't be disappointed. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: AV Tanjō 其實沒什麼深度。隨便選些活動、看看小動畫、看張煽情圖片、反覆循環。當然這就是本作（以及 Games Express 其他作品）的目的——平心而論，這些動漫圖片畫得還算好。沒有什麼特別色情的內容（就是大量胸部與臀部），撇開這點，這款遊戲至少能在你第一輪遊玩期間娛樂你，尤其如果你以前沒玩過這類遊戲的話。不會日文不會太影響你遊玩，但會減損樂趣，因為你不懂那些數值代表什麼，玩法就會淪為隨便亂點只求推進。所以說真的，如果你期待的是一個精簡版的同級生風格遊戲加上大量的福利 H 畫面，那你不會失望。sunteam_paul
no_intro_name: AV Tanjou (Games Express) (Japan)[req. Games Express CD Card]

overview_en: Following the usual plots of this kind of game (2061...Evil government...etc) Avenger is one of the earlier shooters on CD. It's a vertically scrolling affair, with you controlling an advanced helicopter over many stages of shooting mayhem. The weapon system is slightly different from the norm; you get to choose the type of weapon at the beginning of the level (from primary, secondary and special) and this stays with you until the next level starts. During the game, you do get little power up ships that upgrade your current weapon or shield status when you blow 'em up and collect a pod. These pods cycle through the various options so timing is essential (M=primary, S=secondary, R=shield). At certain points in the game, you get to choose which stage to play next and as stages are completed, your range of weapons to choose from increases.
overview_zh: 延續這類遊戲常見的劇情（2061 年……邪惡政府……等等），Avenger 是 CD 平台上早期的射擊遊戲之一。這是款垂直捲動遊戲，你要操縱一架先進直升機穿越多個混亂射擊關卡。武器系統與一般略有不同；你可以在關卡開始時選擇武器類型（主武器、副武器與特殊武器），這些武器會陪你直到下一關開始。遊戲進行中會有小型補給機出現，擊落後撿取膠囊可升級當前武器或護盾。這些膠囊會在各選項間循環，所以時機很重要（M=主武器、S=副武器、R=護盾）。遊戲中某些節點可以選擇接下來要玩哪一關，隨著關卡完成，可選武器也會增加。
comment_en: At first glance, and first play, Avenger seems to be a pretty substandard game. For a CD based game, the graphics on the first level are simplistic and the sound effects are little more than white noise. Initially, I rated this game as typical of Telenet - a poor man's Hudson Soft if you like. But with extended play, I have found this to be a well designed and solid shooter, despite it's visual shortcomings. The weapon system works well, as a little thought is required to match the weapon to the level you are playing, and while it can be frustrating at times, at least it's not 'one hit and you're dead'. It does take a little getting used to as your ship fires diagonally as you move left and right, although holding button I locks you in position. Also, the graphics do improve as you play and there are a few really good tunes hiding among the horrible synthy-trumpets. Another point in it's favour are the gorgeous pictures you get after completing a level - they really are fantastic. So grab a friend, sit yourselves down and take turns until you've licked it - you'll be surprised how good this game is. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 乍看之下，乍玩之下，Avenger 看起來像是款品質普通的遊戲。就一款 CD 遊戲而言，第一關的圖像相當簡陋，音效也只比白噪音好一點。起初我將這款遊戲評為典型的 Telenet 作品——就是所謂「窮人版的 Hudson Soft」。但長時間遊玩後，我發現它其實是款設計紮實、穩健的射擊遊戲，儘管視覺上有所不足。武器系統運作得不錯，因為需要一點思考來搭配武器與關卡，而且就算有時候挫折感很重，至少不是「一擊必殺」。適應一下就會上手，因為你在左右移動時戰機會斜射，但按住 I 鈕可以鎖定位置。另外，隨著遊戲進行圖像會改善，那些難聽的合成小號音效中也藏著幾首超棒的曲子。另一個加分項是過關後會出現超精美的圖畫——真的很棒。找個朋友坐下來輪流玩到破關吧，你會驚訝這款遊戲有多好玩。sunteam_paul

aka: ALICE IN WONDERDREAM, ALICE IN WONDERLAND
overview_en: Obviously based on Alice in Wonderland, Fushigi no Yume no Alice is a cute and colourful platform romp. You adventure through forests, caves, castles and such, defeating the many enemies by letting out a loud scream that shoots across the screen. The scream can be powered up by holding down the button, but leave it too long and you'll get out of breath and stand there panting, defenseless for a few moments. Aside from your voice, you can also jump on enemies to dispatch them. As you progress through the stages (each with a boss at the end of course) you also gain magic powers in the form of books. By pushing RUN then selecting your power with BUTTON I, you get the chance to do such things as show hidden power-ups and become invincible for a short time.
overview_zh: 顯然取材自《愛麗絲夢遊仙境》，Fushigi no Yume no Alice 是款可愛又繽紛的平台冒險遊戲。你會在森林、洞穴、城堡等場景冒險，用能橫掃畫面的巨大尖叫聲擊敗眾多敵人。尖叫聲可以按住按鈕蓄力增強威力，但蓄太久你會喘不過氣來、站著大口呼吸幾秒鐘無法防禦。除了聲音之外，你也能跳到敵人頭上擊退他們。隨著關卡推進（當然每關都有 BOSS），你還會獲得書本形式的魔法能力。按 RUN 鍵再用 BUTTON I 選擇能力，可以做到顯示隱藏道具或短暫無敵等效果。
comment_en: Visually and sonically, Alice is nice. Bright backdrops and sprites suit the subject matter and the jolly tunes are quite adequate. However, at first the game seems hard, brutally hard. You only have 3 life points and it's very easy to lose them, and things like the ease at which you can fall off a ladder really begin to shorten your temper. After a little practice, things do improve. Learning to use your magic frequently is a good tip and makes life a bit easier. Also, once you realise that it is often better to avoid rather than engage, you will last a lot longer. However, the learning curve is still a little too steep and will most likely put people off. Even once you have gotten used to how the game plays, you will still find yourself thrown into frustration far too often, and when a continue puts you back at the start of the level you're more likely to turn the game off than persevere, especially if you're at a particularly nasty boss. It's a shame as it could have been a great little game. If you enjoy challenging platformers then by all means try it, but I will be leaving this one on the shelf. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 視覺與音效上，Alice 很不錯。明亮的背景與角色精靈符合主題，輕快的音樂也相當得體。不過一開始這遊戲看起來很難，殘酷地難。你只有 3 點生命，要丟掉它們非常容易，像是從梯子上掉下來這種事多到令人抓狂。練習一段時間後情況會改善。學會頻繁使用魔法是個好方法，讓生活輕鬆許多。此外，一旦明白通常避戰比交戰好，你就能活得更久。不過學習曲線還是太陡，大概會把人勸退。就算你已經摸熟遊戲方式，還是會常常被搞到挫折爆表，而續關時會把你送回該關開頭，你更可能會把遊戲關掉而不是繼續努力，尤其是在難纏 BOSS 前。可惜了，本可以是款優秀的小遊戲。如果你喜歡有挑戰性的平台遊戲，當然可以試試，但我會把這款留在架上。sunteam_paul

title_jp: 幻蒼大陸 オーレリア
overview_en: Fantasy role-playing game with a side-on perspective and action-based controls.
overview_zh: 側視視角的奇幻角色扮演遊戲，採用動作型操作。

title_jp: 格闘覇王伝説アルガノス
overview_en: One-on-one fighting game from the team who went on to do Asuka 120% Burning Fest. The game is split into pure battle mode and story mode.
overview_zh: 由後來製作《明日香 120% Burning Fest》團隊所做的一對一格鬥遊戲。遊戲分為純對戰模式與故事模式。

title_jp: 魔笛伝説 アストラリウス
overview_en: Fantasy based RPG. You are a flute playing hero who has to fight his way through never-ending random battles. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • CD
overview_zh: 奇幻風格的 RPG。你是位吹奏長笛的英雄，必須在源源不絕的隨機戰鬥中殺出重圍。Images Front Cover • Back Cover • CD

overview_en: A conversion of the 1992 Neo Geo game, Art of Fighting is based around two main characters - Ryo Sakazaki and Robert Garcia who set out to find Ryo's kindapped sister. Gameplay consists of standard 3 rounds one-on-one beat 'em up action with a spirit gauge that is combo charged for special attack power (think Street Fighter II's Hadōken). Every couple of stages you also get the chance to increase your stats a little by playing one of three mini games. These are fairly simple and usually involve a bit of timing or button bashing.
overview_zh: 本作是 1992 年 Neo Geo 遊戲的移植版，《龍虎之拳》的故事圍繞兩位主角——坂崎良與 Robert Garcia——他們為了尋找良被綁架的妹妹而展開旅程。玩法是標準的三回合一對一格鬥，搭配氣力槽機制，蓄滿後可施展必殺技（類似街頭霸王 II 的「波動拳」）。每過幾關還能選擇玩三個小遊戲之一，稍微提升角色能力值。這些小遊戲相當簡單，通常需要點時機或猛按按鈕。
comment_en: If you thought Street Fighter II was an ambitions project for the PC Engine, then they must have been mental when they tried Art of Fighting. Those large sprites and full screen scaling of the Neo Geo...how can the humble Engine cope with that? Well with the help of the extra power given by the Arcade Card, they actually pulled it off in quite an impressive manner. Sprites are massive, well coloured and animated, holding up very well to the original. And believe it or not, they even got the scaling in as well! OK, so it's not real scaling, but it uses a very clever technique that squashes the graphics up a bit to give that impression. The effect can be a little jarring at first, but you have to give them a lot of credit for even trying it. As this is a conversion of a pretty well-rounded beat 'em up, gameplay is solid and feels much more, how can I put it, 'proper' than games like Martial Champion. Now I've never been a big fan of one-on-one fighting games, so I admit that I do find it a bit frustrating, even on the easy setting, although no doubt beat 'em up lovers will be in their element. It does suffer in comparison to Street Fighter II in some respects - most notably variety. In Art of Fighting, you get to choose from only 2 characters and all the levels are played out in a specific order. Beat 'em ups are fairly linear by nature, and this type of game design only serves to compound the problem. However it makes up for that in other areas and your thumb will never be as sore as this in a long while. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 如果你覺得街頭霸王 II 對 PC Engine 來說已經是野心十足的計畫，那他們做《龍虎之拳》的時候一定是瘋了。Neo Geo 上那些巨大的角色精靈與全螢幕縮放特效……平凡的 PC Engine 怎麼可能應付得來？嗯，藉由 Arcade Card 提供的額外效能，他們居然以相當令人印象深刻的方式做到了。角色精靈超大、上色與動畫都不錯，跟原版比起來毫不遜色。而且信不信由你，連縮放效果都做進去了！好啦，那不是真正的縮放，而是運用了一種巧妙的技術，把圖像稍微擠壓以營造那種感覺。效果一開始看會有點跳，但光是他們願意嘗試就值得大大加分。由於本作是一款相當成熟的格鬥遊戲移植，玩起來紮實，比 Martial Champion 那種遊戲感覺更「像樣」。老實說我從來就不是很喜歡一對一格鬥遊戲，所以要承認即使在簡單難度我也覺得有點挫折，雖然格鬥遊戲愛好者肯定會如魚得水。它在某些方面比街頭霸王 II 遜色——最顯著的是變化性。在《龍虎之拳》中只有 2 名角色可選，所有關卡都依特定順序進行。格鬥遊戲本質上就偏線性，這種關卡設計只會讓問題更嚴重。不過本作在其他方面有所彌補，你的大拇指很久不會這麼酸了。sunteam_paul

overview_en: A tie-in from the 1991 movie, The Addams Family casts you as the crooked family attorney, Tully Alford, whose aim is to find his way into the Addams' family vault and claim all the treasures within. You start off outside the Addams' residence, and have to make your way into the house, avoiding the exploding golf balls that Gomez is hitting at you, as well as crossing a moat (funny, I don't remember that bit in the movie). Once inside, and after an overlong fight with Fester, you get into the house proper. Inside the house, the hallway area acts as the 'hub' of the game. There are many doors, each with a coloured jewel in them. As you progress, you obtain keys that match the jewel colours and allow you access to new rooms. The rooms vary from harmless ghost rooms to mini 'levels' or boss rooms. Included in the line-up is a room with a fast moving train, a conservatory with carnivorous plants and insects and the various rooms of the family members. In certain rooms, you can obtain jewels (points) or even power-ups that increase the shot power from your umbrella (yes, you fire bolts from your umbrella just like any decent attorney would), or transform you into a wolf-man.
overview_zh: 改編自 1991 年同名電影，《阿達一族》讓你扮演該家族的奸詐律師 Tully Alford，目標是設法進入阿達家的金庫、奪取所有寶藏。遊戲一開始你在阿達家宅邸外面，必須躲避 Gomez 打出的爆炸高爾夫球，還要越過護城河（好怪，我不記得電影裡有這段）才能進屋。進屋後，要跟 Fester 打一場拖沓的戰鬥才能真正進入屋內。進入屋內後，走廊區域是整個遊戲的「中樞」。這裡有許多門，每扇門上都有一顆彩色寶石。隨著遊戲進行，你會取得對應寶石顏色的鑰匙，就能進入新房間。房間類型多樣，從無害的鬼屋到小「關卡」或 BOSS 房都有。包含快速移動的火車房間、有食人植物與昆蟲的溫室，以及家族成員各自的房間。在某些房間中你可以取得寶石（分數）甚至強化道具，提升你雨傘的攻擊力（是的，你會用雨傘發射能量彈，就像任何稱職的律師會做的事），或是變身成狼人。
comment_en: This movie-game is exactly what I would have expected from a western company at the time. It's dreadful. The backgrounds are nothing special, the sprites are basic and unappealing and the 'music' or ambient sound is all sampled and not even played from the CD. The gameplay itself is shallow, with tedious and poorly designed attack patterns, and it just feels like there is so little of any substance here that it just isn't worth your time. While the idea of progression by unlocking doors is fairly sound, the action in the rooms is so brief that you'll be crying out for something with a lot more meat on its bones. Movie tie-ins are not known for their quality and The Addams Family reinforces the stereotype very well indeed. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 這款電影改編遊戲完全是我對當時西方公司產品的預期。很糟。背景乏善可陳、角色精靈簡陋無趣，「音樂」或環境音效全都是取樣音效，甚至不是從 CD 播放的。遊戲本身也很淺，攻擊模式設計得單調又糟糕，整體感覺沒什麼實質內容，根本不值得你花時間。雖然「解鎖房門來推進」的概念還算合理，但房間內的動作實在太短，你會渴望更有深度的內容。電影改編遊戲以低品質著稱，《阿達一族》完美地印證了這個刻板印象。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en:
The Addams Family is a 1992 action-adventure platform game based on the 1991 film of the same name. Developed and published by Ocean Software, it was released for home consoles such as the Super Nintendo Entertainment System, computers such as the Amiga, and handheld consoles such as the Game Boy.
The player assumes the role of Gomez Addams. His mission is to rescue other members of the Addams family from the clutches of Abigail Craven, who, alongside The Judge and the family attorney Tully Alford, is attempting to seize the Addams' wealth. The game is non-linear, with the player moving throughout the mansion's many inside and outside areas, some of which are hidden. Enemies include bosses each holding a member of the Addams Family hostage, making them necessary to defeat. Power-ups, extra lives, and money are also obtainable.
Ocean, a leader in the market of video game adaptations of films in the late 1980s, began development of the tie-in for The Addams Family film in April 1991, before the film switched studios from 20th Century Fox to Paramount Pictures. It was originally planned to be a puzzle game for computer consoles until Paramount requested that Ocean develop a version for the SNES. The final result was that all versions, including the computer versions, were platformers with the same storyline, setting and objective. The game was critically well-received for its graphics, sound, and music, but was widely considered to be a derivative platformer of its time.

overview_en: Extremely Japanese-heavy historical adventure game where you move around a map of the world looking at various creatures and artefects.
overview_zh: 極度依賴日文的歷史冒險遊戲，你要在世界地圖上移動，查看各種生物與文物。

title_jp: あすか120％マキシマ BURNING Fest.
overview_en: Street Fighter style beat 'em up with cute anime schoolgirls. Longplay Video from World of Longplays Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD  • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back
overview_zh: 街頭霸王風格的格鬥遊戲，以可愛動漫女高中生為主角。Longplay Video from World of Longplays Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back
wiki_extract_en: Asuka 120% (あすか120%), subtitled Burning Fest., is a Japanese bishōjo fighting video game series from FamilySoft. It is set in a school where members of school clubs fight each other in a fighting tournament. Originally released on the FM Towns home personal computer in 1994, Masatoshi Imaizumi led development with artwork provided by manga artist Aoi Nanase and music by Keishi Yonao. Fill-in-Cafe developed it and its four follow-ups: Excellent (1994) on the same platform, later remade for PlayStation in 1997; Maxima (1995) on PC Engine; Special (1996) on PlayStation; and Limited (1997) on Sega Saturn. Success then developed an additional two titles: Final (1999) on PlayStation and Return (1999) on Windows. New entries in the Asuka 120% series have been announced in the 2020s although are yet to be released.

overview_en: Sci-fi role-playing game (not connected to the anime of the same name).
overview_zh: 科幻角色扮演遊戲（與同名動畫無關）。
wiki_extract_en: Metal Gear: Ghost Babel, released in North America and Europe as Metal Gear Solid, is a 2000 action-adventure stealth game developed and published by Konami for the Game Boy Color. The game began development after Konami Computer Entertainment Japan were commissioned by Konami's European branch to develop a portable adaptation of their 1998 PlayStation game Metal Gear Solid. However, Ghost Babel is not a port of Metal Gear Solid, but instead takes place in an alternative continuity set seven years after the events of the 1987 MSX2 game Metal Gear. Tose assisted on the development. The game is set to be re-released for the first time via Metal Gear Solid: Master Collection Vol. 2 under its Japanese name.

title_jp: ベイビー・ジョー ザ・スーパーヒーロー
overview_en: Poor Baby Jo. Out in the wild, all alone and surrounded by dangerous beasties, how will he ever get home? But never fear, as you jump and dodge your way through the many outdoor perils you can pick up bottles of milk to replenish you, rattles to throw and even supernappies that can increase your speed and grant invulnerability. Gift-wrapped boxes are wantonly strewn about the landscape, but be careful as although some contain items, others contain junk that will rain down on your baby-bald head.
overview_zh: 可憐的 Baby Jo。獨自一人置身荒野，身邊全是危險的野獸，他該怎麼回家？但別擔心，你可以一邊跳躍閃避各種戶外險境，一邊撿取奶瓶補充體力、搖鈴可丟擲，甚至能用超級尿布加速並獲得無敵。景觀中也隨便散落著包裝好的禮物盒，但要小心，雖然有些裡面有道具，另一些會噴出垃圾砸在你光溜溜的寶寶頭上。
comment_en: Originating on the Commodore Amiga, Baby Jo is a fine example of why the Japanese were at the top of the gaming tree at this time. I find the graphical style extremely unappealing, particularly the grotesque titular baby, who not only looks pig ugly but also makes you want to punch him in the face after you've heard his scream for the umpteenth time. The gameplay isn't up to much either - it's hard to express in words exactly why it feels so amateurish; maybe it's the bland landscape or the notion that chucking enemies down randomly everywhere is good design. It's worlds apart from something like PC Genjin or New Adventure Island, and to add insult to injury the three (yes, only three) music tracks in the game get annoying really fast too. This game may have cut it on the Amiga where they were starved for decent cute platformers, but on the PC Engine it's just horrible. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Baby Jo 最初是 Commodore Amiga 上的作品，它完美示範了為什麼當時日本人站在遊戲界的頂端。我覺得本作的美術風格極度不討喜，尤其是那個噁心的主角寶寶——不但長得醜，聽他的尖叫聲第 N 次之後還會讓你想一拳打在他臉上。玩法也不怎麼樣——很難用言語表達為什麼感覺這麼業餘；也許是因為那乏味的場景，或是隨機把敵人到處亂丟就當成關卡設計的那種思維。跟 PC Genjin 或 New Adventure Island 根本是兩個世界，雪上加霜的是遊戲中只有三首（沒錯，只有三首）音樂，很快就讓人聽得煩躁。這款遊戲在急缺像樣可愛平台遊戲的 Amiga 上也許還行，但在 PC Engine 上就是慘不忍睹。sunteam_paul
no_intro_name: Baby Jo - The Super Hero (Micro World) (Japan)

title_jp: 爆伝アンバランスゾーン
overview_en: Weird icon controlled musical adventure game. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD
overview_zh: 一款古怪的音樂冒險遊戲，以圖示方式操作。Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD

overview_en: A 'pure' digital comic - which means it's exactly what it says it is, a digitized non-interactive manga that plays itself out with voices and sound effects. Choose one of 3 chapters and a selection of coloured tints to view the artwork in.
overview_zh: 一款「純」數位漫畫——正如其名，就是數位化的非互動式漫畫，搭配語音與音效自動播放。可選擇三個章節之一，以及幾種色調觀看作品。
no_intro_name: Bakuretsu Hunter - Duo Comic (Hudson - Media Works) (Japan)

overview_en: Comedy platformer set in various locales featuring a plethora of mini-games.
overview_zh: 喜劇平台遊戲，場景遍佈各地，內含大量小遊戲。

overview_en: Future sports games have always been a mixed bag. From a brief glance, it would seem that you are in for a decent Speedball clone, but Ballistix is very different. The main aim of the game is simply to get the ball into the opponent's goal at the top of the screen, while protecting yours. However, there is a twist. On each pitch there are certain areas that contain a sort of magnetic influence, so that the ball does not always travel in a predictable manner. On top of this, you don't just run into the ball to move it, you have to fire shot after shot of your own smaller spheres to cause rebounds. Needless to say, it can get a bit frantic. Popping up from time to time are the obligatory bonuses and specials, like an orange multiball explosion causing even more confusion than before. When you're tired of the multi-player game (2 players or 1 player vs CPU), the single player mode offers more relaxed play. Here, you are presented with a seemingly endless series of arenas and you just have to get the ball in the top goal with only the floor-based magnetic effects to disrupt things.
overview_zh: 未來運動遊戲向來有好有壞。乍看之下，你可能以為會拿到一款不錯的 Speedball 仿作，但 Ballistix 很不一樣。遊戲主要目的很簡單：把球踢進畫面頂端對手的球門，同時保護自己這邊。但有個巧思：每個場地上都有某些具磁場影響的區域，所以球不會以可預測的方式前進。加上你不是直接撞球來移動它，而是必須不斷發射自己這邊的小球製造反彈。自然地就會變得相當混亂。遊戲中還會出現固定的獎勵與特殊道具，例如橙色的多球爆發，讓整場變得更加混亂。當你厭倦多人模式（2 人或 1 人對電腦）時，單人模式提供較為輕鬆的玩法。這裡會呈現看似無止盡的一系列競技場，你只需要把球打進上方球門，場中只有地板的磁場會干擾你。
comment_en: So what's it like? Rubbish. The multi player game is little more than random button bashing with little or no skill involved and the single player levels seem really pointless - there's precious little challenge and you just get bored really fast. On top of that, the graphics are dull and the music is inconsequential so the only real use for this HuCARD is to wedge it under a table with a dodgy leg. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 那麼這款遊戲如何？很爛。多人模式不過是隨機亂按按鈕，幾乎不用技巧；單人關卡則顯得毫無意義——挑戰性微乎其微，很快就會膩。再加上圖像單調、音樂也無足輕重，所以這塊 HuCard 卡匣唯一的用途就是墊在桌腳底下穩住晃動的桌子。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en: Ballistix is a sports video game created by Martin Edmondson for the Amiga and Atari ST and published by Psyclapse in 1989. It was also converted to a number of other home computers in the same year and the PC Engine/TurboGrafx-16 console in 1991. It is a fictional futuristic sport about directing a puck to a goal by shooting small balls at it.

overview_en: Based on a manga, Bari Bari Densetsu is something of a rare breed on the Engine - a motorcycle racing game. You can pretty much guess how it works - there's a World GP mode where you have to compete in a variety of races in order and a Travel mode that let's you pick a track of your choice. Also to consider is the gubbins that make up your bike, such as tyres, engine, brakes etc as these have an effect depending on the type of course and the weather conditions. Races are started with a qualifying lap that lets you get the feel of the track, followed by the race proper. You are then placed and can hopefully move on to the next country.
overview_zh: 改編自漫畫，Bari Bari Densetsu 在 Engine 上算是稀有品種——一款摩托車競速遊戲。你大致猜得到玩法——World GP 模式下你要依序參加各種比賽，Travel 模式則讓你自行挑選賽道。另外還有構成你車輛的零件，例如輪胎、引擎、煞車等，這些會根據賽道類型與天氣狀況產生影響。比賽從一圈資格賽開始讓你熟悉賽道，接著才是正式比賽。你會被排名，順利的話就能進入下一個國家。
comment_en: Presentation in Bari Bari Densetsu is very good, with a nice little intro, attractive options screens and little effects here and there. The control method is responsive and the road is smooth even if roadside objects are a tad sparse and scaling is slightly wobbly. But despite all its niceness it does suffer from a lack of variety. The races are too long and even the changing weather conditions can't add enough to the interest factor. If there were any in-game music to listen to while you race, then perhaps it would make a difference, but all you get to listen to is the constant hum of your engine. It's a shame, as it's a very playable game, but maybe if you're a biking nutter then you'll get more out of it. For the rest of us it becomes an exercise in boredom very fast. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Bari Bari Densetsu 的呈現相當不錯，有個漂亮的小開場、吸引人的選項畫面與各種小特效。操作反應靈敏，賽道流暢，雖然路邊物件稍嫌稀疏、縮放也有點不穩。但儘管諸多優點，它還是被變化不足拖累。比賽太長，連變化的天氣條件都無法提供足夠趣味。如果比賽中能有背景音樂，也許會有所改善，但你只能聽著引擎的持續轟鳴。可惜了，因為這是款很耐玩的遊戲；或許如果你是重機狂，會有更多收穫。但對我們一般人來說，這很快就會變成無聊大考驗。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Bari Bari Densetsu (Japanese: バリバリ伝説, Hepburn: Bari Bari Densetsu; lit. 'Vroom Vroom Legend') is a Japanese motorbike racing-themed manga series written and illustrated by Shuichi Shigeno. It was serialized in Kodansha's shōnen manga magazine Weekly Shōnen Magazine from 1983 to 1991, with its chapters collected in 38 tankōbon volumes.
Earlier parts of the story focus both on high school life as well as street racing. At first the characters are illegal street racers (Japanese: hashiriya) that race on public roads, particularly on the winding mountain roads known as tōge. Those kind of racers were called "rolling-zoku", a type of bōsōzoku, and were seen as a social problem in Japan. Later parts of the story revolve around professional motorcycle racing events held on road circuits like the All Japan Road Race Championship.

overview_en: The Engine is hardly lacking in shooters, so to be successful, you have to stand out from the crowd. Barunba tries to add a hint of originality in its own subtle way. You control what is basically a floating globe (complete with little man inside) that has a weapons ring around it - this ring can be rotated right around the ship giving a fully controllable direction of fire, something obviously useful for those pesky critters approaching from behind. From the start, you are equipped with several different types of weapon, each of which can be temporarily boosted by collecting items that are dropped by exploding enemies. The levels are auto-scroll, moving around in all directions and contain mid-level as well as end-of-level bosses. Your ship has an energy bar, located at the bottom left of the screen, and once it is depleted it's 'Game Over'.
overview_zh: Engine 上射擊遊戲從不缺，要成功就得脫穎而出。Barunba 以自己的低調方式嘗試加入一點獨創性。你操縱的基本上是一顆飄浮球體（裡面還有小人），周圍有武器環——這個環可以繞著機體旋轉，讓你能完全控制射擊方向，對付從背後偷襲的討厭鬼特別有用。開場你就配備多種不同武器，每種都可以透過收集爆炸敵人掉落的道具暫時強化。關卡為自動捲動、四面八方移動，有關卡中 BOSS 與關底 BOSS。你的機體有能量條，位於畫面左下方，歸零即「遊戲結束」。
comment_en: Graphically, Barunba is OK. The backdrops are fairly well drawn, though there are some dodgy enemy sprites. But what mainly lets this game down is the lack of variety and slow pace. Levels are far too long for my liking - you'll probably get bored before you reach the end of level one - and because the limitations of HuCARD, there is little graphical change. If the action was faster or the levels were shorter (like Atomic Robo-Kid) then this would be a far better game. The lack of lives/continues only serves to make things worse. Sonically, it's pretty average too, so no extra points there. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 圖像上 Barunba 還可以。背景繪製得還算不錯，雖然有些敵機角色精靈很醜。但這款遊戲主要被變化不足與緩慢節奏拖累。關卡對我來說太長——大概你還沒到第一關結尾就已經膩了——而且因為 HuCard 的容量限制，圖像變化極少。如果動作能更快或關卡縮短（像 Atomic Robo-Kid 那樣），這會是款好多了的遊戲。命數／續關次數少也讓情況更糟。音效也普通，沒多少加分。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Barunba is a shoot 'em up video game released in 1990 by Namco for the NEC PC Engine console and the MSX2 computer line.
It received positive reviews from European gaming magazines at the time, with Aktueller Software Markt and Joystick noting its similarity to Mr. Heli and praising its gameplay and graphics.

overview_en: Overhead RPG with action combat events.
overview_zh: 俯視視角 RPG，含動作型戰鬥事件。

overview_en: With all the hype surrounding the movie, it was inevitable that tie-in games would pop up on virtually every format. But while you would most likely expect a straightforward action platformer, Sunsoft have decided to go down an altogether different path for the PC Engine incarnation. When you boil it down to the basics, Batman is essentially an evolutionary step on from Pac Man. The gameplay is maze-based and is split into several different locations, each with 12 small to medium sized stages. These stages are inhabited by the Joker's minions - most of which wander aimlessly around waiting to be clobbered, but some of which rush around, fire weapons or home in on you with alarming speed. You start off walking very slowly, with a short range baterang, but as you progress, power-up icons will give you more speed, a longer range and multiple shots. Each location has a different type of objective - collecting the Joker's chemically-altered cosmetics, laying bombs, cleaning paintings in the museum etc., although basically the only differences are graphical. Once every item has been collected/cleaned/whatever, the stage ends and it's on to the next one. Lose all your lives and you get the choice to continue, or end the game and receive a password. Passwords are essential as the game is far too long to finish in one sitting.
overview_zh: 隨著電影的大肆宣傳，改編遊戲幾乎必然會出現在各種平台上。但當你可能期待一款直線型動作平台遊戲時，Sunsoft 決定為 PC Engine 版選擇完全不同的路線。說穿了，本作 Batman 基本上是小精靈（Pac Man）的進化版。玩法是迷宮式的，分為好幾個不同地點，每個地點有 12 個中小型關卡。這些關卡裡有小丑的手下——大多數漫無目的地遊蕩等著被揍，但有些會衝向你、開火攻擊或以驚人速度追蹤你。你一開始走得很慢，只有短射程蝙蝠鏢，但隨著進度強化道具會給你速度、更長射程和多重射擊。每個地點有不同目標——收集小丑被化學污染的化妝品、放置炸彈、在博物館清理畫作等，不過其實只是圖像上的差異而已。一旦所有物品都被收集／清理／完成，該關就結束，繼續下一關。命沒了可選擇續關或結束遊戲並接收密碼。密碼必備，因為遊戲太長無法一次玩完。
comment_en: Batman is a pretty fun game. Although the repetitive nature of the gameplay can drag it down a little, it is still fun to play and a treat for the eyes and ears. Graphics are well drawn - suitably dark and moody, and of special note are the animated sequences every 12 levels - they are very impressive for a HuCard game. The sound is great as well - the excellent use of samples gives the sound a unique quality and the growly chip sound makes great use of the Engine's sonic capabilities. It's not exactly a difficult game if you keep your wits about you, but the length of it makes up for that. It was bold for Sunsoft to try something different with such a major license, but it works well enough and is a refreshing change from the norm. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: Batman 是款相當好玩的遊戲。雖然重複性強的玩法稍微拖累整體，但它仍然好玩，而且是視聽上的享受。圖像繪製精良——適當的陰暗沉鬱氛圍，每 12 關一次的動畫場景格外值得一提，以 HuCard 遊戲來說相當驚艷。音效也很棒——精彩的取樣音效帶來獨特音色，低沉的晶片音也充分發揮了 Engine 的聲音能力。如果你保持警覺，遊戲其實不算難，但遊戲長度彌補了這點。Sunsoft 為這麼重要的授權嘗試不同路線相當大膽，但效果不錯，也是對常規的新鮮改變。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
