wiki_extract_en: Batman: The Video Game is a platformer developed by Sunsoft for the Nintendo Entertainment System featuring the DC Comics character Batman, tying into the 1989 film of the same name.

overview_en: Taking a fair amount of inspiration from Sega's After Burner II, Battle Ace is a sci-fi based cockpit shooter. Gameplay is purely arcade style, with a standard machine gun and lock-on missiles to take down the enemy aggressors. There's little more to it than that.
overview_zh: Battle Ace 從 Sega 的 After Burner II 獲得相當靈感，是款科幻主題的駕駛艙射擊遊戲。玩法純大型電玩風格，有標準機槍與鎖定飛彈能擊落敵機。大概就這樣。
comment_en: The main problem with Battle Ace is that it's rubbish! While I've not got anything against the genre - I love After Burner, and Space Harrier is my all time favourite arcade game - but anyone buying this with their brand new Supergrafx must have wondered what made them waste their hard earned cash. The gameplay is mind-numbingly repetitive without being enjoyable, the graphics are extremely bland - you rarely see the enemy ships as anything bigger than a few dots as you've either destroyed them or they've gone whizzing off. Also, the levels are overly long and while the music is quite racy, it's not catchy or technically good enough to relieve the monotony. Quite how a company like Hudson had the nerve to release this trash is beyond me. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Battle Ace 最大的問題就是——它很爛！雖然我對這類遊戲並無意見——我愛 After Burner，Space Harrier 也是我史上最愛的大型電玩——但任何買了全新 SuperGrafx 又買了這款遊戲的人，肯定會納悶自己怎麼把辛苦錢浪費在這上面。玩法重複到讓人腦袋發麻又不好玩，圖像極度平淡——你很少能看到超過幾個點的大小的敵機，不是已經被擊落就是咻的飛走了。此外關卡太長，雖然音樂還算熱血，但既不朗朗上口、技術上也不夠好以緩解單調。Hudson 這樣的公司竟敢發行這種垃圾，實在令人費解。sunteam_paul

title_jp: バトルロードランナー
overview_en: Once an ancient arcade game, and with a previous version on the PC Engine by Pack In Video, Hudson Soft have taken the addictive gameplay of Lode Runner and given the graphics a complete face lift. The puzzle-based action in Lode Runner is simple: You are presented with a side-view platforms-and-ladders based level and you have to collect all the gold and escape without getting caught by the baddies. To defend yourself, you can dig holes in the ground, either to the left or to the right, and enemies stumbling upon them will fall down and be trapped. If you time it right, the hole will re-fill before the enemy can climb out, forcing them to respawn elsewhere in the level. If you prefer evasive action, make sure the coast is clear so you can escape up a ladder or across a well-placed rope, but be warned - they will follow! Once you have collected all the gold, hotfoot it to the nearest long ladder and escape out the top of the screen. In magazine previews, this was originally titled Lode Runner II.
overview_zh: Lode Runner 原本是古老的大型電玩遊戲，先前也曾由 Pack In Video 在 PC Engine 上出過版本，這次 Hudson Soft 採用它令人上癮的玩法並為圖像徹底改頭換面。Lode Runner 的解謎玩法很簡單：畫面呈現側視的平台與梯子關卡，你要收集所有金塊並在不被壞人抓到的情況下逃脫。為了自衛你可以往左或往右挖洞，踩進洞的敵人會掉進去被困住。如果你時間抓得準，洞會在敵人爬出來之前被填滿，迫使他們在關卡其他處重生。如果你偏好逃跑，確保四周安全後從梯子往上逃或走過放得好的繩子，但要注意——他們會追來！收集完所有金塊後，趕快衝到最近的長梯子，從畫面頂端逃出。在雜誌預覽中，本作原本標題為 Lode Runner II。
comment_en: Battle Lode Runner is a surprisingly addictive and fun game. Each level presents some sort of mental challenge as well as testing your reflexes, as you have to be careful not to trap yourself in corners or fall down a badly placed hole. The graphics are well drawn, colourful and cute and the sound is jolly, and there are several play options to choose from. It seems obvious that Hudson have set this up to gain the popularity of their Bomber Man series (the title screen even has the black Bomber Man shooting off in a rocket) and I feel that it easily matches it in quality and fun. As well as the standard puzzle mode, there is also a 4-player battle mode, escape mode, the choice to select any level and even a map editor. So even with a solid single player game, you get the bonus of some frantic multi-player action. Don't overlook this game as second grade to Bomber Man because you will be missing out on an addictive little action/puzzler. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Battle Lode Runner 是款出乎意料地上癮又有趣的遊戲。每個關卡都帶來某種腦力挑戰，也考驗你的反應，因為你必須小心別把自己困在角落或掉進放錯位置的洞裡。圖像繪製精良，色彩繽紛又可愛，音樂歡快，還有多種遊玩選項可選。Hudson 顯然想沾自家 Bomber Man 系列的熱度來推這款（標題畫面甚至有黑色 Bomber Man 乘火箭飛走），我覺得它的品質與樂趣輕易可與之匹敵。除了標準解謎模式外，還有 4 人對戰模式、逃脫模式、任意關卡選擇，甚至地圖編輯器。所以在紮實的單人遊戲之外，還附帶刺激的多人動作。別把這款遊戲當成比 Bomber Man 低一等而忽視它，否則你會錯過一款上癮的動作解謎佳作。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Lode Runner is a puzzle-platform game developed by Doug Smith and published by Broderbund in 1983. Its gameplay mechanics are similar to Space Panic from 1980. The player controls a character who must collect all the gold pieces in a level and reach the end while being chased by a number of enemies. It is one of the first games to include a level editor.
After the original game, a number of remakes, spinoffs, and sequels were published in the Lode Runner series for different computers and consoles by different developers and publishers. Tozai Games holds the copyright and trademark rights.

overview_en: US made wrestling game which allows up to five players to compete against each other. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 美國製作的摔角遊戲，最多可讓五位玩家相互對抗。Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en:
A battle royale game is an online multiplayer video game genre that blends last-man-standing gameplay with the survival, exploration, and scavenging elements of a survival game. Battle royale games involve dozens to hundreds of players, who start with minimal equipment and then must eliminate all other opponents while avoiding being trapped outside a shrinking "safe area", with the winner being the last player or team alive.
The name for the genre is taken from the 2000 Japanese film Battle Royale, itself based on the novel of the same name, which presents a similar theme of a last-man-standing competition in a shrinking play zone. The genre's origins arose from mods for large-scale online survival games like Minecraft and Arma 2 in the early 2010s. By the end of the decade, the genre became a cultural phenomenon, with standalone games such as PUBG: Battlegrounds (2017), Fortnite Battle Royale (2017), Apex Legends (2019) and Call of Duty: Warzone (2020) each having received tens of millions of players within months of their releases.

title_en: BAZAR DE GOZARRE NO GAME DE GOZARRE
title_jp: バザールでござーるのゲームでござーる
overview_en: Puzzle game featuring a monkey hero.
overview_zh: 以猴子為主角的益智遊戲。
no_intro_name: Bazar de Gozarre no Game de Gozarre (Japan)

overview_en: Be Ball is an action/puzzle game in which you have to roll coloured globes around the play area and deposit them on their relevant coloured squares. Once all balls are in place it's on to the next level. Easy, right? Well, maybe not, as there is all manner of wildlife out to put paid to your spherical antics, from hedgehogs to monkeys and penguins. Luckily, the balls themselves do have a use - give them a swift kick and they'll get rid of any creature barring your way. And if you are persistent, you can even whack down walls. Also, be on the lookout for various items scattered around that aid you in your task, like time-stops, smart bombs etc.
overview_zh: Be Ball 是款動作解謎遊戲，你必須在場地上滾動彩色球體，把它們放到對應顏色的方格上。所有球就位後就可以進入下一關。簡單吧？嗯，或許沒那麼簡單，因為會有各種野生動物來阻撓你的球體行動，從刺蝟到猴子和企鵝都有。幸運的是，球本身就有用——給它們一個大力踢擊就能清掉擋路的生物。夠持之以恆的話甚至可以把牆打掉。另外要留意場上散落的各種道具幫助你完成任務，例如時間停止、智慧炸彈等。
comment_en: While the presentation of Be Ball is appealing - large, well drawn sprites and some cute music tracks to hum along to, the game suffers from the repetitive level design which restricts you to a single non-scrolling map. The concept works fairly well and is fun for a while, but you really need to take this game in small doses to avoid boredom setting in. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 雖然 Be Ball 的呈現很討喜——精靈大又繪製精良，加上幾首可哼唱的可愛音樂——但本作因關卡設計單調受限於不捲動的單一地圖。概念還算成功，玩一陣子很有趣，但真的得少量多次玩以免無聊襲來。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review

overview_en: Set in a sort of old Japan with fantasy overtones, Benkei Gaiden is a standard overhead RPG. Battle scenes are random and turn based (with quite a nice bit of music), and the game relies very heavily on Japanese text based menu systems. This game is unrated due to reliance on Japanese text.
overview_zh: 設定在帶有奇幻色彩的古日本，Benkei Gaiden 是款標準俯視 RPG。戰鬥畫面為隨機觸發、回合制（音樂還蠻好聽的），遊戲非常依賴日文文字選單系統。本作因高度依賴日文故不予評分。

overview_en: More than just a fortification of stone, Castle Shadowgate in the land of Kaltorin holds great mystical power.  In times past, the Warlock Lord used that power to summon a demon in an attempt rule the world.  Ultimately he was defeated by a young hero who became the first in the Line of Kings to watch over Shadowgate and guard its secrets. Prince Erik, a long descendant of the original hero, has been world traveling and expanding his mind for the day when he will ascend the throne.  In his 18th year, he receives word that his father, King Aaron has been assassinated. Returning home, he is briefly reunited with his sister Elizabeth before Balazar, the King's advisor has him arrested.  Balazar's men captured the assassin who claimed it was Prince Erik who hired him. Erik must escape prison to protect his sister and solve his father's murder..
overview_zh: Kaltorin 國度中的 Shadowgate 城堡不僅是石造工事，更蘊含強大的神祕力量。昔日暗黑魔王曾利用這股力量召喚惡魔試圖統治世界。最終他被一位年輕英雄擊敗，那位英雄也成為守護 Shadowgate 及其祕密的首位國王傳承。Erik 王子是這位最初英雄的遠房後裔，一直在環遊世界、充實自己，準備未來登基那天。在他 18 歲那年，他得知父王 Aaron 遇刺身亡的消息。返回故鄉後，他短暫與妹妹 Elizabeth 相聚，隨即被國王顧問 Balazar 逮捕。Balazar 的人抓到了刺客，刺客聲稱是 Erik 王子雇用他的。Erik 必須逃出監獄保護妹妹，並破解父王遇害之謎。
comment_en: SAVE YOUR GAME!  Never make a new move in this game without first saving it.  There are more ways to die than to live.  You are going to die often, there's no two ways about it. Now that's out of the way, let me just say this game is a good time.  ICOM spent a lot of effort hand painting tons of different environments to explore.  It really takes you on an adventure the likes of which weren't found on 16-bit consoles.  I prejudge games based on the company that makes them, and I never liked ICOM, but they got it right with Beyond Shadwogate and ShapeShifter. Beyond Shadowgate mixes point-and-click with sidescrolling action.  For puzzles, you have a command screen for look, use, talk and an inventory screen for the things you pick up.  On top of this, you can also duck and punch so you'll have to do some button mashing as well as sitting and thinking. All characters have multiple frames of animation, so it is fun to interact.  There are multiple things you can do which affect gameplay.  Experimenting to see what all you can do will reveal secrets, or new ways to die.  For example, if you save an old woman who was yelling for help, she will sit you down and show you her family album.  She'll keep yakking until you die of old age.  Did I mention SAVE OFTEN? Graphically this game is awesome.  It puts the PC Engine's color palette to the test pulling of stuff that the Genesis or SNES couldn't have.  The sheer number of different environments is enough to keep you moving, just to see where you'll end up next.  The one drawback though is the use of “dither”.  To get more gradients, dither alternates two colors in a pattern and it makes things look very grainy. ICOM did a good job with audio here too.  The midi orchestrations are well done, and there are lots of ambient or atmospheric audio tracks to set the mood.  Most characters have spoken dialogue, which is done quite well.  However, the voice of the hero is the same guy who voiced Lycos in Shapeshifter and it's just a poor choice for a leading role. Like Loom, think of this as an interactive story.  Unlike Loom where you can never die, in this game, it is hard to live.  If you can get past that little frustration, it is a treat all Engine lovers should try. W. Eric Myers Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 存檔！在這款遊戲中做任何新動作前務必先存檔。死法比活法多太多了。你絕對會死很多次，沒有第二種可能。講完這個之後，我要說這款遊戲相當好玩。ICOM 投入大量心力手繪了大量不同場景供玩家探索。它真的帶你踏上一場 16 位元主機上找不到的冒險。我會因製作公司而預判遊戲，而我一直不喜歡 ICOM，但他們在 Beyond Shadowgate 與 ShapeShifter 做對了。Beyond Shadowgate 將點擊式操作與橫向捲動動作融合。解謎上有查看、使用、交談的指令畫面，以及撿拾物品的物品欄。除此之外，你還能蹲下和揮拳，所以得一邊猛按按鈕一邊動腦。每個角色都有多格動畫，互動起來很有趣。你能做的事會影響遊戲進程，實驗看看能做什麼會揭露祕密，或發現新死法。舉例來說，如果你救了一位呼救的老婦人，她會讓你坐下看她家的相簿。她會一直碎念到你老死為止。我有提過要常存檔嗎？圖像上本作非常精彩，它將 PC Engine 的色盤發揮到極致，做出 Genesis 或 SNES 做不到的東西。不同場景數量之多足以讓你持續前進，單純想看接下來會到哪。唯一的缺點是使用了「dither」抖色。為了呈現更多漸層，dither 會交替兩種顏色成圖案，讓畫面看起來很顆粒感。ICOM 在音效上也做得很好。MIDI 編曲完成度高，還有大量氛圍或環境音軌營造氣氛。大多角色有語音對白，表現相當出色。不過主角的配音跟 Shapeshifter 中 Lycos 的配音員是同一人，用在主角身上實在不適合。像 Loom 一樣，請把這想成一個互動故事。跟永不會死的 Loom 不同，這款遊戲中要活下來很難。如果你能克服那點小挫折，所有 Engine 愛好者都該試試這款佳作。W. Eric Myers Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en:
Beyond Shadowgate is a TurboGrafx CD sequel to the 1987 Mac and MacVenture game Shadowgate. Unlike its predecessor, Beyond Shadowgate is a classical point-and-click adventure viewed from a platform perspective. 
A 14 by 19 inch poster by veteran role-playing game artist Jim Holloway, who also created the game's opening and closing animation sequences, was folded inside the jewel case for the game.

overview_en: Based on a manga/anime character, Bikkuri Man Daijikai is less a game, more an encyclopedia of information. You start off with a map screen, and upon selecting the first location, you are presented with the standard information screen which consists of an image, character information (all in Japanese of course), a book to flick to the next image and a couple of other options. Clicking on the image or on its icon beneath it can bring up more characters to look at, and sometimes clicking on a part of the image brings up a description of that part. At various times a quiz screen will appear and you'll have to answer a question to proceed. As you progress, the amulet on the right will gradually build up and selecting this takes you to another screen with bonus pictures.
overview_zh: 改編自漫畫／動畫角色，Bikkuri Man Daijikai 與其說是遊戲，更像是資訊百科全書。你從地圖畫面開始，選擇第一個地點後會呈現標準資訊畫面，包含一張圖像、角色資訊（當然都是日文）、可翻至下一張圖的書本，以及幾個其他選項。點擊圖像或下方的圖示會呼叫更多角色可看，有時點擊圖像的某個部分會顯示該部分的描述。不時會出現問答畫面，要答對問題才能繼續。隨著進度推進，右側的護身符會逐漸累積，選擇它會帶你進入另一個有獎勵圖片的畫面。
comment_en: It is impossible to fairly review this game, as it is utterly reliant on the ability to read fluent Japanese and, I would think, a familiarity with what Bikkuri Man is all about. For non-Japanese speakers it is merely a curiosity with some funny pictures to look at. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 要公平評論本作非常困難，因為它完全仰賴流暢閱讀日文的能力，我想也需要對 Bikkuri Man 本身有一定認識。對不懂日文的人來說，這就只是有趣圖片可看的獵奇物罷了。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Despite being Hudson’s Vol.2, this was in fact released almost a month before The Kung Fu. It’s a conversion of what most people know as Wonder Boy in Monster Land, and it’s as perfect a conversion as you’re likely to get. This game takes a different pace from the first Wonder Boy game, being more of an adventure with a slower pace and more strategy. You start the game with barely a thread on and are given a sword by some wise looking dude who lives in a tree - so far so good. It is then your task to travel through the various platform-based levels defeating monsters and evil bosses along the way. Each enemy you kill leaves behind a coin or money bag (these are also at various hidden locations if you jump at the right spot) and shops will offer you armour, shields, weaponry and go-faster shoes. You can also pop into a bar and top up your energy if you can afford it. Levels are time limited (shown by an egg-timer on the left) so you need to be quick, or energy is taken away from your heart meter.
overview_zh: 儘管本作是 Hudson 的 Vol.2，實際上比 The Kung Fu 早將近一個月發售。這是一款移植自大多數人熟知的 Wonder Boy in Monster Land 的作品，移植品質幾乎完美。本作節奏與第一代 Wonder Boy 不同，更偏向冒險，節奏較慢、策略性更高。遊戲開始時你幾乎一絲不掛，一位看起來很有智慧、住在樹裡的傢伙會給你一把劍——到此為止都不錯。接著你的任務是穿越各種平台關卡，擊敗沿途的怪物與邪惡 BOSS。每個被你殺掉的敵人會留下硬幣或錢袋（也有些藏在特定點只要跳對位置），商店會提供護甲、盾牌、武器與加速鞋。你也可以進酒吧付費補充體力。關卡有時間限制（以左側沙漏顯示），所以要加快腳步，否則愛心條會扣血。
comment_en: As mentioned, this is an extremely accurate conversion from the arcade - the sound in particular is spot on and the music has not been changed like it was in the Master System version of the game. Bikkuri Man World is pretty good fun, but it does have its limitations - the basic look may put some people off, sometimes the bosses can be frustrating and there are points in the game where it would be very advantageous to be able to understand the Japanese text. However, it has a little more depth than your standard arcade-style platformer and will take some time to beat it. Graphics are simple, but well drawn for the most part and there is some good music, with one track in particular (caves) that I think is great. As one of the early Hudson games, it really is essential for collectors. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 如前所述，這是從大型電玩極精準的移植——音效尤其到位，音樂沒像 Master System 版本那樣被改掉。Bikkuri Man World 相當好玩，但也有局限——簡樸的外觀可能讓某些人卻步，某些 BOSS 會讓人挫折，遊戲中有些地方若能看懂日文會相當有利。不過它比一般大型電玩平台遊戲稍有深度，會花你點時間才能破關。圖像簡樸但大部分繪製得不錯，也有不錯的音樂，其中一首（洞穴）我覺得超棒。作為 Hudson 的早期作品，收藏家必備。sunteam_paul

title_jp: 美少女雀士 アイドルパイ
overview_en: Unofficial mahjong game with an anime/adult theme.
overview_zh: 非官方的麻將遊戲，帶有動漫／成人主題。

title_jp: ブラックホールアサルト
overview_en: Black Hole Assault puts you in charge of a selection of massive mecha that scrap each other in various locations in space or on distant planets. The gameplay is standard punch, kick, jump that you would expect from a game of this genre.
overview_zh: Black Hole Assault 讓你操縱一系列巨型機甲，在太空各處或遙遠星球上互相對戰。玩法是這類遊戲中你預期會有的標準拳、腳、跳。
wiki_extract_en: Black Hole Assault is a 1992 fighting video game developed and published by Micronet for the Sega CD. It was released in Japan by Micronet, in North America by Bignet USA (Micronet's North American division) as a launch title for the system and in PAL territories by Sega. The game is the sequel to Micronet's Heavy Nova.

overview_en: Puzzle games. Don't you just love 'em? Classics like Tetris, Puzzle Bobble, Klax....and then there's Blodia. The concept behind Blodia is very simple: 1-You have a screen of pipe-work. 2-There is a ball travelling down the pipe. 3-If the ball drops down a gap in the pipe you have to start again. That's it. So what this all amounts to is you frantically sliding the tiles around block-puzzle style to keep that cursed ball bearing on track. God forbid that you think the ball is moving too slowly, you can even push a button to speed the damn thing up, but you have to wonder why you would ever want to do that.
overview_zh: 益智遊戲，誰不愛呢？經典如俄羅斯方塊、Puzzle Bobble、Klax……然後就是 Blodia。Blodia 的概念非常簡單：1 - 畫面上有一堆管線。2 - 有顆球沿著管線前進。3 - 如果球掉進管線的縫隙，就得重來。就這樣。所以結果就是你要像滑塊拼圖那樣瘋狂滑動磚塊，讓那顆該死的滾珠保持在軌道上。上帝保佑你若覺得球滾得太慢，甚至可以按鈕加速那該死的東西，但你會納悶自己到底為什麼想這麼做。
comment_en: It's hard for me to write an impartial review for Blodia, as this type of puzzle game drives me insane. It is frustrating beyond belief and I would probably damage something if I had to play it for a long period of time. Technically it's fine. Graphics are not great, but there's not much scope for eye candy here, and the music is surprisingly calm and easy to listen to. This is the kind of game where you have to think and plan ahead very fast - sort of like playing chess with a five second time limit to each move. If you are the kind of person who enjoys this sort of thing, then you will probably like Blodia. But if you are like me then you will hate it with a passion and should avoid it like the plague. Tetris I can handle. Blodia I can't. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 要我為 Blodia 寫中立評論很難，因為這類解謎遊戲會把我逼瘋。挫折感破表，若得長時間玩我大概會摔東西。技術面上沒問題。圖像不算出色，但這種遊戲也沒什麼發揮空間，音樂倒是出乎意料地平靜悅耳。這種遊戲要你快速思考與預先規劃——有點像一步只能思考五秒的西洋棋。如果你是喜歡這類遊戲的人，大概會喜歡 Blodia。但如果你像我一樣，就會對它深惡痛絕，該像躲瘟疫一樣躲開。俄羅斯方塊我能應付，Blodia 我不行。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review

overview_en: Sci-fi mecha based role playing game that uses arcade style side-on levels.
overview_zh: 以科幻機甲為主題的角色扮演遊戲，採用大型電玩風格的側視關卡。

overview_en: Based on a TV anime series (from the grandfather of manga Osamu Tezuka), Blue Blink is a cute platformer that manages to find its place among the crowd. The game is divided up into different areas, each represented by a map screen. Within these areas, you can choose your route to the end (by exiting levels at certain points). Throughout each area you have to find a 'master key' allowing you access to the boss - this can be hard to locate at times and requires lots of shooting at blank areas of screen just in case. Control of your character is original - on each stage you have three characters which you can choose between, with the CPU controlled ones following behind you like some bizarre congo line. The characters are preset and vary from stage to stage, and each one has different attributes. For example, some have very high jumping ability, whereas others are poor at jumping but have spread-shot weapons. Once you have found the master key and reached the final level in the area, you are entered into a boss battle, where you sit astride the titular donkey and attempt to fight your way to the next area.
overview_zh: 改編自電視動畫系列（出自漫畫之神手塚治虫），Blue Blink 是款可愛的平台遊戲，在眾多同類作品中找到了自己的位置。遊戲分為不同區域，每個區域以地圖畫面代表。在這些區域中，你可以選擇通往終點的路線（從特定點離開關卡）。每個區域裡你得找到「主鑰」才能進入 BOSS 戰——這有時相當難找，需要對空白畫面區域不斷射擊以防萬一。角色操控也很獨特——每個關卡你有三名角色可以切換，電腦控制的角色會跟在你後面像奇怪的康加舞隊伍。角色固定且各關卡不同，每個角色屬性各異。例如有些跳躍力極高，有些跳躍能力差但具備散射武器。找到主鑰並到達區域內最後一關後，你會進入 BOSS 戰，騎上標題中的那頭驢子，試圖打進下一區。
comment_en: Although Blue Blink could hardly be described as a 'relentless heart-pounding action game' somehow it's just really appealing. The pace is quite subdued, making it a pretty laid back game to play at times. Graphically, it is very pretty. A slightly higher resolution has been used, and along with a choice of the Engine's better colours it really looks lovely. Sound also reflects this as it's tinkly and light, but has a quality above the usual chip sound that you find in games. The best word to describe this game is 'pleasant'. You won't be addicted to it for hours, but I doubt that you could be disappointed by it either - it's just too sweet. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 雖然 Blue Blink 稱不上是「緊張刺激的心跳動作遊戲」，但它就是有種吸引力。節奏相當平和，有時玩起來很輕鬆。圖像上很漂亮。使用了稍高的解析度，搭配 Engine 較鮮豔的配色，看起來真的很美。音效也反映了這點，叮叮噹噹的輕快感，品質超越一般遊戲的晶片音。最能形容這款遊戲的字眼是「愉悅」。它不會讓你上癮數小時，但我也不認為會有人失望——就是太甜美了。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Overhead role-playing game that was never released.
overview_zh: 俯視視角角色扮演遊戲，從未發售。

overview_en: Taking a break from the typical fantasy style, Blunders is a cyberpunk, sci-fi role playing game. Gameplay is from the stardard overhead viewpoint and battle scenes are turn based and random. This game is unreleased. Images Preview from PC Engine Fan magazine May 1992 Page 1 • Page 2 Preview from IGS flyer
overview_zh: 跳脫典型奇幻風格，Blunders 是款賽博龐克科幻角色扮演遊戲。玩法採標準俯視視角，戰鬥為回合制、隨機觸發。本作未發售。Images Preview from PC Engine Fan magazine May 1992 Page 1 • Page 2 Preview from IGS flyer

overview_en: From the title you may well be forgiven for thinking this is a wrestling game, but oh no...far from it. It is, in fact a slightly pervy RPG that is one of the Engine's  'unofficial' titles. The game starts off in a castle, typical fantasy style, and after chatting with the various inhabitants, you leave and get to wander around the surrounding area. Random battles ensue, but with a difference. Instead of foul monsters attacking, they seem to be all cute girls. While this makes for quite a surreal experience, is it really as interesting as it sounds?
overview_zh: 從標題你可能會以為這是款摔角遊戲，但並非如此——差得遠了。它其實是款略帶變態的 RPG，屬於 Engine 的「非官方」作品之一。遊戲從一座典型奇幻風格的城堡開始，與各種居民交談後，你會離開並在周邊區域遊蕩。會有隨機戰鬥出現，但有點不同。不是噁心怪物來攻擊，而是一群可愛的女孩。雖然這帶來相當超現實的體驗，但真的有聽起來這麼有趣嗎？
comment_en: Graphics range from very poor and chunky to some reasonable backdrops in pictures for battle scenes. There is some appalling movement, as when you reach the edge of a map, the scrolling stops and your character jerks around like in some old ZX81 game. Sound is average at best and you'll get bored pretty quickly. None of this is helped by the storyline and options being in Japanese of course. Like most Games Express games, avoid this one. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 圖像從非常差且塊狀，到戰鬥畫面圖片中還算不錯的背景都有。移動表現糟糕，當你到達地圖邊緣時捲動停止，角色像早期 ZX81 遊戲一樣抽搐前進。音效頂多普通，很快就會膩。劇情與選項全是日文當然也無濟於事。像大多數 Games Express 遊戲一樣，這款也要避開。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Blowing things up. Don't you just love it? Well Bomber Man does - and that's all he does. The gameplay in Bomber Man is very simple. You are presented with a grid-like map containing monsters and various objects that block your path. By dropping bombs, you can destroy these blockages and get at the monsters. When you have blown up all the monsters in the level, you have to find the exit and get out before the time limit expires. Some destructible blocks also hold power up icons, giving you extra bomb power, more bombs, speed etc. and particularly useful is the item that allows you to override the  timed explosions and set bombs off manually. After every few levels you encounter a nasty boss monster, some of which are pretty tricky, and then it's on to the next stage. And for those of you who have friends, a frantic multi-player mode is also included with some devilish power icons that can slow you down, speed you up and do other nasty/good things.
overview_zh: 把東西炸掉，誰不愛呢？嗯，Bomber Man 就愛——而且他只做這件事。Bomber Man 的玩法非常簡單。畫面呈現一張方格狀地圖，上面有怪物與各種擋路的物體。透過放置炸彈，你可以炸毀障礙並攻擊怪物。當關卡上所有怪物都被消滅後，你要在時間限制內找到出口逃出去。某些可破壞方塊藏有強化道具，提供額外炸彈威力、更多炸彈、速度等，特別好用的是能讓你手動引爆炸彈而非等倒數的道具。每過幾關會遇到厲害的 BOSS 怪物，有些相當棘手，接著進入下一階段。如果你有朋友，本作也包含刺激的多人模式，搭配邪惡的強化圖示可以讓你變慢、變快，以及各種好／壞效果。
comment_en: Bomber Man is basic, simple fun. Graphically it is functional, but a little bland - there isn't really any variety from level to level, and there is no graphical flair. But despite this, you do get addicted to the bomb-dropping gameplay and although it can get tiresome in long sessions, you'll come back to it until you've completed it (thanks to a password save). One negative point is that once you have completed it, you probably won't play the single player mode for a long time afterwards. But the multi-player mode is where the strength lies - there's nothing more fun than four people playing at once trying to bomb the pants off each other, so if you're after a group game then this, along with it's sequels, is worth taking a look at. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Bomber Man 是單純的基本樂趣。圖像上功能性足夠但有點平淡——關卡間沒什麼變化，也沒什麼美術花俏之處。不過儘管如此，你還是會對放炸彈的玩法上癮，雖然長時間玩會累，但你會一直玩到破關（多虧密碼存檔）。負面一點是一旦破關，你大概很長一段時間不會再玩單人模式。但多人模式才是精華——四人同時對戰互炸褲子的樂趣無與倫比，所以如果你想找款聚會遊戲，這款連同其續作都值得考慮。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Bomber Man World is a 1992 video game released by Irem under license from Hudson Soft for arcades. It is part of the Bomberman series. It was the second Bomberman game to be released for arcades, preceded by Bomberman (1991), which was also released by Irem.
This game is called New Atomic Punk: Global Quest or Atomic Punk 2 in North America, and New DynaBlaster: Global Quest in Europe. The North American version is called Atomic Punk 2, but it shows the text New Atomic Punk - Global Quest in-game.

overview_en: Following on from the success of the first game, '93 makes some changes that helped to shape the future of the series. While the basic gameplay is thankfully untampered with, Hudson have added a few extras - most noticeably a whole selection of multi-player levels to choose from. These are partly taken from the single player levels and include conveyor belts, teleports and no-bomb blocks. This helps to bring more variety, as well as more panic to the multi-player action.
overview_zh: 承接首代的成功，'93 做了一些塑造系列未來的改變。基本玩法謝天謝地沒動，Hudson 加入了一些額外內容——最顯著的是全套可選的多人關卡。這些部分取自單人關卡，包含輸送帶、傳送點與不可放炸彈的方塊。為多人模式帶來更多變化，也更多混亂。
comment_en: Compared to the original, graphics and presentation have  been polished a little (with a nice little opening sequence and some better looking boss monsters) and sound is still decent, though I miss not having the original tune on the early levels. The gameplay for '93 remains pretty much the same as before which means it suffers the same criticisms as all Bomber Man games - that being that once you complete the single player mode you are unlikely to replay it again. But the extra battle modes make  multi-player shine and  for a party game it does the job - and does it very well indeed. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 跟初代相比，圖像與呈現都經過打磨（有個不錯的小開場動畫和外觀更佳的 BOSS 怪物），音效仍然不錯，雖然我懷念初代早期關卡的那首曲子。'93 的玩法仍大致與先前相同，也承擔了所有 Bomber Man 遊戲的批評——就是一旦破關單人模式，大概就不會再重玩。但額外的對戰模式讓多人模式大放異彩，作為聚會遊戲它勝任愉快——而且做得非常出色。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Never one to leave a good thing to be forgotten, Hudson are back with the third installment of the ever present Bomber Man series, and with this one comes a few changes. Apart from our dumpy little hero having lost a little weight since '93, the gameplay has also been altered significantly. While still retaining the basic bombing action, completing a level now no longer requires you to destroy all enemies on screen. Instead, you have to find and destroy a set of pillars on each level and these will unlock a broken piece of amulet from its protected dome. Collect the piece and all remaining destructible blocks turn into coins and you have about 15 seconds to collect as many as possible. Another major addition is kangaroo-type animals that you can jump on and ride. These have special abilities, like jumping and such and also count as an extra hit in case you walk into an enemy or stupidly blow yourself up.
overview_zh: Hudson 從不讓好東西被遺忘，帶著無所不在的 Bomber Man 系列第三部作品回歸，這次也有一些變化。除了我們圓滾滾的主角自 '93 後瘦了一點外，玩法也有顯著改動。雖然保留基本的放炸彈動作，但破關不再需要消滅畫面上所有敵人。取而代之的是，你必須在每個關卡找到並摧毀一組石柱，這會解鎖受保護圓頂下的一塊破碎護身符。撿取碎片後所有剩餘可破壞的方塊會變成金幣，你約有 15 秒可以盡量收集。另一個主要新增是可以跳上去騎的袋鼠型動物。它們有特殊能力例如跳躍，也能在你走進敵人或愚蠢地把自己炸到時多擋一次。
comment_en: Graphics and level design has improved yet again for this update, with the levels looking far less rigidly planned and more natural. Nice little touches add to the game, like the ripple effect on the water levels, and music again is jolly and catchy. Multi-player is better than ever with the addition of different characters to play (fat, tiny, old...). If you're a big Bomber Man fan or new to the series then you should have this game, but if you have either of the prequels and are only vaguely interested, then maybe you should think twice, but this is the best version of the three. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 本次更新中圖像與關卡設計再度提升，關卡看起來比較不那麼僵硬，更自然。一些小細節為遊戲加分，例如水關的漣漪效果，音樂同樣歡快朗朗上口。多人模式因為新增不同可玩角色（胖的、小的、老的……）比以往更棒。如果你是 Bomber Man 鐵粉或系列新手，這款必玩，但若你已經有任一前作且只是略感興趣，或許該再三考慮，不過這是三作中最好的版本。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Robo and Mobo are thieves. And damn good ones. It's their quest in life to pull off the ultimate raids, from banks to shopping malls and even pyramids! Best described as a platform-stealth-thieve 'em up, Bonanza Bros is converted from the popular 1990 arcade game by Sega. Either one or two player simultaneous, you have to break into various buildings and pinch all the treasure. You are aided by a handy map in the middle of the screen and once you have swiped everything in the level, you have to hot-foot it to the roof and escape on your personal hot air balloon. But there are various things out to stop you - from cops to security guards and dogs. If they see you they will chase you, so make sure you do plenty of hiding around corners.
overview_zh: Robo 與 Mobo 是小偷。而且是超厲害的那種。他們的人生目標就是完成終極犯案，從銀行到購物中心甚至金字塔！本作最好描述為平台潛行偷竊遊戲，由 Sega 1990 年熱門大型電玩移植而來。可單人或雙人同時遊玩，你要闖入各種建築並偷走所有寶物。畫面中央有方便的地圖協助你，一旦關卡內物品偷光，就得趕快跑到屋頂搭乘你的私人熱氣球逃走。但有各種人想阻止你——從警察到警衛與犬隻。如果他們看到你就會追過來，所以務必多多躲在角落。
comment_en: Sega chose a very unique style for Bonanza Bros. It's sort of what people imagined computer graphics to be like in the late 80s - squared, smooth shaded objects and people made from cylinders and domes. It's visually very original and the Engine version successfully copies that style. It is a fun game to play - there are lots of nice cartoony touches, like the springboards, rakes and banana skins littered around and this all helps keep it interesting from level to level. One gripe is that the play area is quite small - even in single player mode the screen doesn't open up in any way, but after a couple of levels you begin not to notice it much. The music is a selection of well arranged tunes from the original; quite funky and it's nice to hear that the sampled speech (especially the laughs) from the arcade are in here too. My main problem with this game is its lastability. It is very easy and quite short too, and this seriously affects the replay value. But despite this, it is a quirky and enjoyable game and worth picking up if you can. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: Sega 為 Bonanza Bros 選擇了非常獨特的風格。有點像 80 年代末期人們想像中電腦圖像的樣子——方形、平滑陰影的物件與由圓柱與圓頂組成的人物。視覺上非常原創，Engine 版成功複製了那種風格。玩起來很有趣——有許多不錯的卡通細節，例如彈簧板、耙子、香蕉皮散落各處，這一切讓關卡間保持趣味。唯一的抱怨是遊戲區域相當小——即使是單人模式畫面也沒以任何方式擴大，但玩幾關後你就不太會注意到了。音樂是原版精心編曲的曲目選集，相當有律動，聽到大型電玩的取樣語音（尤其是笑聲）也被收進來真不錯。我對本作的主要問題是它的耐玩度。它很簡單而且也很短，這嚴重影響重玩價值。但儘管如此，它仍是款有特色又好玩的遊戲，能入手的話值得。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en:
Bonanza Bros. (sometimes written Bonanza Brothers) is a 3D-style, 2D side-scrolling stealth action game developed and released by Sega in 1990. It is one of the earliest arcade games powered by the Sega System 24 arcade system board. It was ported to various home systems, including the Mega Drive/Genesis, Master System, PC-Engine/TurboGrafx-CD, and several home computers.
Bonanza Bros. received praise for its graphics, soundtrack, and character dialogue. It has been remastered and rereleased several times.

overview_en: Overhead fantasy dungeon crawler.
overview_zh: 俯視視角的奇幻地下城探索遊戲。
wiki_extract_en: Brandish is a 1991 action role-playing game developed and published by Nihon Falcom. Originally released in 1991 for the NEC PC-9801 and FM Towns, it was later ported to the Super NES and PC Engine CD-ROM² in the mid 1990s, including an expanded re-release titled Brandish Renewal. The game was the first in the Brandish series and was followed by three sequels. A remake, Brandish: The Dark Revenant, was released for the PlayStation Portable in Japan in 2009 and worldwide in 2015.

overview_en: The Engine doesn't really have much in the way of pool games. In fact, this is the only one that I can think of. It looks and plays like those games you used to see in arcades and has plenty of options to choose from. Firstly you get to choose from simulation, action and technique (which lets you try out loads of trick shots). Then, you can play against other humans, your coach or try out the challenge mode that sets you up as a stowaway on a cruise liner, having to beat 14 opponents to be let off the hook! The play screen is laid out clearly - you aim by positioning a target anywhere on the table (unlike some games that make you aim to the cushion), then you can choose the regulars like spin and shot power.
overview_zh: Engine 上其實沒什麼撞球遊戲。事實上這是我能想到唯一的一款。它的外觀與玩法類似你以前在大型電玩會看到的那種，選項相當豐富。首先你可以在 simulation、action 與 technique（讓你試各種花式球）之間選擇。接著可以與其他玩家、你的教練對戰，或嘗試挑戰模式——把你設定為郵輪上的偷渡客，必須打敗 14 位對手才能脫身！遊玩畫面清晰明瞭——你透過將目標準星放在球檯任意位置來瞄準（不像某些遊戲得瞄準檯邊），然後可以調旋轉與擊球力道等標準設定。
comment_en: Visually, Break In is nicely presented and uses a good colour scheme. You wouldn't think there's much scope in drawing pool balls, but these are really well done and look nice and shiny. Ball physics leaves a little to be desired - the movement is a little slow and wobbly, and sometimes the balls tend to stop a bit quicker than they ought to, but it won't upset anyone but the perfectionists out there. The music is suitably reminiscent of bar room jazz and hums along harmlessly in the background. Overall, it's a pretty decent pool game with many different styles of game and trick shots to choose from. It won't set the world on fire and may be too dull for some, but given the lack of choice  this is worth getting if it's the kind of thing that pushes your button. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 視覺上 Break In 呈現不錯，配色佳。你不會覺得畫撞球有什麼發揮空間，但這些球畫得很好，看起來亮又圓。球的物理有點待改進——移動稍慢又有點晃動，有時球停下來的速度比應有的更快，但除了完美主義者以外不會有人在意。音樂適當地令人聯想到酒吧爵士，無害地在背景流淌。整體而言是款相當不錯的撞球遊戲，有多種比賽風格與花式球可選。不會驚天動地，也可能讓某些人覺得沉悶，但考量到選擇不多，如果你對這類遊戲有興趣就值得一試。sunteam_paul

overview_en: "SEA SQUARE", a gigantic man-made island on the Atlantic Ocean, an armed fortress controlled by a mysterious army. It is evident that they are developing the most evil weapon for slaughter to maintain and grasp its superiority of military power in the world. Joint forces have taken the motion for a special a action (irregular combat) and have prepared  a mobile weapon "BROWNING", to destroy the ultimate weapon....according to the official blurb that is. Browning is a side scrolling action game that puts the player in a power suit and pits them against hordes of miscellaneous mecha with some very big guns. You walk and shoot, run and shoot and also fly and shoot, although flight time is limited due to the useless engineers failing to fit a large enough fan in your jetpack. After ploughing through a few screens of nasties, you are presented with a particularly unfriendly boss mecha who seems intent on aggressive negotiations. After quickly dispatching said boss, you are free to move on to the next level and do it all over again!
overview_zh: 官方文案如此介紹：「SEA SQUARE」是大西洋上一座巨大的人造島，為一支神祕軍隊所控制的武裝要塞。很明顯地，他們正在研發最邪惡的屠殺武器，以維持並掌控其軍力在世界上的優勢。聯合部隊已決定採取特別行動（非常規作戰），並準備好一種機動武器「BROWNING」以摧毀這種終極武器……Browning 是款橫向捲動動作遊戲，讓玩家穿上動力裝甲對抗成群配備大砲的雜兵機甲。你邊走邊射、邊跑邊射，也能邊飛邊射，雖然因為廢物工程師沒裝夠大的風扇進噴射背包，飛行時間有限。突破幾個畫面的敵人後，你會遇到一個特別不友善的 BOSS 機甲，似乎有意進行武力交涉。迅速解決該 BOSS 後，你就可以前進下一關再來一次！

title_jp: バブルガムクラッシュ！
overview_en: This is an adventure game based on the sequel to the superb classic cyberpunk anime Bubblegum Crisis. It puts you in the shoes of Nene from the Knight Sabers, a group of women in power suits out to sort out the problems that the AD Police can’t handle. Be aware that unless you can read Japanese, there may be a certain amount of trial and error involved before you get anywhere.
overview_zh: 這是一款冒險遊戲，改編自經典賽博龐克動畫《泡泡糖危機》的續作。你將扮演 Knight Sabers 成員之一的 Nene，她們是一群身穿動力裝甲的女戰士，專門處理 AD Police 無法解決的問題。要注意的是，如果你不懂日文，在遊戲中可能會經歷不少反覆嘗試錯誤的過程才能有所進展。
wiki_extract_en:
Bubblegum Crash (バブルガムクラッシュ!, Baburugamu Kurasshu!) is a 1991 OVA anime series produced by Artmic and Artland. It is the sequel to the 1987 OVA series Bubblegum Crisis, taking place a year after the series. The Knight Sabers seem to be finished, as each of its members except Nene Romanova have seemingly drifted off to pursue their own goals. But at the same time, a recent string of robberies, murders, and Boomer malfunctions begin to occur. Knight Sabers' leader Sylia Stingray is then forced to recruit Nene and the other members back together. The group tries to find out who or what is behind the recent string of crimes which are somehow related to the creation of an advanced artificial intelligence.
After the split between Artmic and Youmex, Artmic proceeded to make Bubblegum Crash on their own, which ran three OVA episodes and is conjectured that it was a shortened version of how Bubblegum Crisis was to end. Youmex then sued Artmic, cutting the series short and tying the franchise up in legal issues until the late 1990s, when Artmic went bankrupt and Youmex was absorbed into Toshiba EMI.
Upon release, the series received mixed reviews from fans and critics.

overview_en: Another western game converted to the PC Engine by Micro World, Builderland has a concept similar to the infamous Lemmings, and requires equally sharp forethought and reactions. The aim is to escort your little buddy across the vast playing area without him getting stuck, burned up, eaten by sheep etc. To do this, you can pick up and move various items that are scattered around the landscape, such as blocks to fill in gaps or create handy slopes, bombs to destroy areas of the map and so on. All this time your red headed friend is moving forward with alarming rapidity towards his doom. Thankfully, you can freeze the action to give yourself some breathing space to juggle things around, but this is limited to a timer which counts down slowly at the top of the screen.
overview_zh: 這是 Micro World 將另一款西方遊戲移植到 PC Engine 的作品。Builderland 的概念與知名的 Lemmings 類似，同樣需要敏銳的預判與反應能力。目標是護送你的小夥伴穿越廣大的遊戲區域，過程中不能讓他卡住、被燒死、被羊吃掉等等。為此你可以拾取並搬移場景中散落的各種物品，例如用來填補空隙或形成便利斜坡的方塊、用來炸開地形的炸彈等等。在這同時，你那紅髮小夥伴正以驚人的速度朝著死路前進。還好你可以暫停動作，給自己一點喘息空間來安排物品位置，但這個功能有時間限制，螢幕上方的計時器會緩緩倒數。
no_intro_name: Builder Land (Micro World) (Japan)[AKA Builderland - The Story of Melba]

title_jp: ブルファイト リングの覇者
overview_en: Select your boxer, select your manager and duke it out for the championship. Bullfight takes the conventional side view of many boxing games - you shuffle left and right tapping one button for block and another for punch, the height of which is determined by the D-pad. During the action, commentators chatter away at the bottom of the screen until one of you goes down for good. This is fairly standard stuff, although Bullfight also has an extra fighting mode to add variety. In it, you take to the streets in a Vigilante-style scrolling beat 'em up, stopping at shops to buy equipment on the way to the main fights in a proper arena.
overview_zh: 選擇你的拳擊手、選擇你的經紀人，然後為冠軍頭銜決一死戰吧！Bullfight 採用許多拳擊遊戲常見的側視視角——你可以左右移動，一顆按鈕負責防禦、另一顆負責出拳，而出拳的高度則由方向鍵決定。比賽過程中，解說員會在螢幕下方不停嚷嚷，直到有一方被擊倒為止。這是相當標準的設計，不過 Bullfight 還額外加入了一種戰鬥模式增加變化。在該模式中，你會走上街頭，進行類似《Vigilante》的橫向捲動格鬥動作，沿途停靠商店購買裝備，最後前往正規競技場進行主要對戰。

title_jp: ブライ「八玉の勇士伝説」
overview_en: Overhead fantasy role-playing game featuring random battles.
overview_zh: 俯視視角的奇幻角色扮演遊戲，採用隨機戰鬥機制。
no_intro_name: Burai - Hachigyoku no Yuushi Densetsu (Riverhill Soft) (Japan)

overview_en: Fantasy sequel, this time with greatly improved icon-driven presentation and graphics.
overview_zh: 奇幻續作，這次採用大幅改良的圖示操作介面與畫面表現。
no_intro_name: Burai II - Yami Koutei no Gyakushuu (Japan)

title_jp: バーニングエンジェル
overview_en: Evil forces have kidnapped the leader of the Burning Project! It's up to the Burning Angels to rescue her! And so starts another vertically scrolling shooter on the PC Engine. There are no surprises in the gameplay here - choose one of two ships, shoot down enemies and collect power upgrades and energy pods. Levels range from the city to the desert and the obligatory sci-fi enemy base. At the end of each level, defeat the large boss craft to move on.
overview_zh: 邪惡勢力綁架了 Burning Project 的領導者！該是 Burning Angels 出馬營救的時候了！於是 PC Engine 上又一款縱向捲動射擊遊戲就此開始。玩法上沒有什麼意外——選擇兩艘機體之一、擊落敵人並收集強化道具與能量球。關卡場景從都市、沙漠到必備的科幻敵軍基地應有盡有。每一關結束時都要擊敗巨大的王者戰艦才能進入下一關。
comment_en: Although not majorly poor in any area, Burning Angels is such a standard shooter that it is hard to work up any excitement for it. Sprites are big, there is plenty going on and graphics are mostly decent (even if the clouds look more like rocks). It can be a bit frustrating as you only have one energy bar and no continues, but practice enough and it's not too much of a hassle. The music is nice but bland, like much of the game, though there is a lovely opening scene and some good between level pictures. Also there is a 2-player simultaneous mode to spice things up a bit. But in the final analysis, there isn't much to really make you want to come back to this game and it certainly can't compete with the 'Soldier' series. Competent but lacking imagination. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 雖然 Burning Angels 在各方面都沒有什麼嚴重缺陷，但它實在是太標準的射擊遊戲了，很難讓人提起勁。角色精靈很大、畫面熱鬧、整體圖形表現也還不錯（雖然雲朵看起來比較像石頭）。由於只有一條能量條又沒有續關機會，玩起來有點令人氣餒，但只要練習夠多也不算太麻煩。音樂不錯但平淡，就像遊戲本身一樣，不過開場動畫很精緻，關卡間的圖片也挺漂亮。另外還有雙人同時遊玩模式能增添一點樂趣。但綜合評估下來，這款遊戲實在沒什麼讓人想一玩再玩的地方，肯定無法與「Soldier」系列相提並論。中規中矩但缺乏想像力。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en: Burning Angels is a 1990 shoot 'em up video game developed and published by Naxat Soft for the PC Engine only in Japan.

title_jp: 超絶倫人ベラボーマン
overview_en: Although typical 'super heroes' are not nearly as common in Japan as they are  in the west, there is no doubting the extraordinary powers of this one. Berabo Man is a strange game - a platformer with underwater shoot 'em up stages (sound familiar? Schbibin Man 2?), but the hero here doesn't just use a gun - instead, his whole body is elastic, so you'll find yourself taking out enemies with extending legs, arms and even neck! Along the way, you'll pick up items from destroyed enemies and some weird floating thing that I'll not even begin to describe. And with a boss at the end of each level, a hero's work is never done.
overview_zh: 雖然日本並不像西方那樣常見典型的「超級英雄」，但這位的超能力確實是不容置疑。Berabo Man 是款很奇妙的遊戲——平台動作加上水下射擊關卡（是不是有點耳熟？Schbibin Man 2？），但這裡的主角不只是靠槍——他整個身體都能伸縮，所以你會看到自己用拉長的腿、手甚至脖子來解決敵人！沿途你會從被擊敗的敵人身上撿到道具，以及一些我實在懶得描述的詭異漂浮物。而且每關結尾還有一隻王者要對付，英雄的工作真的永無止境。
comment_en: Berabo Man is a hard game to have a solid opinion of. While the graphics are a bit sketchy and not particularly well drawn, they are also big and there is some impressive full-on parallax scrolling. Also, the gameplay is a bit clunky but at the same time I find it sort of fun, although it can be a little annoying to return to the start of a level after being solidly beaten up by a boss. It's one of those games that, despite looking and playing a bit B-grade, it has a certain indefinable charm to it. This is probably partly down to the inherent Japaneseness of it, as well as the quirky gameplay and sampled speech. Try before you buy, but give it a chance because it isn't as bad as it first may seem. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: Berabo Man 是款很難給出明確評價的遊戲。畫面雖然有點粗糙、描繪得不算特別精美，但角色精靈很大，而且有令人印象深刻的全螢幕視差捲動。玩法有點笨拙，但我同時又覺得有種樂趣在，儘管被王者痛揍一頓後得從關卡起點重來確實有點煩人。這是那種即便看起來跟玩起來都有點B級片感的遊戲，卻有種難以言喻的魅力。這大概部分來自於它骨子裡的日式風情，以及古怪的玩法和採樣語音。建議先試玩再入手，但請給它一個機會，因為它沒有第一眼看上去那麼糟。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review

title_jp: ならずもの戦闘部隊 BLOODY WOLF
overview_en: Taking inspiration from games like Ikari Warriors and Commando, with a good dollop of Rambo to top it off, Bloody Wolf gives you guns, death and destruction. What more could you want? Viewed from a sort of overhead/side on angle, you have to make your way through town, river, forest and many other types of terrain with just your wits and a massive weapon under your arm. Along the way you will get the chance to rescue hostages - hiding in trucks, caves, tied to trees etc - and by opening crates you gain useful power ups. These include things like spread shot, flame thrower, rockets and frag grenades, but also contain more subtle items like flippers that allow you to move faster when ducked under water. Also, if you manage to shoot someone off their motorbike, you can get on it and race away, mercilessly running down anyone who gets in your way. At various points in the level you will come across bosses that break up the action a little. Also, you have the ability to jump, which comes in handy when traversing chasms or avoiding any suspicious rolling logs that may be out to get you.
overview_zh: 這款作品取材自《怒之鐵拳（Ikari Warriors）》和《Commando》，再加上滿滿的《藍波》風味，Bloody Wolf 給你槍械、死亡與破壞。夫復何求？視角採俯視/側視混合，你必須憑藉自己的機智和腋下那把巨大武器，穿越城鎮、河流、森林等各種地形。沿途你有機會救出人質——他們藏在卡車、洞穴、被綁在樹上等等——打開箱子還能獲得實用的強化道具。這些包括散射、火焰噴射器、火箭、破片手榴彈，也有更細膩的物品，像是潛水時可以加快移動速度的蛙鞋。另外，如果你成功將敵人從機車上擊落，還可以跳上去狂飆，無情地輾過任何擋路的人。關卡中各處都會碰上王者，讓節奏稍微有點變化。你還有跳躍能力，在跨越深淵或閃避任何可疑的滾動原木時非常好用。
comment_en: To get the negative out of the way first, Bloody Wolf has some bloody horrific slowdown. At certain points, the game almost grinds to a halt. Luckily, this will work more in your favour than against you. But despite this flaw, the game itself is excellent. The levels are long and have enough variation, either in visuals or in level structure to keep you interested. The sound is great with some  excellent pieces of music (making great use of  stereo). Graphics are well drawn and varied with good use of parallax effects for water, and the game is not too frustrating or too easy either. At first, I thought Bloody Wolf was a decent enough game, but with time it has remained one of my favourites and a great game to really get your teeth into. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 先把缺點講完——Bloody Wolf 有著很要命的掉幀問題。在某些時刻，遊戲幾乎是停格狀態。還好這反倒常常對你有利。不過撇開這個缺點，遊戲本身非常優秀。關卡既長又富有變化，不論是畫面還是關卡結構都足以維持你的興趣。音效很棒，配上幾首非常出色的音樂（立體聲運用得相當好）。畫面描繪精美、變化豐富，水面運用了不錯的視差效果，難度也不至於太令人氣餒或太簡單。一開始我只覺得 Bloody Wolf 是款不錯的遊戲，但隨著時間它成了我最愛的作品之一，是一款讓你能真正投入其中的好遊戲。sunteam_paul

title_jp: 新日本プロレスリング'94 バトルフィールド IN 闘強導夢
overview_en: Officially licensed wrestling game based on real life Japanese fighters. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back
overview_zh: 取得官方授權、以現實日本選手為藍本的摔角遊戲。圖片：正面封面・背面封面・書背・登錄卡正面・登錄卡背面

overview_en: Set in a fantastical time, an evil demon named Barlog (sound familiar?) has appeared and started to threaten the world, cruelly stealing away Salasa, the princess of Dilsarl. Naturally the population descended into chaos and there was much gnashing of teeth. But of course, the King had an ace up his sleeve and decided to put his trust in four brave warriors, who he sent out to save the princess. The warriors were a fighter, mage, priest and ninja, which as luck would have it, are the choices that you (or you and a friend in 2-player mode) have when you begin the game. As you romp along (after a chit chat with royalty at the castle), you'll find the side-on gameplay similar to Legendary Axe, but with each character giving a more unique feel to the gameplay. For example, the ninja throws shurikens, the fighter and mage have shorter range attacks with sword and staff respectively, and the priest uses a mid-ranged holy mace of head-cracking. The mage  also has skills which use up magic points, such as fireballs and spinning daggers, while the priest has a healing ability - these skills are accessed by holding down the attack button. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 故事設定在奇幻年代，名為 Barlog 的邪惡惡魔（耳熟嗎？）出現並開始威脅世界，還殘忍地擄走了 Dilsarl 王國的公主 Salasa。自然地，民眾陷入恐慌，哀嚎遍野。不過國王當然留了一手，決定將信任託付給四位勇敢的戰士，派他們去拯救公主。這四位戰士分別是戰士、法師、祭司和忍者，湊巧的是，這也正是你（或者你和朋友在雙人模式下）一開始遊戲時可以選擇的角色。隨著你一路向前（在城堡與王族簡短對話後），你會發現側視玩法與《Legendary Axe》相似，但每個角色都有各自獨特的操作感。舉例來說，忍者會投擲手裡劍，戰士和法師分別以劍與法杖進行短距離攻擊，而祭司則使用中距離的神聖錘來敲碎對手腦袋。法師還有消耗魔力值的技能，像是火球和旋轉飛刀，祭司則有治療能力——這些技能透過長按攻擊鍵來發動。Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en: Cadash is an arcade action role-playing game with elements of the platform game genre originally released by Taito in 1990. It was then ported to the TurboGrafx-16 in 1991 and the Sega Genesis in 1992. It is included in Taito Memories Volume 2 released for the PlayStation 2 in 2005 and the Xbox and Microsoft Windows versions of Taito Legends 2 released in 2007. The original arcade version was made available for the PlayStation 4 and Nintendo Switch via the Arcade Archives series on August 31, 2023.

overview_en: Adventure game/digital comic hybrid with an apparently all-girl cast, most of which seem to have an affection for lying seductively on beds or showing a little skin.
overview_zh: 冒險遊戲與數位漫畫的混合作品，角色陣容看起來全是女性，而且大多都對慵懶地躺在床上或稍微露點肌膚情有獨鍾。

overview_en: Continuation of the cute girly digital comic adventure series.
overview_zh: 可愛女孩數位漫畫冒險系列的續篇。

overview_en: Camp California is a US made platformer starring 'The Official Mascots of the Beach Boys.' In it, a band of West Coast environmentalist anthropomorphic bears and pelicans must stage a benefit concert to defeat an evil beach-spoiling power plant entrepreneur. Using a number of characters with different abilities, the player must defeat enemies while recycling cans in order to power their surf woodie and drive to new levels. The Beach Boys songs Fun, Fun, Fun, I Get Around, and Good Vibrations can be heard throughout different parts of the game. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: Camp California 是款美國製作的平台動作遊戲，主角是「The Beach Boys 官方吉祥物」。遊戲中，一群西岸環保主義的擬人化熊與鵜鶘必須籌辦一場公益演唱會，對抗一位破壞海灘的邪惡發電廠老闆。玩家要操控多位擁有不同能力的角色，一邊擊敗敵人，一邊回收鋁罐作為衝浪旅行車的能源，前往新的關卡。整個遊戲過程中會聽到 Beach Boys 的歌曲〈Fun, Fun, Fun〉、〈I Get Around〉和〈Good Vibrations〉。Turbo Views Review

overview_en: Battle it out, girl on girl with this collection of card games! Cardangels sets you against various opponents across Japan in four different types of game: Poker, Blackjack, Babanuki and Speed. The games are streamlined versions, and there is no betting taking place here - you win or lose a hand and the winner gets points. If you beat the CPU by the end of the match, you go on to the next game, or next chapter in the story. Poker is fairly standard - you are dealt a hand, chose which cards to hold and are dealt more before the round ends. Blackjack is plain and simple. Babanuki is a version of Old Maid. Each player has a hand of cards and must take a card from the other player. If you get a pair, you discard them. This whittles down your hand until one person loses by holding the Joker. Speed involves stacks of 3 cards each. Two cards are placed in the centre of the table and you get to place cards on top from your stacks - but only if they are immediately higher or lower. The first person to clear their cards is the winner. Of course, all this is presented complete with anime gals that strip down to their underwear when you beat them, just to give you that little bit extra incentive of course.
overview_zh: 透過這款紙牌遊戲合集，跟女孩們一較高下吧！Cardangels 讓你與日本各地的不同對手較勁，共有四種紙牌遊戲：撲克、21 點、Babanuki（抽鬼牌）與 Speed（快速牌）。這些都是簡化版本，沒有下注玩法——一局分勝負，贏家拿分。如果在對局結束前擊敗電腦，就能進入下一場遊戲，或進入下一章故事。撲克是標準玩法——發牌、選擇要留的牌、補牌，一局結束。21 點則簡單明瞭。Babanuki 是抽鬼牌的變體，每位玩家手上有一疊牌，必須從對手手中抽一張。湊成對就打出去，牌越抽越少，最後手上留著鬼牌（Joker）的人就輸了。Speed 則是每人有三疊各 3 張的牌，桌面中央放兩張，你要從自己的牌疊中出比中央牌大一或小一的牌，最先清空自己牌的人獲勝。當然，所有這一切都搭配上動漫女孩，被你擊敗時就會脫到只剩內衣，就當作是給你一點額外誘因囉。
comment_en: You never really expect an awful lot from borderline hentai games, particularly card games (AV Poker being a typical example). However, there is something quite good about Cardangels. It's not only the presentation, which is very attractive, but also the choice of games. Poker and Blackjack are givens, but Babanuki and Speed are not commonly seen in this style of game. Also, the rounds move on at a pretty fast pace, no waiting around for the computer to pretend it's thinking and no working out how much to bet. Just simple, straightforward, fast gameplay. There are few options to choose from as well, from the number of rounds (from 10 to 200!), to CPU speed. I was expecting rubbish from this, but I enjoyed it more then I thought I would, and it's certainly better than any of the Games Express efforts. If you're in the mood for some card action and don't mind the ladies showing off their bras then you could do a lot worse. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 你通常不會對擦邊球的紳士遊戲抱太大期望，尤其是紙牌類（AV Poker 就是典型代表）。但 Cardangels 卻有點東西。不只是呈現相當討喜，遊戲選擇也很特別。撲克和 21 點是必備的，但 Babanuki 和 Speed 在這類遊戲中就不常見了。另外每局節奏都挺快，不用等電腦裝模作樣地思考，也不用計算下注金額。簡單、直接、快節奏的玩法。可設定的選項也不少，從對局數（10 到 200 局！）到電腦速度都能調整。我原本以為這會很糟，沒想到比預期更有趣，而且絕對比 Games Express 的那些作品強多了。如果你想來點紙牌樂趣，又不介意女生展示她們的胸罩，那這款可是比很多選擇都好。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Fed up with arguing with your friends about who has the better taste in music? Well here's a way to settle things with this arena based battle game that uses your music CD collection to fight! The concept is simple. Each player inserts a CD and the game uses the information to generate three fighters. You then go head to head in a random area - taking it in turns to choose to fight or maybe use one of your special attack moves. The winner is the last one standing.
overview_zh: 跟朋友為了誰的音樂品味比較好而爭吵不休？那麼就用這款競技場對戰遊戲來一決勝負吧——它會用你的音樂CD收藏來戰鬥！概念很簡單。每位玩家放入一張CD，遊戲會根據這些資訊產生三名戰士。接著在隨機場地中正面交鋒——輪流選擇戰鬥或是使用其中一招特殊攻擊。最後還站著的人就是贏家。
comment_en: So the idea behind CD battle sounds like a laugh. Put in 2 music CDs and beat up your mates. Unfortunately that's all there is to it. Have a battle, have another, have another. There is almost no variety and very little design flair which means after about three goes it feels pretty stale. Other than proving that the Latest Jean Michel Jarre CD can beat up the soundtrack to Ghostbusters (which it did with startling efficiency), the whole exercise is rather pointless. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: CD Battle 這點子聽起來很搞笑。放入 2 張音樂CD，然後痛扁你的好友。不幸的是，整個遊戲就只有這樣而已。打一場、再打一場、再打一場。幾乎沒有變化，設計上也沒什麼巧思，大概打個三場就膩了。除了證明「最新的 Jean Michel Jarre 專輯能痛扁《魔鬼剋星》原聲帶」（而且效果驚人地明顯）之外，整個過程實在毫無意義。sunteam_paul

title_jp: CD美少女パチンコ球魔四姉妹
overview_en: Adult themed pachinko simulation.
overview_zh: 成人主題的柏青哥模擬遊戲。

overview_en: After the success of PC Denjin, our hero leaps onto CD with a whole new game and a whole new soundtrack. Flying over the various landscapes (you get to choose which order to play the first four levels in), you come up against tidal waves, giant robots and a general array of nasty but cute bad guys as you would expect. The plants from the original PC Kid games are still here to provide such joys as extra firepower, fountains of smiley faces or the tiny-denjin which makes dodging bullets that little bit easier. Another handy little trick is that your boots also pack a punch, so backing into an enemy is more likely to dispose of them than do you any permanent damage. Part way along each of the levels you get the chance to rescue a friend who then joins with you, giving you a specific extra ability. These friends are pre-set one per level and cannot be chosen, and they allow things like rapid-sushi-fire and handy rear shots. See a translation of the songs in the game here.
overview_zh: 在 PC Denjin 大獲成功之後，我們的主角帶著全新的遊戲和全新的原聲帶躍上CD。飛越各種地形時（你可以選擇前四關的遊玩順序），你會遭遇海嘯、巨型機器人以及各種可愛又討厭的壞蛋。原版 PC Kid 遊戲中的植物仍然存在，提供額外火力、笑臉噴泉，或是讓你更容易閃避子彈的迷你電人之類的樂趣。另一個好用的小技巧是你的靴子也能發揮威力，所以倒退撞向敵人反而更有可能幹掉對方，而不是自己受傷。每一關進行到一半都有機會救出一位夥伴加入你，帶來特定的額外能力。每關的夥伴都是預設好的、無法選擇，能帶來像是連發壽司彈和實用後方射擊之類的能力。可在此查看遊戲中歌曲的翻譯。
comment_en: After the brilliant PC Denjin, and the previous Hudson/Red shooters like Gate of Thunder and Winds of Thunder, I was expecting something graphically very special from CD Denjin - and although the design is nice enough, albeit a tad functional in places, it lacks any parallax scrolling and also the boundless variety of those games. The game's strongest points are the first two levels - both are fun, pretty and have really catchy music, but this quality doesn't seem to have followed through to the later stages, which somehow don't seem as exciting. But this all sounds like I'm down on the game, which is not true. It is a great little shoot 'em up, fun to play, variable in quality and it's only because the games we compare it to are so good that it seems to have developed a bad rep. I'd still recommend it. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 在看過出色的 PC Denjin，以及 Hudson/Red 的前作像是 Gate of Thunder 和 Winds of Thunder 之後，我原本期待 CD Denjin 在畫面上會有特別之處——設計雖然夠好，但在某些地方顯得功能性太強，缺乏視差捲動，也沒有前述那些作品的無窮變化。遊戲最精彩的是前兩關——兩者都好玩、畫面漂亮、音樂洗腦，但這個品質似乎沒有延續到後面的關卡，感覺沒那麼令人興奮。不過聽起來我好像在貶低這款遊戲，其實不是。這是款很棒的小射擊遊戲，好玩又有一定品質變化，只是因為拿來比較的遊戲都太強，才讓它名聲不佳。我還是推薦它。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Super Air Zonk: Rockabilly-Paradise, released in Japan as CD Denjin: Rockabilly Tengoku (Japanese: PC原人シリーズ CD電人 ～ロカビリー天国～), is a horizontally scrolling shooter developed by Dual and published by Hudson Soft. It was released for the TurboGrafx-CD/TurboDuo in 1993, and was later made available on the Wii's Virtual Console on November 19, 2007, in North America, and on January 29, 2008, in Japan.
Super Air Zonk is the sequel to the 1992 game Air Zonk, both of which are part of the Bonk series. As a sequel, Super Air Zonk introduces all-new levels, assistants, and enemies, as well as a Red Book CD audio soundtrack featuring rockabilly music.

title_jp: CD花札 美少女ファンクラブ
overview_en: Japanese suit-matching card game with an adult theme.
overview_zh: 成人主題的日式花札配對紙牌遊戲。

title_jp: CD麻雀 美少女中心派
overview_en: Adult mahjong game. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • CD • System Card Front • System Card Back
overview_zh: 成人麻將遊戲。圖片：正面封面・背面封面・CD・系統卡正面・系統卡背面

title_jp: CDパチスロ美少女ギャンブラー
overview_en: Adult fruit machine game. Images Front Cover • Back Cover •  CD
overview_zh: 成人吃角子老虎遊戲。圖片：正面封面・背面封面・CD

title_jp: チャンピオン・レスラー
overview_en: Take to the ring with one of eight characters - push, kick, rebound and trample your opponent in this muscle-bound wrestling title from Taito.
overview_zh: 從八名角色中選擇一位登上擂台——推、踢、彈繩、踩踏對手，在這款來自 Taito 的肌肉摔角作品中大展身手。

overview_en: US made boxing game featuring all the big names from Muhammad Ali to George Forman. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 美國製作的拳擊遊戲，網羅了從穆罕默德・阿里到喬治・福爾曼等所有大牌人物。Turbo Views Review

title_jp: チャンピオンシップ・ラリー
overview_en: Overhead rally game with time attack, high speed and adventure modes. Longplay Video from World of Longplays
overview_zh: 俯視視角的拉力賽車遊戲，包含計時挑戰、高速競速與冒險模式。Longplay Video from World of Longplays

title_jp: タイトーチェイスH. Q.
overview_en: This is Nancy at Chase Headquarters. We've got an emergency here! Always wanted to drive a Porsche 928 but couldn't afford one? Well here's your chance...as lucky cop Tony Gibson you take part in high speed pursuits to capture dangerous criminals. You have a set time to reach the perps before they escape, and then resort to the age-old tactic of smashing into them as hard as you can to finally ram them off the road. But look out as there are forks in the road and a wrong turn can set you back for good. Once the offending crim is taken in for questioning (or a severe beating most likely), you radio in for your next mission. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 這裡是總部的 Nancy，我們有緊急情況！一直想開 Porsche 928 卻買不起？機會來了……你扮演幸運的警察 Tony Gibson，參與高速追捕，逮捕危險罪犯。你有限定時間追上罪犯否則他們就會逃脫，追上後就採用老招式——用盡全力撞向他們，直到把他們撞離路面為止。但要小心路上的岔路，一個轉錯方向就全盤皆輸。一旦把罪犯帶回去偵訊（更可能是痛打一頓）之後，就可以呼叫下一個任務。Turbo Views Review

title_jp: ちびまる子ちゃん クイズでピーヒャラ
overview_en: Popular children's character Chibi Maruko-chan makes her way onto the PC Engine with this cleverly presented action/quiz game. Choose your difficulty and set off down the street...but beware as there are birds, cats and nasty robots intent on zapping you. You have as defense your explorer's helmet, and magical stars shoot out of it to dispatch the baddies (jumping on their heads for a quick escape is also an option if you need to). While all this is going on, you are presented with a series of questions at the top of the screen. You have a choice of answers from A-D and to make a selection you have to pick up the corresponding letter from a defeated enemy. Get three wrong and you're out.
overview_zh: 大受歡迎的兒童角色櫻桃小丸子以這款精心設計的動作/益智遊戲登上 PC Engine。選擇難度後走上街頭……但要小心，因為有小鳥、貓咪和討厭的機器人想攻擊你。你的防禦武器是探險家的頭盔，魔法星星會從中射出來擊退壞蛋（如果需要快速脫身，跳到他們頭上也是個選項）。同時，螢幕上方會出現一連串問題，答案從 A 到 D 四選一，要作答就得撿起被擊敗敵人掉落的對應字母。答錯三題就出局。
comment_en: This is actually a really novel idea for a quiz game. The graphics are simple, but will appeal to the age group that the game is aimed at. Unfortunately, unless you can read Japanese then the game is virtually impossible, unless you are very, very lucky, which is why it remains unrated. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 這其實是款相當新奇的問答遊戲點子。圖形很簡單，但會吸引目標年齡層。可惜的是，除非你懂日文，否則幾乎不可能玩得通，除非你非常非常走運——這也是它沒有評分的原因。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Chibi Maruko-chan (Japanese: ちびまる子ちゃん; lit. "Little Maruko-chan") is a manga series written and illustrated by Momoko Sakura. The series depicts the simple, everyday life of Momoko Sakura, a young girl everyone calls Maruko, and her family in suburban Japan in the year 1974. Maruko is a troublemaker, and every episode recounts Maruko's trouble and how she and her friends succeed in resolving the situation.
The series is set in the former Irie District (入江町), Shimizu, now part of Shizuoka City, birthplace of its author.
The first story under the title "Chibi Maruko-chan" was published in the August 1986 edition of the manga magazine Ribon. Other semi-autobiographical stories by the author had appeared in Ribon and Ribon Original in 1984 and 1985, and were included in the first "Chibi Maruko-chan" tankōbon in 1987. The author first began writing and submitting strips in her final year of senior high school, although Shueisha (the publisher of Ribon and Ribon Original) did not decide to run them until over a year later. The author's intent was to write "essays in manga form"; many stories are inspired by incidents from her own life, and some characters are based on her family and friends. The nostalgic, honest and thoughtful tone of the strip led to its becoming popular among a wider audience.
Chibi Maruko-chan was adapted into an anime television series by Nippon Animation, which originally aired on Fuji Television and affiliated TV stations from January 7, 1990, to September 27, 1992. It has also spawned numerous games, animated films and merchandising, as well as a second TV series running from 1995 to the present. Maruko's style and themes are sometimes compared to the classic comic Sazae-san. In 1989, the manga tied to receive the Kodansha Manga Award for the shōjo category. As of 2006, the collected volumes of the manga had sold more than 31 million copies in Japan, making it one of the best-selling manga series.

overview_en: Another NEC Avenue conversion of a Capcom coin-op, Chiki Chiki Boys is a cute platformer for either one or two players simultaneously. Armed with a sword (and a small collection of pillars-of-flame smart bombs), you travel through forests, swim in oceans and float in the clouds in your epic adventure.
overview_zh: 這是 NEC Avenue 移植自 Capcom 大型電玩的另一款作品。Chiki Chiki Boys 是款可愛的平台動作遊戲，可單人或雙人同時遊玩。帶著劍（以及少量的火柱型智慧炸彈），你將穿越森林、游過大海、漂浮在雲端，展開你的史詩冒險。

title_jp: 逐電屋 藤兵衛 首斬り館より
overview_en: Digital comic adventure with a samurai feel. Knowledge of Japanese recommended.
overview_zh: 帶有武士風情的數位漫畫冒險作品。建議具備日文閱讀能力。

overview_en: Bo Emperor Bill has a problem. After winning the Great Galaxy Bodybuilding Contest ten times in a row, he has found that he has virtually exhausted his protein supplies. Not one to sit around complaining, he decides to invade nearby galaxies and set up factories, harvesting the protein for his own use. However, the heaven realm does not like the look of all this, and sends two warriors - Idaten and Benten to thwart his plans. Playing similarly to most shoot 'em ups, Cho Aniki features the usual power-up pods that increase your damage, super weapons that devastate and R-Type style orbs in the form of muscle-bound brothers Adon and Samson. Levels are split into various stages with lots of sub-bosses thrown in for good measure.
overview_zh: Bo 皇帝 Bill 有個麻煩。在連續十次贏得銀河大健美比賽之後，他發現自己的蛋白質供應幾乎耗盡。他可不是坐著抱怨的人，於是決定入侵鄰近星系設立工廠，收割蛋白質供自己使用。然而天界不喜歡這樣的發展，於是派出兩名戰士——韋馱天與弁天來阻止他的計畫。玩法與大多數射擊遊戲類似，Cho Aniki 具備常見的提升傷害強化道具、毀天滅地的超級武器，以及 R-Type 風格的飛球——這些飛球以肌肉壯碩的兄弟 Adon 和 Samson 的形象呈現。關卡分成若干階段，中途穿插了不少小王者。
wiki_extract_en: Cho Aniki (超兄貴, Chō Aniki; lit. "Super Big Brother") is a 1992 side-scrolling shooter video game developed by Masaya Games and published by Nippon Computer Systems (NCS). The first game in the Cho Aniki series, it was originally released in 1992 on the PC Engine Super CD-ROM² System add-on. Many years later, the game was released as part of Project EGG for Microsoft Windows only in Japan, the Wii Virtual Console and the PC Engine/TurboGrafx-16 Mini worldwide, making it the first time this game has seen the release in Western regions. Cho Aniki was also included with the sequel Ai Cho Aniki as part of Cho Aniki Collection for the Nintendo Switch, which was first released in Japan on December 12, 2024 and then in North America and Europe on January 29, 2025.

overview_en: Puzzle games come in all shapes and sizes. There are ones that rely purely on your mental abilities and there are others that throw in an arcade element to them. Circus Lido is more the latter, looking like some strange insectoid son of Bubble Bobble. You play a squat green lizard and your aim is to clear the screen of bugs. To do this, you have a long pink tongue that shoots out to swallow any critters in your way, you then have to spit them out into the gaping maws of hungry plants dotted around the level. But being a lizard, you are seemingly unable to jump, so to navigate your way around, you have a tail that shoots upwards to catch on to any grippable areas of platform above. And to make things harder, there are certain sections of floor that can be slid left or right by pushing up when over the appropriate arrowed block.
overview_zh: 益智遊戲五花八門。有的純靠腦力，有的則加入動作元素。Circus Lido 偏向後者，看起來像是泡泡龍的某個昆蟲系遠房親戚。你扮演一隻矮胖的綠色蜥蜴，目標是清光畫面上的蟲子。你有條粉紅色的長舌頭，會伸出去吞掉擋路的蟲子，然後再把牠們吐進關卡各處那些張大嘴的貪吃植物裡。但蜥蜴似乎跳不高，所以要移動時，你得用往上射出的尾巴勾住上方可攀附的平台區域。為了增加難度，某些地板區段可以按向上並配合對應的箭頭方塊，左右滑動。
comment_en: Circus Lido is  a fairly appealing arcade puzzler. The emphasis is slightly more on puzzle than arcade and now and again you'll be scratching your head trying to figure out how on earth to get to a certain place on screen. The visuals are pretty - well drawn backdrops and nice sprites and the music is suitable enough and doesn't get on your nerves. It's not as mind melting as something like Sokoban and there is no time limit to the levels, giving you room to consider your moves carefully. In all, pretty good puzzle fun. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Circus Lido 是款相當討喜的動作益智遊戲。重心稍微偏向益智而非動作，時不時你會抓著頭想辦法到達畫面上的某個位置。視覺表現不錯——背景繪製精美、角色精靈討喜，音樂搭配得宜也不會惹人厭。它不像 Sokoban（倉庫番）那樣讓人腦袋爆炸，關卡也沒有時間限制，留給你空間仔細思考每一步。整體而言是相當不錯的益智樂趣。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Ryo Saeba - a "Sweeper", bodyguard for hire, handsome, talented and the finest shot in Shinjuku. He's also a monumental lecher who only accepts beautiful female clients and will do anything to get a peek at their bodies. But keeping watch on him is his partner Kaori, sister to his ex-partner who was killed on one fateful night. Kaori has talents herself, being able to produce enormous mallets seemingly from thin air whenever Ryo is acting up around the ladies - and she isn't afraid to use them. City Hunter is based on the very popular manga/anime by Tsukasa Hojo. The game itself is a kind of action/adventure split into several different 'stories', of which you can choose in any order (with the exception of the final chapter). Gameplay mostly involves running around buildings, shooting the bad guys that constantly appear ahead of you and trying out the doorways scattered around. These doors often lead to separate rooms, sometimes with that essential character in that you need to talk to to progress the story. Aside from armed mobsters, you'll also have to navigate around laser beams, crushing machines and spikes that shoot from the ground. Around each level you will also find a nurse to heal you - although stumbling into a room with a semi-naked gal inside has pretty much the same effect. As you progress through the levels, you also gain extra weaponry - the bazooka being particularly useful in a crowded room.
overview_zh: 冴羽獠——一名「清道夫」、受雇保鑣，英俊、才華橫溢，還是新宿最強的槍手。他同時也是個超級色狼，只接受美女客戶，為了偷瞄她們的身體什麼都做得出來。但他的搭檔香同時盯著他——她是他那位在某個命運之夜喪生的前搭檔的妹妹。香自己也身懷絕技，每當冴羽對女士們動手動腳時，她就能從空氣中變出巨大的木槌——而且毫不手軟。City Hunter 改編自北条司非常受歡迎的漫畫/動畫。遊戲本身是動作/冒險混合類型，分成數個「篇章」，可以任意順序選擇（最終章除外）。玩法主要是在建築物中奔走、射擊不斷出現在前方的壞蛋，並試著打開散佈各處的門。這些門通常通往另外的房間，有時裡面就是推動劇情所必須對話的關鍵角色。除了武裝黑幫外，你還得閃避雷射光束、壓扁機械裝置與地面射出的尖刺。每關各處都有護士可以治療你——不過跑進有半裸女孩的房間效果其實也差不多。隨著關卡推進，你還會獲得額外武器——在人多的房間裡，火箭筒特別好用。
comment_en: Firstly, let me say that I do like this game. Gameplay isn't great, but fun enough and not too difficult, and it does suffer not being able to follow the Japanese storyline as this is a major aspect of the levels. Character animation on Ryo is nice, if a little flappy, and generally backgrounds are pleasing, despite there not being much variety. Making progress is a little hit-and-miss and you'll find yourself doing plenty of backtracking in levels in case you've not spoken to that critical character some way along the road. Also, the music is superb and is probably the main hook that makes me enjoy the game to the extent that I do (that and me being a massive City Hunter fan of course). There are some very heavy criticisms I can lay down here. Given that they had the whole City Hunter world to work with, it's pretty shocking what the final product was. It's almost as though the game was well into production before they got the licence and they just slotted the characters in the best they could. For example, the genetic blobs and robot bosses featured in the game are just so out of place in City Hunter, which is anything but science fiction, that it's hard to believe they made it in. The scenery is 95% interiors...no walking the streets of Shinjuku, no Cat's Eye, nothing at Ryo's apartment...characters like Umibozu only appear from time to time (where it would have been an ideal opportunity to be able to switch from one to another) and the overboard visual humour is almost non-existant. As a licensed product, it just fails to feel like City Hunter. As a game, it's fun for a while. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 首先我必須說我確實喜歡這款遊戲。玩法不算出色，但挺有趣也不太難，但因為看不懂日文劇情，這款遊戲的體驗會大打折扣，畢竟劇情是關卡的重要部分。冴羽的角色動畫很不錯，雖然動作有點飄，背景整體來說看起來也蠻討喜的，儘管變化不多。進展有點碰運氣，常常要在關卡內折返，以防錯過沿路某個關鍵角色的對話。另外音樂超讚，大概是讓我這麼喜歡這款遊戲的主要原因（當然還有我本身就是個 City Hunter 超級粉絲）。不過我也有些很嚴厲的批評。考量到他們可以運用整個 City Hunter 世界觀，成品實在令人震驚。感覺這款遊戲幾乎已經開發到很後期才拿到授權，隨便把角色塞進去就交差。舉例來說，遊戲裡的基因怪物和機器人王者跟 City Hunter 完全搭不上——City Hunter 怎樣都不是科幻作品，實在難以相信它們竟然能混進來。場景 95% 都是室內……沒有走新宿街頭、沒有貓眼咖啡店、冴羽公寓裡也什麼都沒有……像海坊主這樣的角色只是偶爾出現（原本可以是讓玩家切換角色的絕佳機會），那些誇張的視覺搞笑橋段也幾乎不見蹤影。作為授權作品，它就是不像 City Hunter。作為遊戲，可以玩一陣子。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
City Hunter (Japanese: シティーハンター, Hepburn: Shitī Hantā) is a Japanese manga series written and illustrated by Tsukasa Hojo. It was serialized in Shueisha's shōnen manga magazine Weekly Shōnen Jump from 1985 to 1991, with its chapters collected in 35 tankōbon volumes. The manga was adapted into an anime television series by Sunrise Studios in 1987. The anime series was popular in numerous Asian and European countries.
City Hunter spawned a media franchise consisting of numerous adaptations and spin-offs from several countries. The franchise includes four anime television series, three anime television specials, three made-for-television animated films, two animated feature films for theatrical release (Shinjuku Private Eyes in February 2019 and Angel Dust in September 2023), several live-action films (including City Hunter, a Hong Kong film starring Jackie Chan, and Nicky Larson et le Parfum de Cupidon, a French film), video games, and a live-action Korean TV drama. It also had a spin-off manga, Angel Heart, which in turn spawned its own anime television series and a live-action Japanese TV drama.

overview_en: Digital Comic based on the manga of the same name. Cobra is a wisecracking and cool guy who, for his protection, has a gun concealed in his arm. He's aided on his quest by his sexy robot, Lady in this sci-fi/space opera-esque story,
overview_zh: 改編自同名漫畫的數位漫畫。Cobra 是個貧嘴又酷帥的男子，為了保護自己，手臂裡藏了一把槍。在這個科幻/太空歌劇風格的故事中，他由性感機器人女郎 Lady 陪同一起踏上冒險。

title_en: COBRA II - THE LEGEND OF MEN
overview_en: The cigar chomping hero returns in another space adventure.
overview_zh: 叼著雪茄的英雄回歸，再次展開一場太空冒險。

overview_en: Puzzle game involving rotating and dropping coloured balls in a 3D play area. Includes an adventure mode and a 4-player party mode.
overview_zh: 益智遊戲，玩法是在 3D 遊戲區域內旋轉並掉落彩色球。含有冒險模式和四人派對模式。

overview_en: Sega’s gem dropping  game keeps things simple. Rotate the coloured jewels as they fall down screen to form rows of three, either vertically, horizontally or diagonally. These groups vanish as they are made, but fail too many times and the gems will hit the top of the screen and end your game. As you progress, the drop rate gets faster and faster. A two player mode is also included.
overview_zh: Sega 的寶石落下遊戲，玩法簡單明瞭。在彩色寶石落下時旋轉方向，使三顆同色寶石連成一排——不論是直、橫或斜向——組合完成就會消除。但消除失敗次數過多、寶石堆到畫面頂端就遊戲結束。隨著進度推進，寶石下落速度會越來越快。也包含雙人模式。
wiki_extract_en: Columns (Japanese: コラムス, Hepburn: Koramusu) is a match-three puzzle video game designed and developed by Jay Geertsen and shared in 1989. Originally developed for the Motorola 68000-based HP 9000 running HP-UX, it was ported to Mac and MS-DOS before being released commercially by Sega, who ported it to arcades and then to several Sega consoles. The game was subsequently ported to other home computers, including the Atari ST.

overview_en: Horizontal shoot 'em up that casts you as a baby dragon out to free a princess from the clutches of an evil....well, you get the idea. Gameplay is traditional, with power-up weapons that include multi-way shot and 'miniature' mode and a sort of reverse R-Type beam where you don't shoot to power it up. Also contains 2 minute and 5 minute time attack modes.
overview_zh: 橫向捲動射擊遊戲，你扮演一隻小龍寶寶，要從邪惡的……算了，你懂的……手中拯救公主。玩法很傳統，強化武器包含多向射擊和「迷你化」模式，還有種類似 R-Type 但反過來不用射擊就能蓄能的光束。另外包含 2 分鐘和 5 分鐘的計時挑戰模式。
wiki_extract_en: Coryoon is a side-scrolling shoot 'em up video game released in 1991 for the PC Engine by Naxat Soft.

title_jp: コズミック・ファンタジー冒険少年ユウ
overview_en: Sci-fi role-playing game.
overview_zh: 科幻角色扮演遊戲。

title_jp: コズミック・ファンタジー2冒険少年バン
overview_en: Fantasy sci-fi role-playing game featuring turn-based battles. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 奇幻科幻角色扮演遊戲，採用回合制戰鬥。Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en: Cosmic Fantasy 2, known in Japan as Cosmic Fantasy 2: Bōken Shōnen Ban (コズミック・ファンタジー2 冒険少年バン) is a role-playing video game developed and published by Nippon Telenet in Japan in 1991, and localized and published by Working Designs in North America in 1992, for the TurboGrafx-CD (PC Engine CD-ROM²) video game console. It is the second game in the Cosmic Fantasy series and was the only one released outside Japan until 2024.

title_jp: コズミック・ファンタジー3冒険少年レイ
overview_en: Sci-fi role-playing game.
overview_zh: 科幻角色扮演遊戲。

title_jp: コズミックファンタジー4 ～銀河少年伝説～ -激闘篇-
overview_en: Sci-fi role-playing game with a very hefty initial chunk of digital comic.
overview_zh: 科幻角色扮演遊戲，開頭有相當長的一大段數位漫畫內容。
no_intro_name: Cosmic Fantasy 4 - Ginga Shounen Densetsu - Totsunyuu Hen (Telenet) (Japan)[AKA Cosmic Fantasy 4 Chapter 1]

title_jp: コズミックファンタジー4 ～銀河少年伝説～ -突入篇-
overview_en: The sci-fi role-playing series continues in chapter 2 of Cosmic Fantasy 4. The game brings you into the main story with a  digital comic style adventure sequence at the beginning before switching to a more familiar overhead viewpoint. Gameplay  is pretty standard - walk around, visit shops for upgrades and fight in  turn-based battles as you progress.
overview_zh: 科幻角色扮演系列 Cosmic Fantasy 4 第 2 章延續前作。遊戲一開始以數位漫畫風格冒險段落帶你進入主線劇情，之後切換成更熟悉的俯視視角。玩法相當標準——四處走動、在商店購買升級，並隨著進度進行回合制戰鬥。
no_intro_name: Cosmic Fantasy 4 - Ginga Shounen Densetsu - Gekitou Hen (Telenet) (Japan)[AKA Cosmic Fantasy 4 Chapter 2]

title_jp: コズミックファンタジー　ビジュアル集
overview_en: Collection of the visual scenes (cinemas) from Cosmic Fantasy games. Longplay Video from World of Longplays
overview_zh: Cosmic Fantasy 系列作品中的視覺場景（過場動畫）合集。Longplay Video from World of Longplays
wiki_extract_en:
Cosmic Fantasy (コズミック・ファンタジー, Kozumikku Fantajī) is a series of role-playing video games created by manga artist Kazuhiro Ochi, published by Telenet and developed by subsidiary LaserSoft from 1990 to 1994. It consists of four games (the last one being split in two installments) for the PC Engine CD console. The first two games were re-released as Cosmic Fantasy Stories, an upgraded compilation for the Sega CD developed by Riot. The series has themes of science fiction, adventure, raunchy comedy, and light erotica. It is notable as among the earlier RPGs to feature extended anime-style cutscenes and voice acting. Cosmic Fantasy 2 was the only game in the series to be released in English, localized and published by Working Designs.
Limited Run Games released Cosmic Fantasy Collection in North America on 25 January 2024. It features new English translations for the first two games. Both of the games only have Japanese voice acting with English subtitles.
Limited Run Games released Cosmic Fantasy Collection 2 in North America on 18 February 2025. It features new English translations for the last three games. All of the games only have Japanese voice acting with English subtitles.

overview_en: Take to the skies as Cotton, a cute witch with an unhealthy desire for 'willows'. You are armed with standard shot and two types of powerful special weapon - a red fire dragon that flies across the screen and an impressive wide burst of electricity. Additionally, you have a little fairy follower who can be sent out to give you that edge when attacking. Increasing the power of your normal shot is a gradual process and is achieved through gaining 'experience' as you destroy enemies. There are also crystals that drop in various colours which can aid you in points, more experience and special weapons. When you die you suffer experience loss and have to work to get your power back up. To add a little spice, Cotton doesn't stick rigidly to horizontal scrolling, and often shifts the play area up or down to keep you on your toes.
overview_zh: 化身為 Cotton 飛上天空吧！她是位對「柳樹（willows）」有著不尋常執著的可愛小女巫。你配備標準射擊以及兩種強力特殊武器——一條飛越整個畫面的紅色火焰龍，以及一道驚人的大範圍電擊。此外你還有一位小精靈跟班，可以派她出擊在攻擊時佔得優勢。提升普通射擊火力是漸進的過程，要透過擊敗敵人累積「經驗值」來達成。另外也會掉落各種顏色的水晶，能增加分數、經驗值與特殊武器。死亡時會損失經驗值，必須努力重新蓄力。為了增添變化，Cotton 並不嚴格採橫向捲動，畫面常常上下移動，讓你不敢鬆懈。
wiki_extract_en:
Cotton: Fantastic Night Dreams is a 1991 scrolling shooter video game developed by Success and published by Sega for Japanese arcades.
