overview_en: Capcom’s horizontally scrolling blaster has you take control of a flying warrior with a Space Harrier style jet-gun thing. Your journey takes you through strange landscapes, from ruined cities to Egyptian tombs. As you fly around, you control shot direction by rotating left or right, allowing you to a 360 degree range of fire. You also have a handy satellite that follows you around, adding to your firepower. This, among other things, can be upgraded in a shop where you can spend all that zenny you have been collecting from your kills. Shops pop up at specific points in each level, so be sure to have enough cash for your gear, armour or health potions.
overview_zh: Capcom的橫向捲動射擊遊戲，玩家操作一位飛行戰士，使用類似《Space Harrier》的噴射槍作戰。旅程會帶你穿越各種奇異場景，從廢墟城市到埃及古墓都有。飛行時可以透過左右旋轉控制射擊方向，能達成360度全方位射擊。還有一個好用的衛星跟著你跑，增加你的火力。你可以在商店裡用擊敗敵人掉落的zenny金錢來升級衛星以及其他裝備。商店會在各關卡特定地點出現，所以要隨時備足現金購買裝備、護甲或補血藥水。
comment_en: The first thing that strikes you about Forgotten Worlds are the impressive graphics, which despite the lack of parallax scrolling are very close to the original arcade version. The second thing that strikes you is the overly fiddly control system, particularly if you don't have a 3 button Avenue pad (unfortunately the 6 button pad does not work correctly). It gets to be a bit of a nuisance to aim where you want at times and so you'll find yourself rotating purely in one direction if you are feeling lazy. But despite this minor niggle, it is a remarkable conversion. As mentioned, the graphics are great (a little flicker and some slowdown the only bugbears here) and the music deserves a special mention. Forgotten Worlds has always had a quite unique soundtrack for a game, and NEC Avenue have arranged this particularly well, and it's certainly worth a regular listen on its own. The game itself peaks and dips with certain levels, the most entertaining being the first few, with the Egyptian styled levels being fun, but slightly less so. Bosses are imaginative and have pretty much gained classic status in the world of video games, along with the goofy dialogue at the end of each level. You also get the option of choosing the poorly sampled arcade speech or some nice crisp new speech which sounds an awful lot better. The game is more challenging than the Mega Drive version and a lot more faithful and will definitely keep fans of the original happy. If you liked Side Arms you can’t go far wrong with Forgotten Worlds, and if you didn’t - well, this shows how it should have been done. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 讓人第一眼印象深刻的就是《Forgotten Worlds》的畫面表現，儘管沒有視差捲動，仍相當接近大型電玩原作。再來讓人印象深刻的就是過於繁瑣的操作系統，尤其是沒有三鍵Avenue Pad手把的玩家特別有感（很遺憾六鍵手把無法正常運作）。要精準瞄準有時會變成一件麻煩事，結果偷懶時就會只朝單一方向旋轉。儘管有這個小缺點，這仍是一次出色的移植。如前所述，畫面表現很棒（只有一點閃爍和輕微的掉速是美中不足之處），音樂尤其值得一提。Forgotten Worlds的配樂一向相當特別，NEC Avenue改編得特別好，絕對值得單獨拿出來反覆聆聽。遊戲本身各關卡有高有低，最有趣的是前幾關，埃及主題的關卡仍算好玩但稍微遜色。頭目設計很有想像力，在電玩史上已幾乎可稱經典，加上每關結尾那些愚蠢的對白也很有味道。還可以選擇品質不佳的大型電玩版取樣語音，或是清晰許多的新版語音，後者聽起來好太多了。遊戲比Mega Drive版更有挑戰性，也忠實許多，原作粉絲一定會喜歡。如果你喜歡《Side Arms》，那絕對不會對《Forgotten Worlds》失望，如果不喜歡Side Arms——嗯，這款示範了它當年應該怎麼做才對。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en: Forgotten Worlds, originally titled Lost Worlds, is a 1988 horizontally scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Capcom for arcades. It is notable for being the first title released by Capcom for their CP System arcade game hardware.

overview_en: Biologically themed shooter including side-pod powerups that can be positioned around your ship.
overview_zh: 以生物為主題的射擊遊戲，包含可圍繞飛機配置的側邊強化模組。
wiki_extract_en:
Formation Armed F is a 1988 vertically scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Nichibutsu for arcades. It was initially only released in Japan, with a PC Engine port released in 1990 by Pack-In-Video.
Hamster Corporation acquired the rights to the game alongside Nichibutsu's intellectual property, releasing the game as part of their Arcade Archives series for the PlayStation 4 in 2016 and Nintendo Switch in 2019 as simply Armed F.

title_jp: フォーメーション・サッカー・ヒューマンカップ'90
overview_en: Vertically scrolling football (or soccer if you prefer).
overview_zh: 縱向捲動的足球遊戲（或者你說soccer也行）。

title_jp: フォーメーションサッカー95 デッラ セリエA
overview_en: Vertically scrolling overhead licensed footie game with an Italian flavour. Play exhibition maches or compete in a league - your standard soccer game options apply.
overview_zh: 縱向捲動俯視視角的正版授權足球遊戲，帶有濃厚的義大利風味。可進行表演賽或參加聯賽——標準的足球遊戲選項一應俱全。
comment_en: I'm not a great fan of sports games in general and despite being British, I couldn't really care less about football/soccer. But Formation Soccer 95 has a certain speed and intensity that makes the gameplay very exciting. Sure, it might border on frustrating at times (if you leave it on default difficulty) but it really gets your heart pounding and your thumb aching like crazy. I surprised myself by actually enjoying it, even if I wanted to punch my screen on more than one occasion. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 我基本上不是體育遊戲的粉絲，雖然身為英國人，我對足球／soccer其實也沒什麼愛。但Formation Soccer 95節奏快、張力十足，玩起來非常刺激。沒錯，預設難度下可能會讓你抓狂，但它真的會讓人心跳加速、大拇指按到發痠。我自己都沒想到會玩得這麼起勁，雖然好幾次氣到想揍螢幕。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Super Formation Soccer '95: della Serie A (スーパーフォーメーションサッカー95 della セリエA) is an official licensed football video game that featured all clubs and footballers from the Italian Serie A (SEASON 1994-95) and was released exclusively in Japan in 1995. It was licensed by Italian Football League and AIC (Associazione Italiana Calciatori). The game is based on the original video game Super Formation Soccer.
In the same year, Formation Soccer '95: della Serie A (フォーメーションサッカー95 della セリエA) was released for the Turbo CD. The game structure differs from Super Formation Soccer '95.
wiki_title: Super Formation Soccer 95: della Serie A

title_jp: フォーメーションサッカーオンJリーグ
overview_en: Football game sequel with the added bonus of a J.League licence.
overview_zh: 足球遊戲續作，加碼取得J聯盟授權。

overview_en: Cute overhead action game with some adventure elements.
overview_zh: 可愛風格的俯視動作遊戲，帶有一些冒險元素。
no_intro_name: Fray CD - Xak Gaiden (Micro Cabin) (Japan)[AKA Fray in Magical Adventure]

title_jp: 餓狼伝説2―新たなる闘い―
overview_en: Ambitious conversion of the famed Neo Geo fighting game. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD
overview_zh: 知名 Neo Geo 格鬥遊戲的野心移植版本。附圖：封面、封底、側標、CD。

overview_en: An updated version of the previous title featuring more playable characters. Images Spine
overview_zh: 前作的升級版本，追加了更多可操作角色。附圖：側標。

overview_en: As the brave knight Arthur, you must rescue the princess from the forces of evil! This sequel to the original Makaimura (Ghosts 'n' Goblins') follows the similar platforming gameplay through a variety of spooky landscapes. Starting with a simple suit of armour and a throwing lance, you can pick up various weapons along the way; these include a rapid-firing dagger, a short range sword, a flame that burns the ground in front of you and a shield that slides along the ground. Some of these weapons are less useful than others and you will soon learn to keep hold of the dagger for as long as possible. You also get the chance to pick up a special gold suit of armour. When equipped, you can fire off a special move by holding and releasing the attack button. These attacks can be especially useful, particularly the ghost Arthur that follows and attacks with you. Armour can only protect you to a degree though - take a hit and you end up walking around in your underwear - take another and you're a pile of bones, ready to start again from either the beginning or the half-way point if you have reached it. Occasionally, you will see chests mysteriously pop out of the ground. These can be both a blessing and a curse as they can either contain weapons, or a magician intent on transforming you into a duck or a slow-moving OAP with a walking stick. Levels are split into two areas, with a daunting boss guarding the exit to each one. Defeat them and it's off to the next stage.
overview_zh: 你扮演勇敢的騎士亞瑟（Arthur），必須從邪惡勢力手中救出公主！這款作品是原作 Makaimura（Ghosts 'n' Goblins）的續集，採用類似的平台動作玩法，穿越各種陰森詭譎的場景。一開始只有一套簡單的盔甲和一支投擲長矛，途中可以撿到各種武器，包括連射匕首、短距離的劍、能在你面前點燃地面的火焰，以及會沿地面滑行的盾牌。有些武器的實用性不如其他武器，你很快就會學到要盡量一直留著匕首。你也有機會撿到特殊的黃金盔甲，裝備之後按住並放開攻擊鈕就可以發動特殊招式。這些攻擊特別有用，尤其是跟著你一起攻擊的幽靈亞瑟。不過盔甲只能在一定程度上保護你——被打到一次就會變成只穿內褲到處跑，再被打到就變成一堆白骨，必須從頭開始，或者如果你已經到達中途點就從那裡重新開始。偶爾你會看到寶箱神祕地從地底冒出來，這些寶箱可能是祝福也可能是詛咒，因為裡面可能裝著武器，也可能跑出魔法師把你變成鴨子或拄著拐杖、行動緩慢的老人。每一關分為兩個區域，每個區域的出口都有一個難纏的魔王把守。打倒牠們就可以進入下一關。
comment_en: And so here it is...the best game on the SuperGrafx. NEC Avenue have done a stunning job in converting this arcade classic, and it’s easily the closest home version of its time. Although hardly arcade perfect, the graphics manage to be a great representation of the original and the SuperGrafx hardware allows a little extra polish with great use of its second background layer. The game itself is great fun to play - the gameplay is fast and full of reflex testing jumps and attack patterns. Until you learn the layout of the levels it can be a pretty tough challenge, but there is rarely a cheap death and the mid-level restart points are never too far to discourage you. That said, the lack of continues on offer is very stingy so if you are having trouble I would highly recommend adjusting the settings in the hidden options screen. If the game has any flaw, it is probably the music. The sound is actually well done, but anyone familiar with the Mega Drive version may find the audio a bit of a disappointment. Despite that, you won’t find a better game on the SuperGrafx and it is an essential purchase. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 好戲登場……這就是 SuperGrafx 上最棒的遊戲。NEC Avenue 在移植這部大型電玩經典時做得非常出色，輕而易舉地成為當時最接近街機的家用版本。雖然稱不上完全還原街機，但畫面設法做到了對原作的優秀重現，SuperGrafx 硬體還讓它能利用第二層背景做出一些額外的光彩。遊戲本身玩起來非常有趣——節奏快，滿是考驗反射神經的跳躍和攻擊模式。在你摸熟關卡配置之前會是相當嚴苛的挑戰，但鮮少有不講理的死法，關卡中途的重生點也從不會遠到讓你氣餒。話雖如此，遊戲提供的 continue 次數實在小氣，如果你玩得很吃力，強烈建議到隱藏選項畫面調整設定。如果說這款遊戲有什麼缺點，大概就是音樂了。音效其實做得不錯，但熟悉 Mega Drive 版本的玩家可能會對音樂有點失望。儘管如此，在 SuperGrafx 上你找不到比這更棒的遊戲，絕對是必買之作。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review

overview_en: Fantasy turn-based strategy battle game with various maps to choose from.
overview_zh: 奇幻風格的回合制策略戰鬥遊戲，可從多張地圖中選擇。

overview_en: Sci-fi based strategy battle game in the Langrisser series.
overview_zh: Langrisser 系列中的科幻題材策略戰鬥遊戲。

overview_en: Overhead run and shoot arcade conversion that relies heavily on your ability to dodge as you work through the many short levels.
overview_zh: 俯視視角的跑轟型大型電玩移植作，玩家需要高度倚賴閃避能力來闖過眾多短小的關卡。
wiki_extract_en:
Gain Ground is a 1988 action arcade video game developed and published by Sega. It is set within a supercomputer's simulation of war, and follows up to three players traversing through a series of forty levels themed after select periods of human history. The goal of each level, depending on the player's choice, is either to guide at least one player character safely to an exit point or to destroy all enemies within them, both of which must be completed before a given time limit elapses.
It was later ported to the Master System, Mega Drive/Genesis, and TurboGrafx-CD.

overview_en: A slight evolution from Space Invaders, Galaga differs in that the enemy craft fly in from the sides of the screen to form up in groups ahead of you. Then, various craft will attack you in different ways - some will spin around as they get close, others will join together to perform super-craft. Each defeated wave moves you along a stage, which are split up by the regular appearance of scrolling levels with multiple encounters and bonus rounds. These bonus rounds are 'Galactic Dancing' and feature the enemies moving around the screen in time to a piece of music. Destroy them all for a huge bonus score. You ship itself has a simple single shot laser, but by strategically letting it be captured and rescued by alien flies, you can power it up into a double, then a super-triple ship for greater firepower, although it is easier to get hit.
overview_zh: Galaga 相較於 Space Invaders 略有演進，不同之處在於敵機會從畫面兩側飛進來，在你前方列隊集結。接著，不同的敵機會以各種方式攻擊你——有的會在接近時旋轉，有的會組合起來變成超級戰機。每擊敗一波就往下一個階段前進，階段之間會穿插具有多次交戰與紅利關卡的捲動關卡。紅利關卡名為「Galactic Dancing」，敵人會隨著音樂在畫面上舞動，全部擊落就能獲得大量分數。你的戰機本身只有簡單的單發雷射，但可以策略性地讓它被外星蟲抓走再救回來，讓它升級成雙重戰機，再升成超級三重戰機以獲得更強火力，不過變大後也更容易被擊中。
wiki_extract_en:
Galaga '88 is a 1987 fixed shooter video game developed and published by Namco for Japanese arcades; it was distributed by Atari Games in North America and Europe. It is the fourth entry in the Galaxian series, following 1984's Gaplus. It features significantly improved graphics over previous games in the series, including detailed backgrounds, larger enemies, and greater ship details.
Galaga '88 was a commercial success in Japan, but was not as successful as its predecessors outside of Japan. The game was praised by critics for its gameplay, graphics, and music, as well as for its new enhancements that changed and innovated the core gameplay. It was ported to the TurboGrafx-16, X68000, and Japanese mobile phones, and is included in several Namco compilations. It was followed by Galaxian3: Project Dragoon in 1990.

title_jp: ギャラクシー刑事ガイバン
overview_en: Cute scrolling fighting game. Longplay Video from World of Longplays Images Front Cover • Back Cover• Spine • CD
overview_zh: 可愛風格的橫向捲動格鬥遊戲。Longplay Video 來自 World of Longplays。附圖：封面、封底、側標、CD。

title_jp: ギャラクシーフォースII
overview_en: An ambitiously planned conversion of Sega's 3D scaling space shooter, Galaxy Force II was never completed.
overview_zh: 原本是 Sega 3D 縮放太空射擊遊戲 Galaxy Force II 的野心移植計畫，可惜最後並未完成。
wiki_extract_en:
Galaxy Force is a 1988 rail shooter video game developed and published by Sega for arcades. The player assumes control of a starship named the TRY-Z, as it must prevent the Fourth Empire from taking over the entire galaxy. Gameplay involves shooting down enemies using either a laser shot or a limited supply of heat-seeking missiles, all while avoiding collision with projectiles or obstacles and making sure the ship's energy meter doesn't fully deplete. It ran on the Sega Y Board arcade system, and was released with a motion simulator cockpit arcade cabinet like previous Sega Super Scaler games (Space Harrier, After Burner and Thunder Blade).
Created by the same group of developers that later went on to form Sega AM1, Galaxy Force was largely inspired by Star Wars, and was developed specifically to show off the capabilities of the Sega Y hardware with its usage of large, detailed backgrounds and massive amount of on-screen sprites. The soundtrack was composed jointly by Katsuhiro Hayashi and Kouichi Namaki, both of whom had previously created the music for Thunder Blade. The game came in three different cabinet styles; a standard upright, a "Deluxe" machine, and a "Super Deluxe" version that could twist and turn the player around. Almost immediately after the game's release, Sega published an updated version titled Galaxy Force II which added two new levels and other minor additions.
Galaxy Force was critically acclaimed, being praised for its graphics, gameplay, presentation, music and hardware capabilities, considered to be visually impressive for the time period. It was ported to several platforms, including the Master System, Mega Drive/Genesis and Commodore 64, and released under several different Sega classic game re-release labels such as Sega Ages. A high-definition remake titled Galaxy Force Neo Classic was released for the PlayStation 2 in Galaxy Force II Special Extended Edition, alongside the original, which featured smoothed-out graphics and additional visual effects. With the exception of the Master System version, all home versions of the game are based on Galaxy Force II.

overview_en: Cute-idol-hero-anime-style digital comic that spawned its own anime series. As Yuna, you adventure across the galaxy, picking up companions as you go and defeating a wide selection of girls in powersuits. The digital comic system here is pretty standard, with a choice of selections and frequent turn-based battle sequences.
overview_zh: 可愛偶像英雄動漫風格的數位漫畫（digital comic），後來還衍生出自己的動畫系列。你扮演 Yuna，在銀河中冒險，途中收集夥伴，並擊敗一連串穿著動力裝的女孩們。這裡的數位漫畫系統相當標準，有選項選擇以及頻繁的回合制戰鬥橋段。
comment_en: I'm a fan of digital comics and Yuna is a pretty good one. Bear in mind this opinion is from the viewpoint of someone who doesn't speak or read Japanese so as far as the plot goes, it's all a bunch of guesswork. The mechanics of the game are fairly simple - there is minimal exploring to do so you won't ever get lost in a maze of locations, and progression is pretty easy from just guessing your menu selections. The combat scenes are a diversion, but tend to go on a bit too long at times. I'm not sure if I'm missing on some of the finer details, but at least one combat scene was so difficult that I had to resort to save states and high-speed mode in an emulator just to stop myself giving the game up. But once I was past it, the rest was fairly plain sailing (combat can often be won just by picking the same selection repeatedly). The flow of story (as far as I can gather) becomes a little predictable at times (planet, fight, planet, fight) but the artwork is all lovely to look at and the music is upbeat enough to make it enjoyable to play. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 我是數位漫畫的愛好者，Yuna 算是相當不錯的一部。先說清楚，這是一個不會說也看不懂日文的人的觀點，所以劇情方面完全是在猜。遊戲機制相當單純——探索部分非常少，所以你不會在一堆地點的迷宮裡迷路，只要胡亂猜選單選項大多也能順利進行。戰鬥場景算是一種調劑，但有時候拖得有點久。我不確定是不是漏掉了什麼細節，但至少有一場戰鬥難到我必須在模擬器上用即時存檔和高速模式，才不至於把遊戲棄坑。不過過了那關之後剩下的就相當順利（很多戰鬥只要重複選同一個選項就能贏）。劇情的推進（就我能推測的範圍）有時變得有點套路（星球、戰鬥、星球、戰鬥），但美術非常賞心悅目，音樂也夠輕快，玩起來挺享受的。sunteam_paul
no_intro_name: Ginga Ojousama Densetsu Yuna (Hudson) (Japan)[AKA Galaxy Fraulein Yuna]
wiki_extract_en:
Galaxy Fräulein Yuna (銀河お嬢様伝説ユナ, Ginga Ojōsama Densetsu Yuna) is a Japanese media franchise created by Mika Akitaka. The Japanese title literally translates to "Galaxy Lady Legend Yuna", "Fräulein" refers to the German word "Fräulein" standing for "Miss".
The main protagonist of the series is Yuna Kagurazaka, a somewhat ditzy 16-year-old girl. After winning a "Galactic Bishōjo Contest", she becomes "The Savior of Light", a magical girl charged with defending the universe from evil. After becoming "The Savior of Light", Yuna gains an impressively powerful armored suit. Her greatest strength, however, lies in her ability to befriend anyone, even her enemies. Her group of comrades (which is extensive) is comprised almost exclusively of former opponents.

title_jp: 銀河お嬢様伝説ユナ2永遠のプリンセス
overview_en: The continuing adventures of Yuna in digital comic format.
overview_zh: Yuna 冒險的續篇，採數位漫畫形式。
wiki_extract_en:
Galaxy Fräulein Yuna (銀河お嬢様伝説ユナ, Ginga Ojōsama Densetsu Yuna) is a Japanese media franchise created by Mika Akitaka. The Japanese title literally translates to "Galaxy Lady Legend Yuna", "Fräulein" refers to the German word "Fräulein" standing for "Miss".
The main protagonist of the series is Yuna Kagurazaka, a somewhat ditzy 16-year-old girl. After winning a "Galactic Bishōjo Contest", she becomes "The Savior of Light", a magical girl charged with defending the universe from evil. After becoming "The Savior of Light", Yuna gains an impressively powerful armored suit. Her greatest strength, however, lies in her ability to befriend anyone, even her enemies. Her group of comrades (which is extensive) is comprised almost exclusively of former opponents.

overview_en: Mahjong game. Visual Scenes
overview_zh: 麻將遊戲。附視覺場景。

overview_en: Selection of puzzle games using mahjong tiles.
overview_zh: 使用麻將牌的益智遊戲合輯。

title_jp: がんばれ！ゴルフボーイズ
overview_en: Overhead 2D golf game. This one does nothing unusual - all the controls are pretty standard for a game of this type, the course is viewed overhead at all times (no 3D tee-off like in Naxat Open) and the view is zoomed in when you reach the green. Club swing is determined using the circular gauge method.
overview_zh: 俯視 2D 高爾夫遊戲。這款遊戲沒什麼特別之處——所有操作都是此類遊戲的標準配置，球場全程以俯視角呈現（不像 Naxat Open 有 3D 開球視角），到達果嶺時畫面會放大。揮桿力道以圓形計量條來決定。

title_jp: ゲート オブ サンダー
overview_en: Hudson's answer to Thunder Force III, Gate of Thunder is an ambitious shoot 'em up that pushes the hardware to its limit. You control the police craft 'Hunting Dog' and have a selection of weapons at your disposal, each of which can be powered up. There is the standard forward firing lightning laser, a wide but less powerful shot and a 3-way bomb weapon that deals the most damage. Also available to you (thanks to the ever helpful Esty who flies by and drops things off from time to time) is a shield and gun pods that follow you above and below, and can switch direction with a quick double tap on the fire button. Aside from the normal enemies coming at you, there are also other obstacles to dodge, such as shafts of shooting lava, shifting backgrounds and huge missiles launching into your path.
overview_zh: Hudson 對 Thunder Force III 的回應之作，Gate of Thunder 是一款野心十足的射擊遊戲，把硬體推到極限。你操控警用戰機「Hunting Dog」，擁有多種可升級的武器。包括標準的前射閃電雷射、範圍較大但威力較弱的散彈，以及威力最強的 3 向炸彈武器。另外（多虧了會不時飛過來丟東西給你的熱心夥伴 Esty）還可以使用護盾和跟隨在你上下方、只要快速按兩下射擊鈕就能切換方向的射擊子機。除了正常的敵人襲來之外，還有其他障礙要閃避，例如噴射的岩漿柱、會移動的背景，以及朝你發射的巨大飛彈。
comment_en: I really cannot praise this game highly enough. From my point of view, this is the best shoot 'em up on the Engine, and probably my favourite on any format. Everything about this game is stunning - the graphics are superbly designed and coloured, with some amazingly ingenious parallax scrolling. Levels are highly varied with a lot of scenery changes, and attack waves are well planned and never seem unfair to the player. And unlike many games, it keeps you coming back even when you’ve completed it, it's just so much fun. The music is also excellent, and very fitting and it’s really a game that you can get your teeth into. If you haven't got this, you're barking mad! sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 我真的怎麼稱讚這款遊戲都不為過。在我看來，這是 PC Engine 上最棒的射擊遊戲，大概也是我在所有平台上最愛的一款。這款遊戲的一切都令人驚豔——畫面設計精良、配色出色，視差捲動的運用也十分巧妙。關卡變化豐富，場景切換多，攻擊波的安排也很用心，從不會讓玩家覺得不公平。而且不像許多遊戲破關後就擱置，這款遊戲即使通關後還是會讓你一玩再玩，就是這麼有趣。音樂也相當精彩、契合氛圍，真的是一款會讓你深陷其中的遊戲。如果你還沒入手，那你一定是瘋了！sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Gate of Thunder is a 1992 scrolling shooter video game developed by Red Company and published by Hudson Soft for the TurboGrafx-CD. It was the first game released in North America to support the Super CD-ROM² format and served as one of the pack-in games for the TurboDuo, a two-in-one system which runs both TurboGrafx-CD and TurboGrafx-16 titles, where it was bundled with Bonk's Adventure, Bonk's Revenge and Bomberman on the same disc. In the game, the player controls the Hunting Dog space fighter craft, piloted by space cop Hawk. Alongside his ally Esty, piloting the Wild Cat support ship, Hawk must stop General Don Jingi and his Obellon armada from obtaining the powerful "Starlight" energy source from planet Aries.
Gate of Thunder was created by Red Raimon, a group within Red consisting of former Technosoft staff which previously worked on the Thunder Force series, whose members would later form the game development company CAProduction. It was the first shoot 'em up game programmed for the Super CD-ROM² format, which allowed features such as more detailed visuals due to its increased memory size. The soundtrack was composed by Nick Wood, a co-founding member of the Syn Sound Design music production studio. First released on the TurboGrafx-CD, the title has since been re-released through the Virtual Console and PlayStation Network download services.
Gate of Thunder garnered acclaim since its release on the TurboGrafx-CD; critics praised the presentation for its detailed and colorful graphics, well-animated sprites, use of parallax scrolling, large bosses, lack of slowdown, CD-quality heavy metal soundtrack, fast gameplay and intense action. Retrospective commentary have been equally positive, being considered one of the best video games of all time and one of the most important shooting titles on the platform. A follow-up, titled Lords of Thunder, was released for the TurboDuo in 1993.

overview_en: Possibly a spinoff of  Ninja Warriors that was unfortunately never released. Images Preview from PC Engine Fan, June 1993
overview_zh: 可能是 Ninja Warriors 的衍生作，很可惜最終並未發售。附圖：PC Engine Fan 雜誌 1993 年 6 月號的預告。

overview_en: Novel game in which you have to earn points by taking photographs of the most newsworthy happenings as you walk down the street. These involve people falling over, planes crashing, UFOs and many other bizarre events. You have a limited amount of film and have to be careful to dodge obstacles such as bouncing balls and skateboards, as contact means you drop some and when you run out the level is over.
overview_zh: 新穎有趣的遊戲，你必須一邊走在街上一邊拍攝最具新聞價值的事件來賺取分數。事件包括人摔跤、飛機墜落、UFO 以及許多其他光怪陸離的情景。你的底片數量有限，必須小心閃避像彈跳球和滑板這類障礙物，被撞到就會掉幾張底片，用完時關卡就結束了。
wiki_extract_en: Gekisha Boy (激写ボーイ, Gekisha Bōi) is an action photography video game developed by Tomcat System and published by Irem for the PC Engine. The game is centered on taking photographs of the interactive environments through which the player progresses.

title_jp: ゲンジ通信 あげだま
overview_en: While screenshots may make this look like a straightforward platformer, it’s actually a little different. It is (for most levels) an auto scroll platform shooting game, where you are constantly running, dodging and building up different ‘powers’ accessed by holding down the fire button. These range from whirlwinds to multiple genies and can get quite destructive when fully powered.
overview_zh: 光看截圖你可能以為這是個直白的平台遊戲，但其實有點不一樣。它（絕大多數關卡）是一款自動捲動的平台射擊遊戲，你會不斷奔跑、閃避，並累積各種按住射擊鈕就能發動的「力量」。這些招式從龍捲風到多個精靈應有盡有，完全充能時破壞力十足。
wiki_extract_en:
Genji Tsūshin Agedama (ゲンジ通信あげだま) is a Japanese anime series created by Sukehiro Tomita and Akira Sakuma, produced by NAS and TV Tokyo, and animated by Studio Gallop. The series was broadcast on TV Tokyo every Friday evening from October 4, 1991, to September 25, 1992. It centers around a kid hero who comes down to Earth in a city in Japan and often battles the city's resident rich girl and supervillainess. The anime contains many of references and parodies from other anime series as well as live-action shows and movies that were popular at the time, e.g., Kiki's Delivery Service, Kamen Rider X, A Taxing Woman, and Sailor Moon (which had started airing a few months afterward, and Usagi Tsukino would be played by the same voice actress as the love interest of this show).
Aside from the anime, two manga series and a PC Engine side-scrolling video game by NEC Home Electronics were made as tie-ins, all of which were also released in 1991. The first manga was written by Kazuhiko Shimamoto and was serialized in Deluxe BomBom, released a few months before the anime. This version followed an early draft that featured different scenarios and character designs to the ones shown in the anime and served as the basis for the video game. The second manga was written by Eiichi Saitō, which was published in Comic BomBom and followed the anime closely.

overview_en: Scrolling robot combat game, converted from an arcade original. Run, attack, run, attack.
overview_zh: 捲軸式機器人格鬥遊戲，從大型電玩原作移植而來。跑、攻擊、跑、攻擊。
comment_en: From the screenshots this looks like a cool robot fighting game, but in reality the gameplay is spread very thinly indeed. It feels like you have little control and are just routinely bashing buttons in the hope something good will come of it, and in the mean time blowing up quite a lot. It's almost as though they got as far as the graphics and forgot to add the gameplay. This would be bad even as a homebrew game, although the music is nice FM style sound and is probably the best thing about this shocking affair. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 從截圖看起來這好像是一款很酷的機器人格鬥遊戲，但實際上玩法內容非常稀薄。你會覺得自己幾乎沒有操控感，只是例行公事地狂按按鈕希望能出點什麼好東西，同時一直被炸掉。感覺就像他們做完畫面之後就忘了把玩法加進去。就算是自製遊戲（homebrew）這樣做都嫌糟糕，雖然音樂是不錯的 FM 風格音色，大概是這場駭人演出中唯一的亮點。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Multi-style game in which you play a Japanese demon warrior with flowing red hair. It is divided into overhead areas, platform areas with small sprites and walk along hack ‘n’ slash bits with much larger characters.
overview_zh: 多風格的遊戲，你扮演一名留著飄逸紅髮的日本鬼武士。遊戲分成俯視畫面、角色精靈較小的平台關卡，以及角色巨大的橫向砍殺（hack 'n' slash）場景。
wiki_extract_en: Genpei Tōma Den is a 1986 hack and slash video game developed and published by Namco for arcades. It was released only in Japan in October 1986. Over a decade later, the game was released in America and Europe in the video game compilation Namco Museum Vol. 4 under the title of The Genji and the Heike Clans for the PlayStation.

overview_en: Sequel to the original multi-style action game. However, this time the focus is purely on the side scrolling run-and-slash scenes. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 多風格動作遊戲原作的續集。不過這次的焦點完全放在橫向捲動的跑與砍場景。Turbo Views Review。

overview_en: Platform action game with a spooky theme, produced in the US. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 陰森主題的平台動作遊戲，美國製作。Turbo Views Review。
wiki_extract_en: Ghost Manor is a horror video game released by Xonox in 1983 for the Atari 2600 and VIC-20. It was packaged in a double ended cartridge and a cassette tape along with one of three other games in an effort to appeal to budget conscious buyers who would purchase two games for the price of one cartridge and one cassette tape. There was also a more limited release of single ended cartridges and cassette tapes containing Ghost Manor by itself. The double ended cartridges and cassette tapes paired Ghost Manor with the platform game Spike's Peak, the fighting game Chuck Norris Superkicks, and a strategy game called Artillery Duel.

overview_en: Adventure based on an anime about Reiko Mikami, a sort of Japanese Ghostbuster.
overview_zh: 改編自動畫的冒險遊戲，主角是 Reiko Mikami，類似日本版的魔鬼剋星（Ghostbuster）。
wiki_extract_en:
Ghost Sweeper Mikami (Japanese: GS美神 極楽大作戦!!, Hepburn: Gōsuto Suīpā Mikami Gokuraku Daisakusen!!; lit. 'Ghost Sweeper Mikami: The Great Paradise Battle!!') is a Japanese manga series written and illustrated by Takashi Shiina. It was published in Shogakukan's shōnen manga magazine Weekly Shōnen Sunday from May 1991 to September 1999, with its chapters collected in 39 tankōbon volumes. It follows the exploits of a group of exorcists who try to combat supernatural forces in an effort to get paid. The series explores some folk religion themes such as possession, exorcism, shamanism, yūrei, and yōkai.
A 45-episode anime television series adaptation by Toei Animation was broadcast on the Asahi Broadcasting Corporation from April 1993 to March 1994. An anime film premiered in August 1994. The anime series was licensed in North America by Sentai Filmworks.
In 1993, Ghost Sweeper Mikami won the 38th Shogakukan Manga Award in the shōnen category.

overview_en: Anime style golf game.
overview_zh: 動漫風格的高爾夫遊戲。

title_en: GOD PANIC SHIJŌ SAIKYŌ NO GUNDAN
title_jp: ゴッドパニック 至上最強軍団
overview_en: Bizarre comical shoot 'em up with a simple, cartoony style.
overview_zh: 風格詭異、帶有搞笑感的射擊遊戲，採用簡潔的卡通風格。
no_intro_name: God Panic - Shijou Saikyou no Gundan (Japan)

overview_en: Godzilla has been kickin’ tail since 1954, and this is the first game to truly let players brawl with the big ‘G’.  Sixteen enemies are included:  Anguirus, Rodan, Gigan, Megalon, Hedorah, King Ghidorah ’64, King Ghidorah ’91, Mecha-King Ghidorah, Mechagodzilla ’74, Mechagodzilla ’75, Super MechaGodzilla, Battra Larva, Battra Adult, Biollante Rose, Biollante Final, and the military hovercraft Super X2. In Normal Mode, you can only play as Godzilla.  At the start of each stage, you are given a choice to fight in one of two locations with its own unique enemy.  Brawling through five battles, your overall score determines what you face in the sixth and final fight.  Each creature defeated becomes an unlocked, playable character for VS Mode with the exception of Biollante. On the surface this is a ‘Street Fighter’ with all of the basic blocks, punches and combo moves you’d expect.  Each character has its signature attacks and battle cries straight from the films.  Enemies carry a point total to achieve depending on how well you can beat them down.  Since the final bosses are made available based on points, only the best fighters with perfect wins will be able to unlock the last couple.  Normal Mode is the single player six-stage adventure, VS Mode lets individuals square off against another person.
overview_zh: 哥吉拉（Godzilla）從 1954 年起就一直在痛扁對手，而這是第一款真正讓玩家操控這位大「G」互毆的遊戲。收錄十六名敵人：Anguirus、Rodan、Gigan、Megalon、Hedorah、King Ghidorah '64、King Ghidorah '91、Mecha-King Ghidorah、Mechagodzilla '74、Mechagodzilla '75、Super MechaGodzilla、Battra Larva、Battra Adult、Biollante Rose、Biollante Final，以及軍用氣墊船 Super X2。在 Normal Mode 中你只能操作哥吉拉。每一關開始時會給你兩個地點選擇，各有專屬敵人。闖過五場戰鬥後，你的總分會決定第六場也就是最終戰的對手。除了 Biollante 以外，每個擊敗的怪獸都會解鎖成為 VS Mode 中的可操作角色。表面上這是一款「街霸（Street Fighter）」式遊戲，具備你預期會有的所有基本防禦、拳擊與連段招式。每個角色都有直接取自電影的招牌絕招和戰吼。擊敗敵人可獲得的點數取決於你打得有多漂亮。由於最終頭目是依分數解鎖的，只有能以完勝之姿打倒對手的頂尖玩家，才能解鎖最後幾個角色。Normal Mode 是單人的六關冒險，VS Mode 則是讓玩家彼此對戰。
comment_en: This game is a MUST HAVE for all Godzilla fans, as it pays homage to the movie series from 1954 through 1993 when the game was developed.  Many consider it to be the best Godzilla game for any system until “Destroy All Monsters: Melee” came out on the Xbox.  Stages accurately depict the backdrops where Godzilla faced off against his respective foe.  But, in an over-the-top nod to fans, the Godzilla character art changes to match how he looked when he fought said enemy!  Nine Godzilla incarnations are included. This is NOT a super-fast moving Capcom button masher.  The controls are responsive, but the characters are 20,000+ ton behemoths, so don’t expect to sneak in with a heavy jab then fly to the other edge of the screen in retreat. Backgrounds have multiple layers of parallax, and the bitmaps are well drawn, but they seem a bit sparse.  Some stages have a pagoda or castle to crash into but the arenas won’t blow players away.  Sound shines on this Super CD.  Each stage has a well-orchestrated theme and just hearing the authentic voices of the beasts send shivers of happy surging. I’m no good at ‘Street Fighters’ but found myself putting in the extra time to try and retain all of the special moves for this one.  It is fun for casual gamers too as a 7-year-old and I could plunk down in front of this and battle for hours. W. Eric Myers Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 對所有哥吉拉迷來說這款遊戲是「必收」的，因為它向 1954 年到 1993 年（遊戲開發時）的電影系列致敬。許多人認為在 Xbox 上的《Destroy All Monsters: Melee》出現之前，這是所有主機上最棒的哥吉拉遊戲。關卡場景精準重現了哥吉拉與各自對手交手的背景。而且，以誇張的方式向粉絲致敬的是，哥吉拉的角色造型會隨著他對戰該敵人時的樣子而改變！共收錄九種哥吉拉造型。這可不是 Capcom 那種超快節奏的亂按鈕遊戲。操作反應很靈敏，但角色都是重達兩萬多噸的龐然大物，別期望能偷溜進去打一記重擊再飛到畫面另一邊撤退。背景有多層視差捲動，點陣圖也畫得不錯，只是看起來有點空。有些關卡會有塔或城堡可以撞毀，但場地整體並不會讓玩家驚豔。這張 Super CD 的聲音表現非常亮眼。每一關都有編排精緻的主題曲，光是聽到那些怪獸原汁原味的吼聲就讓人全身起雞皮疙瘩。我不擅長玩「街霸」類遊戲，但我卻願意多花時間來記住這款遊戲的所有特殊招式。它對休閒玩家也很友善，我和一個 7 歲小孩可以坐在電視前對戰好幾個小時。W. Eric Myers Turbo Views Review

title_jp: 戦斧ゴールデンアックス
overview_en: One of Sega's classic arcade titles, Golden Axe features three fantasy characters on their quest to destroy the evil Death Adder. At the beginning of the game you get to choose from the dwarf Gilius Thunderhead, the woman Tyris Flare and the man Ax Battler. The game itself is a scrolling beat 'em up with the player having to defeat waves of enemies as you progress. There are  also a few creatures you can mount, such as dragons and the chicken-leg from Altered Beast which has a nice tail-whip attack to keep the bad guys at bay. At various points (and between each level) you will encounter tiny little humanoids dressed in blue or green - the green ones drop food to increase your health bars, the blue ones drop magic potions (although you have to put the boot in to get anything from them). Each character is able to cast magic spells, and the more potions you have, the more impressive and powerful the spells are. Gilius casts lightning spells, which are the weakest, Ax casts earthquake spells and Tyris casts powerful fire spells which can be powered up to give you a giant dragon that breathes flames all over the landscape.
overview_zh: Sega 的經典大型電玩之一，Golden Axe 描述三位奇幻角色踏上打倒邪惡 Death Adder 的征途。遊戲開始時，你可以從矮人 Gilius Thunderhead、女性 Tyris Flare 以及男性 Ax Battler 中擇一操作。遊戲本身是橫向捲軸格鬥，玩家必須一路擊敗層層敵人前進。沿途還有一些可以騎乘的生物，例如龍和 Altered Beast 裡的那隻雞腿怪，牠有一記不錯的尾擊可以把壞人打退。在某些地點（以及每關之間），你會遇到穿藍衣或綠衣的小小矮人——綠衣的會掉食物幫你回血，藍衣的會掉魔法藥水（不過你得踹他們一頓才拿得到東西）。每個角色都能施展魔法，而你擁有的藥水愈多，咒法就愈華麗、威力愈強。Gilius 施展最弱的閃電咒，Ax 施展地震咒，Tyris 則能施展強大的火焰咒，充飽後會召喚出一條對整個場景噴火的巨龍。
comment_en: What the hell have they done with this? Golden Axe was one of my most frequently played arcade games in its time and the Mega Drive version was a joy. This, however, is a travesty. The PC Engine is more than capable of a great conversion, but in steps Reno/Telenet and makes a complete dog's breakfast of the whole thing. Firstly, the visuals are awful. Basic backdrops and poorly drawn and coloured sprites resemble the arcade, but not nearly enough. Animation is sloppy, and character movement is ugly and cumbersome. The magic effects are also half of what they should have been. And fans of the original will be shocked by the corners they have cut with the gameplay also - gone are the position specific attacks. No more throwing your enemies or bashing them over the head with your sword hilt - these are the things that made Golden Axe fun! The music is also for the most part very badly arranged, with the cheapest synth sounds being used that do nothing to evoke the spirit of the original. But the icing on the cake is the sound effects, which prove once and for all the programmers have no clue what to do with the hardware - the sword slashing sounds like a duck quacking, and some of the magic spell sounds will make your ears bleed. Some may think that the extensive animated sequences that introduce each character are a big plus point to the game, but to me they only show where all the budget went, which was certainly not on the game itself. It's no wonder that NEC Avenue took over most of the Sega conversions after this sloppy piece of work. If you're not familiar with Golden Axe then you may get some small enjoyment from this game, but for me, just knowing what it could have been like frustrates me all the more every time I force myself to play it. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 他們到底把這遊戲搞成什麼樣子？Golden Axe 當年是我最常玩的大型電玩之一，Mega Drive 版則是一大樂事。但這款根本是一場鬧劇。PC Engine 絕對有能力做出一款很棒的移植，但 Reno/Telenet 偏偏把整件事搞得一塌糊塗。首先，視覺超糟。陽春的背景和畫得、上色都糟糕的角色精靈，勉強讓人聯想到街機版，但差得太遠了。動畫很隨便，角色的動作既醜又笨重。魔法特效也只有應有水準的一半。原作的粉絲也會被他們在遊戲性上的偷工減料嚇到——那些依位置觸發的攻擊全都被砍了。沒辦法再把敵人摔出去，也不能用劍柄砸他們的頭——而這些才是讓 Golden Axe 好玩的地方啊！音樂大部分也編得非常差，用的是最廉價的合成音色，完全沒能喚起原作的氛圍。不過最錦上添花（諷刺意味）的是音效，徹底證明了製作人員根本不懂怎麼用這個硬體——揮劍聲聽起來像鴨叫，有些魔法音效根本會讓你耳朵流血。有些人或許會覺得每個角色開場那些大量的動畫演出是一大加分，但對我來說這只顯示出預算都花到哪去了，肯定不是花在遊戲本身。難怪 NEC Avenue 在這個隨便的作品之後接手了大部分的 Sega 移植案。如果你不熟悉 Golden Axe，或許還能從這遊戲獲得一點小樂趣，但對我來說，想到它本來可以是什麼樣子，就每次被我逼著玩都更氣結。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Golden Axe is a 1989 beat 'em up video game developed and published by Sega for arcades on the Sega System 16B hardware. Players control one of three warriors who must free the fantasy land of Yuria from the tyrannical rule of Death Adder, who wields the titular Golden Axe. The lead designer was Makoto Uchida, who was also responsible for the creation of Sega's earlier Altered Beast (1988).
Golden Axe was well received at the time of release, and was later ported to several home systems, including Sega's own Mega Drive/Genesis and Master System. The game's success spawned a franchise with several sequels and spin-offs, beginning with Golden Axe II in 1991.

overview_en: You play a segmented caterpillar-like creature that has to surround food to open the exit to each level. As you work your way around each area, you pick up new body segments which make you longer, and have the ability drop little bombs that attract the enemy bugs. There is a password system to avoid replaying all the levels every time.
overview_zh: 你扮演一隻分節、像毛毛蟲的生物，必須把食物圍住以打開每一關的出口。在關卡中走動時會撿到新的身體節，讓你變長，並且能夠放置小炸彈來吸引敵人蟲子。遊戲有密碼系統，不用每次都從頭重玩所有關卡。

title_jp: ゲッツェンディーナー
overview_en: A beautiful woman, captured by an evil beast - chained up in his castle and waiting for the brave knight  to come and rescue her. The showdown - the knight fells the evil monster with an almighty blow, but himself is slain where he stands. The captured maiden falls to the floor, her hero and captor both dead by her feet. And this is where the game starts... As you can see, Götzendiener is not your average game. Instead of rescuing the maiden, you ARE the maiden, with only the sword of your rescuer and a couple of magical spells to aid you, you have to escape from the castle you have been imprisoned in. The game looks and plays a lot differently from the usual stuff on the Engine. It's hard to categorize, but it's a sort of isometric puzzle-action-role playing game. The play area is split up into a series of maze-like levels that you have to travel through - from castle to caves to mines. Each level has a minimal selection of baddies that can be taken out with your sword (that is sheathed and unsheathed with the I button), and several puzzles that must be solved to progress. These are usually linked to your spells of which there are two. Pushing SELECT activates a spell - if there are burning torches or candles on screen you can summon a fire dragon, which is good for burning down wooden doorways. Alternatively, if there is a dead monster blocking the passageway you can either push it around or use your magic to possess them. Under possession, they follow you around or can be controlled by holding down button II and moving them. There are a few objects you can pick up - picks for breaking rock, broken pots, magical staffs for teleportation etc. There are no bosses in the game, but levels blend into each other as the game progresses.
overview_zh: 美麗少女被邪惡怪物擄走——被鎖在牠的城堡裡，等待勇敢的騎士前來救援。決戰時刻——騎士以一記壯烈攻擊擊倒邪惡怪物，但自己也當場倒下。被囚禁的少女跌坐在地，救她的英雄與擄走她的怪物都死在她腳邊。遊戲就從這裡開始……如你所見，Götzendiener 可不是普通的遊戲。你不是要去救少女，你「就是」那位少女，只帶著救援者的劍和幾個魔法咒語，必須從關押你的城堡逃出去。這款遊戲的視覺和玩法都跟 PC Engine 上常見的作品很不同。很難歸類，姑且稱它是一種等角視角的解謎動作角色扮演遊戲。場地被分割成一連串迷宮般的關卡，你必須一路穿越——從城堡到洞穴再到礦坑。每一關都有少少幾隻可以用你的劍（按 I 鈕拔劍、收劍）解決掉的壞蛋，以及幾個必須解開才能前進的謎題。這些謎題通常跟你的兩種咒語相關。按 SELECT 可以施展咒語——如果畫面上有燃燒的火把或蠟燭，你可以召喚火龍，能燒毀木門。或者，如果有隻死掉的怪物擋路，你可以把牠推走，或用你的魔法附身牠。附身狀態下牠會跟著你，也可以按住 II 鈕操控牠移動。遊戲中有幾樣可以撿拾的道具——破石頭用的鎬、破掉的壺、傳送用的魔法杖等等。遊戲裡沒有魔王戰，關卡隨著進度彼此連在一起。
comment_en: Götzendiener is a game with a lot of potential. After all, it does come partly from the almighty anime studio of Gainax, who brought us classics like Gunbuster and Evangelion. But it has many flaws. The control is awkward - you move with diagonals instead of up-down-left-right and this can prove annoying and uncomfortable on your thumb. The game moves at a very sedate pace at times, seemingly slowing down for no good reason. Puzzles are pretty basic and there are as few puzzles as there are baddies. Calling it an action game would be wrong - it's more like an adventure, but it is so shockingly short it feels like the first few levels of a larger game. I would guess that this was a game that was only half finished when they decided to go ahead and release it - after all it was 1994 and the Engine was beginning to fade away. And to add insult to injury, the music in game is all chip generated - and not particularly good chip sound either, technically or in composition. During play, Götzendiener isn't a poor game. I was a tad bored at times, but always felt compelled to get a little further - it's just hard to completely recommend such an unfinished and almost demo-length piece of software. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Götzendiener 是一款潛力十足的遊戲。畢竟它部分出自大名鼎鼎的動畫工作室 Gainax 之手，他們帶給我們 Gunbuster、Evangelion 等經典作品。但這遊戲毛病不少。操作很彆扭——你是用對角線而不是上下左右移動，拇指按起來既惱人又不舒服。遊戲節奏有時非常緩慢，好像無緣無故就慢下來。謎題相當基本，謎題和壞蛋一樣少得可憐。說它是動作遊戲不太對——比較像冒險遊戲，但它短到驚人，感覺只是一款更大型遊戲的前幾關。我猜這是一款還只做到一半就決定上市的作品——畢竟當時已是 1994 年，PC Engine 已經開始式微。雪上加霜的是，遊戲內的音樂全是晶片音源——而且不論在技術面還是作曲面都不算特別好。實際玩起來，Götzendiener 並不能算是爛遊戲。我有時是有點無聊，但總是覺得被驅使著要再往前一點——只是這樣一款未完成、幾乎只是試玩版長度的軟體，實在很難完全推薦。sunteam_paul

overview_en: An arcade conversion of Konami's classic shoot 'em up, Gradius is simple, no frills shooting action. The weapon system is fairly unique to the series, with power-up pod that cycles through a list of weapons at the bottom of the screen, allowing you to choose what you want, when you want it. The weapons themselves are fairly simple and range from bombs to diagonal shots or thin lasers. Given time, you can also amass a squad of 'options' that follow your ship and shoot when you shoot - very useful little buddies indeed. The levels are all space based, with lava-spewing volcanoes, mysterious Easter Island heads and destroyable walls to block your path.
overview_zh: Konami 經典射擊遊戲的大型電玩移植版，Gradius 是樸實無華的射擊動作。本系列的武器系統相當獨特，畫面底部有一個能量強化欄，會循環顯示各種武器，讓你自己決定什麼時候要拿什麼。武器本身相當簡單，從炸彈到斜向射擊或細雷射都有。只要給夠時間，你也可以累積一隊跟著你的戰機飛行、隨你開火的「options」，是非常實用的小夥伴。關卡全部以太空為背景，有噴岩漿的火山、神祕的復活節島人頭像以及擋路的可破壞牆壁。
comment_en: Gradius is a fine conversion of a classic, albeit an old classic. Your enjoyment will probably depend on how much you were into the original. I personally can take it or leave it - the design is a little bland and dated, although the interesting weapon system and sometimes intense action work in its favour. The main problem with Gradius is the terrible slowdown that the game suffers, which is a pity as it does affect the gameplay enough to become annoying and disruptive at times. Thankfully, Konami pulled their finger out for Parodius which does not suffer in the same way. So it's a good shooter, not exceptional, but mostly one for the existing fans. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Gradius 是經典作品的優秀移植，雖然是相當老的經典。你會不會樂在其中，大概要看你對原作的投入程度。我個人可有可無——設計有點平淡老派，但有趣的武器系統和偶爾激烈的動作也算是加分。Gradius 最大的問題是遊戲嚴重的減速，這點很可惜，因為它確實嚴重到會影響遊戲體驗，時不時讓人覺得惱火、被打斷。所幸 Konami 在 Parodius 上動了起來，沒有同樣的問題。所以它是一款不錯但不出色的射擊遊戲，主要推薦給既有粉絲。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Gradius is a 1985 horizontally scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Konami for arcades. It is the first installment in the Gradius series. The player maneuvers a spacecraft known as the Vic Viper that must defend itself from the various alien enemies. The game uses a power-up system called the "power meter", based upon collecting capsules to acquire additional weapons.
The arcade version of Gradius was initially released internationally outside Japan under the title of Nemesis, but subsequent home releases have since used the original title. During development, it had the working title Scramble 2, as it was originally intended to be a follow-up to Konami's earlier shooter Scramble (1981). Home versions were released for various platforms, such as the Nintendo Entertainment System, the MSX home computer, and the PC Engine. It was a major success in 1986, becoming the year's highest-grossing arcade game in London and one of Japan's top five table arcade games, while the Famicom port sold over a million copies in Japan that year. Nintendo released the NES version in arcades for the Nintendo VS. System as VS. Gradius and PlayChoice-10 in November 1986.
Gradius was critically acclaimed for its gameplay and at the time unique power-up system. Along with Namco's Xevious, it is cited as being one of the most important shooter games, having paved the way for many similar games to follow.

title_jp: グラディウスIIゴーファーの野望
overview_en: CD Conversion of Gradius II featuring the original arcade music.
overview_zh: Gradius II 的 CD 移植版本，收錄大型電玩原作的音樂。
wiki_extract_en: Gradius II, retitled Vulcan Venture in North American arcades, is a 1988 horizontally scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Konami. It is the sequel to Gradius and was succeeded by Gradius III. Initially released in  arcades, ports of Gradius II were released for the Family Computer (under the shortened title of Gradius II), PC Engine Super CD-ROM², and the X68000 in Japan. The original arcade version is also included in the Gradius Deluxe Pack compilation for the PlayStation and Sega Saturn and in Gradius Collection for the PlayStation Portable.

overview_en: Isometric, turn-based robot strategy game.
overview_zh: 等角視角、回合制的機器人策略遊戲。

title_jp: 空想科学世界ガリバーボーイ
overview_en: A tie in with an anime series of the same name, Gulliver Boy takes place in a surreal reimagining of our world.  Venice, Spain, and other Mediterranean-esque locations will be traveled in this steampunk/mecha/magic world ultimately leading to Atlantis. Gulliver, a young magic user and his younger, super genius inventor buddy Edison are pulled into a sweeping war as Judau, the king of Spain is attacking Venice.  They team up with a musical healer named Misty and set out to end Judau’s reign. But, are there other forces at work?
overview_zh: 與同名動畫的聯動作品，Gulliver Boy 的故事設定在一個對我們現實世界進行超現實重新詮釋的世界。威尼斯、西班牙，以及其他類似地中海風格的地點都會在這個蒸氣龐克／機甲／魔法世界中走過，最終通向亞特蘭提斯。年輕的魔法使用者 Gulliver 和他年紀更小、超級天才發明家夥伴 Edison 被捲入一場波瀾壯闊的戰爭，因為西班牙國王 Judau 正攻擊威尼斯。他們與一位以音樂治療的角色 Misty 組隊，出發去終結 Judau 的統治。但是，幕後是否還有其他勢力在運作？
comment_en: Anyone who seeks to collect showpieces for the Engine’s capabilities should get this title.  The HuVideo alone is worth the price of admission, but then you get an amazingly rich game to boot?  Bonus! Of all the Engine’s 16-bit RPG’s with their Run/Fight/Magic/Item battle systems there are two whose graphics are so solid, so indicative of the beauty of pixel art I’d put them against any other console of the time; Seiya Monogatari and Gulliver Boy.  Just look at any screenshot. There’s not much CD music here.  I’m guessing with the HuVideo, they sacrificed some space and the wavesynth music is standard Engine fair – no landmarks were created in that department.  However, when the compressed version of the main theme plays, it is just as wonderful as a Joe Hisaishi soundtrack (Studio Ghibli composer).  And, like Seiya Monogatari, the voice acting is superb although some voices, like Edison, are that grating, high pitched kind used for humor in Japanese media. Gameplay, as mentioned above, is standard RPG.  Walking the overworld, you see the creatures so you can pick and choose your battles.  In a fight you get a beautifully detailed, although rather static backdrop. Your characters’ portraits are displayed at the bottom.  You can control three of your characters, the fourth member can change throughout the game and make their own decisions in battles.  During boss fights, the enemy picture takes up the whole window and it updates to show damage when they’re losing. If the world could have experienced titles like this instead of some of the system’s shovelware, perhaps Hudson would have been a contender through the 32/64-bit era and beyond?  The community should rally around this one, it truly is a landmark title. W. Eric Myers
comment_zh: 想要蒐集能展現 PC Engine 能耐的展示作品的人，都應該入手這款。光是 HuVideo 就值回票價了，結果還附送一款內容豐富得驚人的遊戲？賺到了！在 PC Engine 眾多 16 位元 RPG（那種 Run/Fight/Magic/Item 戰鬥系統）中，有兩款的畫面扎實到、以像素藝術之美來說，我會把它們和任何同時期主機相比也毫不遜色；就是 Seiya Monogatari 和 Gulliver Boy。隨便挑張截圖看看就知道。這裡 CD 音樂不算多。我猜配合 HuVideo 的關係，他們犧牲了一些容量，波形合成音樂則是 PC Engine 的標準水準——這部分沒有什麼劃時代的表現。不過當主題曲的壓縮版響起時，聽起來就跟久石讓的配樂（吉卜力工作室的作曲家）一樣棒。而且跟 Seiya Monogatari 一樣，配音非常精湛，雖然像 Edison 那種尖銳的高音屬於日式媒體常見用來搞笑的刺耳聲音。玩法如前述，是標準 RPG。在世界地圖上走動時你看得到怪物，所以可以自行挑選戰鬥。進入戰鬥後會看到一張漂亮細緻、雖然頗為靜態的背景圖。角色肖像顯示在畫面下方。你能操作三位角色，第四位隊員會在遊戲中輪替，並在戰鬥中自行決定行動。魔王戰時敵人圖像會占滿整個視窗，並且會更新顯示牠們受傷的樣子。如果當年世界能多接觸這類作品，而不是這個系統上某些濫竽充數的作品，或許 Hudson 能在 32/64 位元時代甚至之後繼續立足？玩家社群該為這款遊戲集結起來，它真的是一款里程碑級的作品。W. Eric Myers
no_intro_name: Kuusou Kagaku Sekai Gulliver Boy (Hudson) (Japan)[AKA Nouvelle Fanpasia Gulliver Boy]
wiki_extract_en: Imagination Science World Gulliver Boy (Japanese: 空想科学世界ガリバーボーイ, Hepburn: Kūsō Kagaku Sekai Garibābōi) or simply Gulliver Boy is a Japanese anime series created by Oji Hiroi and Toyoo Ashida. It was produced by Toei Animation, directed by Ashida and aired on Fuji TV from January 8, 1995 to December 24 of that year. On December 5, 2012, Pony Canyon released the series in a DVD box in Japan.

overview_en: Military based gunboat simulation/action game using a mix of sprites and polygon graphics.
overview_zh: 軍事題材的砲艇模擬／動作遊戲，混用角色精靈與多邊形畫面。
comment_en: A courageous  attempt to get a polygon-based military simulation onto the PC Engine, Gunboat just fails to deliver. With a tiny play area and sluggish controls, the slow pace of the gameplay and lack of in-game music does nothing to endear you to  a game far more suited to  home computers than a console. The game soon becomes boring and there is very little to recommend here. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 這是一次勇敢的嘗試，想把多邊形為主的軍事模擬帶到 PC Engine 上，但 Gunboat 終究沒能交出令人滿意的成果。畫面可玩範圍很小、操作遲鈍，再加上節奏緩慢、缺乏遊戲內音樂，讓你實在很難喜歡上這款更適合家用電腦而不是家用主機的遊戲。遊戲很快就讓人覺得無聊，這裡實在沒什麼好推薦的。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en: Gunboat is a simulation video game developed and released by Accolade in 1990 for MS-DOS. Ports were released for the Amstrad CPC, ZX Spectrum, Amiga and TurboGrafx-16. It is a combat simulator of a Patrol Boat, River (PBR).

overview_en: A highly polished and arcade-like shoot 'em up, Gunhed shows off some spectacular weapons, super-fast scrolling and tons of sprites on screen at once. The gameplay is familiar, with a selection of different weapons to power-up with devastating effect as you blast your way across a variety of space and land based areas.
overview_zh: 高度打磨、接近街機風格的射擊遊戲，Gunhed 展現出令人驚豔的武器、超快速捲動以及同時出現在畫面上的大量角色精靈。玩法熟悉，具備多種可升級武器，在一連串太空和地面為背景的區域中一路開火前進，效果十足。
comment_en: Gunhed is a classic, one of the games that really sold the PC Engine to some people. Arcade quality graphics, sampled speech and some of the most impressive weapons you've seen. And be sure that it is a decent shoot 'em up, but it is not flawless. The main problem I have with the game is the pacing. The first few levels are, let's say, not the most exciting in the world. There is something about the timing of the enemy waves that seems a little slow and makes the game appear a bit empty compared to others. It's only when you get quite far into it that the difficulty ramps up and things really begin to kick off. This may seem like a minor gripe, but it does greatly affect my enjoyment of the game, as does the music. I've never really liked the music to Gunhed, it seems a bit too passive and doesn't set the mood for action. Basically this all boils down to two things I expect from a great shoot 'em up. The first is a  great initial level  to really gear me up for what is to come, the second is a kick-ass level 1 tune that complements the action perfectly. There are many examples of this (Super Star Solder, Nexzr, Spriggan, Soldier Blade etc.), but it's not something that Gunhed does well. I know this is on most people's 'must have' lists, but for my taste it has always fallen a little short of greatness and certainly doesn't compare to the successors from Hudson. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Gunhed 是一款經典，是當年真正讓某些人決定入手 PC Engine 的遊戲之一。街機等級的畫面、取樣語音，以及你可能看過最華麗的一些武器。這肯定是一款不錯的射擊遊戲，但並非完美無缺。我對這款遊戲最大的抱怨是步調。前面幾關，怎麼說呢，不是世界上最令人興奮的。敵人波次的時機安排感覺有點慢，讓遊戲相較於其他作品顯得有點空。要等到相當後面的關卡，難度才會上來、戰況才真的熱烈起來。這聽起來可能像是小毛病，但確實會大大影響我對這款遊戲的享受，音樂也是一樣。我一直不太喜歡 Gunhed 的音樂，感覺太過被動，無法營造動作氛圍。這一切基本上歸結到我對優秀射擊遊戲的兩個要求。第一是有一關很棒的開場關，真正讓我為接下來的內容做好準備；第二是一段威猛的 Level 1 BGM，完美襯托動作場面。符合這兩點的例子很多（Super Star Soldier、Nexzr、Spriggan、Soldier Blade 等等），但 Gunhed 不在其中。我知道這在很多人心中是「必收」名單上的作品，但就我的口味來說，它一直未能達到偉大的水準，和 Hudson 後續的作品相比更是遜色。sunteam_paul

aka: MAD KING GRANZORT, MADŌ KING GRANZORT
overview_en: Platform game in which you can switch between robots with various abilities.
overview_zh: 平台遊戲，可以在擁有不同能力的多台機器人之間切換。

title_jp: トップをねらえ！ Gunbuster VOL.1
overview_en: Sticking very closely to the first two episodes of the anime, Gunbuster Vol.1 is a digital comic, but approached differently than normal. To add more of a game experience to it, you have a stress meter on the right hand side of the screen and as you make incorrect choices, the meter fills up. When it reaches the top, it's game over and you have to replay from the beginning of that section. The game also features character statistics and a bonus drama scene.
overview_zh: 非常忠於動畫前兩集劇情，Gunbuster Vol.1 是一款數位漫畫，但切入方式和一般有所不同。為了增加遊戲性，畫面右側有一條壓力條，當你做出錯誤選擇時，壓力條就會上升。一旦累積到頂就 Game Over，必須從該段落的開頭重玩。遊戲也包含角色數值統計及一段額外的劇情場景。
comment_en: Riverhill Soft has made some strange design choices for this game. The stress meter is an original idea for a digital comic and no doubt works well if you can understand Japanese, but it is more of a hindrance to anyone else as most of your choices are trial and error. However, it does not mean the game is rendered impossible - it's still pretty easy to get through it with a good memory or a notepad beside you. The visuals are also an odd choice. Instead of clean, colourful redrawn images of most other digital comics, these are more or less digitized and cleaned up, meaning that there is a certain loss of colour depth, although some of the animation is pretty good. The music is nice, the fantastic title song from the anime is there, along with some reasonable chip generated renditions of the soundtrack. Personally, I'm a massive fan of the original anime, so I enjoyed this game tremendously; it has some great dramatic moments and moves fairly quickly compared to some other games of this type. Fans of other digital comics might feel a little short-changed by this though, and may be more comfortable with something else. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Riverhill Soft 為這款遊戲做出了一些特別的設計選擇。壓力條對數位漫畫來說是一個新穎的點子，如果你看得懂日文肯定效果很好，但對其他人來說反而是個阻礙，因為大多數選擇只能靠試錯（trial and error）。不過，這並不代表遊戲變得完全玩不下去——只要記性好或在旁邊放張紙條記筆記，還是相當容易破關。視覺呈現的選擇也挺特別。這裡不是大多數數位漫畫那種乾淨、色彩鮮明的重繪畫面，而是數位化後再加以修整的處理，所以色深會有所損失，不過部分動畫表現還不錯。音樂不錯，動畫裡那首很棒的主題曲也有收錄，配樂也有一些以晶片音源做的還算像樣的重新詮釋。就我個人而言，我是原作動畫的超級粉絲，所以對這款遊戲非常享受；它有一些很棒的戲劇性時刻，節奏也比一些同類遊戲快一些。不過熟悉其他數位漫畫的粉絲可能會覺得被打折扣，可能去玩別款比較自在。sunteam_paul

title_jp: トップをねらえ！ Gunbuster VOL.2
overview_en: This continues the story, with improved graphics and a lot more extras to play with, including a janken (scissors/paper/stone) match.
overview_zh: 延續故事的續作，畫面提升，還加入了更多額外玩點，包括猜拳（janken，剪刀石頭布）對戰。

overview_en: Wacky and colourful shoot 'em up with a Japanese flavour.
overview_zh: 帶有日式風味、瘋狂又繽紛的射擊遊戲。
wiki_extract_en: Hana Tāka Daka!? is a 1991 side-scrolling shoot 'em up video game released for the NEC PC Engine by Taito.

overview_en: Featuring one of the oddest characters in a shoot 'em up, you control the rotation of your firing arm, allowing you to shoot in all directions.
overview_zh: 主角是射擊遊戲中最奇特的角色之一，你可以控制射擊手臂的旋轉方向，讓你能朝各個方向開火。

overview_en: He might look like a condom, but Hany is one active little guy. Following on from Hany in the Sky (released the year before), Hany on the Road is a scrolling action game and bears a strong resemblance to Shockway Rider, a game released a few years before on the Spectrum, C64 and Amstrad CPC. You control Hany (or Lemon if you are playing a two player game) who must run the length of the 'road' to reach the goal. The road is divided up into four walkways, which you can instantly switch to by pushing up and down on the pad. Depending on the stage, the walkways have various behaviours: some auto scroll, with the faster at the bottom of the screen, others are push-scroll and some even scroll in multiple directions just to shake things up. They are also littered with enemies and obstacles, such as the fiery rocks that rain down from a volcano in the background. Unfortunately for Hany and friend, he's not blessed with a weapon of any kind, so to protect yourself you have to rely on dodging and jumping to stay alive. There are also plenty of items to collect that give anything from points to lives and some that clear the screen of enemies if you can get to them in time. Once the level is complete, you are on to the next one and are sometimes given a choice of which route to take.
overview_zh: Hany 長得可能有點像保險套，但牠可是個活力滿點的小傢伙。繼前一年發售的 Hany in the Sky 之後，Hany on the Road 是一款捲軸動作遊戲，與 Shockway Rider 有強烈相似之處（那是幾年前在 Spectrum、C64 和 Amstrad CPC 上發售的遊戲）。你操控 Hany（或雙人遊戲時是 Lemon），必須跑完整條「道路」抵達終點。道路被分成四條人行道，只要按搖桿上下方向就能立刻切換。依照關卡不同，人行道有各種行為：有些會自動捲動，愈靠下方速度愈快，有些是玩家推著才捲動，還有些甚至會往多個方向捲動來把局勢攪亂。上面還散布著敵人和障礙物，例如從背景火山噴下來的火岩。不幸的是，Hany 和夥伴都沒有任何武器，所以要保命只能靠閃躲和跳躍。有很多可收集的道具，從加分、加命，到能及時吃到就能清掉整個畫面敵人的都有。完成當前關卡就進入下一關，有時還可以選擇要走哪條路。
comment_en: Hany on the Road is a great idea and benefits from being the only game of its type on the PC Engine. It looks good, with well drawn sprites, nice use of colour and some neat visual effects here and there. Audio is what I have come to expect from Face - light, jolly and catchy. And to begin with the game is a lot of fun to play. It can take a deal of concentration to dodge and jump when things get frantic on screen and the levels themselves provide some welcome variety within the format. The point at which the game fails is the learning curve, which is far too steep. The first two or three levels are fairly easy to clear, but without practice you can very quickly lose all your lives and have to start again from the beginning of the area. Not the level, the whole area, forcing you to replay the initial stages time and time again. It doesn't help that some enemies require very precise jumping to avoid and you can often feel that things are a little unfair. It's a shame because if the difficulty was more gradual, or the restart points placed more regularly, then this would probably be a game that I could very much recommend. As it stands I feel this is a game that you should try before you buy, and if you are someone who relishes a challenge then you may well find something here for you. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Hany on the Road 是個很棒的點子，也受益於它是 PC Engine 上這類遊戲的唯一之作。畫面不錯，角色精靈畫得好、配色漂亮，這裡那裡也有一些不錯的視覺效果。音效是我對 Face 的一貫印象——輕快、歡愉、朗朗上口。剛開始玩時也非常有趣。當畫面上的狀況忙亂起來時，要閃躲和跳躍需要相當的專注，關卡本身也在這個框架下提供了令人歡迎的變化。遊戲失敗之處在於學習曲線太陡。前兩、三關相當容易過關，但沒練習的話你會非常快就把命都丟光，又得從該區的開頭重來。不是該關卡，而是整個區域，逼你一次又一次重玩前面那幾關。雪上加霜的是，有些敵人需要非常精準地跳躍才閃得過，你常會覺得有點不公平。很可惜，如果難度更循序漸進，或是重生點安排得更密，我大概會非常推薦。就目前狀況而言，我認為這是一款你該先試再買的遊戲，如果你是那種樂於接受挑戰的玩家，或許還真的能從中找到樂趣。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Follow-up to Tetris that involves dropping a variety of different hats onto people's heads.
overview_zh: Tetris 的後繼作，玩法是把各式各樣不同的帽子掉到人們頭上。
wiki_extract_en: Hatris (ハットリス, Hattorisu) is a 1990 puzzle video game developed by Alexey Pajitnov and Vladimir Pokhilko of ParaGraph for Bullet-Proof Software. An arcade version was manufactured by Video System.

overview_en: Digital comic style talk-to-girls game package thingy (it's hard to describe, OK?).
overview_zh: 數位漫畫風格的「跟女生聊天」類遊戲套組（很難形容，OK？）。

overview_en: Horizontal shoot 'em up similar in style to Power Gate, although technically more advanced.
overview_zh: 風格與 Power Gate 相似的橫向捲軸射擊遊戲，不過技術上更為進步。

overview_en: Sci-fi shooter featuring a transforming spacecraft and lots of mechanical and demonic enemies.
overview_zh: 科幻射擊遊戲，有會變形的太空戰機以及大量機械和惡魔敵人。
wiki_extract_en: Heavy Unit (ヘビーユニット, Hebii Yunitto) is a horizontally scrolling shooter arcade video game developed by Kaneko and published by Taito in 1988. It was ported to the PC Engine by Taito and was released on December 22, 1989. There was also a Mega Drive port by Toho entitled "Heavy Unit: Mega Drive Special" released on December 26, 1990. The player takes control of a star ship that can transform into a mecha by obtaining a specific type of power up.

overview_en: Shoot 'em up conversion that features switchable multi-directional weapons.
overview_zh: 射擊遊戲移植作，具備可切換的多方向武器。

title_jp: ハイレグファンタジー
overview_en: Spoof adult RPG in the style of Final Fantasy.
overview_zh: Final Fantasy 風格的惡搞成人 RPG。

overview_en: Complex strategy battle game.
overview_zh: 複雜的策略戰鬥遊戲。

overview_en: Another of Tokuma Shoten's life simulation style adventures.
overview_zh: Tokuma Shoten 另一款生活模擬風格的冒險遊戲。
wiki_extract_en:
Himitsu no AiPri (ひみつのアイプリ, Himitsu no AiPuri) is a Japanese dress-up rhythm arcade game developed by syn Sophia and published by T-ARTS Company. It is the successor to Waccha PriMagi! and the fifth entry in Takara Tomy's Pretty Series.
An anime television series co-produced by OLM and DongWoo A&E began airing from April 7, 2024 to March 29, 2026, It is set to be followed by sequel titled, Onegai AiPri on April 5, 2026.

overview_en: Robot strategy battle game.
overview_zh: 機器人題材的策略戰鬥遊戲。

title_jp: ヒット ジ アイス
overview_en: 2-a-side ice hockey game that doesn't take itself too seriously.
overview_zh: 2 對 2 的冰上曲棍球遊戲，風格不太認真嚴肅。
comment_en: Hit The Ice isn't a perfect ice hockey sim by any means but it was never supposed to be taken all that seriously. Having only 2 players per side is somewhat limiting at first but turns out to be a good thing as you aren't faced with the usual problem of team sports games where you are desperately trying to find which player the computer has decided to give you contol of. Much of the game is spent trying to bash your opponents with yout sticks and it is fun for a while, but this is a game best played in short bursts as extended play just gets tedious. I just wish the players moved a bit faster. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: Hit The Ice 絕對稱不上完美的冰上曲棍球模擬，但它本來也沒打算要被當成正經作品看待。每邊只有 2 名選手剛開始會覺得有點侷限，但結果反而是好事，因為你不會碰到團隊運動遊戲常見的那個問題——拼命找電腦到底把控球權切給哪個選手了。遊戲大半時間都在用球桿互相砸對手，有一陣子還挺有趣，但這款遊戲最適合短時間玩，玩久了就單調乏味了。我只希望選手能動快一點。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
no_intro_name: Hit the Ice - VHL - The Video Hockey League (Japan)

title_jp: 炎の闘球児 ドッジ弾平
overview_en: Dodgeball game with loads of anime style sequences and even an RPG style story mode.
overview_zh: 躲避球遊戲，有大量動漫風格的動畫演出，甚至還有 RPG 風格的故事模式。

overview_en: Unreleased action game.
overview_zh: 未發售的動作遊戲。

overview_en: Arcade conversion of this scrolling action platform game. Run along the ghostly landscapes, shooting spirits and ghouls with your gun, which has a range of attack modes depending on the icons you collect.
overview_zh: 這款捲軸動作平台遊戲的街機移植版。在陰森的場景中奔跑，用你的槍射擊幽靈和食屍鬼（ghoul），依撿到的圖示不同，槍有多種攻擊模式。

title_jp: ヒューマンスポーツフェスティバル
overview_en: Sports compilation featuring Formation Soccer, Final Match Tennis and Fine Shot Golf. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back
overview_zh: 運動合輯，收錄 Formation Soccer、Final Match Tennis 以及 Fine Shot Golf。附圖：封面、封底、側標、CD、登錄卡正面、登錄卡反面。

title_jp: 百物語 ～ほんとにあった怖い話～
overview_en: Hyaku Monogatari is based on a traditional Japanese parlour game in which a group of people would tell 100 spooky tales in one night, extinguishing a candle after each one. Once the final tale was told, it was rumoured that the spirits would appear and something pretty nasty might happen, which is why most players called it quits at 99. The PC Engine take on this is not a game, but a collection of stories. You are presented with a screen showing 100 candles and you can choose (in any order) whichever one you like. You are then shown a scary story which ends with the candle being blown out. The stories are presented in similar ways, with limited interaction. Most are text over digitised images (with some animation here and there) and sinister music and sound effects. Others allow you to chose map or building locations and hear a relevant story or report. There are also a selection of tales read by Junji Inagawa - a Japanese actor and  horror author. Once the game is complete, you gain access to three mini 'games'; Candle blowing, Ouija board and Zener cards.
overview_zh: Hyaku Monogatari 取材自傳統日本客廳遊戲「百物語」：一群人在同一個夜晚講 100 個怪談，每講完一個就吹熄一根蠟燭。據傳說，講完最後一個故事後幽靈就會現身，可能會發生相當可怕的事，這也是大多數玩家會在第 99 個就喊停的原因。PC Engine 版並不是一款遊戲，而是一部故事合集。你會看到一個畫面上有 100 根蠟燭，可以任意順序挑選你想聽的那一根。接著畫面會呈現一個恐怖故事，結尾時該蠟燭會被吹熄。故事的呈現方式相似，互動有限。大多是在數位化影像上加字幕（偶爾配上一些動畫）並搭配陰森的音樂和音效。另外有些會讓你選擇地圖或建築物位置，聆聽相關的故事或報告。還有一些故事由稻川淳二（Junji Inagawa）朗讀——他是日本演員、恐怖故事作家。全部玩完後，你會解鎖三款小「遊戲」：吹蠟燭、碟仙（Ouija board）以及 Zener 卡片。
comment_en: This is one of those titles that it is impossible to have a valid opinion of, unless you can understand Japanese. To the westerner, it's a curiosity and your mileage may vary. I was hoping to have more traditional tales of yokai (Japanese demons) than the contemporary stories we have here, but nevertheless, I still found it mildly interesting seeing all the pictures. Most of the stories are fairly short and have about enough visual stimuli so as not to bore you if you can't read the text. None of it is particularly frightening and there's a lot of shots of houses, corridors and the inside of cars. There isn't as much animation as I would have liked, with Hudson settling for lots of wibbly wobbly picture effects to create the mood. The mini games are also fairly useless so don't consider them an incentive to play. In conclusion, I'm not going to rate this title as it is entirely up to you - I got something out of it, maybe you will, maybe you wont. Who knows? sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 這是那種——除非你懂日文，否則很難給出什麼中肯評價的作品。對西方玩家而言這只是個奇特物件，感受因人而異。我原本期待有比這裡收錄的當代故事更多傳統妖怪（日本惡魔）故事，但儘管如此，看看所有的圖片還是讓我稍微覺得有趣。多數故事相當短，視覺刺激大致足以讓看不懂字的人不會覺得無聊。沒有特別嚇人的內容，房屋、走廊和車內的鏡頭很多。動畫沒有我期望中那麼多，Hudson 大多用各種搖晃飄動的畫面特效來營造氣氛。那些小遊戲也相當無用，別把它們當成動力去玩。總結來說，我不打算給這款作品評分，因為一切取決於你——我從中獲得了一些東西，或許你也會，或許不會，誰知道呢？sunteam_paul
no_intro_name: Hyaku Monogatari - Honto ni Atta Kowai Hanashi (Japan)

overview_en: Management strategy game where you genetically create a robot and set it to battle in a tournament.
overview_zh: 管理經營類策略遊戲，你可以透過基因方式打造出一台機器人，讓牠去參加錦標賽戰鬥。

overview_en: Cute but spooky platformer where you play a bald headed monk who hurls giant coloured prayer beads at his enemies.
overview_zh: 可愛但陰森的平台遊戲，你扮演一名光頭和尚，朝敵人丟出巨大彩色念珠。

title_jp: アイドル花札ファンクラブ
overview_en: Version of the Japanese suit-matching card game Hanafuda, but featuring stripping ladies as you progress.
overview_zh: 日本花牌（Hanafuda）湊牌紙牌遊戲的一種版本，但隨著遊戲進行會有脫衣女郎登場。

overview_en: Old Japan combines with high tech in this Shinobi-esque action game.
overview_zh: 融合古日本與高科技的 Shinobi 風格動作遊戲。

overview_en: A familiar sci-fi setting for this vertically scrolling shoot 'em up from Irem.
overview_zh: Irem 出品的縱向捲軸射擊遊戲，採用熟悉的科幻設定。
wiki_extract_en: Image Fight, also stylized as ImageFight, is a 1988 vertically scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Irem for Japanese arcades. It was ported to the Nintendo Entertainment System, PC Engine, X68000 and FM Towns in 1990. The NES version was the only version that was released in North America. It was followed by Image Fight II: Operation Deepstriker.

overview_en: Space based shooty sequel to the tough original.
overview_zh: 以太空為背景的射擊續作，承接原作的高難度。
wiki_extract_en: Image Fight, also stylized as ImageFight, is a 1988 vertically scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Irem for Japanese arcades. It was ported to the Nintendo Entertainment System, PC Engine, X68000 and FM Towns in 1990. The NES version was the only version that was released in North America. It was followed by Image Fight II: Operation Deepstriker.

title_jp: インペリアル・フォース
overview_en: Unreleased space combat strategy game. Images Preview page from PC Engine Fan magazine May 1992
overview_zh: 未發售的太空戰鬥策略遊戲。附圖：PC Engine Fan 雜誌 1992 年 5 月號預告頁。

overview_en: Platform game featuring the hero Monty Mole who originated on 8-bit computers. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 平台遊戲，主角是源自 8 位元電腦的英雄 Monty Mole。Turbo Views Review。
wiki_extract_en: Impossamole is a platform game developed by Core Design for the Amiga, Atari ST, Commodore 64, Amstrad CPC and ZX Spectrum. It was released in 1990 and published by Gremlin Graphics. NEC Technologies published it on TurboGrafx-16 the following year. It is the sixth and final game in the Monty Mole series.

title_jp: アイキュー パニック
overview_en: Multiple choice quiz game.
overview_zh: 多選題問答遊戲。

overview_en: FMV heavy horror adventure game with some minimal action sequences, featuring giant carnivorous ants. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 大量使用 FMV（動態影像）的恐怖冒險遊戲，夾雜一些簡短的動作橋段，內容是關於食肉巨蟻。Turbo Views Review。
wiki_extract_en:
It Came from the Desert is a 1989 action-adventure game by Cinemaware. It was originally released for the Amiga, but later ported to MS-DOS, as well as released in distinctly different forms to consoles. The TurboGrafx-16 release is different from the computer versions, in terms of gameplay and presentation. An expansion, Antheads: It Came from the Desert II, was released in 1990.
The game is inspired by dozens of 1950s monster movies especially the 1954 mutant-ant classic Them!, with the title referencing the 1953 horror film, It Came from Outer Space. The game is a non-linear combination of dialogue boxes and several types of action scenes, typical of contemporary Cinemaware releases.

overview_en: An unofficial release, J Thunder is an adult erotic title with a science fiction/giant robot setting. Gameplay mostly involves pushing a button to scroll through lengthy conversations, with a few options to select here and there.
overview_zh: 非官方發售作品，J Thunder 是一款以科幻／巨型機器人為背景的成人情色遊戲。玩法大多是按鈕看冗長的對話，偶爾選擇一些選項。
comment_en: Like most of these unofficial adult titles, J Thunder is pretty much a waste of a CD. There is very little actual interaction in digital comic terms, the game is hopelessly short and even the naked pictures (which is what the title is created for after all) are infrequent. The only redeeming aspect is that some of the artwork is quite nice - it's a pity that this talent didn't go towards creating a decent game. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 就像多數這類非官方成人作品，J Thunder 幾乎就是浪費了一張 CD。就數位漫畫的角度而言實際互動非常少，遊戲長度短得無可救藥，連裸體圖（說到底這不就是這種作品的賣點嗎）也不常出現。唯一可取之處是部分美術還不錯——可惜這份才華沒拿來做一款像樣的遊戲。sunteam_paul

title_jp: J. B. ハロルド 殺人クラブ
overview_en: Crime investigation game. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 犯罪調查遊戲。Turbo Views Review。
wiki_extract_en: J.B. Harold Murder Club, known as J.B. Harold no Jikenbo #1: Murder Club in Japan, and as Murder Club in North America (MS-DOS), is a 1986 murder mystery adventure game, developed by Riverhillsoft and released for the NEC PC-98, MSX, MS-DOS, NEC TurboGrafx-CD (TurboDuo), and Nintendo DS. The TurboGrafx-CD version includes still photographs, text and audio voices as well as the option to select the language, English or Japanese. The game sold 200,000 copies. It is the first entry in the J.B. Harold series, which have been released on various platforms.

title_jp: ジャックニクラウス・チャンピオンシップ・ゴルフ
overview_en: Licensed golf game. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 授權高爾夫遊戲。Turbo Views Review。
wiki_extract_en:
Jack William Nicklaus (; born January 21, 1940), nicknamed "the Golden Bear", is an American retired professional golfer and golf course designer. He is widely considered to be one of the greatest golfers of all time. He won 117 professional tournaments in his career, including a record 18 major championships. He is an inductee of the World Golf Hall of Fame.
Nicklaus won the U.S. Amateur in 1959 and 1961 and finished second in the 1960 U.S. Open, two shots behind Arnold Palmer. Nicklaus turned professional at age 21 in 1961. He earned his first professional victory at the 1962 U.S. Open, defeating Palmer by three shots in an 18-hole playoff and launching a rivalry. Nicklaus was part of "The Big Three" along with Palmer and Gary Player, a name given to the trio due to the growing popularization of golf in the 1960s. In 1966, Nicklaus became the first player to win the Masters Tournament in back-to-back years; he also won the 1963 PGA Championship and the 1966 Open Championship, becoming at age 26 the youngest player at the time to complete the career grand slam. 
Named the AP Athlete of the Decade for the 1970s, Nicklaus had won 17 major championships by 1980. He overtook Bobby Jones' record of 13 majors, and became the first player to complete double and triple career grand slams. At age 46, Nicklaus won his final major championship at the 1986 Masters Tournament, which was a record sixth Masters title. He joined the Senior PGA Tour (now known as the PGA Tour Champions) when he became eligible in 1990, and by 1996 had won 10 tournaments, including eight senior major championships, despite playing a limited schedule. He continued to play at least some of the four regular majors until making his final appearance at the 2005 Open Championship held at the Old Course at St Andrews.
Today, Nicklaus heads Nicklaus Design, one of the world's largest golf course design and construction companies. He runs an event on the PGA Tour, the Memorial Tournament, which is held at the Nicklaus-designed Muirfield Village Golf Club. Nicklaus's books vary from instructional to autobiographical, with his Golf My Way considered one of the best instructional golf books of all time; the video of the same name is the best-selling golf instructional to date. Nicklaus won the Ryder Cup with the United States five times as a player, he also captained the team  in 1983 and 1987. He received the Presidential Medal of Freedom in 2005 and the Congressional Gold Medal in 2015.

overview_en: A platform action game based on the master of martial arts movies, Hudson has chosen cute over realistic and set the game in traditional, if fantastical, old China. Naturally, a young lady-friend  has been kidnapped by an evil guy in a black cloak (happens all the time) and it's down to you to run, jump, dodge and bash your way through many different areas to get her back. The game plays at a fair pace and some stages have a large variety of sub-levels to work through. Aside from the normal running and jumping, there are also places where you have to use more precision to judge moving platforms, and others where you need to jump quickly to escape rising lava. Aside from the normal punching and kicking, there are two types of special attack. The first is a ball of energy that you expel Dragon Ball style by holding and releasing the attack button. The other is a specific move, picked up from jumping frogs, that could be either a low spinning kick, a high kick or somesuch. These froggies also drop bowls of food that restore your energy. As a bonus, there are also several mini-games which are found by kicking invisible bells in the landscape when you hear a ringing noise close by. These games include kicking fish, jumping on clouds for fruit, punching a huge rock and a familiar wooden man.
overview_zh: 一款以武術電影大師為主題的平台動作遊戲，Hudson 選擇了可愛而非寫實的風格，將遊戲舞台設定在傳統但奇幻色彩濃厚的古代中國。理所當然地，有位年輕的女性友人被披著黑斗篷的壞蛋擄走（這種事一天到晚都在發生），你得一路跑、跳、閃、打，穿越眾多不同區域把她救回來。遊戲節奏不慢，有些關卡還有大量的子關卡可以玩。除了一般的跑跳之外，有些地方需要你更精準地判斷移動平台，有些則要你快速跳躍以躲過上升的岩漿。除了普通的拳打腳踢之外，還有兩種特殊攻擊。第一種是按住並放開攻擊鈕釋放的七龍珠式氣功球；另一種是特定招式，可從彈跳的青蛙身上取得，可能是低掃腿、高踢或類似的招式。這些小青蛙也會掉出回復體力的食物碗。額外地，當你聽到附近有鈴聲響起時，踹一踹場景中看不見的鈴鐺，可以找到多款小遊戲。這些小遊戲包含踢魚、跳雲摘水果、打巨石，以及一個熟悉的木人樁。
comment_en: There is much to praise about Jackie Chan. The action is fast paced and fun, with the many sub-levels providing a nice variety of scenery as you play. The sprites are cute and well drawn and there are some very nice parallax scrolling effects in some stages. Music is also fantastic, with catchy tunes and some nice sampled drums. If there was one negative point it would be that  some of the later levels are not quite as interesting or long as the first few, but that's a minor gripe in such a gem of a game - it reeks of quality and for me is an essential purchase. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Jackie Chan 有很多值得稱讚之處。動作節奏快、有趣，眾多子關卡讓你在遊玩時享有相當豐富的場景變化。角色精靈可愛、畫得好，某些關卡還有非常漂亮的視差捲動效果。音樂也很棒，旋律朗朗上口，還有一些不錯的取樣鼓聲。如果一定要挑一個缺點，那就是後期的某些關卡不如前面幾關那麼有趣或那麼長，但在這樣一款寶石級的作品中這只是小毛病——它從裡到外都散發品質感，對我來說是必買之作。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Jackie Chan Adventures is a 2004 action video game based on the animated series of the same name, which focuses on a fictionalized version of Hong Kong action film star Jackie Chan. The game was developed by Atomic Planet Entertainment, published by Sony Pictures Television's sister company, Sony Computer Entertainment, and released for the PlayStation 2 on October 1, 2004, in Europe.
The game is compatible with the EyeToy. An Xbox version was also announced but ultimately never released.. Jackie, Jade, Uncle, Valmont and Shendu were voiced by their original actors.

overview_en: American Football game featuring some short FMV sequences.
overview_zh: 美式足球遊戲，內含一些簡短的FMV影片片段。
comment_en: To put it simply: the graphics are basic, the FMV is interesting and funny for the wrong reasons, and it's American Football. You either like it or you hate it, so if you're a fan then it does the job competently. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 簡單來說：畫面很陽春、FMV有趣但方向走偏反而變好笑，而且這就是美式足球。喜歡的人會喜歡，討厭的人會討厭，如果你是球迷那麼這款遊戲表現得還算稱職。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
