title_jp: KO世紀ビースト三獣士ガイア復活完結編
overview_en: Based on the 1992 anime, KO Seiki BEAST: Sanjuushi is set in a future where two super computers, Gaia and Uranus have split the Earth in two at the equator.  The Gaia-controlled Northern half stayed in regular orbit and the people evolved into shapeshifting Beasts.  The Southern half controlled by the Uranus computer was banished to a parallel dimension.  These people remained human, but are ruled by the power hungry Czar Master.  The humans seek the power of the North’s “Gaia Network” to unify the planet, and cleanse it of the freakish Beasts. Tiger Beast Wan Dabadabadatta, Mermaid Mei Mah and Bado Mint of the Bird clan make up the Three Beast Warriors.  With the power of their stone totems called “Jinn” these three can call upon mechanized Beast Lords; Chirei-Oh the panther, Kairei-Oh a colossus and Kurei-Oh the phoenix.  These three form the gestalt of Jinrei-Oh, the Master Lord.  Wan, Mei and Bado are the only masters, but they have a fourth friend named Mekken Mannen, a chubby Turtle Beast. The story begins with the imprisonment of all four beasts and subsequent release by Dr. Password and his granddaughter Yuuni Charm Password.  Though human and once in the service of the Czar, they are sympathetic to the beasts’ plight and seek to aid them in unlocking the power of Gaia for the good of all.  Yuuni even has a mysterious psychic link to the sentient Gaia computer. Hounded by the Czar’s henchmen V-Darn, his female counterpart V-Sion and their lackey demon Akumako, the good guys set out to learn the power of their Jinn’s, reboot Gaia and stop the evil Czar.
overview_zh: 本作改編自1992年的動畫《KO世紀ビースト三獣士》，故事設定在未來世界，兩台超級電腦Gaia和Uranus將地球從赤道一分為二。由Gaia掌控的北半球維持正常軌道，住民演化為能變身的獸人。由Uranus電腦控制的南半球則被放逐到平行次元，那裡的人保持人類樣貌，但被權力慾薰心的Czar Master統治。人類想要奪取北方的「Gaia Network」力量來統一星球，並清除那些怪異的獸人。虎獸人Wan Dabadabadatta、人魚Mei Mah以及鳥族的Bado Mint組成了三獸士。藉由稱為「Jinn」的石製圖騰之力，三人能召喚機械化的獸王：黑豹Chirei-Oh、巨像Kairei-Oh與不死鳥Kurei-Oh。三者合體成為究極獸王Jinrei-Oh。Wan、Mei、Bado是僅有的主人，但他們還有第四位朋友，胖嘟嘟的龜獸人Mekken Mannen。故事從四隻獸人被囚禁開始，Dr. Password和他的孫女Yuuni Charm Password將他們釋放。這對祖孫雖是人類、曾效力於Czar，但同情獸人處境，想協助他們解開Gaia之力以造福眾生。Yuuni甚至與具有意識的Gaia電腦有著神秘的心靈連結。在Czar手下V-Darn、他的女性搭檔V-Sion以及惡魔跟班Akumako的追擊下，主角一行踏上學習Jinn之力、重啟Gaia、阻止邪惡Czar的旅程。
comment_en: One can tell this game was made for fans of the series.  I knew nothing of the show before I played this and when I got to searching for the background story in English, I could pick out every story point in the game. The game characters talk in text A LOT! I can read Katakana and some Hiragana but it got to the point where I would cringe to talk to someone because of the constant yacking.  If you are a fan and can read Japanese – you’d love it. Graphics get the job done, but even for a game made in 1994 they are a bit bland, not bad, but nothing astounding like Magicoal, Ys IV or Legend of Xanadu II – maybe on par with Xanadu I.  Music is that fun ol’ PC Engine synth with lots of slap bass and catchy repetitive tunes.  Cut scenes are colorful and well animated, but average for CD games of that day.  The character screens just have words for the different items, weapons or selections (in Japanese of course) and I would have liked icons or images. Fighting is your basic walk on the overhead map and go to a fight screen every six or seven steps.  Fights consist of a sparse screen bordered by 5 gradients of a color (I’ve seen this in other Pack-In-Video RPGs), monsters in the background, the current active character in the foreground and the usual fight, magic (beast attack), item, run away.  Absolutely nothing to write home about here and the fact that you fight every couple of seconds when walking around, you’ll find yourself just mashing buttons to get through it. All in all, it is a great novelty and worth a play if you have nothing else to do or of course if you are a fan.  I personally am not going to rush out and find the OVA’s based on my experience with this, but you might! W. Eric Myers
comment_zh: 看得出這款遊戲是為了該系列的粉絲而製作的。我玩之前對這部作品一無所知，玩完後去查英文版的背景故事，才發現遊戲裡幾乎每個故事情節我都有看到。遊戲角色用文字講話講非常多！我看得懂片假名和一點平假名，但到後來每次要跟人講話都覺得很煩，因為講個不停。如果你是粉絲又看得懂日文，一定會很愛。畫面表現夠用，但以1994年的遊戲來說略嫌平淡，不差，但也沒有像Magicoal、Ys IV或Legend of Xanadu II那樣令人驚艷，大概跟Xanadu I同等級。音樂是那種好玩的PC Engine合成器音色，有很多slap bass和洗腦的重複旋律。過場動畫色彩豐富、動畫流暢，但以那個年代的CD遊戲來說只是普通水準。角色畫面只顯示各種道具、武器或選項的文字（當然是日文），我會希望有圖示或圖像來輔助。戰鬥部分是基本的俯視地圖移動，每走六七步就會進入戰鬥畫面。戰鬥畫面背景單調，周圍有5層漸層色框（其他Pack-In-Video的RPG也有這種設計），背景是怪物，前景是目前行動的角色，指令就是一般的戰鬥、魔法（獸人攻擊）、道具、逃跑。沒什麼特別值得一提的，而且走路時每幾秒就戰鬥一次，你會發現自己只是一直亂按按鈕撐過去。整體來說，這是個很有意思的新奇體驗，如果你閒著沒事或是系列粉絲，值得一玩。我個人玩完後並不打算去找OVA來看，但你可能會想！W. Eric Myers

overview_en: One-on-one beat 'em up featuring characters from the Far East of Eden series, primarily Kabuki Danjūrō.
overview_zh: 一對一格鬥遊戲，角色來自《天外魔境》系列，主要以歌舞伎団十郎為主角。

overview_en: As you relax into your chair and watch the latest concert from Noriko (your favourite idol singer) on the television, something strange happens. She is suddenly sucked into some otherworldly portal and then...so are you! You find yourself in a mysterious forest and begin your quest to rescue her in this digital comic. Gameplay is treated in a traditional manner, with a menu system allowing you to chose options such as look, examine, listen, use, move etc (all in Japanese) and the game flow consists of several areas to explore and find the way to escape. Some areas are standard maps that you move from location to location in, others are 3D corridors where you need to explore what is going on in the adjoining rooms to progress. You pick up objects along the way, including a small compact mirror in which you can communicate with Noriko.
overview_zh: 當你舒服地靠在椅子上，看著電視上最愛的偶像歌手Noriko的最新演唱會時，怪事發生了。她突然被吸進某個異世界的傳送門裡，然後……你也被吸進去了！你發現自己身處一座神秘森林中，在這部數位漫畫裡展開拯救她的冒險。玩法採傳統形式，透過選單系統選擇「看」、「檢查」、「聽」、「使用」、「移動」等指令（全日文），遊戲流程包含數個需要探索並尋找逃脫之道的區域。有些區域是標準地圖，你可以在地點間移動，有些則是3D走廊，你需要探索相鄰房間發生了什麼才能推進劇情。途中你會撿到各種物品，包含一面小巧的化妝鏡，可以透過它與Noriko溝通。
comment_en: As far as digital comics go, Kagami no Kuni no Legend is OK. Because of the exploration format of the game, it can take some perseverance to progress if you are unable to understand the language. To avoid complete frustration, it's probably best to at least familiarise yourself with what the basic commands are and knowing a little bit of katakana can be an advantage. The story is a very cartoony affair, with silly characters that pop up to block your path. The makers also seem to have an obsession with mirrors and you'll find a lot of the early game is spent talking to them. I admit to getting stuck several times and it was only sheer tenacity that made me keep going until I found a way to progress. There are a few points where you can actually get a Game Over, so best to save a lot, but luckily these are pretty infrequent. Defeating the final guardian in the game was somewhat of a chore, as you keep getting wiped out if you choose the wrong thing (and bluffing around in the Japanese menu system means this happens often), so you have to really pay attention and try and try again. Graphically it is generally decent enough to look at. The chip music is unremarkable (sometimes a bit annoying) and many areas are concluded with a sequence in which Noriko performs her songs accompanied by some animation that really shows how strapped they were for memory on the original CD System card. The songs aren't exactly J-Pop at it's highest standard, but at least she's in tune most of the time and if you love all that cheesyness you might get a kick out of it. So in conclusion, Kagami no Kuni no Legend has enough visual niceness to warrant playing if you're a fan of digital comics, but loses some points on the 'stupid westerner' scale for getting tedious when you can't work out what the hell you are supposed to do next. Give it a try if this is your kind of thing. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 就數位漫畫而言，Kagami no Kuni no Legend還算OK。因為遊戲是探索類型，如果看不懂日文，要推進劇情需要一些毅力。要避免完全挫敗，最好至少先熟悉基本指令，懂一點片假名會是個優勢。故事很卡通風，會有一些搞笑的角色跑出來擋你的路。製作者似乎對鏡子有迷戀，遊戲初期會花很多時間和鏡子對話。我承認卡關卡了好幾次，完全靠堅持才走下去。遊戲有幾個點會真的出現Game Over，所以最好常存檔，幸好這種情況不算頻繁。打最終守關者有點辛苦，選錯選項就會被秒殺（在日文選單裡瞎猜常常這樣），所以得很專注地反覆嘗試。畫面整體還算不錯看。晶片音樂沒什麼亮點（有時還有點煩），許多區域會以Noriko演唱歌曲的段落作結，搭配一些動畫，真的能看出當時原版CD System Card記憶體多麼捉襟見肘。歌曲不算最頂級的J-Pop水準，但她至少大部分時間音準是對的，如果你喜歡那種俗氣味，可能還挺享受。總結來說，如果你是數位漫畫愛好者，Kagami no Kuni no Legend視覺上夠漂亮值得一玩，但在「搞不清楚下一步該做什麼」這點上對西方玩家來說會變得有點乏味，扣了一些分。如果這是你的菜，不妨試試。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Take to the streets on a bike or moped and...deliver stuff.
overview_zh: 騎上腳踏車或機車上街，然後……送貨。

overview_en: Fishing role-playing game.
overview_zh: 釣魚主題的角色扮演遊戲。

overview_en: A side scrolling action game where you must clear a set number of enemies in a stage before you can continue.
overview_zh: 橫向捲動動作遊戲，每關必須清除指定數量的敵人才能進入下一關。
comment_en: Great fun at first, but let down by repetitive gameplay despite the fast pace and fairly large amount of movement available to you. However, the music is fantastic and makes it more than worth playing just to listen. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 一開始非常有趣，但儘管節奏快、可用的動作幅度也不小，玩法還是因為重複性過高而掉分。不過音樂非常棒，光是想聽音樂就值得一玩。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en: Kaze Kiri, also known as Kaze Kiri: Ninja Action, is a 1994 Japanese video game for the PC Engine CD-ROM² system. Developed and published by Naxat Soft the game was released only in Japan. It is a side scrolling ninja game set in feudal Japan.

overview_en: Shoot 'em up in the style of classic giant robot anime.
overview_zh: 風格致敬經典巨大機器人動畫的射擊遊戲。
wiki_extract_en: Kiaidan 00 is a 1992 mecha side-scrolling shoot 'em up video game released by Riot for the NEC PC Engine Super CD-ROM².

overview_en: A  baseball style game with elements of football and dodgeball thrown in. Chose from a selection of bizarre teams, from seals to sumos to Schbibin Men!
overview_zh: 棒球風格的遊戲，融入了足球與躲避球的元素。可從各種奇特的隊伍中挑選，從海豹、相撲力士到Schbibin Men都有！

overview_en: Supernatural action game with plenty of oriental ghouls and spirits after your blood.
overview_zh: 超自然動作遊戲，有一堆東方鬼怪與幽靈追著你不放。
wiki_extract_en:
Kiki Kaikai is a 1986 shoot 'em up video game developed and published by Taito for arcades. Set in Feudal Japan, the player assumes the role of a Shinto shrine maiden who must use her o-fuda scrolls and gohei wand to defeat renegade spirits and monsters from Japanese mythology. The game is noteworthy for using a traditional fantasy setting in a genre otherwise filled with science fiction motifs.
The game received a number of home ports, both as a stand-alone title and as part of compilations. Taito would license the rights of the game to Natsume, who developed a sequel for the Super NES in 1992, known as Pocky & Rocky outside Japan. The series, known as Kiki Kaikai in Japan and Pocky & Rocky outside Japan, has continued since then under Natsume Atari.

title_jp: キング オブ カジノ
overview_en: Gambling simulation including poker, blackjack, slot machines and roulette. Turbo Views Review �
overview_zh: 賭博模擬遊戲，包含撲克、21點、吃角子老虎和輪盤。Turbo Views Review

overview_en: Strategic combat game. Images Front Cover • Back Cover •  Spine • CD
overview_zh: 策略戰鬥遊戲。Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD

title_en: KISŌ LOUGA II - THE ENDS OF SHANGRILA
overview_en: More fantasy-based strategic combat.
overview_zh: 更多奇幻風格的策略戰鬥。
no_intro_name: Kisou Louga II - The Ends of Shangrila (Japan)

overview_en: Puzzle game where you have to catch  blocks that approach on a conveyor belt and drop them in stacks of corresponding colours. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 益智遊戲，你必須接住從輸送帶上傳來的方塊，並依照顏色把同色方塊堆在一起。Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en:
Klax is a 1990 puzzle video game developed and published by Atari Games for arcades; in Japan, it was distributed by Namco. The game was designed and animated by Mark Stephen Pierce, with software engineering by Dave Akers. The object of the game is to catch colored tiles moving down a conveyor belt, and arrange them in matching rows and patterns to make them disappear.
Klax was originally released in February 1990 as an arcade follow-up to Tetris (1989), about which Atari Games had been in a legal dispute. It was later ported to several home and handheld systems, including the Nintendo Entertainment System, Genesis, TurboGrafx-16, Game Boy, and Lynx. The Atari 2600 version of the game, released in the UK in mid-1990, was one of the final licensed games for the console, which was discontinued in early 1992.

title_jp: ナイトライダースペシャル
overview_en: Chase HQ style racing game based on the popular ’80s TV series.
overview_zh: Chase HQ風格的賽車遊戲，改編自80年代人氣電視影集。
wiki_extract_en:
Knight Rider is an American entertainment franchise created by Glen A. Larson. The core of Knight Rider is its three-television series: the original Knight Rider (1982–1986) and sequel series Team Knight Rider (1997–1998) and Knight Rider (2008–2009). The franchise also includes three television films, a short-lived spin-off series, computer and video games, and novels, as well as KnightCon, a Knight Rider convention. Beginning with the original television series and continuing with the subsequent films and series, the franchise has developed a cult following and spawned many pop culture references.
The original Knight Rider series followed the adventures of Michael Knight, a sleek modern-day crime fighter who uses a technologically advanced, artificially intelligent automobile. This car, named KITT, is virtually indestructible, due to a high-tech coating applied to it called a "molecular bonded shell". Knight Rider stories usually depict either average citizens, or ethical heads of corporations, being bullied into subservience to an overbearing or ruthless criminal organization. The protagonists of each particular series are instructed by the Foundation for Law and Government (FLAG) to assist in some manner. The protagonists have the assistance of a high-tech, self-aware, and nearly indestructible vehicle.

overview_en: Baseball simulation.
overview_zh: 棒球模擬遊戲。

overview_en: Baseball simulation sequel.
overview_zh: 棒球模擬遊戲續作。

title_jp: 究極麻雀アイドルグラフィック
overview_en: Adult mahjong game.
overview_zh: 成人向麻將遊戲。

overview_en: More adult mahjong gaming.
overview_zh: 更多成人向麻將對戰。

overview_en: A vertically scrolling helicopter shoot 'em up, Kyūkyoku Tiger bears more than a passing resemblance to games like Raiden and Daisenpu. The gameplay is familiar enough, with smart bombs and coloured power-ups that give a variety of weapons.
overview_zh: 縱向捲動的直升機射擊遊戲，究極タイガー和Raiden、Daisenpu等遊戲有不少相似之處。玩法相當熟悉，有大範圍炸彈以及能變換武器種類的彩色強化道具。
comment_en: Great graphics, awesome soundtrack and tough but fair gameplay makes this game a winner. Enemy patterns are devious, making you move into dangerous positions if you don't have your wits about you, and power-up pods taunt you as they float just out of reach...but the gameplay is rock solid and although you won't be completing this as fast as the 'Soldier' games, it's certainly worth the effort trying. But the best bit is the sound effect of the chopper taking off - it’ll have you looking out the window! sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 精彩的畫面、一流的配樂加上硬派但公平的玩法，讓這款遊戲成為贏家。敵人攻擊模式狡猾，你若不留神就會被逼到危險位置，強化道具膠囊總在碰不到的地方飄著挑釁你……但玩法紮實穩固，雖然你不會像通關『Soldier』系列那樣快就打完，但絕對值得挑戰。最棒的是直升機起飛時的音效——讓你不禁想往窗外看看！sunteam_paul

title_jp: カイザーズクエスト 麻雀覇王伝
overview_en: Adventure mahjong game where you travel around a kingdom playing matches against various people.
overview_zh: 冒險麻將遊戲，你會走遍整個王國和各種人對戰麻將。

title_jp: ザ・キックボクシング
overview_en: Side-on kickboxing game with training mode. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 側視角的踢拳格鬥遊戲，含有訓練模式。Turbo Views Review

overview_en: Hudson Soft's Vol. 1 game, The Kung Fu was a graphical showcase for the release of the PC Engine, with half-screen high sprites and no clash or slowdown. The gameplay is particularly simple - the screen auto scrolls and you have to punch, kick and dodge the various enemies and obstacles that appear in your way.
overview_zh: Hudson Soft的Vol. 1作品，The Kung Fu是為了展示PC Engine首發實力的畫面示範作品，角色精靈有半個螢幕高、沒有閃爍與變慢的問題。玩法相當單純——畫面自動捲動，你必須出拳、踢腿、閃躲擋在路上的各種敵人與障礙。
comment_en: The Kung Fu  suffers from very shallow gameplay, playing more like a souped-up graphics demo than a full blown game, which it probably was at the time. The clumsy controls don't help either - however, once you get into the feel of it there is some enjoyment to be had. This game is more about showing what the PC Engine could do than anything else and because of its place in the history of the console, it gains a little more interest than it probably deserves. But because it is what it is, it's hard to truly dislike the game, and is certainly worth a look, especially for collectors. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: The Kung Fu玩法非常淺，比較像是華麗版的畫面展示而非完整的遊戲作品，當年大概也就是這個定位。笨拙的操控也沒什麼幫助——不過一旦抓到手感，還是能玩得開心。這款遊戲比較像是用來展示PC Engine的能耐，而非其他目的，因為它在主機史上的地位，讓它的關注度略高於它應得的水準。但也因為它就是這樣一款作品，很難真的去討厭它，還是值得一看，特別是對收藏家來說。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en:
Kung-Fu Master, known as Spartan X in Japan, is a 1984 beat 'em up game developed and published by Irem for arcades. It was distributed by Data East in North America. Designed by Takashi Nishiyama, the game was based on Hong Kong martial arts films. It is a loose adaptation of the Jackie Chan, Sammo Hung and Yuen Biao film Wheels on Meals (1984), called Spartan X in Japan. The protagonist Thomas is named after Jackie Chan's character in the film. It is also heavily inspired by the Bruce Lee film Game of Death (1972), which was the basis for the game's concept. Nishiyama, who had previously designed the side-scrolling shooter Moon Patrol (1982), combined fighting elements with a shoot 'em up gameplay rhythm. Irem and Data East exported the game to the West without the Spartan X license.
The game was a major commercial success, topping the Japanese arcade charts and becoming America's second highest-grossing arcade game of 1985, while receiving critical acclaim for its fast-paced, side-scrolling gameplay and detailed, colorful graphics. A port for the Nintendo Entertainment System (known as the Famicom in Japan) was developed by Nintendo under the direction of Shigeru Miyamoto, released as Spartan X in Japan and Kung Fu in the West, selling 3.5 million copies worldwide. It was also one of the top five best-selling Commodore 64 games of 1986. It spawned the sequel Spartan X 2 (1991) and the spiritual successors Trojan (1986) and Vigilante (1988).
Kung-Fu Master was a highly influential game. It is regarded as the first beat 'em up video game, and an early example of the side-scrolling character action game genre, which became popular during the mid-to-late 1980s. Miyamoto's work on the NES port inspired his development of the side-scrolling platformer Super Mario Bros. (1985), while Nishiyama was hired by Capcom where he used the boss battles as the basis for the fighting game Street Fighter (1987). He later worked for SNK on fighting games such as Fatal Fury and The King of Fighters. Kung-Fu Master also influenced other media, such as the Red Ribbon Army saga (1985–1986) of the manga and anime series Dragon Ball, as well as the French film Kung Fu Master (1988).

title_jp: 冒険男爵ドン サン＝ハート編 THE LOST SUNHEART
overview_en: Oddball shoot 'em up with the kind of crazy design of the Cho Aniki games - it's like the dark side of L-Dis.
overview_zh: 風格古怪的射擊遊戲，帶有《超兄貴》那種瘋狂設計感——就像是L-Dis的黑暗版。

overview_en: Cute and comical horizontally scrolling shoot ‘em up with some really weird and wacky enemies.
overview_zh: 可愛又搞笑的橫向捲動射擊遊戲，敵人設計相當怪異古靈精怪。
wiki_extract_en: L-Dis is a 1991 side-scrolling shoot 'em up video game published by Masaya Games for the NEC PC Engine CD-ROM².

overview_en: Overhead hex-based battle game with giant robots. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine  • CD
overview_zh: 俯視視角、以六角格為基礎的戰鬥遊戲，登場的是巨型機器人。Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD

overview_en: Unofficially released dungeon crawler.
overview_zh: 非官方發行的地城探索遊戲。
wiki_extract_en: Lady Sword: Ryakudatsu Sareta 10 Nin no Otome (レディソード 略奪された10人の乙女), Lady Sword: The 10 Captive Maidens, is an adult 1989 role-playing video game that was released by Games Express for the PC Engine in Japan the year of 1992 for the PC Engine. The game was never released outside of Japan. However, an unofficial English translation has been made.

title_jp: ラングリッサー光輝の末裔
overview_en: Fantasy turn-based battle game.
overview_zh: 奇幻風格的回合制戰鬥遊戲。
wiki_extract_en:
Langrisser (ラングリッサー, Rangurissā; originally spelled Lungrisser prior to the third game) is a fantasy tactical role-playing video game series created by Masaya Games. The main development team is Career Soft, first as Team Career within Masaya Games for the first three games and then as an independent studio for Langrisser IV and V. The series has a fantasy-Germanic setting, but draws on religious concepts like ditheism and sword worship for historical context. The series was originally released for Sega platforms during the 1990s, with the first two installments originally made for the Sega Genesis, followed by third through fifth installments (along with a remake compilation of the first two games) for the Sega Saturn. Ports and remakes were also made for other platforms such as PC Engine, Super Famicom, PC-FX and PlayStation during the same period.
After separating from Masaya following the release of Langrisser V, Career Soft would produce an unofficial successor in the form of the Growlanser series, published and owned by Atlus, while Masaya would go on to produce Langrisser Millenium with a different development team (Santa Entertainment).

overview_en: Fantasy RPG where you play monsters such as orcs, gargoyles and harpies.
overview_zh: 奇幻RPG，你扮演獸人、石像鬼、女妖等怪物。
wiki_extract_en:
Last Armageddon (ラストハルマゲドン, Rasuto Harumagedon) is a 1988 post-apocalyptic role-playing video game for the NEC PC-8801, MSX, X68000, MS-DOS, PC Engine CD-ROM², and Famicom. The game was exclusively in the Japanese language until an English translation patch was created for the Nintendo Famicom.
The game had a sequel, After Armageddon Gaiden, released for the Sega CD in 1994. Working Designs planned to release the game in North America as A Side Story of Armageddon in 1995, but the localization was cancelled due to the demise of the Sega CD system.

title_jp: デコボコ伝説走るワガマンマー
overview_en: This cute overhead racing game allows you to play with up to 5 players all at once (using the multi-tap). The object is to race up the varied, auto-scrolling courses, avoiding all manner of weird objects like dung beetles, naked bathing girlies, giant robots, Rambo clones...you get the idea. At the end of each race points are awarded for your finishing position and these can be spent on upgrading your car with a choice of weapons to use against your opponents.
overview_zh: 這款可愛的俯視賽車遊戲最多可支援5人同時遊玩（使用多人接頭）。目標是在各種自動捲動的賽道上競速，閃躲各類奇葩物體，像是糞金龜、洗澡的裸女、巨大機器人、藍波分身……以此類推。每場比賽結束後會依名次給予點數，這些點數可以用來升級你的車輛，並選擇武器對付對手。

title_jp: レジェンド・オブ・ヒーロー・トンマ
overview_en: Cute platform game converted from the arcade.
overview_zh: 從大型電玩移植而來的可愛平台動作遊戲。
comment_en: Legend of Hero Tonma is pretty good - but there is something about it that stops it from being great. It may be the weedy music, or that it's just too easy and not particularly varied. It's fun to play but it just needs more meat on its bones. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Legend of Hero Tonma還不錯，但總有某個部分讓它無法達到頂尖水準。或許是那偏弱的音樂，或是它太簡單、變化不夠多。玩起來很有趣，但就是需要再多一點血肉。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Legend of Hero Tonma (レジェンド・オブ・ヒーロー・トンマ) is a side scrolling platform game released by Irem to arcades in 1989. The player controls a caped hero named Tommy in his quest to rescue a princess. Tommy can cast fireballs (which can be upgraded in power) to dispatch enemies, and jump on their heads to temporarily stun them.
The game was ported to the TurboGrafx-16 in 1991 and localized to North America in 1993. The TurboGrafx-16 version was re-released on the Wii Virtual Console in Japan on September 4, 2007, in North America on September 24, (delisted on March 30, 2012; returning in September 2013), and in PAL regions on September 28. The game was then released for the Wii U Virtual Console in Japan on March 18, 2015, and in North America and Europe on October 12, 2017.

overview_en: An overhead fantasy ARPG that uses a similar bump-attack style to the Ys games. Some unique features include a day/night cycle, some side-on action sequences and the ability to level up your weapons and armour.
overview_zh: 俯視視角的奇幻ARPG，採用類似Ys系列的撞擊攻擊方式。獨特之處包括日夜循環、部分側視角動作場景，以及武器與防具可升級的機制。
no_intro_name: Kaze no Densetsu Xanadu (Falcom - NEC) (Japan)[AKA The Legend of Xanadu]

overview_en: Falcom has pretty much established themselves as one of the finest RPG makers in the business, and Xanadu II - an offshoot of the Legend of Heroes series shows exactly why. The sequel to the first popular Xanadu game, Xanadu II is also an action RPG. This game retains the simple Ys inspired walk-into-the-enemy attack style which works very well and also the side-on action scenes used for boss battles. Being untranslated, the story is a little hard to plot out, but you play Arios and start out aboard a ship in search of your friend, whose own ship (as shown in the intro) was attacked by dragon riders. Eventually you get blown overboard in a vicious storm and end up on a beach near the city of Razan... Your attack/defense capabilities are dependant on your weapons and armour - sword, shield and armour each have their own 'level' and as you attack or take damage, these stats slowly increase until they hit their max. New weaponry can be found in chests or bought in shops along the way. This method of levelling up is interesting as sometimes you actually need to get hit and lose energy so you can improve your armour stats. As you kill the various monsters, they drop money which you or your party (which can be set to auto attack and auto pick up) can collect. When you reach a boss, you get the option of going it alone, or choosing a companion to help you. The choice can be important as some bosses are far easier with arrows than with sword.
overview_zh: Falcom基本上已確立為業界頂尖的RPG製作公司之一，而Xanadu II——Legend of Heroes系列的外傳——正好體現了這一點。作為首款人氣Xanadu的續作，Xanadu II同樣是動作RPG。本作沿用Ys啟發的「撞敵人攻擊」簡易系統，效果非常好，也保留了BOSS戰使用的側視角動作場景。由於沒有翻譯，劇情較難理解，不過你扮演的是Arios，故事從你登上一艘船尋找朋友開始，朋友的船（在開場動畫中展示）遭到龍騎士襲擊。後來你在一場猛烈風暴中被吹落船外，漂到Razan城附近的海灘……你的攻擊與防禦能力取決於武器和防具——劍、盾牌、鎧甲各自有其「等級」，當你攻擊或受到傷害時，這些數值會慢慢提升，直到達到上限。新裝備可在寶箱中找到或在沿途商店購買。這種升級方式很有趣，有時你實際上需要讓自己挨打、減少體力，才能提升鎧甲數值。當你擊敗各種怪物時，牠們會掉落金錢，你或隊友（可設成自動攻擊與自動拾取）能撿起來。遇到BOSS時，你可以選擇單挑，或挑選一位同伴協助。這個選擇可能很關鍵，因為有些BOSS用弓箭打比用劍容易很多。
comment_en: Xanadu II is a superb game. From the moment I started, I played this game solidly until I completed it. From the opening  onwards, this game reeks of quality, with a vast array of locations, each beautifully drawn in a way that really gives you a sense of the place. These are probably some of the best graphics of any Engine RPG, and it could easily pass for a game on one of the more powerful consoles. Sound is all chip generated, but wait - don't write it off yet. Even though you would expect CD sound throughout a CD game, the chip music is surprisingly easy to listen to and the tunes are typically great. In fact, I barely even noticed the absence of CD tracks at all while I was playing. If you are after a challenging RPG then Xanadu is not it. It is very easy. The only stumbling block may be the hints given in the Japanese dialogue, but any decent walkthrough can help you out there. But the easiness, for me, works in its favour. Only towards the very end of the game do you need to spend any time doing the boring levelling-up that permeates most other RPGs and this means that you can regularly progress the story and open up new areas, keeping your interest at a high level. In fact, the balance is far better than something like Ys IV, which I felt was crippled at certain points where you had to spend some time increasing your experience points.  Xanadu II will suck you in and you'll enjoy every minute - this is one amazing game. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Xanadu II是一款傑作。從我開始遊玩那一刻起，我就一口氣玩到破關。從開頭開始，這款遊戲就散發出高品質氣息，場景種類豐富，每個場景都畫得漂亮，真的能讓你感受到那個地方的氛圍。這大概是PC Engine任何一款RPG中最頂尖的畫面，拿到更強大的主機上也毫不遜色。音效全是晶片音樂——先別急著否定。雖然你會期待CD遊戲從頭到尾都是CD音源，但這裡的晶片音樂意外好聽，曲子也都很棒。實際上，我玩的時候幾乎沒察覺CD配樂的缺席。如果你想要挑戰性高的RPG，Xanadu不是首選。它非常簡單。唯一的絆腳石可能是日文對話裡的提示，但任何一份好的攻略都能幫你解決。但對我來說，簡單反而是加分項。只有到遊戲非常後期，你才需要花時間做那種大部分RPG裡無聊的練等作業，這表示你可以穩定推進劇情、開放新區域，讓你一直保持高度興趣。實際上，它的節奏平衡遠勝過Ys IV這種作品——Ys IV在某些點上會逼你花時間衝等，讓我覺得很卡。Xanadu II會把你吸進去，每一分鐘都玩得很爽——真的是一款超棒的遊戲。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Sci-fi spaceship shoot 'em up that narrates a story as you play.
overview_zh: 科幻太空船射擊遊戲，遊玩過程中會有故事旁白敘述。
wiki_extract_en: Legion is a turn-based computer wargame with a historical setting, designed by Slitherine and released in 2002. In Legion, the player attempts to build a powerful army by controlling villages and defeating enemies with the ultimate goal of dominating a region. An updated version, Legion Gold, was released in 2003. A port for OS X was released in 2003, developed by Freeverse. A sequel, Legion II, was announced on November 16, 2004, for a 2005 release.

overview_en: Puzzle game conversion. Get the tiny lemmings to the exit by setting them tasks such as digging or building bridges. Strategy and quick thinking are very important to solve some of the more devious levels.
overview_zh: 益智遊戲移植作。透過指派挖掘、搭橋等任務，讓小小旅鼠抵達出口。策略與快速思考對於解開某些更狡猾的關卡非常重要。
wiki_extract_en:
Lemmings is a 1991 puzzle and strategy video game developed by DMA Design and published by Psygnosis for the Amiga. It was later ported to numerous other platforms. The game was programmed by Russell Kay, Mike Dailly and David Jones, and was inspired by a simple animation that Dailly created while experimenting with Deluxe Paint.
The objective of the game is to guide a group of anthropomorphised lemmings through a number of obstacles to a designated exit. In any given level, the player must save a specified number or percentage of the lemmings in order to advance. To this end, the player must decide how to assign limited quantities of eight different skills to individual lemmings, allowing them to alter the landscape and/or their own behaviour so that enough of the lemmings can reach the exit safely.
Lemmings was one of the best-received video games of the early 1990s. It was the second-highest-rated game in the history of Amstrad Action, and was considered the eighth-greatest game of all time by Next Generation in 1996. Lemmings is also one of the most widely ported video games, and is estimated to have sold around 20 million copies between its various ports. The popularity of the game also led to the creation of several other Lemmings games, remakes and spin-offs, and has also inspired similar games. However, Lemmings lost considerable popularity by the late 1990s, which was attributed in part to its slow pace of gameplay compared to games of later generations.

maker: NEC HOME ELECTRONICS / MARS / MEDIA WORKS
overview_en: Overhead role-playing game. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD
overview_zh: 俯視視角的角色扮演遊戲。Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD

title_jp: ロードランナー 失われた迷宮
overview_en: A very straightforward conversion of a popular puzzle platform game. You must collect the piles of gold on each level, while avoiding the robots on patrol. To defend yourself, you are able to shoot holes in the platforms to your left or right, and these will capture the robots for a short time before they climb out again. Once you have collected all the gold, make your way to the top of the screen for the next level. The game also includes a level editor.
overview_zh: 人氣益智平台遊戲的單純移植作。你必須在每一關收集所有金塊堆，同時閃避巡邏的機器人。要自保的話，你可以在左右兩側的平台上射出洞來，暫時困住機器人，之後牠們會爬出來。收集完所有金塊後，往畫面最上方前進即可進入下一關。遊戲也包含關卡編輯器。
comment_en: Lode Runner Lost Labyrinth is a difficult game to rate. On one hand, it is a shockingly lazy version of Lode Runner: graphics are extremely basic at best and certainly not befitting a console as capable as the PC Engine; sound is almost non existant, with only a few plinks and plonks as you run around and the occasional jingle between levels. I really want to slap this game down, but the problem is that at its core it is still Lode Runner, and that means there is fun to be had, especially if you are someone who enjoys a little bit of thought with your action. There is certainly no reason to  choose this over the vastly superior Battle Lode Runner, but taken on its own, the gameplay just saves it. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Lode Runner Lost Labyrinth是款難以評價的遊戲。一方面，這是Lode Runner一個偷懶到讓人傻眼的版本：畫面極其陽春，完全配不上PC Engine這樣強大的主機；音效幾乎沒有，只有跑動時的幾聲叮叮咚咚，以及關卡間偶爾的小旋律。我真的很想狠狠批它，但問題是它骨子裡仍然是Lode Runner，也就是說還是有樂趣可挖，特別是對於喜歡動作遊戲裡帶點思考的人來說。跟遠優秀的Battle Lode Runner相比當然沒有理由選這款，但單獨來看，光靠核心玩法就勉強救了它。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Lode Runner is a puzzle-platform game developed by Doug Smith and published by Broderbund in 1983. Its gameplay mechanics are similar to Space Panic from 1980. The player controls a character who must collect all the gold pieces in a level and reach the end while being chased by a number of enemies. It is one of the first games to include a level editor.
After the original game, a number of remakes, spinoffs, and sequels were published in the Lode Runner series for different computers and consoles by different developers and publishers. Tozai Games holds the copyright and trademark rights.

overview_en: Citizens have divided themselves into five guilds according to their talents and worldly ambitions; Weavers, Shepherds, Blacksmiths, Glassmakers and the Clerics.  The guilds have become increasingly separatist towards each other but none have been ostracized more than the Weavers.  So dedicated were they to their craft, that they eventually developed the ability to weave the fabric of reality using the mystical Loom on their remote island.  They are feared for their so called 'witchcraft' and never leave their home or interact with others. On the eve of his seventeenth birthday, Bobbin Threadbare overhears the Weaver Elders discussing concern over doomsday prophecies that somehow center on him.  The mystery surrounding his birth and the Elders’ intent are further shrouded when a swan appears through a hole in ‘the fabric’ and uses the Loom to turn the Elders into swans. Bobbin embarks on a journey to unravel the secrets about his past, the world’s future and how it all ties back to the LOOM.
overview_zh: 這個世界的居民依據自身才能與志向，分成了五個公會：織者、牧羊人、鐵匠、玻璃匠以及牧師。這些公會彼此越來越壁壘分明，但沒有一個比織者更被排斥。他們太投入於自身技藝，最終發展出能在偏遠島嶼上以神秘Loom編織現實本質的能力。他們因被稱為「巫術」的能力而被畏懼，從不離開家園或與外界往來。在Bobbin Threadbare即將邁入17歲生日的前夕，他偷聽到織者長老們討論似乎與他有關的末日預言。他的身世之謎以及長老們的真正意圖更加撲朔迷離，因為一隻天鵝從「現實布料」的破洞中出現，使用Loom把長老們變成了天鵝。Bobbin踏上旅程，解開自己過去的秘密、世界的未來，以及這一切如何與LOOM緊密相連。
comment_en: Consider this an interactive book where you have to keep a sharp eye out for graphical clues to help you turn the page and get more story.  Unlike other point-and-click games where you keep an inventory and try to figure out what to use where, all Bobbin has is a musical staff.  Certain items or areas will give you notes in sequence that you must use for action or events (WRITE THEM DOWN).  Some songs are only used for their specific purpose, but some can be played backwards to do the opposite, like ‘open’ played backwards is ‘close’.  Players must search every nook and cranny and experiment to figure out all the little tricks and things to do. Graphically, LOOM is colorful, but sparse and somewhat grainy as it was a port of an older PC EGA game.  It is also nearly silent SFX-wise save for the score from Tchaikovsky's ballet, “Swan Lake” ever playing in the background, which is just lovely. Overall, this is a great departure from the normal action oriented video games.  The story is phenomenal and since you can’t die, players of all ages should be able to spend quality time here.  It can get frustrating when looking for items to interact with, and some things can go unnoticed.  Also, if you forget a tune, there is no way to relearn it so players should have a pen and paper handy.  There are some horrendous load-times and choppy bits with the CD music, but they’re not deal breakers. Loom and Beyond Shadowgate should be on every Engine-lovers list of things to do on a Saturday afternoon. W. Eric Myers Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 把這款遊戲當成互動繪本來看——你必須敏銳地尋找畫面線索，翻開下一頁、看更多故事。與其他累積道具、想辦法判斷在哪用什麼的點擊式冒險遊戲不同，Bobbin擁有的只是一支音樂五線譜。某些物品或區域會依序給你音符，你必須使用這些音符來執行動作或觸發事件（記得把它們寫下來）。有些歌只能用在特定用途，但有些能反過來彈出相反效果，例如「開」反過來彈就是「關」。玩家必須仔細搜尋每個角落、實驗各種組合，才能摸清所有小技巧。畫面上LOOM色彩豐富，但場景稀疏、畫質略顯粗糙，因為這是從較舊的PC EGA版本移植而來的。除了背景一直播放著柴可夫斯基的芭蕾舞劇《天鵝湖》的配樂之外，幾乎沒有音效，不過《天鵝湖》本身就很動聽。整體而言，這款作品跟一般動作取向的電玩相當不同。故事極為出色，而且你不會死，各年齡層的玩家都能在這裡享受優質時光。要找可互動的物品時可能會有點挫折，有些東西會被忽略。另外，如果你忘了某段旋律，沒辦法重新學習，所以玩家最好備妥紙筆。CD音樂有一些可怕的讀取時間和片段斷裂，不過還不至於讓人破戒。Loom和Beyond Shadowgate應該列入每一位Engine迷週六下午必玩清單。W. Eric Myers Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en: Loom is a 1990 fantasy-themed graphic adventure game developed and published by Lucasfilm Games for MS-DOS. The project was led by Brian Moriarty, a former Infocom employee and author of classic text adventures Wishbringer (1985), Trinity (1986), and Beyond Zork (1987). It was the fourth game to use the SCUMM adventure game engine, and the first of those to avoid the verb–object interface introduced in Maniac Mansion.

overview_en: Tank strategy battle game.
overview_zh: 戰車策略戰鬥遊戲。

overview_en: The jungles surrounding the village of Minofu are under the thumb of the evil Jagu cult who require a blood sacrifice.  A beautiful young woman named Flare has been selected as this season’s offering, however her boyfriend Gogan will not stand for it.  Equipped with the legendary axe ‘Sting’, he braves the six zones of Jagu’s territory to defeat the cult and save his love. Throughout the zones are breakable Jagu idols which drop various sized gems for points leading to extra lives, health revitalizing orbs of differing strength, crown-like crystal containers, and wing icons.  Four crystal containers can be earned which charge the destructive power of Sting’s strike, while up to two wings can be collected increasing the speed of subsequent strikes. Each time you use the axe, the power meter drains completely then recharges as long as you don’t continue to swing.  The added strategy of - is it better to dodge and charge the axe for a crushing blow, or is it better to hack away as fast as possible – sets this game apart from most other hack-n-slashers.  When you die, one level of speed and axe power is taken away and you must re-find an icon to get it back.  The game doesn’t lock you to only scrolling right, so there are times where you can backtrack to find items.
overview_zh: Minofu村周圍的叢林被邪惡的Jagu邪教掌控，邪教需要活祭。一位美麗的年輕女子Flare被選為本季的祭品，但她的男友Gogan可不答應。他手持傳說之斧「Sting」，勇闖Jagu地盤的六大區域，擊敗邪教拯救心愛之人。各區域中散佈著可破壞的Jagu偶像，打破後會掉落各種大小的寶石（可得分換取額外生命）、不同強度的回血球、皇冠狀水晶容器以及翅膀圖示。最多可取得四個水晶容器來蓄積Sting揮砍的破壞力，而最多收集兩個翅膀可加快後續揮砍的速度。每次使用斧頭，力量計量表會完全清空，只要你不繼續揮砍就會重新蓄滿。這帶來了額外的策略要素——是閃躲並蓄力揮出毀滅一擊比較好，還是盡快狂砍比較好？這一點讓本作與其他砍殺遊戲有所區隔。死掉時，速度與斧頭力量會各降一級，必須重新找到圖示才能回升。遊戲不會鎖定只能往右捲動，所以有時可以回頭尋找道具。
comment_en: Makyō Densetsu is a well produced, great looking and sounding game, especially for the time of its release. On initial plays it can get frustrating to the point where you want to bung the card out of the window, but give it some time and learn not to rush through the stages and you will uncover a challenging and fairly satisfying action platform game. It does have its faults though, the more tricky platform jumps can be particularly unfair and you begin to question the collision detection, and at times it can seem more like hard work than fun (particularly when compared to its successor). However,  it has a charm to it that makes it easy to forgive, and a little practice makes a lot of difference. It's a game that just misses sitting among the top tier of platformers, but it's certainly worth checking out nonetheless. sunteam_paul Comment You ever notice how the greats have an outstanding loopy mascot and a heavy hitting side-scroller to really define the system?  NES = Mario and Castlevania, Genesis = Sonic and Ghouls N Ghosts (some would say Revenge of Shinobi).  I’d say the TurboGrafx = Bonk and Legendary Axe. Every geek on the planet who could put a quarter in an arcade machine in the late ‘80s holds hack-n-slashers to the ‘Rastan’ standard.  Legendary Axe IS Rastan set in the tropics vs. a European kingdom.  IMHO, the only thing this game lacks is parallax scrolling and a digital, “HUH” whenever you jump. The tile work for the graphics is unrivaled.  Look at the cliffs, the mountains in the background, the unique way of showing foliage, nothing blocky, almost unnoticeable repeating patterns, attention to lighting - pure artwork.  The music is not only arranged well, but the voices chosen for the instruments give it a Latin feel.  The character controls are spot-on and you never feel like Gogan is going to slip or be sluggish when you need to move. Finally, I love LOVE the enemy designs and A.I.  The designers created some of the funkiest characters to ever grace a game, then gave them multiple frames of animation and attack patterns.  Look at so many other games where the characters just zip on screen with two frames of animation, come at you and then die unceremoniously.  Then watch how the Jagu cult members slide around, jump, do back flips, duck and attack…this game deserved and won Game of the Year back in 1989! W. Eric Myers
comment_zh: Makyō Densetsu在當年發售時是一款製作精良、畫面與音效都很棒的作品。初玩時可能會挫折到想把卡匣丟出窗外，但給它一點時間、學會不要急著衝關，就會發現這是一款具有挑戰性且令人滿足的平台動作遊戲。它也有缺點，比較刁鑽的平台跳躍會不公平得讓人懷疑碰撞判定，有時感覺像在幹苦工而非享樂（特別是跟它的續作相比）。不過它有某種讓人願意原諒的魅力，多練一下就差很多。這款遊戲差一點就能躋身頂級平台遊戲行列，但仍然值得一試。sunteam_paul 感想：你有沒有發現，經典主機都有一個出色的瘋狂吉祥物，加上一款狠角色橫向捲動遊戲來定義整個系統？NES = 瑪利歐加惡魔城，Genesis = 音速小子加魔界村（有些人會說是Revenge of Shinobi）。我會說TurboGrafx = Bonk加Legendary Axe。1980年代末期、每個能在大型電玩機台投25分硬幣的玩家，都用『Rastan』這個標準來衡量砍殺遊戲。Legendary Axe就是熱帶版的Rastan，對上的不是歐洲王國而是叢林。說真的，這款遊戲唯一缺少的就是視差捲動和每次跳躍時發出的數位化「呵」聲。畫面的圖塊設計無人能敵。看看那些懸崖、背景裡的山脈、獨特的植被呈現方式，沒有方塊感、重複圖案幾乎看不出來、對光影的細緻注意——純粹是藝術品。音樂不只編排得好，所選用的樂器音色還帶有拉丁風情。角色操控非常精準，你絕不會覺得Gogan要在你需要移動時滑倒或遲鈍。最後，我超愛敵人設計與AI。設計師創造出一些史上最奇葩的角色，然後給了他們多幀動畫與攻擊模式。看看其他遊戲裡，角色就是兩幀動畫進場、朝你衝來然後乾巴巴地死掉。再看看Jagu邪教成員如何滑動、跳躍、後空翻、蹲下攻擊……這款遊戲在1989年勇奪年度遊戲，實至名歸！W. Eric Myers

overview_en: Overhead action game. Traverse swamps, canyons, castles and caves armed with your sword that fires upgradeable bolts of energy from its tip. The action also includes a few puzzles and there are some original ideas  (like the level where you have to catapult yourself from one place to another). Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 俯視視角動作遊戲。配備一把劍，劍尖能發射可升級的能量彈，穿越沼澤、峽谷、城堡與洞穴。遊戲中也包含一些謎題，還有一些原創構想（例如需要把自己彈射到另一個地點的關卡）。Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en:
Valkyrie no Densetsu is a 1989 action-adventure video game developed and published by Namco for arcades. It is a follow-up to the Family Computer game Valkyrie no Bōken (1986). Players control the warrior maiden Valkyrie and her lizard-like companion Kurino Xandra as they set out to drop a mythical item called the Golden Seed into the Northern Fountain to replenish the dying crop fields of Xandra Land. Gameplay involves defeating enemies and collecting gold to purchase magical spells and weapons in shops.
Valkyrie no Densetsu was the creation of Namco artist Hiroshi Fujii and a designer only known by the pseudonym of "Koakuman". The game's world, the fictional kingdom of Marvel Land, was greatly inspired by Viking tales from northern Europe and the Middle Ages, with a heavy emphasis on having a sort-of "magical" feel of it. It was originally meant to be a four-player action game in the vein of titles like Gauntlet with a cabinet-linking system similar to Final Lap, which was scrapped later on. Characters were made to have personality and depth, a design choice inspired by The Wizard of Oz.
Valkyrie no Densetsu was released in arcades to critical acclaim for its gameplay, characters, and world. Namco ported the game to the PC Engine in 1990, a conversion that was met with a more mixed response for its difficulty, downgraded graphics, and altered gameplay. The game was mostly unknown outside Japan until the release of Namco Museum Vol. 5 in 1997, which renamed the game to The Legend of Valkyrie and was fully translated into English. Several additional ports were made, including those for Windows, Japanese mobile phones, and the Wii's Virtual Console.

overview_en: Choosing to move on with a new story rather than that of the Macross anime, the creators of Macross 2036 brought in the original character designer, Haruhiko Mikimoto, for this horizontal shoot 'em up. The game features extensive anime sequences between levels to recreate the feeling of the show, and these are well drawn although quite heavy in dialogue. The gameplay itself is nothing new - you have a primary weapon and optional secondary weapon that is extra powerful, and you have to mow down the Zentradi forces in your Valkyrie (which only gets to transform at specific points). Power-up pods increase your firepower a little each time, while hidden Minmay heads give extra lives.
overview_zh: Macross 2036的製作團隊決定走出Macross動畫的故事線、另寫新劇本，並請來原作角色設計師美樹本晴彥操刀這款橫向捲動射擊遊戲。遊戲在關卡之間有大量動畫場景來重現動畫氛圍，作畫精美但對話相當繁雜。玩法本身沒什麼新意——有主武器和威力較強的副武器，必須駕駛Valkyrie戰機（只在特定點會變形）擊潰Zentradi軍勢。強化道具膠囊每次會讓火力增加一點，隱藏的Minmay頭像則會給額外生命。
comment_en: To the average player, Macross 2036 is a decent enough shoot ‘em up, but fans of the Macross series will get much more out of it. The soundtrack is  excellent, with many key tunes reproduced here very well, and the action is good fun. My main gripe is the lack of variety though, with each level having the same background graphics repeating over and over, even if they are nice to look at. But there are a few nice touches, faithful sampled explosion effects and great visual scenes, so definitely check it out. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 對一般玩家而言，Macross 2036是款不錯的射擊遊戲，但Macross系列粉絲會獲得更多樂趣。配樂非常出色，許多經典曲目都重現得很好，動作部分也挺有趣。我主要的抱怨是變化不足，每一關的背景圖都一直重複，雖然畫得很漂亮。但還是有一些不錯的小細節，像是忠實的取樣爆炸音效和精彩的視覺場景，絕對值得一試。sunteam_paul

title_jp: 超時空要塞マクロス―永遠のラヴソング―
overview_en: Strategy battle game based on the classic mecha anime series.
overview_zh: 以經典機器人動畫系列為題材的策略戰鬥遊戲。

title_jp: マッドストーカー フルメタルフォース
maker: NEC HOME ELECTRONICS / KOGADO STUDIO / FILL IN CAFE
overview_en: Robot action fighting game. Longplay Video from World of Longplays

wiki_extract_en:
Mad Stalker: Full Metal Forth is a 1994 side-scrolling beat 'em up game developed by Fill-in-Cafe and published by Family Soft in Japan for the X68000. It is the fourth game to be created and released by both Fill-in-Cafe and Family Soft for the X68000 platform late into its commercial life span, after being discontinued in 1993.
Though it was initially launched for the X68000, Mad Stalker: Full Metal Forth was later ported to other home computers and consoles such as the FM Towns and PC Engine Arcade CD-ROM², with each one exhibiting several changes and additions compared to the original incarnation, while all versions of the game are Japanese-exclusive. In 1997, the title was substantially remade for the PlayStation. Both the X68000 and PlayStation versions have since been re-released through download services such as Microsoft Windows and PlayStation Network respectively. A conversion for the Mega Drive was in development and previewed, but it did not receive an official release to the public until Columbus Circle published it in September 2020.
Despite its late initial launch, Mad Stalker: Full Metal Forth received positive reception from critics who praised multiple aspects such as the graphics, sound design and gameplay, becoming a relatively popular title among the X68000 userbase from Fill-in-Cafe that would lead it in being nominated for a Game of the Year award by Japanese magazine Oh!X before ultimately losing against other titles on the system.

overview_en: Dungeon crawling fantasy RPG using characters that later appeared in Puyo Puyo.

wiki_extract_en:
Madō Monogatari, formerly known as Sorcery Saga outside Japan, is a dungeon crawler role-playing video game franchise created by Compile. The first game was released in 1990 for MSX2. Sega published the Game Gear remakes based on 1-2-3. The characters of this series would later be used in the puzzle game Puyo Puyo.
The plot of the first game consists of a six-year-old named Arle Nadja, who has passed the written test and she needs to scale a giant tower to pass the actual test. In the second game, ten years later, Arle Nadja encounters Schezo Wegey, and also Satan (Dark Prince outside of Japan), and in the end Carbuncle joins Arle Nadja.

overview_en: Cute witch-on-a-broomstick shoot 'em up. It was released twice in Japan (the latter with a newer style box is called the 'Fan Edition' as it was released with PC Engine Fan magazine). The US version features some significant graphical changes.
overview_zh: 可愛的騎掃帚小魔女射擊遊戲。在日本發售過兩次（後來推出新款式外盒的版本稱為『Fan Edition』，隨PC Engine Fan雜誌一起發售）。美版在畫面上有不少顯著變動。
wiki_extract_en:
Magical Chase is a horizontal-scrolling shooter video game developed by Quest Corporation for the TurboGrafx-16. It was published by Palsoft in Japan on November 15, 1991, and by Turbo Technologies Inc. in North America in July 1993. A version for Microsoft Windows was released in 1998, followed by a version for the Game Boy Color (GBC) in 2000. The plot follows Ripple, an apprentice witch, accompanied by her star maiden friends Topsy and Turvy, on a quest to retrieve the demons she accidentally released from a forbidden book. The player controls Ripple, fighting enemies and avoiding obstacles, while collecting crystals to purchase items in shops.
Magical Chase was created by the same Quest staff that would later work on Ogre Battle, Tactics Ogre, and Final Fantasy Tactics. It was designed by art director Hiroshi Minagawa. The team wanted to create a shooter due to the popularity of the genre at the time, but they also wanted something unique and to explore how far they could go with the PC Engine, so production took a long time. The soundtrack was composed by Hitoshi Sakimoto and Masaharu Iwata.
Magical Chase received generally favorable reception from critics, with praise for the graphics, music, gameplay, and lack of slowdown. Some publications felt the presentation was lacking and the controls for the stars could be frustrating, while criticism focused on its short length. Retrospective commentary for the game has been generally favorable, and the North American release has become an expensive collector's item.

wiki_extract_en: Mamono Hunter Yōko: Dai 7 no Keishō (魔物ハンター妖子 第7の警鐘) is a platform game developed by Klon and published by NCS Masaya for the Sega Mega Drive in 1991 exclusively in Japan. It is an adaptation of the manga and anime series Devil Hunter Yohko.
wiki_title: Mamono Hunter Yōko: Dai 7 no Keishō

overview_en: Digital comic from the popular anime series. Yōko  Mano is the last in a line of demon hunters, and as such, has to confront all manner of wicked creatures in her Valis-style life. Those familiar with the Ranma 1/2 digi-comic will find that this plays in exactly the same way - there is no way to ‘game over’ and you can save at any time in the story.
overview_zh: 改編自人氣動畫系列的數位漫畫。間野妖子是惡魔獵人一脈最後的傳人，因此必須在她那Valis風格的生活中對抗各式各樣的邪惡生物。玩過亂馬1/2數位漫畫的人會發現這款玩法完全相同——無法game over，可以在劇情任何時刻存檔。
comment_en: Without the benefit of understanding Japanese, Mamono Hunter Yōko doesn’t fare quite as well as Ranma 1/2 (which has far more visual humour) or The Secret of Blue Water (which is more dramatic and has slightly better graphics). There is a lot of chit-chat and scenes seem to linger on more than some other games of this type. The graphics are well drawn, but somehow not as interesting as the aforementioned games. This is one to add to your digital comics  when you feel the itch to play another, rather than at the beginning of a collection. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 對看不懂日文的玩家來說，Mamono Hunter Yōko的表現沒有亂馬1/2（視覺笑料更多）或The Secret of Blue Water（更戲劇化、畫面也略好）來得出色。閒聊很多，場景停留時間感覺比這類型其他遊戲更久。畫面作畫精良，但不知為何就是沒有前述作品那麼吸引人。如果你癢得想再玩一款，可以把它加進數位漫畫清單，但不建議當成入門作品。sunteam_paul

wiki_extract_en:
Marble Madness is a 1984 platform game designed by Mark Cerny and published by Atari Games Inc. for arcades. Set in an isometric perspective, the game tasks the player with guiding a marble through six courses, populated with obstacles and enemies, within a time limit. The player controls the marble by using a trackball. Marble Madness is known for using innovative game technologies: it was Atari's first to use the Atari System 1 hardware, the first to be programmed in the C programming language, and one of the first to use true stereo sound (previous games used either monaural sound or simulated stereo).
In designing the game, Cerny drew inspiration from miniature golf, racing games, and the art of M. C. Escher. He aimed to create a game that offered a distinct experience with a unique control system. Cerny applied a minimalist approach in designing the appearance of the game's courses and enemies. Throughout development, he was frequently impeded by limitations in technology and had to forgo several design ideas.
Upon its release in arcades, Marble Madness was commercially successful and profitable. Critics praised the game's difficulty, unique visual design, and stereo soundtrack. The game was ported to numerous platforms and inspired the development of several similar games. A sequel was developed and planned for release in 1991, but was canceled when location testing showed it could not succeed in competition with other titles.

overview_en: Overhead cutesy arcade conversion where you play a kind of Alice in Wonderland character who defeats enemies by blowing bubbles.
overview_zh: 俯視可愛風的大型電玩移植作，你扮演一位愛麗絲夢遊仙境風的角色，透過吹泡泡擊敗敵人。
wiki_extract_en:
Märchen Maze is a platform game developed by N.H. System and published in 1988 by Namco for arcades. Controlling a young girl named Alice, the player must complete each of the game's nine stages while avoiding enemies and falling off ledges. Alice can blow powerful bubbles at enemies to knock them back, and can hit them enough times to send them off the platform. It is the first Japanese video game adaptation of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland, and runs on the Namco System 1 arcade board.
Development was handled by N.H. System, a short-lived subsidiary of Namco, with character design by famed anime director Katsuhiko Nishijima. It is Namco's second game to feature a female protagonist, following Wonder Momo. The word Märchen (pronounced [ˈmɛːɐ̯çn̩] MEH-kh'n) is the German word for "fairy tale". The PC Engine version was released in 1990, which replaced the isometric view with an overhead one, followed by the 1991 X68000 port. Märchen Maze received mixed reviews; although its visuals and controls were praised, critics disliked the sharp rise in difficulty and mediocre boss fights. It was digitally re-released for the Japanese Wii Virtual Console in 2009. On February 6, 2025, the game got ported by Hamster Corporation for the Nintendo Switch and PlayStation 4 as part of the Arcade Archives series.

title_jp: マーシャル・チャンピオン
overview_en: A one-on-one beat 'em up heavily influenced by Street Fighter II.
overview_zh: 深受快打旋風II影響的一對一格鬥遊戲。
comment_en: Despite some excellent presentation, including a couple of songs, this is a very poor and rushed fighting game. After the joy that was Street Fighter II we expect a whole lot more from our fighting games, particularly on CD, and this fails to beat it in any area. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 儘管包裝優異、還有幾首歌曲，這仍是一款相當粗糙、感覺匆忙趕工的格鬥遊戲。在快打旋風II那款神作之後，我們對格鬥遊戲會有更高的期待，特別是CD遊戲，而本作在任何面向都無法超越它。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en: Martial Champion (マーシャルチャンピオン) is a 1993 fighting game released for the arcades by Konami. It was Konami's third fighting game after the 1985 releases Yie Ar Kung-Fu and Galactic Warriors and the 1986 release Yie Ar Kung-Fu II, and their first release that came after the success of Capcom's 1991 arcade hit Street Fighter II.

wiki_extract_en:
Master of Monsters is a turn-based strategy game developed by SystemSoft for the MSX and NEC PC8801. It was ported to a variety of consoles and PCs including the PC Engine CD, NEC PC9801, and Sega Genesis/Mega Drive. While it never had the same success as its SystemSoft stablemate Daisenryaku, the game garnered a loyal following. Its success in the North American market on the Sega Genesis proved sufficient for a sequel on the Sega Saturn, and an anime art-style enhanced Sony PlayStation version titled Disciples of Gaia with a Japanese role-playing game feel. Master of Monsters: Disciples of Gaia was released in 1998.
The PlayStation version was announced to be re-released by Hamster for the Nintendo Switch 2 and PlayStation 5 as part of the Console Archives label.

wiki_extract_en: Megami Paradise (女神(めがみ)天国(パラダイス), Megami Paradaisu) is a role-playing game by NEC Home Electronics and released in 1994 on the PC Engine Super CD-Rom. A two-part OAV series was produced in 1995 by King Records, under their subdivision Starchild Records, and Studio Fantasia. It was directed by Katsuhiko Nishijima and follows in the tradition of his later works Agent Aika and Najica by having character designs by Noriyasu Yamauchi and having copious amount of upskirt shots. The anime is based on a manga with character designs by Akihiro Yoshizane which was serialized in Dengeki PC Engine magazine.

wiki_extract_en:
Sacred 2: Fallen Angel is a 2008 action role-playing game and the second in the Sacred video game series. It is a prequel which takes place 2,000 years before the events of Sacred. Like its predecessor, the game takes place in a fantasy setting. A new game engine allows the game to be rendered in perspective correct 3D, while retaining the viewpoint found in older isometric games. Game designer Bob Bates was involved in its production. Power metal band Blind Guardian wrote the song "Sacred Worlds" as the theme for the game and also make an appearance as characters.
The PC version was released in late 2008, the console versions were delayed until May 2009. In April, developer Ascaron went into administration, citing the extended development as the reason. An add-on titled Ice & Blood was released 2 October for European PC players only. Support for the American PC version was taken over by Deep Silver, though all support for current and future expansions and console versions in the US was dropped.
Sacred 2 was remastered on 11 November 2025.

overview_en: An overhead multi-directional action shooter, you control a craft that has to destroy all the enemies in various locations to progress. Your ship fires in any of the eight directions that you face, and you can also lock the direction of fire for more accuracy. Scattered around are various power-up pods that allow you to chose another ship from the pause menu, each having differing offensive or defensive abilities.
overview_zh: 俯視視角的全方位動作射擊遊戲。你操縱一架載具，必須在各個場地消滅所有敵人才能前進。你的機體可朝面對的八個方向射擊，也能鎖定射擊方向以提高準度。場上散落著各種強化道具艙，讓你能從暫停選單中挑選另一種機體，每一種都有不同的攻擊或防禦能力。
comment_en: There's a few things I like about Metal Stoker. The overhead graphics  are well drawn and nicely coloured, and they remind me of an upgrade to  some of the old 8-bit games I used to play. The sound is nice - decent  if forgettable music with a few voice samples that add some atmosphere  to the game. The game itself is generally pretty good; the aiming lock  system is a bit of a hassle to get used to, but eventually you'll master it. I just find it hard to get really excited  about the gameplay - it has all the elements of an exciting game but it somehow fails  to hook me. Despite that, it's certainly worth giving it a try. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Metal Stoker 有幾點我蠻喜歡的。俯視視角的畫面繪製得不錯，配色也很好看，讓我想起以前玩的一些 8-bit 老遊戲的升級版。聲音部分也不錯——音樂還可以但不算難忘，加上幾段語音取樣為遊戲增添了一些氣氛。遊戲本身整體來說算蠻不錯的；瞄準鎖定系統一開始用起來有點麻煩，但熟悉之後就能掌握了。只是我覺得它的玩法很難讓人真正熱血起來——有該有的要素，但就是沒能抓住我。即便如此，還是值得試試看。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en: Metal Stoker (Japanese: メタルストーカー) is a multidirectional shooter developed by Sankindo and published by Face. The game was released in Japan for the PC Engine in 1991.

title_jp: メタモ ジュピター
overview_en: Sci-fi shoot 'em up. The following information was kindly provided by Brandon Sheffield of www.insertcredit.com: Metamor Jupiter represents the first (major, he had one previous collaboration) foray into games by musician/designer Masaya Matsuura, of Parappa the Rapper fame. Matsuura, hot off the disbanding of his pop group PSY'S, wrote a vocal song and some incidental music for the game. As for the game itself, it's a rather standard shooter, but is also notable as an early creation of Flight Plan, the developer that went on to create such notable titles as Summon Night, Black/Matrix, Poison Pink, et al. Definitely worth a go if you're a fan of either Matsuura or Flight Plan, and a decent enough, if merely workmanlike effort otherwise. Try it. I actually bought a copy of this game when last I was in Tokyo, and presented it to Matsuura at his office during an informal interview. He was incredibly surprised to see the game, as he'd lost the original copy of the track, and ripped the disc on the spot in order to get it back! Pretty nifty. Honestly though, I only played it for about 30 minutes. It's really quite ok, but is way more interesting for its history than anything else.
overview_zh: 科幻射擊遊戲。以下資訊承蒙 www.insertcredit.com 的 Brandon Sheffield 提供：Metamor Jupiter 是音樂人兼設計師松浦雅也（Masaya Matsuura，《Parappa the Rapper》的知名創作者）首次正式跨足遊戲界的作品（先前他還有一次合作經驗）。松浦剛從他的流行樂團 PSY'S 解散後，為這款遊戲寫了一首人聲歌曲以及一些配樂。遊戲本身是相當標準的射擊遊戲，但也值得注意的是，它是 Flight Plan 的早期作品，這家開發商後來推出了《Summon Night》、《Black/Matrix》、《Poison Pink》等知名作品。若你是松浦雅也或 Flight Plan 的粉絲，絕對值得一試；對其他人來說則是中規中矩、算是稱職的作品。試試看吧。我上次去東京時實際買了一片，並在一次非正式訪談中親自帶到松浦的辦公室送給他。他看到這片遊戲驚訝到不行，因為他原本的歌曲母帶已經遺失了，他當場把光碟內容抓取出來以找回這首歌！蠻酷的。不過老實說，我只玩了大約 30 分鐘。遊戲本身還可以，但它的歷史故事比遊戲本身有趣得多。
wiki_extract_en: Metamor Jupiter is a 1993 side-scrolling shooter video game developed by Flight-Plan and published by NEC for its PC Engine Super CD-ROM².

title_jp: マイトアンドマジック
overview_en: Fantasy stat-driven RPG.
overview_zh: 以數值為核心的奇幻 RPG。
wiki_extract_en: Might and Magic is a series of role-playing video games in the science fantasy genre developed by New World Computing, which in 1996 became a subsidiary of The 3DO Company. The original Might and Magic series ended with the closure of the 3DO Company. The rights to the Might and Magic name were purchased for US$1.3 million by Ubisoft, which rebooted the franchise with a new series with no apparent connection to the previous continuity, starting with the games Heroes of Might and Magic V and Dark Messiah of Might and Magic.

title_en: MIGHT AND MAGIC III - ISLES OF TERRA
title_jp: マイトアンドマジックIII
overview_en: 3D dungeon crawling sequel. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 3D 迷宮探索的續作。Turbo Views 評論。
no_intro_name: Might and Magic III - Isles of Terra (Hudson) (Japan)
wiki_extract_en:
Might and Magic III: Isles of Terra is the third game in the role-playing video game series Might and Magic. Released in 1991, it is the predecessor to Might and Magic IV: Clouds of Xeen and the sequel to Might and Magic II: Gates to Another World. A Sega Genesis version was developed, but never released.
This was the last installment in the series to be released for the Amiga, Mac OS, Sega CD, TurboGrafx-CD and Super NES.
wiki_title: Might and Magic III: Isles of Terra

overview_en: Classic but basic puzzler that requires you to move through a minefield by deducing mine positions from adjacent numbers. Longplay Video from World of Longplays Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back
overview_zh: 經典但基本的踩地雷益智遊戲，你必須依據相鄰數字推斷地雷位置，穿越雷區。Longplay Video 來自 World of Longplays。圖片：封面、封底、書背、CD、登錄卡正面、登錄卡背面。
wiki_extract_en:
Minesweeper is a logic puzzle video game genre generally played on personal computers. The game features a grid of clickable tiles, with hidden "mines" (depicted as naval mines in the original game) dispersed throughout the board. The objective is to clear the board without detonating any mines, using clues about the number of neighboring mines in each field. Variants of Minesweeper have been made that expand on the basic concepts, such as Minesweeper X, Crossmines, Minesweeper Plus, and Minehunt. Minesweeper has been incorporated as a minigame in other games, such as RuneScape and Minecraft's 2015 April Fools update.
The origin of Minesweeper is unclear. According to TechRadar, the first version of the game was 1990's Microsoft Minesweeper, but Eurogamer states Mined-Out (1983) by Ian Andrew was the first Minesweeper game. Curt Johnson, the creator of Microsoft Minesweeper, acknowledges that his game's design was borrowed from another game, but denies that it was Mined-Out.

aka: FUTURE BOY CONAN, CONAN, THE BOY IN FUTURE

overview_zh: 改編自知名動畫導演宮崎駿電視動畫的直球型平台動作遊戲。

wiki_extract_en:
Momotarō Densetsu (桃太郎伝説; lit. "Momotarō Legend" or "Peach Boy Legend"), also known by the abbreviated name Momoden, is a role-playing video game series in Japan featuring the character Momotarō (桃太郎; lit. "Peach Boy") from Japanese folklore, as well as other Japanese folklore characters such as Kintarō, Urashima Tarō, and Princess Kaguya (from The Tale of the Bamboo Cutter). The first game in franchise, Momotarō Densetsu, had shipped 1 million copies in Japan.
Started in 1987, the series was initially produced by Hudson Soft. Konami absorbed the company in 2012. In 2015, a rumor stated that the franchise was acquired by Nintendo, though no official word from either Nintendo or Konami has been given. Momotarō Densetsu has many sub-series, including Momotaro Dentetsu. As with Momotaro Dentetsu, the project supervisor for the Momotarō Densetsu series is Akira Sakuma, with illustration by Takayuki Doi (土居 孝幸) and main music production by Kazuyuki Sekiguchi of Southern All Stars.
In addition to the Momotarō Densetsu and Momotaro Dentetsu series, Hudson has produced several other video games in the Momotarō franchise, including the Momotarō Festival (桃太郎まつり, Momotarō Matsuri) series, the Momotarō Thunderbolt (桃太郎電劇, Momotarō Dengeki) series, and Momotarō Katsugeki (桃太郎活劇). The franchise has sold 15 million units, including the Momotaro Dentetsu spin-off series.
A Momotarō Densetsu anime series was also broadcast, which had its own spinoff, PEACH COMMAND: Shin Momotarō Densetsu (PEACH COMMAND 新桃太郎伝説), featuring a different storyline set in outer space. Both series were animated by Knack Productions.

overview_en: Platform game based around Peachboy or Momotarō, a boy born from a peach. You are armed with a sword that shoots peaches, and collecting coins allows you to upgrade this and your armour. As you progress, you also get the option to call your animal friends for help.
overview_zh: 以從桃子裡誕生的男孩桃太郎為主題的平台動作遊戲。你手持一把能射出桃子的劍，收集金幣可以升級武器與盔甲。隨著進度推進，你還能呼喚動物夥伴來幫忙。
comment_en: Much overlooked, this is one of my favourite platform games of all time. It's cute and a lot of fun with great music and no shortage of variety in the gameplay. Worth putting to the top of your shopping list along with PC Genjin. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 這款常被忽視的遊戲，是我心目中的經典平台動作遊戲之一。它可愛又好玩，音樂棒極了，玩法變化也很豐富。絕對值得和《PC Genjin》一起列在購物清單的最上方。sunteam_paul

title_jp: モンスターメーカー闇の竜騎士
overview_en: Fantasy role-playing game.
overview_zh: 奇幻風格的角色扮演遊戲。

overview_en: Strategic wrestling with muscle-bound mutant creatures.
overview_zh: 由肌肉發達的突變生物進行策略式摔角比賽。

overview_en: Girlie action role-playing game.
overview_zh: 美少女風格的動作角色扮演遊戲。
wiki_extract_en:
Moonlight Lady may refer to:

Moonlight Lady (anime), the American release title for No Surface Moon The Animation; a 2001 Japanese OVA anime series
"Moonlight Lady" (song), Julio Iglesias song written by Albert Hammond and appearing in Iglesias' 1984 album 1100 Bel Air Place
Moonlight Lady (video game), an TurboGrafx-16 video game released for  on 1993

overview_en: Traditional Shōgi and a type of monster chess game.
overview_zh: 傳統將棋，以及一種怪獸對戰棋類遊戲。

overview_en: Fast  overhead multiplayer racing-battle game best played with a bunch of friends. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 快節奏俯視視角多人競速對戰遊戲，最適合一群朋友一起玩。Turbo Views 評論。
wiki_extract_en: Moto Roader is a futuristic racing game developed by NCS for the PC Engine/TurboGrafx-16. The game is the first in a series which includes Moto Roader 2 and Moto Roader MC. It is notable for having a possible five players race simultaneously, one more player than most games' maximum number.

overview_en: Futuristic racing sequel, this time with tanks and hovercraft as optional vehicles.
overview_zh: 未來風的競速續作，這次可選擇戰車與氣墊船等載具。

overview_en: A change in style for the Moto Roader series, Moto Roader MC plays and looks more like the arcade game Super Sprint than the previous installments.
overview_zh: Moto Roader 系列的風格轉變，Moto Roader MC 的玩法與視覺更接近大型電玩《Super Sprint》，而非前幾作。
wiki_extract_en: Moto Roader is a futuristic racing game developed by NCS for the PC Engine/TurboGrafx-16. The game is the first in a series which includes Moto Roader 2 and Moto Roader MC. It is notable for having a possible five players race simultaneously, one more player than most games' maximum number.

overview_zh: 類似 Bomber Man 風格的迷宮遊戲，主題是許多鴨子與蛋。

overview_en: A multi-directional shooter where you control a cute orange helicopter with feet. Collect crystals to buy power-ups at shops.
overview_zh: 全方位射擊遊戲，你操縱一架長了腳的可愛橘色直升機。收集水晶就能在商店購買強化道具。
wiki_extract_en: Mr. Heli, fully titled in Japan as Mr. HELI no Daibōken (Ｍｒ．ＨＥＬＩの大冒険, "Mr. Heli's Great Adventure") is a multidirectional scrolling shooter developed and published in arcades in 1987 by Irem. It was released in North America as Battle Chopper.

title_jp: ミスティックフォーミュラ
overview_en: Overhead run and shoot action game featuring several characters, each with their own mystical powers.
overview_zh: 俯視視角的跑位射擊動作遊戲，有多位角色可選，每位都有各自的神祕能力。
wiki_extract_en: Mystic Formula is a 1993 run and gun video game released by Microcabin for the PC Engine Super CD-ROM².

overview_en: Fantasy role-playing featuring dragons.
overview_zh: 以龍為主題的奇幻角色扮演遊戲。

overview_en: Adventure game converted from the PC, aimed at children. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • CD
overview_zh: 從 PC 版移植過來的冒險遊戲，主要面向兒童。圖片：封面、封底、CD。
wiki_extract_en:
Manhole is an action Game & Watch video game, one of six releases for the Gold Series of Game & Watch systems. The play field is split between two streets with two sewer openings each, and the player is tasked with holding a manhole cover to prevent people from falling in as they cross, with the difficulty increasing as the game goes on. It was originally released in 1981, before getting a new release in 1983. Like most Game & Watch games, Manhole was directed by Gunpei Yokoi, the creator of the Game & Watch, and was the second to feature color on the screen. Yokoi described the game as silly, a quality he hoped to achieve with its premise.
It has been featured in multiple collections of Game & Watch games, including Game & Watch Gallery and Game & Watch Gallery 4, the former which featured a new version where the player-character is replaced with Yoshi. It was also bundled with the Nintendo e-Reader for the Game Boy Advance, stored on a card that the user must swipe to play. Along with other Game & Watch games, Manhole was released as a DSiWare download for the Nintendo DSi. It was featured alongside Ball at a Game & Watch exhibit at the Nintendo Museum, allowing people to play the game using their shadow. It was among the more popular and successful Game & Watch games. Its gameplay has been found as fun by critics, though it has also been criticized for starting too slowly and being too repetitive.

title_jp: ワンダーボーイIII モンスター・レアー
overview_en: Feeling more like the first Wonder Boy  than the second, Monster Lair is a fast-paced auto scrolling platform game. The levels are split into two stages, the first being a platform stage, the second a shoot 'em up stage which ends in a boss. During the game your energy counts down, so you must keep picking up fruit to replenish yourself. There are a variety of weapons to collect - lasers, spread shots, spinning shields and so on, but these are also on a timer and do not last long, so weapon switching is frequent to avoid being left with your basic short range sword shot. The game is single or two player simultaneous.
overview_zh: 整體感覺比起 Wonder Boy 第二代更接近第一代，《Monster Lair》是一款快節奏、自動捲動的平台動作遊戲。關卡分成兩個階段，第一段是平台動作，第二段是射擊關卡，最後以頭目戰收尾。遊戲過程中你的體力會持續下降，所以必須不斷撿水果補充。武器種類也很多樣——雷射、散射彈、旋轉盾牌等等——但這些武器也有時限，用完很快，因此得經常切換武器，以免只剩下基本的近距離短劍。遊戲支援單人或雙人同時遊玩。
comment_en: This is just damn good fun, plain and simple. Visually it's a superb representation of the arcade original (minus the parallax scrolling) with the chunky, well drawn sprites that have a lot of character. The soundtrack is fantastic, great tunes arranged superbly add much to the experience of the game, which is fast paced, no-nonsense action. It's a game you will play again and again and is an essential part of any CD-Rom owner's collection. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 這就是單純、純粹的樂趣。畫面上是對大型電玩原版的絕佳重現（少了視差捲動），厚實又生動的角色精靈充滿個性。配樂非常棒，編排極佳的旋律大大提升了遊戲體驗，遊玩起來節奏明快、毫不拖泥帶水。這是一款會讓你一玩再玩的遊戲，也是 CD-ROM 玩家收藏中不可或缺的一片。sunteam_paul。Turbo Views 評論。
wiki_extract_en: Wonder Boy III: Monster Lair (ワンダーボーイIII モンスターレア, Wandā Bōi Surī: Monsutā Reā; "Wonder Boy III Monster Lair") is a 1988 platform game developed by Westone and published by Sega for arcades. It is the third game in the Wonder Boy series and the last one released for arcades. A console adaptation was made by Hudson Soft and released in 1989 in Japan for the PC Engine CD-ROM² System; the subsequent North American release on the TurboGrafx-CD dropped the Wonder Boy III title. It was also converted and released by Sega for the Mega Drive in Japan in 1990 and Europe in 1991. Both the TurboGrafx-CD and Mega Drive versions were later re-released for the Wii Virtual Console.

overview_zh: 背景設在 1921 年一棟豪宅裡的冒險遊戲。

overview_en: Sci-fi hex based strategy battle game.
overview_zh: 科幻風格、以六角格為基礎的策略對戰遊戲。
wiki_extract_en:
Nectaris, occasionally released as Military Madness, is a series of sci-fi-themed, hex map turn-based strategy games for a variety of systems. The games were developed by Hudson Soft. The company was absorbed by Konami in 2012, and as a result Konami owns the rights to the series.
Games in the series include:

Nectaris / Military Madness (PC Engine / TurboGrafx-16, 1989)
Nectaris (PC 9800 & X68000, 1992)
Neo Nectaris / Military Madness 2 (PC Engine CD, 1994)
Nectaris (MS-DOS, 1995)
Nectaris (Windows 95, 1997)
Nectaris GB (Game Boy, February 1998)
Nectaris (PlayStation, 1998), (PlayStation Network, 2008)
Nectaris Cellular (i-mode, 2003)
Military Madness (US cellphone (Verizon) v1.1)
Military Madness: Nectaris (WiiWare, Xbox Live Arcade, PlayStation Network, 2009)
Military Madness: Neo Nectaris (iPhone, 2010)

overview_zh: 可愛的躲避球遊戲，比賽地點遍及世界各地。

overview_en: Cute football game in the Kunio-kun series.
overview_zh: 屬於熱血系列（Kunio-kun 系列）的可愛足球遊戲。

overview_en: Baseball role-playing game.
overview_zh: 棒球題材的角色扮演遊戲。

overview_en: Overhead fantasy RPG featuring dynamically animated turn-based battle scenes.
overview_zh: 俯視視角的奇幻 RPG，戰鬥採回合制，有動態動畫演出。

aka: SHORT STORIES FOR A SLEEPLESS NIGHT
overview_en: Children's interactive story game. Mouse compatible. Visual Scenes
overview_zh: 兒童互動故事遊戲。支援滑鼠。視覺場景。
