title_jp: ニュートピア フレイの章
overview_en: Neutopia is an action role-playing game very much in the style of The Legend of Zelda. You must complete various dungeons in each world to progress, as well as upgrading your weapons and armour. Various items are obtained along the way (such as fire magic, bombs and a rainbow drop that allows you to cross small gaps in the landscape). Each dungeon contains an orb which reveals the map and a key, required to access the boss room. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: Neutopia 是一款動作角色扮演遊戲，風格非常接近《薩爾達傳說》。你必須在每個世界完成各個迷宮才能前進，同時升級你的武器與裝甲。沿途可以取得各種道具（例如火焰魔法、炸彈，以及能讓你跨越地形小縫隙的彩虹水滴）。每個迷宮裡都有一顆能顯示地圖的寶珠，以及進入頭目房間所需的鑰匙。Turbo Views 評論。
wiki_extract_en:
Neutopia is an overhead action-adventure video game developed by Hudson Soft. It was released by Hudson for the PC Engine in Japan on November 17, 1989. It was then released by NEC for the TurboGrafx-16 in North America on April 15, 1990. It was re-released for the Virtual Console service worldwide for the Wii in 2007; it was re-released for the PlayStation Network in Japan in 2010 and in North America in 2011. It was re-released for the Wii U on April 16, 2014 in Japan, and in USA and Europe in 2017. The game takes place in the land of Neutopia, where the evil demon Dirth has captured Princess Aurora and has stolen the eight ancient medallions which contain the wisdom and power necessary to maintain peace and prosperity throughout the land. It is up to the protagonist Jazeta to retrieve the eight medallions, defeat Dirth, rescue Princess Aurora, and save the land and its people.
Neutopia is widely regarded as a clone of the popular Nintendo game The Legend of Zelda in nearly every aspect. Many reviewers have praised the game for making noticeable improvements over Zelda, but various shortcomings – which include long passwords unless the system is used in conjunction with an add-on providing battery-backed RAM, repetitive gameplay, and poor collision detection – prevent the game from being superior to the 1986 Nintendo title. Overall, reviewers have called Neutopia one of the better video games of its type and one of the better titles in the TurboGrafx-16 library. The game received a sequel, Neutopia II, in which Jazeta disappears and his son sets out to find him.

overview_en: Sequel which doesn't deviate from the original Zelda-like formula.
overview_zh: 續作，未脫離原作薩爾達式的公式。
wiki_extract_en:
Neutopia II is a 1991 action-adventure/action role-playing video game developed and published in Japan by Hudson Soft and in North America by Turbo Technologies for the TurboGrafx-16. It is the sequel to Neutopia, which was released earlier in 1989. In the game, the player takes control of Jazeta's son, who embarks on a quest to both save his father and defeat the returning evil demon Dirth.
Headed by director and designer Shigeki Fujiwara, Neutopia II was created by a mostly different team at Hudson Soft who did not work on the first Neutopia. First released on the TurboGrafx-16, the game has since been re-released through download services such as the Virtual Console and PlayStation Network download services, in addition to being included on the TurboGrafx-16 Mini console.
Neutopia II received mostly positive reception from critics since its release; praise was given to the varied monster designs, new gameplay additions, straightforward plot and audiovisual presentation, while criticism was geared towards its lack of originality, simplistic puzzles and poor sprite animations, with some stating that the sequel felt indistinguishable from the first Neutopia. A third entry, Neutopia III, was teased by Hudson Soft but never materialized. Retrospective commentary has been equally positive, although some have criticized it as very derivative and imitative of The Legend of Zelda series.

overview_en: Space based vertically scrolling shoot ‘em up, similar in style to Super Star Solider, but far more challenging.
overview_zh: 太空背景的縱向捲軸射擊遊戲，風格類似《Super Star Soldier》，但挑戰性高得多。
wiki_extract_en: Nexzr is a 1992 vertically scrolling shoot 'em up video game released by Naxat for the NEC PC Engine Super CD-ROM².

title_en: NHK OKĀSAN TO ISSHO - NIKO NIKO PUN
title_jp: NHKおかあさんといっしょ にこにこ、ぷん
overview_en: Obviously designed as a game for younger children, you choose between three animal characters to play and must guide them across each level, collecting fruit to feed to the dragon at the end. Gameplay is simple, mostly involving jumping or ducking to avoid enemies - there is no attack. During the level the timer slowly decreases, however levels are quite short so this is to encourage children to keep moving, rather than provide any sort of challenge. Along the way you will encounter doors - some of these contain sliding block puzzles to solve, others have animated pictures of characters that talk to you. Enemies are mostly slow moving, some can be used to reach higher fruit, others are static and require timing to dodge (such as the elephants who lift their trunks for you to pass).
overview_zh: 顯然是為年幼兒童設計的遊戲，你可以從三隻動物角色中選一個來遊玩，引導牠們走過每個關卡，一路收集水果，最後拿去餵關底的龍。玩法很簡單，主要就是跳躍或蹲下閃避敵人——沒有攻擊手段。關卡進行時計時器會慢慢減少，不過因為關卡都很短，這只是鼓勵孩子往前走，而不是製造挑戰。途中你會遇到一些門——有些裡面是推拉方塊的解謎，有些則是會跟你說話的動畫角色圖。敵人大多移動緩慢，有些還能拿來當墊腳石吃到高處的水果，有些則是靜止不動、需抓準時機閃過（例如會抬起象鼻讓你通過的大象）。
comment_en: A lot of games look like they are aimed at kids, but can still provide a challenge. Niko Niko Pun is without doubt aimed squarely at the younger gamer. The gameplay is utterly simplistic. You run, jump, duck a bit at a quite sedate pace - there is no life meter to worry about, just the generous time bar. The graphics are actually quite nice - the scenery and sprites are well drawn, and there is enough parallax scrolling to please the eye. The music is a different matter. The tune that is constantly repeated throughout is tinny and fast becomes extremely annoying. By the end of the game you will be reaching for the mute button for sure. You could be mistaken for thinking this is going to provide the same enjoyment as the second Doraemon game, but don't be fooled. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 很多遊戲看起來是給小孩玩的，但還是能帶來挑戰。Niko Niko Pun 無疑是擺明要給小小玩家玩的。玩法極其簡單。你用不急不徐的節奏奔跑、跳躍、偶爾蹲一下——沒有體力條要顧，只有很寬裕的時間條。畫面其實還不錯，場景與角色精靈都畫得挺好，視差捲動也足以悅目。音樂就是另一回事了。整場不斷重複播放的那首曲子單薄又吵，很快就會讓人煩到不行。玩到最後你肯定會很想按下靜音鍵。你可能會誤以為它能帶來跟第二代《哆啦A夢》差不多的樂趣，但別上當。sunteam_paul

title_jp: NHK大河ドラマ 太平記
overview_en: Hex-based samurai warfare strategy game.
overview_zh: 以六角格為基礎的武士戰爭策略遊戲。

overview_en: Western made scrolling action horror game. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 歐美廠商製作的橫向捲軸動作恐怖遊戲。Turbo Views 評論。
wiki_extract_en: Creatures of the Night is the tenth studio album by American rock band Kiss, released in 1982. It was the band's last for Casablanca Records, the only label for which Kiss had recorded up to that point. The album was dedicated to the memory of Casablanca founder and early Kiss supporter Neil Bogart, who had died of cancer during the recording sessions. It is also the band's last album recorded with Ace Frehley credited as an official member and their first album with Vinnie Vincent, as the initially uncredited lead guitarist. Vincent would later be credited but not featured on the cover of the 1985 reissue of the album. It was also Kiss's last album to feature the band with their trademark makeup until the release of Psycho Circus in 1998.

overview_en: Side-on ninja action game that requires careful platform jumping skills. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 側視視角的忍者動作遊戲，需要仔細的平台跳躍技巧。Turbo Views 評論。

overview_en: Ninja Spirit is a fast paced action game set over multiple levels in ancient Japan. You have a choice of four weapons, switchable at any time using the Select button, each of which has multiple stages of power, increased by collecting certain scrolls dropped by orange ninjas. Your katana can slash in four directions (useful when sneaky ninjas are trying to stick a spear in you from below), shurikens are rapid fire and have a wider spread as power increases, bombs are slower to fire but do more damage, and finally the sickle and chain is deadly, allowing you to spin it around yourself in an arc of devastation. But the unique feature to Ninja Spirit are the platform versions of Gradius’ Options - ghost ninjas that mimic your moves and add greatly to your offensive damage.
overview_zh: Ninja Spirit 是一款快節奏動作遊戲，舞台設在古代日本，關卡眾多。你有四種武器可選，隨時都能用 Select 鍵切換，每種武器都有多段威力等級，可透過收集橘色忍者掉落的特定卷軸來提升。你的武士刀能朝四個方向揮砍（對付偷偷從下方刺你長槍的忍者很有用），手裡劍連射速度快、威力提升後散佈範圍更廣，炸彈發射速度較慢但傷害更高，最後是鎖鏈鐮刀，威力驚人，能以弧形在身邊旋轉造成毀滅性傷害。不過 Ninja Spirit 獨特的特色，是類似《Gradius》的 Options 的平台版——會模仿你動作的忍者分身，大幅提升你的攻擊火力。
comment_en: Ninja Spirit is quite a blast to play. The action is speedy and quite intense at times, although it can suffer from some quite bad slowdown which diminishes the experience slightly. The ghost ninjas are very handy, quite easy to obtain, and they give you a real satisfying sense of power as you plough through the many enemies on screen. The weapons give a slightly strategic element to the gameplay - there are times when choosing the right weapon will make your life considerably easier. Speaking of which, this conversion contains both an arcade mode and a PC Engine mode, the difference being the multiple hits you can take before dying in the PC Engine mode opposed to the arcade’s one-hit-and-you’re-dead. Graphically, it’s really quite an atmospheric game. Both background graphics and sprites are nicely drawn and there are a few places with a clever dual-playfield parallax scrolling effect, which despite using quite simple pattern blocks is very effective. Sound is unfortunately less good. As with most Irem games, it suffers from that kind of icky, weedy Irem music, although given the mass of sound effects going off, you never really notice it. It’s certainly a better ninja-action game than Shinobi or Kaze Kiri, and well worth adding to your collection. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 玩 Ninja Spirit 相當過癮。動作節奏快，時而相當緊繃，雖然偶爾會有嚴重的拖慢，稍微影響體驗。忍者分身非常實用，也相當容易取得，當你橫掃畫面上一大堆敵人時，它們會讓你獲得非常痛快的強者快感。武器系統為玩法帶來些微的策略性——有時候選對武器能讓你的日子輕鬆許多。說到這個，這個移植版同時收錄了大型電玩模式與 PC Engine 模式，差別在於 PC Engine 模式下可以承受多次攻擊才會死，而大型電玩模式則是「挨一下就掛」。畫面上這是一款頗有氣氛的遊戲。背景與角色精靈都畫得不錯，有幾個場景還用了巧妙的雙場景視差捲動效果，雖然用的是相當簡單的圖塊，但效果十分出色。可惜聲音表現就沒那麼好了。跟大多數 Irem 的遊戲一樣，它有那種很 Irem、軟綿綿又不紮實的音樂，不過在一堆爆炸音效此起彼落之下，其實你不太會注意到音樂。它絕對是比《忍》或《風斬り》更好的忍者動作遊戲，非常值得收進收藏。sunteam_paul
no_intro_name: Ninja Spirit (USA, Europe) (Wii U Virtual Console)
wiki_extract_en: Ninja Spirit is a 1988 hack and slash platform video game developed and published by Irem for arcades. Although praised by gamers for detailed graphics, serious themes, solid controls and gameplay, the game also was criticized for its harsh difficulty.

title_jp: 北斗星の女西村京太郎
overview_en: Hokutosei no Onna is a digital comic that puts you in the shoes of a detective  tasked to investigate a series of murders. The game follows the basics of digital comics (which is mostly text menus prompting actions such as look, listen, move etc) along with some areas that can be examined in closer detail using an on-screen pointer.
overview_zh: 《北斗星の女》是一款數位漫畫，讓你扮演偵探，負責調查一連串命案。遊戲採用數位漫畫的基本玩法（大多是用文字選單進行「看」、「聽」、「移動」等動作），部分場景可透過畫面上的指標進行更細部的調查。
comment_en: Digital comics can be very different experiences to the player who cannot understand Japanese. Some are easy to play and very enjoyable, while some are more of a painful slog through repetitive menus and locations. Unfortunately, Hokutosei no Onna veers towards the latter. When the plot is unfathomable, all you are left with are a series of merely acceptable backgrounds and some slightly dodgy character art in places. There's not a massive range of locations compared to other games in the genre and the chip music is harmless but not memorable. One blessing is that it doesn't feel overly long - perhaps even a little short. If you can understand Japanese then there may be a decent story to get your teeth into here, but for those of us who don't, there are better digital comics to give our time to. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 對不懂日文的玩家來說，數位漫畫的遊玩體驗可能差異很大。有些玩起來輕鬆又有趣，有些則像是在重複選單與場景間痛苦跋涉。可惜的是，《北斗星の女》偏向後者。當你完全看不懂劇情時，剩下的就只有還算可以的背景、以及部分地方略嫌粗糙的角色插圖。比起同類型其他作品，這款的場景種類不算多，晶片音樂雖無傷大雅但毫不令人印象深刻。唯一值得慶幸的是，它不會讓人覺得過長——甚至可能還有點短。如果你懂日文，這裡可能有個不錯的故事可以深入；但對不懂日文的我們來說，還有更多更值得投入時間的數位漫畫。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Adventure dating style game with a cute Japanese girl. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD
overview_zh: 與一位可愛日本女孩互動的戀愛冒險遊戲。圖片：封面、封底、書背、CD。

overview_en: Complex Feudal Japan strategy game.
overview_zh: 複雜的日本戰國時代策略遊戲。

overview_en: Samurai strategy battle simulation. Images Front Cover • Box Front Cover • Box Back Cover • Spine • CD • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back
overview_zh: 武士戰爭策略模擬遊戲。圖片：封面、外盒正面、外盒背面、書背、CD、登錄卡正面、登錄卡背面。

title_jp: ニュージーランドストーリー
overview_en: Cutesy platformer in which you play Tiki the Kiwi, out to rescue your kiwi friends from the nasty animals that have taken them captive. The platforming action requires you to navigate through sets of levels to reach your goals armed with a long-range bow and arrow to defend yourself. You can gain various upgrade items along the way such as a laser gun, fast running shoes and plenty of floating transport like hot air balloons or inflatable ducks to ride around on. But take care as these pop easily, and you yourself can only take a single hit before expiring.
overview_zh: 可愛風格的平台動作遊戲，你扮演奇異鳥 Tiki，要去拯救被壞心動物們擄走的奇異鳥同伴。玩法要求你穿越一組組關卡抵達目標，武器是長距離的弓箭可用來自衛。沿途可以取得各種升級道具，例如雷射槍、跑得飛快的鞋子，以及熱氣球、充氣鴨等各式漂浮載具可讓你乘坐。不過要小心，這些載具很容易爆掉，而且你自己只要挨一下就會掛掉。

title_jp: ニンジャウォーリアーズ
overview_en: Conversion of Taito's scrolling ninja slash 'em up. Playing as a choice of male or female robot ninja, you make your way across the horizontally scrolling play area slashing enemies and throwing shurikens from a limited supply. As you take hits your robot form is slowly revealed until you explode - then it's Game Over.
overview_zh: Taito 橫向捲軸忍者砍殺遊戲的移植版。你可以選擇操作男性或女性的忍者機器人，在橫向捲動的場景中砍殺敵人，並投擲數量有限的手裡劍。當你受到攻擊時，機器人的外殼會逐漸剝落，最後爆炸——然後 Game Over。
wiki_extract_en:
The Ninja Warriors is a beat 'em up video game developed by Natsume Co., Ltd. for the Super Nintendo Entertainment System and published by Taito in Japan and North America in 1994 and by Titus in Europe in 1995. It is a follow-up to Taito's 1987 arcade game of the same title, and shares similar gameplay. The player can choose between playing as one of three ninja androids, each with different attributes and a unique set of moves including jumps, dashes, throws, and other attacks. The game was developed by the same team at Natsume that later developed Wild Guns (1994).
The game was generally well received by critics. They compared the quality of The Ninja Warriors to Neo Geo and arcade games, and they felt the game had tight controls and vibrant graphics. Some reviewers disagreed on the quality of several aspects including the difficulty, sound quality, and how well the game distinguished itself among the myriad of beat 'em up games. An enhanced remaster titled The Ninja Saviors: Return of the Warriors was released in 2019.

overview_en: Peculiar platform game that allows you to call companions that help you traverse the many levels.
overview_zh: 風格特殊的平台動作遊戲，你可以呼喚夥伴幫你闖過眾多關卡。

title_jp: オペレーション ウルフ
overview_en: Being a one-man army is a difficult business - just ask that bloke Rambo. But you have taken on the hard task of mowing down whole platoons of enemy forces single handed, all to rescue hostages from a rather nasty concentration camp. Choosing from one of four stages, you have a first person view of the action and have to carefully aim your on-screen crosshair to take out the bad guys - but don't get too trigger happy, as there are many civilians and innocents who have chosen just this moment to go for a stroll in the middle of a raging firefight. You have limited ammunition, which can be replenished by shooting the spare clips lying around (which are also dropped from objects such as coconuts and birds), and also a small supply of extra powerful rockets which make short work of armoured vehicles or helicopters that have you in their sights. Occasionally you will see a pile of dynamite that serves as a smart bomb, and a nice energy drink which increases your health slightly - which is essential as it does not recover between levels.
overview_zh: 當個一人軍隊可不輕鬆——去問問那位藍波就知道了。但你得擔下這份艱鉅任務，單槍匹馬掃射整個排的敵軍，好從一座相當殘酷的集中營裡救出人質。從四個關卡中擇一開始後，你會以第一人稱視角進行遊戲，小心地以畫面上的準星瞄準敵人射擊——但別太衝動亂扣板機，因為有很多平民和無辜民眾偏偏選在這場激戰當中出來散步。你的彈藥有限，可以射擊地上的備用彈匣補充（這些彈匣也會從椰子或鳥等物件上掉下來），另外還有少量威力超強的火箭彈可用，能迅速解決瞄準你的裝甲車或直升機。偶爾你會看到一堆炸藥，作用類似智能炸彈，以及能小幅回復體力的能量飲料——這很重要，因為體力不會在關卡之間自動恢復。
comment_en: I quite enjoyed Operation Wolf in the arcades and used to play it often. Of course the light gun gimmick was a large factor in this, something which the PC Engine conversion cannot replicate. But despite this, it retains the frantic (and quite challenging) pace of the original, as well as looking and sounding close enough to what I remember. The use of a crosshair is naturally a sticking point with a game such as this. It's inherently more difficult to aim and move, although with a little practice you begin not to notice. The main problem I have with Operation Wolf is its slightness. With only a handful of levels, it doesn't present much in the way of variety and you are only likely to play it in short bursts. I find the game suitably challenging to keep my playing though - sometimes it seems impossible, but have a good day and you can get that feeling of satisfaction with your progress. And however well you are doing, it does manage to get the old heart beating just a little. It's kind of a tricky game to rate - it's fun, but not overly so, it's limited and it's short. As long as you are aware of the longevity issues, you will probably enjoy it while it lasts. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 我以前在大型電玩滿享受玩 Operation Wolf 的，常常去投幣。當然，光線槍的噱頭是很大的加分項，這點 PC Engine 版本無法重現。不過儘管如此，它仍保有原版那種緊湊（而且相當有挑戰性）的節奏，看起來、聽起來也夠接近我記憶中的樣子。像這種遊戲使用準星瞄準自然是個痛點，瞄準加移動在本質上就比較難，不過練一下就會漸漸忘了這點。我對 Operation Wolf 最主要的不滿是它內容太少。只有少少幾關，變化不多，大概只會讓你短時間短時間地玩。不過遊戲的難度拿捏剛好讓我想繼續玩下去——有時候會覺得根本過不去，但運氣好的時候又能獲得推進關卡的成就感。而且不管你玩得如何，它都能讓老人家的心跳加速一點點。這款遊戲還挺難評分的——它好玩，但沒有很好玩；內容有限、篇幅又短。只要你對耐玩度心裡有底，玩的時候應該還是會覺得滿享受的。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Operation Wolf is a 1987 light gun shooter video game developed and published by Taito for arcades. It was ported to many home systems.
The game was critically and commercially successful, becoming one of the highest-grossing arcade games of 1988 and winning the Golden Joystick Award for Game of the Year. Operation Wolf popularized military-themed first-person light gun rail shooters and inspired numerous clones, imitators, and others in the genre over the next decade. It spawned three sequels: Operation Thunderbolt (1988), Operation Wolf 3 (1994) and Operation Tiger (オペレーションタイガー) (1998), and the remake Operation Wolf Returns: First Mission (2023).

overview_en: Comical one or two player shoot 'em up. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 搞笑風格的單人或雙人射擊遊戲。Turbo Views 評論。
wiki_extract_en: Ordyne is a 1988 horizontal scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Namco for arcades. It was released only in Japan in September 1988, though a port to the TurboGrafx-16 was released in 1989 and internationally in March 1990 by NEC.

overview_en: Sci-fi style adventure/dungeon crawler. (Pronounced 'live' as in 'live wire').
overview_zh: 科幻風格的冒險／迷宮探索遊戲。（Live 發音同「live wire」中的「live」）。

overview_en: Conversion of Sega's classic arcade racing game. Race against the clock to the finish through a series of branching stages, each with a different ending.
overview_zh: Sega 經典大型電玩競速遊戲的移植版。在一連串分歧的關卡中與時間賽跑，抵達終點，每條路線都有不同的結局。
comment_en: Out Run is one of the finest arcade racing games ever made, and this conversion is about as good as you could hope for. The graphics are faithfully recreated and the classic arcade tunes are all here, albeit in NEC Avenue style sound (which is decent enough but they really need to learn how to sample drums). The only misgiving is the horrible engine noise, which can thankfully be turned off. It's not a game you would play for hours, but it was never meant to be. Out Run is just pure arcade fun that you can come back to time and time again. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Out Run 是有史以來最棒的大型電玩競速遊戲之一，這個移植版的水準大概已達到能期待的極限。畫面忠實重現原作，經典的街機配樂也全數收錄，只是採用 NEC Avenue 風格的音源（整體還算可以，但他們真的該學學怎麼取樣鼓聲）。唯一的敗筆是那個難聽的引擎聲，幸好可以關掉。這不是那種會讓你一玩好幾個小時的遊戲，但它本來就不是為此設計的。Out Run 就是純粹的大型電玩樂趣，可以一玩再玩。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Out Run (also stylized as OutRun) is 1986 racing video game developed and published by Sega for arcades. It is known for its pioneering hardware and graphics, nonlinear gameplay, a selectable soundtrack with music composed by Hiroshi Kawaguchi, and the hydraulic motion simulator deluxe arcade cabinet. The goal is to avoid traffic and reach one of five destinations before time runs out.
The game was designed by Yu Suzuki, who traveled to Europe to gain inspiration for the game's stages. Suzuki's original concept was to base the game on the 1981 American film The Cannonball Run, of which he was a fan. He disliked racing games where cars exploded on impact, and wanted gamers to enjoy the experience of driving and to feel "superior".
Suzuki had a small team and only ten months to program the game, leaving him to do most of the work himself. The game was a critical and commercial success, becoming the highest-grossing arcade game of 1987 worldwide, as well as Sega's most successful arcade cabinet of the 1980s. It was ported to numerous video game consoles and home computers, becoming one of the best-selling video games at the time and selling millions of copies worldwide. Out Run is considered one of greatest games ever made, cited as an influence upon numerous later video games, playing a role in the arcade video game industry's recovery, and providing the name for a popular music genre. It spawned a number of sequels, beginning with Turbo OutRun in 1989.

overview_en: Sci-fi vertically scrolling shoot 'em up.
overview_zh: 科幻風格的縱向捲軸射擊遊戲。
comment_en: While not the pinnacle of PC Engine shoot 'em ups, Override is reasonably good fun, moderately nice to look at and somewhat decent to listen to. Where is does stand out is the relentless fast pace that keeps the adrenaline pumping throughout the game. It's a good, solid, competent shooter that deserves to get a little of your time. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Override 雖然不是 PC Engine 射擊遊戲中的頂尖之作，但還挺有趣的，畫面算中上、聽起來也還過得去。它真正突出的是那股從頭到尾不間斷的緊湊節奏，讓腎上腺素全程飆升。這是一款紮實、稱職的射擊遊戲，值得花一點時間玩玩看。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en: Override is a vertically scrolling shooter developed by Sting Entertainment and published by Data East in 1991 for the PC Engine. A port to the X68000 was self-published by Sting as Last Battalion.

title_jp: デジタルコミック機動警察パトレイバー「グリフォン編」
overview_en: Digital comic based on the hugely successful power-suit anime series. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD
overview_zh: 改編自人氣動力裝甲動畫系列的數位漫畫。圖片：封面、封底、書背、CD。

overview_en: Arcade conversion of this plane-based shooter.
overview_zh: 這款以飛機為主題的射擊遊戲的大型電玩移植版。
wiki_extract_en:
P-47: The Phantom Fighter is a 1988 horizontally scrolling shooter video game developed by NMK and published by Jaleco for arcades. Set during World War II, players control a Republic P-47 Thunderbolt fighter aircraft to face against the Nazis, who are occupying multiple countries around the world. Its gameplay involves destroying waves of enemies, picking up power-ups and new weapons, and destroying bosses. It ran on the Mega System 1 hardware.
P-47: The Phantom Fighter was ported to home consoles and personal computers; a conversion for the Sega Mega Drive was in development, but did not receive an official release until 2025 by City Connection, Jaleco's successor. The game received positive reviews from critics, while the home ports garnered mixed response from magazines. A sequel, P-47 Aces, was released in 1995.

overview_en: Conversion of Namco's simple platform game. Run along the levels, jumping to avoid ghosts and other enemies, collect fruit as you go and navigate over various platform-based obstacles and springboard jumps over lakes. Has a choice of 2 control methods for those that prefer the push-button-to-run of the arcade original. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: Namco 簡單平台動作遊戲的移植版。在關卡中奔跑，跳躍閃避幽靈與其他敵人，途中收集水果，並克服各種平台障礙與跨越湖泊的彈簧跳躍。有兩種操作方式可選，適合喜歡原版大型電玩那種「按鍵才會跑」玩法的玩家。Turbo Views 評論。
wiki_extract_en:
Pac-Land is a 1984 platform game developed and published by Namco for arcades. It was released in North America by Bally Midway, and in Europe by Atari Games. Controlling Pac-Man, the player must make it to the end of each stage to return a lost fairy back to its home in Fairyland. Pac-Man will need to avoid obstacles, such as falling logs and water-spewing fire hydrants, alongside his enemies, the Ghost Gang. Eating large flashing Power Pellets will cause the ghosts to turn blue, allowing Pac-Man to eat them for points.
Pac-Land was conceptualized by Namco Research and Development 1 programmer Yoshihiro Kishimoto, who was tasked with creating an arcade game based on the American Pac-Man cartoon television series by Hanna-Barbera. The backgrounds were made to be vibrant and colorful, and the characters to be detailed and move smoothly to match the show's animation style. The control scheme was inspired by Konami's Track & Field (1983), using buttons instead of a traditional joystick to make it stand out among other games at the time. A new Namco Pac-Land arcade system was created to make it easier to develop the game and was used for several later Namco games, including Baraduke (1985) and Metro-Cross (1985).
Pac-Land was a commercial success in arcades, becoming one of the top five highest-grossing arcade games of 1985 in the United States. It was well-received by critics for its colorful graphics, stage designs, and soundtrack, but was criticized for its difficulty. It is cited as an important and influential game in the platform genre, paving the way for many games to follow such as Super Mario Bros., Ghosts 'n Goblins, Alex Kidd and Wonder Boy. It was ported to several home consoles and computers, including the Family Computer, PC Engine/TurboGrafx-16, Commodore 64 and Atari Lynx. It is the first platform game in the Pac-Man series, and was followed by Pac-Man 2: The New Adventures (1994).

overview_en: Role-playing adventure played out through a series of Pachinko games.
overview_zh: 以一連串柏青哥遊戲串起的角色扮演冒險。

overview_en: Role-playing adventure consisting of hours of pachinko playing.
overview_zh: 包含大量柏青哥玩法的角色扮演冒險。

overview_en: Pachinko-heavy role-playing game.
overview_zh: 柏青哥份量十足的角色扮演遊戲。

title_jp: パチ夫くん3パチスロ＆パチンコ
overview_en: Pachinko adventure game. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD
overview_zh: 柏青哥冒險遊戲。圖片：封面、封底、書背、CD。

overview_en: Puyo-Puyo style puzzle game with a Bomber Man theme. Includes a challenge mode where you have to clear tasks within a time limit.
overview_zh: 魔法氣泡風格的益智遊戲，主題採用 Bomber Man 元素。包含挑戰模式，要求你在時限內完成任務。
wiki_extract_en: Bomberman: Panic Bomber is a 1994 puzzle video game developed and published by Hudson Soft for the PC Engine (in Super CD-ROM² format) on December 22, 1994. It was later released for the Neo Geo, Super Famicom, X68000, FM Towns, NEC PC-9821, Virtual Boy, and PlayStation Portable. It saw a re-release for the Wii and Wii U's Virtual Console services. Panic Bomber is a falling block game with the players' goal being to clear matching blocks using bombs, ensuring their screen does not fill and that their opponents' screens do. It received mixed to positive reception, identified as a decent game by multiple critics. It has been compared to the falling block puzzle game Tetris. The Virtual Boy version received a mixed reception for its handling of the platform's visual capabilities.

overview_en: Colourful horizontal shooter, with a insect/biological theme. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 色彩繽紛的橫向捲軸射擊遊戲，主題結合昆蟲與生物意象。Turbo Views 評論。
wiki_extract_en: Paranoia! (or Paranoia) is a Czech conquest science fiction video game and a clone of Dune II. It was developed by Phoenix Arts in 1995 and distributed by Vision and later by MEC. It is the first Czech RTS. A sequel, Paranoia II, was released the following year.

title_jp: パラソルスター THE STORY OF BUBBLE BOBBLE III
overview_en: Third in the Bubble Bobble series created specifically for the PC Engine, you must clear each level of enemies by using your umbrella to throw them, or catch water or lightning droplets and toss them across the screen.
overview_zh: Bubble Bobble 系列第三作，專為 PC Engine 開發。玩家必須用雨傘把敵人丟出去清光每一關，或是接住水滴與閃電再把它們甩過整個畫面。
no_intro_name: Parasol Stars - The Story of Bubble Bobble III (Japan)
wiki_extract_en: Parasol Stars: The Story of Bubble Bobble III (パラソルスター) is a 1991 platform game developed and published by Taito for the TurboGrafx-16. It is a sequel to 1987's Rainbow Islands, and the third game in the Bubble Bobble series. The game was ported by Ocean Software to the Amiga, Atari ST, Game Boy and Nintendo Entertainment System (with the NES port released under the title Parasol Stars: Rainbow Islands II). On July 11, 2024, the game was digitally re-released for the PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X/S, Nintendo Switch, and Windows. On April 19, 2026, the game got another release for modern consoles as part of a bundle with Spica Adventure under the name Parasol Superstars.

title_jp: パロディウスだ！ －神話からお笑いへ－
overview_en: Konami's imaginative parody on the Gradius series. It plays just like Gradius, with the same power-up system, but features a far more bizarre and imaginative series of levels and characters.
overview_zh: Konami 對自家 Gradius 系列的奇想惡搞之作。玩法幾乎跟 Gradius 一模一樣，連強化系統都相同，但關卡和角色整個變得更怪異、更天馬行空。
comment_en: One of the most imaginative shoot 'em ups ever made, Parodius is a visual treat and has the gameplay to match. It's well balanced with a good difficulty curve and it just shines among the sea of shooters on the PC Engine. Essential purchase for shoot 'em up fans. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Parodius 是史上最具想像力的射擊遊戲之一，視覺華麗，玩起來也對得起這份賣相。整體平衡度佳，難度曲線舒服，在 PC Engine 眾多射擊遊戲中特別亮眼。射擊遊戲迷必入。sunteam_paul
no_intro_name: Parodius Da! - Shinwa kara Owarai e (Japan)

overview_en: Cute girlie digital comic.
overview_zh: 可愛少女風的數位漫畫。

overview_en: Unreleased platform game that looks like a cross between Adventure Island and Wataru.
overview_zh: 未發售的平台動作遊戲，看起來像是 Adventure Island 和 Wataru 的混合體。

overview_en: The first shoot 'em up outing for the PC Genjin series, PC Denjin look and sounds very much like an industrial version of Coryoon. There is a wide variety of weapons and character-transforming power-ups to obtain, including 'friends' that follow after you and attack the enemies in their own special way.
overview_zh: PC Genjin 系列首度跨足射擊遊戲。PC Denjin 的視聽風格就像是工業版的 Coryoon。遊戲中可取得各式武器和讓角色變身的強化道具，還有會跟隨你、用獨特方式攻擊敵人的「夥伴」。

overview_en: Mario has his jumping, Sonic has his speed, but PC Genjin has his head-butt! On a journey through prehistoric lands, this is your main defense against the crazed dinosaurs out to get you. But it's not your only defense, as now and again you will come across huge chunks of meat that grant you increased powers - from the ability to freeze all enemies by head-butting the ground, to a limited period of invincibility - complete with wacky music. Your cranial skills also come in handy when you are required to jump a long distance, as hitting the attack button as fast as you can will make you somersault in mid-air and increase your jumping range. On your way, you will come across several different types of plant. Yellow ones act as a sort of springboard, and red ones spit out fruit - be careful though as some will transform into an evil plant and come hopping after you. Also, points can be gained by keeping enemies in the air by repeatedly head-butting them - something to remember as points mean lives. NOTE ABOUT THE NAME: In Japan, Bonk/PC Kid is called PC Genjin. Genjin means pithecanthrope or primitive man which ties in nicely with the PC (Pithecanthropus Computerurus). This also leads to name-play in future projects like CD Denjin/PC Denjin (Air Zonk) where Den means lightning or electricity and Jin means a person. Genjin is also played with in CD Denjin’s title song, which refers to the main character ‘Genhead’ with the Gen coming from Genjin (and possibly a play on ‘Gunhed’). However, the name ‘PC Kid’ is the original intended English language name (before US marketing bods came up with ‘Bonk’), as it has appeared (in English) in the Japanese literature. Got all that?
overview_zh: Mario 靠跳躍、Sonic 靠速度，而 PC Genjin 靠的是用頭撞！在史前大地的冒險旅途中，這顆頭是你對抗那些瘋狂恐龍的主要防禦手段。不過也不是你唯一的本事，偶爾會出現巨大的肉塊，吃下去能獲得各種強化能力，從用頭撞地面就能冰凍全場的敵人，到短時間無敵狀態（還會搭配無厘頭的音樂）。在需要跳很遠的地方，這顆頭也能派上用場：狂按攻擊鈕就能讓你在空中翻滾，增加跳躍距離。旅途中會遇到好幾種植物，黃色的會像彈簧板一樣把你彈起來，紅色的會吐出水果，但要小心，有些會變成邪惡植物跳來追你。另外，不斷用頭撞敵人讓他們停留在空中可以累積分數，要記得分數就是生命。關於名稱的註解：在日本，Bonk／PC Kid 的名字是 PC Genjin。Genjin 意思是「猿人」或「原始人」，跟 PC（Pithecanthropus Computerurus）這個設定剛好呼應。這也延伸到後續作品的命名玩法，像是 CD Denjin／PC Denjin（Air Zonk），Den 是「電」或「閃電」，Jin 是「人」。CD Denjin 的主題曲也玩了 Genjin 的哏，歌中稱主角「Genhead」的 Gen 就來自 Genjin（可能也影射了「Gunhed」）。不過「PC Kid」才是官方原本預定的英文名（後來美國行銷部門才改叫「Bonk」），這個名字（英文）也出現在日本的宣傳資料上。都聽懂了嗎？
comment_en: While graphically and sonically a little 'primitive' (ahem), PC Genjin is a truly brilliant game, and pretty large too. There's something about whapping baddies with your forehead that is great fun throughout and you really get a satisfaction every time you complete the game - and you will come back to it time and time again. This is one of the games that no Engine owner should be without (and the reason I bought one in the first place) and despite the superior visual look of the sequels, this is still the best in terms of gameplay. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 雖然畫面和音效稍微「原始」了點（咳），PC Genjin 其實是款非常出色的遊戲，而且份量不小。用頭把敵人巴飛這件事怎麼玩都有趣，每次破關都會有滿滿成就感，讓你一再回味。這是每位 PC Engine 玩家都不該錯過的作品（也是我當初買主機的理由），儘管續作畫面更強，這一代在遊戲性上依然是最棒的。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Following closely from the original, PC Genjin 2 keeps the formula and makes a few tweaks, such as different power-up characters and limiting your ability to somersault as fast as before.
overview_zh: 延續前作的精神，PC Genjin 2 保留原有公式，並做了些微調，例如不同的變身強化角色，以及讓空中翻滾不再像前作那樣可以快速連打。
comment_en: The sequel bumps the graphics up to scratch and introduces more crazy bosses and bonus stages. It is a really quality, full platforming experience, but the inability to do really, really fast mid air somersaults can be a little frustrating at times if you are used to the original game. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 續作把畫面拉上了新水準，也加入了更多瘋狂的魔王戰和獎勵關卡。整體是相當扎實、完整的平台動作體驗，但沒辦法再像前作那樣狂速連翻空中筋斗，對玩慣一代的人來說偶爾會有點煩躁。sunteam_paul

overview_en: The third in the series offers some significant differences to the gameplay. Firstly, you can now enjoy the game with a friend with 2 player simultaneous play. And secondly, you now have the ability to transform your size to either tiny or huge with coloured sweets that are strewn about the area. The setting has moved on from the primitive era, and you now find yourself adventuring into boats, sewers and houses, complete with giant cakes and mutant babies.
overview_zh: 系列第三作在玩法上做了幾處重大改變。第一，現在支援雙人同時遊玩。第二，可以透過撒落關卡各處的彩色糖果把身體變超小或變超大。場景也脫離了史前時代，主角改為跑進船隻、下水道、房屋，還會遇到巨型蛋糕和變異嬰兒。
comment_en: The new 'super-size' mode in PC Genjin 3 is certainly impressive, although it adds little to the actual gameplay compared to the tiny mode which is necessary for access to certain areas.   By this stage, the series is starting to feel a little tired, but while this is undoubtedly the weakest of the three games, it still reeks of quality, is fun to play and miles better than many other platform games on the system. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: PC Genjin 3 新增的「超大化」模式的確很有看頭，但對實際玩法的加分有限，反倒是「縮小」模式因為進某些區域時非得用不可而更實用。到了這作，系列有點開始走疲態，雖然這毫無疑問是三部曲裡最弱的一款，整體品質仍然上乘，玩起來有趣，遠勝這台主機上多數平台動作遊戲。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review

title_jp: PCパチスロ アイドルギャンブラー
overview_en: Adult fruit machine simulator with 2 designs to choose from.
overview_zh: 成人向小鋼珠機台模擬，有兩款機種可選。

title_jp: ピーターパックラット
overview_en: Taking control of a rat called Peter, you have to navigate the levels, collecting junk to bring back to your nest. This game is unreleased. Images Preview from PC Engine Fan magazine May 1992
overview_zh: 玩家扮演一隻叫 Peter 的老鼠，必須穿越各關卡收集雜物帶回巢穴。本作未發售。Images Preview from PC Engine Fan magazine May 1992
wiki_extract_en: Peter Pack Rat is a 1985 platform game developed and released by Atari Games for the Atari System 1 arcade hardware. It was programmed by Peter Thompson, with graphics by Debbie Hayes and music by Brad Fuller. The game was only produced in small quantities, either as a standalone cabinet or as an upgrade kit to existing ones (Atari part no. 136028).

title_jp: ポリス・コネクション
overview_en: Cop-based board game.
overview_zh: 以警察為題材的桌遊。

overview_en: Action game where you travel the world, popping bubbles with your harpoon gun. Big bubbles split into smaller ones when burst and so care must be taken to dodge them all while eliminating them completely. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 動作遊戲，玩家環遊世界，用魚叉槍把泡泡戳破。大泡泡被打破後會分裂成小泡泡，因此得一邊閃躲一邊全部清光。Turbo Views Review

overview_en: A static screen action game in the style of Bubble Bobble or Don Doko Don, Pop 'n Magic allows you to trap enemies by firing your wand at them, then pick them up and throw them across the screen to destroy them. The bubbles they are trapped in are specific colours and care must be taken not to throw two of the same colour together as this will release the (now quite upset) creatures inside.
overview_zh: 單畫面動作遊戲，風格類似 Bubble Bobble 或 Don Doko Don。Pop 'n Magic 讓玩家用魔杖把敵人困住，再把他們撿起來甩過畫面消滅。困住敵人的泡泡有顏色之分，要小心別把同色的兩顆丟在一起，否則會把（此時已經很火大的）怪物放出來。

overview_en: A strange hybrid between a role-playing and platform game, Popful Mail is yet another entry in Falcom's  list of classics. Naturally taking the fantasy setting common to games of this ilk, the player is cast in the role of fiery red-headed warrior girl Mail. The game proper is sort of similar to Sorcerian, in that it's side on and presented in a simpler style than out-and-out action games. That's not to say that there isn't any action - it is very much a platformer, with many gaps to jump and enemies to dispense with. The attack method is a little different to the norm, as you can damage enemies by either landing on them or by making contact while jumping. This seems strange at first, but you soon get used to it and it does make for some frantic moments in the game. As you progress, puzzles have to be solved and bosses have to be defeated, as you'd expect.
overview_zh: 角色扮演與平台動作的奇妙混合體，Popful Mail 是 Falcom 經典名作清單上的又一員。本作採用這類遊戲常見的奇幻背景，玩家扮演一位火紅頭髮的戰士少女 Mail。遊戲本身有點像 Sorcerian，橫向視角呈現，風格比純動作遊戲簡樸。不過別以為沒動作可玩，這其實非常平台導向，有很多要跳的空隙和要清的敵人。攻擊方式有點特別：你可以踩在敵人頭上或跳起來接觸敵人來造成傷害。一開始會覺得怪，但很快就會習慣，也造就了一些緊張時刻。隨著遊戲推進，當然也得解謎、打魔王。
comment_en: As mentioned, the presentation is simpler than pure platformers - the sprites are very small and the backgrounds are a little 'blocky'. But that doesn't seem to matter as the graphics are generally well drawn and use some lush, bright colours making them attractive enough to look at. Presentation is top notch, with high quality opening scenes and additional snippets throughout the game. One piece of trivia for voice acting buffs is that one of the characters is voiced by Akira Kamiya, who voiced Ryo Saeba in the City Hunter anime and Shutaro Mendo in the Urusei Yatsura series (among other things). He also voiced Guy Kazama in the Japanese version of Telenet's Red Alert (Last Alert). Popful Mail is a fun and addictive little game that is well worth hunting down. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 如前所述，本作的呈現比純平台動作遊戲樸素，角色精靈很小，背景稍嫌方塊。但這些都不算問題，因為整體畫面繪製精良，用色飽滿明亮，看起來很順眼。演出部分頂尖，有高水準的開場動畫和散布遊戲中的小片段。給配音迷的小花絮：本作其中一位角色是由神谷明配音，他正是「城市獵人」中冴羽獠、「福星小子」中面堂終太郎的聲優（作品還很多）。他也是 Telenet 的 Red Alert（Last Alert）日版中 Guy Kazama 的聲音。Popful Mail 是款有趣又讓人上癮的小品，非常值得挖出來玩。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Popful Mail: Magical Fantasy Adventure is a 1991 action-adventure platform video game developed and published by Nihon Falcom for the PC-8801. It was later ported to the PC-9801 and Super Famicom by Falcom, to the Sega CD by Sega and Sega Falcom, to the PC Engine Super CD-ROM² by NEC Home Electronics and HuneX, and to DoJa mobile phones by Bothtec.
Most versions of Popful Mail are for the most part similar to each other, but the Sega CD and Super Famicom versions differ significantly both from each other and from the other releases. The Sega CD version was going to be reworked even further to be part of Sega's Sonic the Hedgehog series, but this did not end up happening. This version was localized by Working Designs and released in North America in early 1995, and was the only version available outside Japan prior to July 2024.

overview_en: Ever felt underpowered and lacking in omnipotence? Well now is your chance to live the dream in Populous, Bullfrog's seminal god game. Domination is the aim here - you control a community of cute little guys and must build a population greater than your computer controlled rival. Starting with a house or two, you are at first limited to raising and lowering the ground - the flatter the ground around a domicile, the more advanced it becomes, up to the level of a sturdy fort. But this is not the extent of your power. More houses mean more people, and more people means the higher your little arrow creeps along your power bar, opening up such furious skills to inflict on your opponent like floods, swamps and volcanoes that disrupt the landscape and any city planning therein. Once you feel you have sufficiently dominated the opposition (the display on the top right conveniently gives you a visual guide here) then you release armageddon - all followers gather together and duke it out until there is only one. Depending on your score, you then move forward any number of levels which include diverse scenery such as grasslands, desert, snow and volcanic rock.
overview_zh: 曾經覺得自己能力不足、缺乏神力嗎？Populous 就是讓你圓夢的機會，這是 Bullfrog 經典的「神仙遊戲」。目標就是支配全局，你掌管一群可愛小人，要讓你的族群人口超過電腦對手。一開始只有一兩棟房屋，起初你能做的只有墊高或壓低地形，民宅周邊的地越平，就會越升級，最高可達堅固的城堡。但你的能力遠不止於此，越多房子代表越多人口，越多人口就讓你的能量條上的小箭頭爬得越高，解鎖洪水、沼澤、火山等各種能砸在對手身上、破壞地形與城鎮規劃的狂暴神蹟。當你覺得已經把對方壓制得差不多（右上角的顯示方便你目視判斷），就能引爆最終決戰，所有信徒聚到一起廝殺到只剩一方為止。依照分數，你會一口氣推進數個關卡，場景多樣，包括草原、沙漠、雪地與火山岩。
comment_en: There are good reasons Populous was a massive hit when it was released, and translation to the PC Engine has lost nothing of the brilliance of the original. The game is so unique and compelling that you can easily play for hours, playing map after map with that 'just one more' feeling. There is something massively satisfying about dominating an entire landscape and beating the computer into submission time and time again. Graphically it does the job well, with colourful and detailed landscapes and the audio, although understated with the constant thump-thump heart beat and abstract whining sounds, creates the perfect atmosphere for the game. Movement around the map can be a little fiddly at first, but once you get used to it you don't give it a second thought. Populous is a timeless classic, other god games have come and gone with more complex systems, but the sheer simplicity of Populous along with the relaxed pace of the gameplay works in its favour and makes it a game you will find hard to tire of soon. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Populous 當年熱賣是有道理的，移植到 PC Engine 也絲毫沒有折損原作的精彩。遊戲獨特又耐玩，你輕鬆就能一玩幾小時，一關接一關停不下來。用神蹟把整片地形整垮、把電腦一次又一次打到投降，帶來的爽感極其滿足。畫面做得稱職，地貌色彩鮮明細節充足，音效雖然低調，只有那持續的咚咚心跳聲和抽象的呻吟聲，卻把氣氛烘托得剛剛好。地圖操作一開始會覺得有點彆扭，但習慣之後就是直覺反應。Populous 是不朽經典，後來的神仙遊戲帶來更複雜的系統，但 Populous 的純粹簡潔加上悠閒步調反而成為優勢，是一款怎麼玩都不會膩的作品。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Populous is a video game developed by Bullfrog Productions and published by Electronic Arts for the Amiga in March 1989, then quickly the Atari ST and MS-DOS. Many conversions followed, including for the Genesis, Super NES, and PC Engine consoles. Populous is considered the first god game. With over four million copies sold, Populous is one of the best-selling PC games of all time.
The player assumes the role of a deity, who must lead followers through direction, manipulation, and divine intervention, with the goal of eliminating the followers led by the opposite deity. Played from an isometric perspective, the game consists of more than 500 levels, with each level being a piece of land which contains the player's followers and the enemy's followers. The player is tasked with defeating the enemy followers and increasing their own followers' population using a series of divine powers before moving on to the next level. The game was designed by Peter Molyneux, and Bullfrog developed a gameplay prototype via a board game they invented using Lego.
The game received critical acclaim upon release, with critics praising the game's graphics, design, sounds and replay value. It was nominated for multiple year-end accolades, including Game of the Year from several gaming publications. Retrospectively, it has been considered one of the greatest video games of all time. The game was ported to many other computer systems and was later supported with multiple expansion packs. It is the first game in the Populous series, preceding Populous II: Trials of the Olympian Gods and Populous: The Beginning.

title_jp: ポピュラス ザ・プロミストランド
overview_en: Being the major hit that it was, it's no surprise that Populous was a rich prospect for expansion. What Populous - The Promised Lands brings to the table is a whole new set of landscapes as well as the original game included for good measure. In total, there are 8 new lands to discover, ranging from Bomber World (with Bomber Man related houses and characters) to Block Land (Lego), the French Revolution and Wireframe (where everything is made from pseudo-vector graphics). Gameplay remains the same as the original however.
overview_zh: Populous 既然大紅大紫，推出資料片擴充自然不意外。Populous - The Promised Lands 帶來一整套全新地景，並且附贈原版遊戲算是回饋。總共有 8 張新地圖可探索，從 Bomber World（房屋和角色都是 Bomber Man 主題）、Block Land（樂高）、法國大革命，到 Wireframe（一切都以偽向量圖形構成）。不過玩法跟原作完全相同。
comment_en: In terms of new stuff, Promised Lands is a bit of a mixed bag. Some of the new landscapes are great (the little PC Engine houses are adorable), whereas ones like Silly Land seem to be a wasted opportunity. But that's no big deal because Populous is Populous, and that means it's an engaging and fun experience. Because this is on CD it gives the added opportunity of redbook music, although I have to admit that this is one of the few times in a game that I prefer to turn it off - it gets repetitive fast. It's a bit of a shame that you can't play through with all the worlds from both games included but that's a minor niggle and shouldn't prevent you from getting onboard with this gaming classic. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 就新內容而言，Promised Lands 的表現好壞參半。有些新地景非常棒（小小的 PC Engine 房屋超可愛），但像 Silly Land 就像白白浪費一次機會。不過這沒什麼大不了，因為 Populous 就是 Populous，意思就是它依舊好玩有趣。因為是 CD 版，所以還多了紅皮書音樂，但老實說這是我少數覺得寧願關掉音樂的遊戲，因為重複得很快。可惜不能把兩款遊戲的所有世界一次跑完，這是小缺點，但不該妨礙你入手這款遊戲經典。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Ambitious conversion of Sega’s  racing game. Instead of choosing your tracks like in the arcade, this version limits you to playing them in order, continuously. Place first, second or third in each race to go on to the next track.
overview_zh: Sega 賽車遊戲的野心之作移植版。不像大型電玩版可自行挑選賽道，這版限制你必須依序連續跑完所有賽道。每場比賽取得前三名才能進入下一賽道。

title_jp: パワーゴルフ2 ゴルファー
overview_en: Providing several modes of play, Power Golf 2 uses a third person 3D view to represent the course and features all the usual aspects that you would expect of the genre.
overview_zh: 提供多種遊戲模式，Power Golf 2 採用第三人稱 3D 視角呈現球場，包含此類遊戲該有的所有要素。
comment_en: Power Golf 2 doesn't surprise in any way, being a pretty standard style of golf game. However, it is one of the more enjoyable ones on the PC Engine. For me, the extra modes are inconsequential as I just like to relax and play the holes casually, but I'm sure the career driven tournement mode will excite some players. Overall the atmosphere is decent enough and if you just want something lazy to do while filling time then it's a good candidate. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Power Golf 2 沒什麼驚喜，是相當標準的高爾夫遊戲。不過，它在 PC Engine 上算是比較好玩的一款。對我來說額外模式無關緊要，我就愛輕鬆隨興地打幾洞，不過我相信有些玩家會被生涯制的錦標賽模式吸引。整體氛圍不錯，如果你只是想懶懶地消磨時間，這款是不錯的選擇。sunteam_paul

wiki_extract_en:
Power Spikes II is a volleyball arcade video game developed by Video System and originally published by Taito on October 19, 1994. A follow-up to Hyper V-Ball for the Super Nintendo Entertainment System, it was first launched for Neo Geo MVS (arcade) and later ported to Neo Geo CD. It is the final installment in the Super Volleyball series. It is also the only volleyball game released on the Neo Geo.
In the game, players have the choice to compete across any of the game modes available with either AI-controlled opponents or against other human players. Headed by Aero Fighters Assault producer Koji Furukawa, Power Spikes II was created by most of the same team that would later work on several projects at Video System such as later entries in the Aero Fighters franchise. The game has since been re-released through download services for various consoles. It received mixed reception from critics and reviewers alike since its initial launch.

overview_en: Action tennis game.
overview_zh: 動作派網球遊戲。
wiki_extract_en:
Mario Power Tennis is a 2004 sports video game developed by Camelot Software Planning and published by Nintendo for the GameCube. It is the sequel to the Nintendo 64 title Mario Tennis, and is the third installment of the Mario Tennis series. The game was ported for the Wii in 2009 as part of the New Play Control! series, and was also re-released as a Nintendo Selects title in 2012.  A companion handheld game, Mario Tennis: Power Tour, was also released on Game Boy Advance around the same time as the original GameCube release, bearing the same title as Power Tennis in Europe.
Power Tennis incorporates multiple characters, themes, and locations from the Mario series. The game includes standard tennis matches, but contains variants that feature different scoring formats and objectives. Other variants include "Gimmick" courts, thematic areas with components and properties that directly affect gameplay. The game has 18 playable characters, each categorised by their style of play and each with a pair of unique moves known as "Power Shots". Power Tennis was developed simultaneously with Mario Golf: Toadstool Tour, and the pair shared similar technology and concepts with each other during production. Such similarities include an emphasis on the Mario theme in characters and settings as well as alternative game modes such as "Ring Shot".
The GameCube version was positively received in general, attaining an aggregate score of 81 percent from GameRankings and 80 out of 100 from Metacritic. Critics praised the game's depth and variety, but criticised the Power Shot animations, which could not be skipped. The Wii version in contrast received a more mixed reaction, with praise for the graphics and multiplayer but criticism for its inaccurate motion controls. In 2010, it was included as one of the games in the book 1001 Video Games You Must Play Before You Die.

title_jp: プリンスオブペルシャ
overview_en: Escaping from the evil Sultan's prison, you have to make your way through the various levels to find the princess. There are many traps laid for you, including spiked pits, falling floors and switch operated doorways. The focus is more on exploration and acrobatics than action, although you do come across guards that have to be dispatched once you find a handy sword.
overview_zh: 從邪惡蘇丹的牢獄中逃脫後，你必須一路闖關找到公主。途中陷阱密布，包括尖刺坑、塌陷地板、按鈕控制的閘門等。本作重點更偏探索與特技動作，而非純動作，不過你也會遇上必須對付的守衛，得先撿到趁手的劍才能應付。
comment_en: Prince of Persia is more than just a conventional platform game. Due to its control method, it requires carefully timed movement as well as precise positioning. It’s the kind of game where you have to constantly replay levels to learn how to finish them, but once you do it is quite satisfying. Also, you have a time limit for the whole game which is counting down throughout, so the pressure is really on. It’s also the inspiration for the Tomb Raider games, only it’s a lot better, and it has a very impressive soundtrack too. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: Prince of Persia 不只是一款普通的平台動作遊戲。由於它的操作方式，必須精確掌握動作時機與走位。屬於那種得反覆試錯才能學會怎麼過關的遊戲，但過關後相當有成就感。另外，整個遊戲還有一個倒數的總時限，壓力滿滿。它也是 Tomb Raider 系列的靈感來源，只不過它更好玩，配樂同樣令人印象深刻。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review

overview_en: Life sim in which you take on jobs from a wide variety such as archbishop or soldier.
overview_zh: 人生模擬遊戲，可挑選從大主教到士兵等各式各樣的職業。
wiki_extract_en:
Princess Maker is a child-raising simulation video game created by Gainax and the first entry in the Princess Maker series, first released in Japan in 1991. 
Set in a medieval fantasy world, the game centers on the long-term upbringing of a young girl entrusted to the player. The gameplay centers on managing her education and moral development from childhood to adulthood.
Gameplay unfolds over a span of eight in-game years, during which the player manages the daughter's work, rest, and leisure activities. These choices determine events, character development, and the eventual outcome of her life.
At the time of release, Princess Maker drew attention for its unusual focus on parenting. The game is widely regarded as a foundational work in the child-raising simulation genre.

overview_en: Simulation where you adopt a young girl and have to raise her by setting tasks and activities to fill her spare time. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD
overview_zh: 模擬遊戲，玩家收養一名小女孩，藉由安排任務與課餘活動把她養大。Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD

An original video animation by Group TAC was originally released by Toho in May 1995 in Japan; it was later released also in the United States. The extended franchise also includes a manga series, an illustrated serial novel, and other media.

wiki_extract_en:
Psychic Storm is a 1992 vertically scrolling shooter video game released by Laser Soft for the NEC PC Engine Super CD-ROM².
It was included in the 2023 Telenet Shooting Collection for the Nintendo Switch. It was also released on the Nintendo eShop as a stand-alone title.
At the time of its original release, the Famitsu review staff gave the game average ratings, while highlighting the creature-like appearance of enemy ships. TurboPlay considered the game easy, but praised its presentation and co-op mode.

overview_en: Running-up-the-screen shoot 'em up that allows you to power up your weapons between stages.
overview_zh: 畫面由下往上捲動的射擊遊戲，關卡之間可強化武器。
wiki_extract_en: Psycho Chaser is a 1990 vertically scrolling shooter video game released by Naxat for the NEC PC Engine.

overview_en: Classic Tetris-style puzzle game where you compete against opponents by grouping together coloured blobs that drop down from the top of the screen.
overview_zh: 經典的俄羅斯方塊風益智遊戲，從畫面上方掉下的彩色小球必須組合成群來擊敗對手。

overview_en: More blob dropping puzzle action.
overview_zh: 更多落下式消除的益智動作。

overview_en: Brain bending puzzle game in which you guide your little man to the exit in each room by moving and rotating blocks until your path is clear. Features several different modes, such as single player, timed, and competitive play. It also features a talking tomato.
overview_zh: 傷腦筋的益智遊戲，玩家在每個房間中移動與旋轉方塊打通路徑，引導小人物走到出口。支援多種模式，包括單人、計時、對戰玩法。還有一顆會說話的番茄。

overview_en: Move the coloured blocks around to match them up. Blocks can only be moved left or right, and can fall down but not move up. Some levels are fiendishly designed and need some careful thought, and all this is against a strict time limit, so don't make a mistake.
overview_zh: 把彩色方塊推來推去湊在一起消除。方塊只能左右移動，會往下掉但不能往上推。有些關卡設計刁鑽，得仔細思考，而且全程還有嚴格的時間限制，千萬別失誤。
wiki_extract_en:
Puzznic (パズニック, Pazunikku) is a tile-matching video game developed and released by Taito for arcades in 1989. It was converted to the Nintendo Entertainment System, Game Boy, PC Engine, X68000, Amiga, Atari ST, Amstrad CPC, Commodore 64, MS-DOS, and ZX Spectrum between 1990 and 1991. Home computer ports were handled by Ocean Software; the 2003 PlayStation port was handled by Altron. The arcade and FM Towns versions have adult content, showing a naked woman at the end of the level; this was removed in the international arcade release (but not the US one) and other home ports. The completed Apple IIGS port was never officially released, but subsequently leaked, after Taito America shut down.
Puzznic bears strong graphical and some gameplay similarities to Taito's own Flipull/Plotting.

overview_zh: 這張 CD 把兩張 HuCard卡匣合而為一，呈現完整版本，也就是原本該有的樣貌。還添加了為 CD 格式增值的視覺演出場景，以及每個關卡重新編曲的音樂。
wiki_extract_en:
R-Type is a 1987 horizontally scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Irem for arcades. The player controls the R-9 "Arrowhead" starship in its efforts to destroy the Bydo, a powerful alien race bent on wiping out all of mankind. The R-9 can acquire a glowing orb called a "Force", giving limited protection from enemy fire and providing additional firepower.
R-Type was the first game to run on Irem's 16-bit M72 arcade system. The development team drew inspiration from Gradius, Aliens and works by H.R. Giger. The music was composed by Masato Ishizaki, while character designs were by Akio Oyabu. The arcade version was distributed in North America by Nintendo, and was the last arcade title to be released by the company.
R-Type was commercially successful and praised by critics for its graphics and addictive gameplay, but was criticized for its difficulty. It is commonly cited as one of the best shoot 'em up games, and one of the greatest video games of all time. Its success inspired several sequels and spin-off games, as well as home ports and releases for digital distribution services. A remake of the game was released as R-Type DX for the Game Boy Color in 2000. A 3D remake, R-Type Dimensions, was released for the Xbox 360 in 2009; for the PlayStation 3 in 2014; for the Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 4, and Windows in 2018; and for iOS in 2019.

overview_en: One of the games that really sold the PC Engine to people, R-Type I contains the first four levels of Irem's seminal shoot 'em up. Pilot your  R-9 fighter to wipe out the evil Bydo Empire. You have a variety of weapons available, primarily 'The Force', an orb that you can have sit in front or behind your ship for protection, or release to give you extra firepower. Other weapons include diagonally firing lasers, lasers that travel vertically and move across the ground, or a powerful circular red laser. Combined with homing missiles and protective orbs, you have a major arsenal at your disposal. Released in the US as part 1 & 2 on one card.
overview_zh: 當初讓許多人下手買 PC Engine 的關鍵作之一，R-Type I 收錄 Irem 經典射擊遊戲的前四關。駕駛 R-9 戰機，消滅邪惡的 Bydo 帝國。武器豐富，核心是「The Force」力場球，可裝在機體前方或後方當防禦，或發射出去增加火力。其他武器還有斜向發射的雷射、沿地面垂直推進的雷射，以及強力的紅色環狀雷射。搭配追蹤飛彈和護衛機，戰力一應俱全。美版當時以「1 & 2 合一卡」發售。
wiki_extract_en:
R-Type is a 1987 horizontally scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Irem for arcades. The player controls the R-9 "Arrowhead" starship in its efforts to destroy the Bydo, a powerful alien race bent on wiping out all of mankind. The R-9 can acquire a glowing orb called a "Force", giving limited protection from enemy fire and providing additional firepower.
R-Type was the first game to run on Irem's 16-bit M72 arcade system. The development team drew inspiration from Gradius, Aliens and works by H.R. Giger. The music was composed by Masato Ishizaki, while character designs were by Akio Oyabu. The arcade version was distributed in North America by Nintendo, and was the last arcade title to be released by the company.
R-Type was commercially successful and praised by critics for its graphics and addictive gameplay, but was criticized for its difficulty. It is commonly cited as one of the best shoot 'em up games, and one of the greatest video games of all time. Its success inspired several sequels and spin-off games, as well as home ports and releases for digital distribution services. A remake of the game was released as R-Type DX for the Game Boy Color in 2000. A 3D remake, R-Type Dimensions, was released for the Xbox 360 in 2009; for the PlayStation 3 in 2014; for the Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 4, and Windows in 2018; and for iOS in 2019.

overview_en: This contains the last, and more challenging, four levels from R-Type. Released in the US as part 1 & 2 on one card. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 收錄 R-Type 最後、也更有挑戰性的四關。美版當時以「1 & 2 合一卡」發售。Turbo Views Review
wiki_extract_en: R-Type II is a 1989 horizontally scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Irem for arcades. It is the sequel to 1987's R-Type, and the second game in the R-Type series.

overview_en: Horizontal shooter that puts you in control of a robotic rabbit.
overview_zh: 橫向捲軸射擊遊戲，玩家操縱一隻機械兔。
wiki_extract_en: Rabio Lepus is a 1987 horizontally scrolling shooter video game developed and published by V-System for arcades. It was released in Japan in September 1987 and in North America by Bally Midway in February 1988 as Rabbit Punch. An NEC PC Engine port, Rabio Lepus Special, was released in 1990. Hamster Corporation released the game for the PlayStation 2 as part of the Oretachi Gēsen Zoku series in 2006, as well as part of the Arcade Archives series for the Nintendo Switch and PlayStation 4 in July 2022.

overview_en: Motorbike circuit racing game.
overview_zh: 機車賽道競速遊戲。

overview_en: A conversion of the classic arcade shoot 'em up, Raiden follows the conventions of the genre with coloured power up pods that give different weapons when collected.
overview_zh: 經典大型電玩射擊遊戲的移植版，雷電 Raiden 遵循此類遊戲的公式，透過收集彩色強化道具艙取得不同武器。
comment_en: Raiden is one of the all-time greats in the annals of shoot 'em up history. It’s not just the excellent graphics and sounds, but the engaging gameplay that keeps you addicted for ages. It’s also capable of throwing up some hair-raising moments, and bullet dodging skills are pushed to the extreme. Thankfully, despite its toughness, it doesn’t get too frustrating. If you have a CD unit, be sure to check out Super Raiden instead for a more complete experience. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 雷電是射擊遊戲史上的大師級名作之一，不只畫面音效一流，耐玩的玩法也讓你上癮許久。它也常常端出讓人捏冷汗的瞬間，子彈迴避技術逼到極限。還好雖然硬派，但不至於惹人抓狂。如果你有 CD 主機，建議改玩 Super Raiden 體驗更完整的版本。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Raiden is a 1990 vertically scrolling shooter video game developed by Seibu Kaihatsu and published by Tecmo for arcades. The game's story takes place in the year 2090, when an alien species known as the Crystals invaded Earth. Players assume the roles of the Vanquish Crystal Defense pilot duo, taking control of two state of the art Fighting Thunders aircraft to defeat the Crystals and save the Earth.
The game was conceived after Dynamite Duke, Seibu Kaihatsu's prior title, failed to sell as well as expected. During development, the game was designed as a vertically scrolling shooter due to the popularity of the genre at the time. Cheaper arcade hardware had to be used due to financial constraints caused by Dynamite Duke's poor sales.
Although Seibu doubted Raiden's success, it managed to sell 17,000 arcade units worldwide, helping to recuperate the company's investments through word-of-mouth. The title became a critical success, with its most lauded features being the graphics, music, gameplay and co-operative play.
Due to the success of Raiden, several sequels and related games were made. Raiden was ported to home computers and various home video game consoles in the early to mid 1990s. The game was released as part of several compilations and through download services such as PlayStation Network. The ports received mixed to positive reception.

title_jp: レインボーアイランド
overview_en: Ultra cute sequel to Bubble Bobble. Work your way up each level by jumping platforms and throwing out rainbows. You can collapse your rainbows by jumping on them from above, allowing you to destroy any enemies trapped underneath, or you can shoot them directly at anything heading your way. The rainbows can be powered up to shoot three at a time and are essential to use as temporary platforms to progress up the level.
overview_zh: Bubble Bobble 的超可愛續作。跳上一個個平台並射出彩虹，一路往上爬通關。從上方跳到彩虹上可以把它踩塌，壓死底下被困住的敵人；也能直接朝迎面而來的敵人射彩虹。彩虹可強化到一次射出三道，也是必備的臨時立足點幫助你向上推進。
wiki_extract_en:
Rainbow Islands: The Story of Bubble Bobble 2 (レインボーアイランド) is a 1987 platform game developed and published by Taito for Japanese arcades. It is the sequel to 1986's Bubble Bobble, and the second of four arcade games in the Bubble Bobble series (followed by Bubble Symphony and Bubble Memories, but itself has two direct sequels: Parasol Stars and Bubble Bobble Part 2). The game was ported to home computers and home video game consoles.
The "bubble dragons" of the first game, Bubblun and Bobblun (known as "Bub and Bob" in the western releases) appear in Rainbow Islands in their human forms as "Bubby" and "Bobby". Also unlike the first game, players must now "alternate" (i.e., take turns), with player one as Bubby (green shirt), and player 2 as Bobby (blue shirt).
wiki_title: Rainbow Islands: The Story of Bubble Bobble 2

overview_en: The first Ranma 1/2 game based on Rumiko Takahashi’s popular manga. You play Ranma, a boy who after falling in a magical hot spring, changes into a girl if he gets wet. The only way to change back is to come into contact with hot water. The large cast of supporting characters includes many shape changing people, including a panda, cat and goose! The game itself is a scrolling beat ‘em up (with some one-on-one stages) with a major focus on the visual scenes between levels that tell the story from the manga.
overview_zh: 改編自高橋留美子人氣漫畫的第一款《亂馬1/2》遊戲。你扮演亂馬，一個不小心掉進神祕溫泉後只要碰到水就會變成女生的男孩，只有接觸熱水才能變回原樣。龐大的配角陣容裡有很多會變身的角色，包括熊貓、貓和鵝！遊戲本身是橫向捲軸格鬥／橫向動作（夾雜一些一對一關卡），重點放在關卡之間呈現原作劇情的視覺演出場景。
comment_en: A rather disappointing use of the licence, this game works on paper but the implementation leaves a lot to be desired. The graphics range from average to poor - the character sprites somehow don't look proportionally correct at times and the visual scenes vary from well drawn to a bit rough. Gameplay  feels loose, unfinished and just not 'solid' enough, and also suffers from an unevenness of difficulty. Ranma fans will get a bit of a buzz from the whole package of course, non-fans will find limited amusement from the game. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 算是相當令人失望的授權作，紙上看起來可行，但實際呈現就還有很大進步空間。畫面從普通到糟都有，角色精靈看起來比例有時就是不太對，視覺場景品質也參差不齊。玩起來手感鬆散、未完成、不夠「紮實」，難度分佈也不均。亂馬粉絲看到整個包裝會有點興奮，但非粉絲大概會覺得樂趣有限。sunteam_paul

title_jp: らんま1／2打倒、元祖無差別格闘流！
overview_en: The third Ranma 1/2 game is a one-on-one beat 'em up featuring extensive visual scenes that vary depending on whether you win a fight as boy-type Ranma or girl-type Ranma. Levels are set in a variety of locations, with a crazy array of characters from the manga out to get you. During fights you can hold down the button to power up a super attack, or hit select to change from boy to girl and back again, female Ranma being more agile but having less power.
overview_zh: 《亂馬1/2》的第三款遊戲是一對一格鬥遊戲，包含大量視覺演出場景，內容會依你是以男版亂馬還是女版亂馬贏得戰鬥而改變。各關卡場景多變，原作漫畫裡各種瘋狂角色輪番來找你麻煩。戰鬥中可以按住按鈕蓄力放必殺技，或按 SELECT 在男女之間切換，女版亂馬較敏捷但力量較低。
comment_en: As a beat 'em up, the game is pretty competent, but where it really shines is presentation. The scenes between levels are well drawn and very funny in places and are the glue that holds the game together, and this combination makes the whole package greater than the sum of its parts and a fantastic bit of entertainment, especially for Ranma fans. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 作為格鬥遊戲，本作表現稱職，但真正亮眼的是演出。關卡之間的場景繪製精良，有些橋段還相當爆笑，是串起整款遊戲的黏著劑，讓整體大於各部分加總，是非常出色的娛樂，尤其對亂馬粉絲而言。sunteam_paul

title_jp: らんま1／2とらわれの花嫁
overview_en: The second game based on Ranma 1/2, and this time it's a fully formed Digital Comic. The story takes Ranma and friends through many situations, from a school contest and a domed beach for women only to a secret base in the snow where an evil bear plots to marry girl-type Ranma.
overview_zh: 第二款《亂馬1/2》改編作，這次是完全成型的數位漫畫。故事帶著亂馬和夥伴們穿越各種情境，從校園比賽、女性限定的室內海灘，到雪地裡邪惡熊意圖迎娶女版亂馬的祕密基地。
comment_en: Out of all the Digital Comics I’ve played, this is by far the best. Its quite big, and even though my grasp of Japanese is minimal, it is very funny in places. Obviously, some knowledge of the characters will help, along with a familiarity of some of the basic commands, but anyone who likes decent graphics and the quirky Japanese sense of humour can’t fail to get something out of it. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 在我玩過的所有數位漫畫裡，這款是到目前為止最棒的一款。份量很大，就算我的日文能力很有限，某些橋段還是相當好笑。當然，對角色有一定認識以及熟悉一些基本指令會更有幫助，但只要你喜歡體面的畫面和日式的怪趣幽默，都不會一無所獲。sunteam_paul

overview_en: The Sacred land of Rastania is under threat. Legend says that anyone who conquers the temple 'skyscraper' will control the land - but a group of evil forces has set out with this goal, so a solitary hero with only his fierce resolve and a loincloth to be reckoned with sets out to destroy this evil group before it is too late. And so begins the second chapter in the mighty Rastan Saga. Like the original, Rastan Saga II is a side scrolling hack 'em up, although the game plays very different to its predecessor. For a start, the sprites are much bigger and the emphasis seems more on rushing through a level like a maniac than taking it more carefully to avoid losing energy. As before, power-up weapons are included, such as double handed swords and swords that shoot fireballs, and also familiar will be the rope swinging action, even if there is less emphasis on accurate platform jumping.
overview_zh: Rastania 這片聖地受到威脅。傳說征服聖塔「摩天樓」者將能統治整片土地，而一群邪惡勢力已帶著這個目標出動，於是獨自一人、只帶著堅毅意志與一條丁字褲的英雄前來，試圖在一切太晚之前摧毀這群惡勢力。巨大 Rastan Saga 的第二章就此展開。和原作一樣，Rastan Saga II 是橫向捲軸砍殺遊戲，但玩起來和前作非常不同。首先，角色精靈大得多，重點似乎改成了像瘋子一樣衝過關卡，而非小心翼翼避免流失體力。如前作一般有強化武器，如雙手劍與會射火球的劍，也保有耳熟能詳的繩索擺盪，但精準跳躍的比重降低了。
comment_en: Despite this sounding pretty much like a clone of a sequel, it really is a very different game to its arcade prequel, and that is part of its downfall. I love the original Rastan - great action, smart graphics and amazing tunes. But Rastan Saga II is like some foul offspring that has been vomited forth from all the design ideas that could have ruined the original. The graphics, while looking promising on initial screenshots are impressive only by their size. Animation is poor and the whole thing looks like an unprofessional mess - it's missing graphical polish on some very important level. The gameplay really sucks too. The main sprite seems to slide around and fly through the air when jumping, and the size of the sprites is very detrimental to how the game plays. You just feel as you are rushing from start to finish, not caring whether you get hit by anything or not and this seriously affects the game. To add insult to injury, the superb music of the original Rastan is replaced by weedy, feeble sound and tunes that really belong in a cute platformer and not a barbarian action game. I was sorely disappointed by this game and it gives the original Rastan a bad name. Shocking. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 儘管聽起來就像是續作裡的克隆版，其實它和大型電玩前作完全不同，而這正是它的敗筆。我愛原版 Rastan——精彩動作、銳利畫面、神級配樂。但 Rastan Saga II 像是某種從原作所有糟糕設計念頭中嘔吐出來的歹種後代。畫面在初版截圖上看似有模有樣，實際上讓人印象深刻的只有尺寸而已。動畫糟糕，整體一團不專業的混亂，缺乏某個很重要層次上的視覺打磨。玩法也一塌糊塗。主角精靈好像在地上滑動，跳起來還會飄在空中，過大的角色尺寸嚴重影響玩法。你就像是一路從頭衝到尾，完全不在意會不會被打到，嚴重損害遊戲體驗。更糟糕的是，原作 Rastan 那精彩配樂被軟弱貧乏的音效與曲子取代，那種風格應該出現在可愛風平台遊戲，而不是野蠻人動作遊戲。這款遊戲讓我極度失望，也敗壞了原版 Rastan 的名聲。非常糟糕。sunteam_paul
wiki_extract_en:
Rastan Saga II, known in Europe as Nastar and in North America as Nastar Warrior (except for the North American Sega Genesis version, which was released as Rastan Saga II), is a 1988 hack and slash platform game developed and published by Taito for arcades. The sequel to Rastan (released as Rastan Saga in Japan), it tells the story of how Rastan got his name (meaning his real name is unknown) and saved a vast region called Rastania from evil monsters known as the Wicked Group. Rastania, the kingdom which Rastan saves in this game, subsequently becomes his kingdom to rule.
On June 20, 2024, the arcade version of the game was digitally re-released for the Nintendo Switch and PlayStation 4 as part of the Arcade Archives series.

overview_en: Sci-fi horizontal shoot 'em up.
overview_zh: 科幻風格的橫向捲軸射擊遊戲。
wiki_extract_en:
Rayxanber II is a 1991 horizontally scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Data West for the PC Engine CD-ROM². It is the sequel to Rayxanber, which was released earlier in 1990 for the FM Towns. In the game, the player assumes the role of a fighter pilot controlling the Eliminate Scanner AD space craft to protect Earth against an alien invasion led by the returning Zoul Empire. The title was created by Team 50, a group within Data West that previously worked on the first entry for FM Towns. The music was scored by Yasuhito Saito, who composed for the original entry and also worked on titles such as Layla and The 4th Unit series.
Rayxanber II became a success when it released in Japan but garnered mixed reception from critics, including French publications reviewing it as an import title; praise was given to the visuals, audio, controls, introduction of various innovations into its gameplay and longevity, but most noted its difficulty and criticized its presentation. Retrospective commentary have been equally mixed, some of which found it to be an improvement over its predecessor but concurred in regards to its high difficulty nature. A follow-up, Rayxanber III, was released for the PC Engine Super CD-ROM² in 1992.

overview_en: Horizontal shoot 'em up with striking spacecraft and background designs.
overview_zh: 橫向捲軸射擊遊戲，具有引人注目的戰機和背景設計。
wiki_extract_en:
Rayxanber III is a 1992 scrolling shooter video game developed and published by Data West for the PC Engine Super CD-ROM². It is a follow-up to Rayxanber II, which was released earlier in 1991 for the PC Engine CD-ROM², and the last entry in the Rayxanber trilogy. In the game, the player assumes the role of a fighter pilot controlling the ES3 Donner Kyle space craft deployed into the homeworld of the Zoul Empire, in retaliation for the destruction of a mother ship from Earth. It retains the same gameplay as its predecessors, with the players fighting against an assortment of enemy forces while avoiding collision with their projectiles and other obstacles.
Rayxanber III was created by Team 50, a group within Data West responsible for the Rayxanber trilogy, with Kazuhide Nakamura reprising his role as designer. The soundtrack was scored by Yasuhito Saito, who composed for the previous games in the trilogy, and worked on titles such as Layla and The 4th Unit series. An English localization was slated to be published by Turbo Technologies, but it never materialized. The game was anticipated by Japanese players, but garnered mixed reception from critics who reviewed it as an import title. Retrospective commentary has been more positive, being considered one of the best games for the PC Engine and one of the most important shooting titles on the platform.

overview_en: Role-playing game based on the anime of the novels.
overview_zh: 根據小說動畫版改編的角色扮演遊戲。
wiki_extract_en: Record of Lodoss War (Japanese: ロードス島戦記, Hepburn: Rōdosu-tō Senki; lit. "Lodoss Island War Chronicle") is a franchise of fantasy novels by Ryo Mizuno based on the work he originally created for a world called Forcelia as a rules-free setting for role-playing games (RPGs). There have since been multiple manga, anime and video game adaptations, several of which have been translated into English. The plots generally follow the conventions and structure of the RPG systems including Dungeons & Dragons and Sword World RPG, in which several characters of distinct types undertake a specific quest.

overview_en: Fantasy role-playing game.
overview_zh: 奇幻角色扮演遊戲。
wiki_extract_en: Record of Lodoss War (Japanese: ロードス島戦記, Hepburn: Rōdosu-tō Senki; lit. "Lodoss Island War Chronicle") is a franchise of fantasy novels by Ryo Mizuno based on the work he originally created for a world called Forcelia as a rules-free setting for role-playing games (RPGs). There have since been multiple manga, anime and video game adaptations, several of which have been translated into English. The plots generally follow the conventions and structure of the RPG systems including Dungeons & Dragons and Sword World RPG, in which several characters of distinct types undertake a specific quest.

overview_zh: 俯視視角的跑射遊戲，主角是個像藍波的角色 Guy Kazama。
wiki_extract_en:
Command & Conquer: Red Alert is a 2.5D real-time strategy video game developed and published by Electronic Arts for iOS. It was released in October 2009 in the App Store.
The game contains two playable factions, Soviets and Allies, which both previously appeared in Command & Conquer: Red Alert and Command & Conquer: Red Alert 2 with a third playable faction, the Empire of the Rising Sun from Command & Conquer: Red Alert 3, available as an in-app purchase.
wiki_title: Command & Conquer: Red Alert (2009 video game)

overview_en: Side scrolling fighting game in which you play Fujiro, a private eye who is hired to hunt down some nasty gothic types.
overview_zh: 橫向捲軸格鬥遊戲，你扮演私家偵探 Fujiro，被雇用來追捕一群邪惡的哥德系壞人。

overview_en: Conversion of the Amiga game where you control a Japanese general, featuring strategy sections and arcadey mini-games. Turbo Views Review Images Front Cover • Back Cover •  CD • Front Cover (US) • Back Cover (US) • Box Front Cover (US) • Box Back Cover (US) • CD (US)
overview_zh: Amiga 遊戲的移植版，玩家控制一位日本將軍，包含策略環節與大型電玩風的小遊戲。Turbo Views Review Images Front Cover • Back Cover •  CD • Front Cover (US) • Back Cover (US) • Box Front Cover (US) • Box Back Cover (US) • CD (US)
wiki_extract_en:
Rising Sun is a 2000 computer wargame developed by TalonSoft and published by Take-Two Interactive. Set during the Pacific War, it is an entry in TalonSoft's Campaign series.
Rising Sun won positive reviews from critics and was nominated for awards by Computer Gaming World and Computer Games Magazine.

overview_en: 17 course into-the-screen racing game.
overview_zh: 共17條賽道的第一人稱視角賽車遊戲。

overview_en: Chunky shoot 'em up with a wide range of selectable weaponry.
overview_zh: 畫面厚實的射擊遊戲，可選用的武器種類相當豐富。

overview_zh: 棒球遊戲。Images Front Cover • Back Cover • CD

overview_en: Unreleased overhead RPG based in the PC Genjin world. Gekkan PC Engine magazine originally ran mocked-up screenshots of this game as a joke, but the positive response lead them to put it into production. However, no substantial development occured before the project ended. (Information from The Untold History of Videogame Developers vol2 by John Szczepaniak). Images Preview from PC Engine Fan magazine May 1992 • PC Genjin Wallpaper
overview_zh: 未發售的俯視視角RPG，以PC原人（PC Genjin）世界為背景。《Gekkan PC Engine》雜誌原本是開玩笑刊登了這款遊戲的模擬截圖，但因為讀者反應熱烈，就真的決定投入製作。不過專案在實質開發展開前就已告終。（資訊來源：John Szczepaniak所著《The Untold History of Videogame Developers vol2》）。Images Preview from PC Engine Fan magazine May 1992 • PC Genjin Wallpaper

overview_zh: 改編自人氣動畫系列的數位漫畫。選擇你的角色，從她的視角體驗故事。
