title_jp: ふしぎの海のナディア
overview_en: Taken from the highly acclaimed Gainax anime series, you play a young inventor called Jean, who adventures with Nadia, a  circus performer with a mysterious blue pendant. On the run from the evil Neo-Atlantians and their leader, Gargoyle, they find themselves making a strange discovery on a deserted island. The game also includes some quiz-based mini games. *SERIES SPOILERS AHEAD*
overview_zh: 改編自備受好評的Gainax動畫系列《不可思議之海的娜迪亞》，玩家扮演年輕的發明家Jean，與戴著神秘藍色墜飾的馬戲團表演者Nadia一同展開冒險。他們逃離邪惡的新亞特蘭提斯人和其首領Gargoyle的追捕，並在一座荒島上有了奇妙的發現。遊戲中還包含一些問答類小遊戲。*以下含系列劇透*
comment_en: The anime series is mostly excellent, but suffers a dip in quality when the studio decided to extend the run and add a set of what are essentially 'filler' epidodes. This happens right after the destruction of the Nautilus and one of the series' most dramatic and dark moments, and the shift in tone and character is highly noticeable for these episodes. They mostly consist of stories with Jean and Nadia stranded on a desert island and don't further the main plot in any way, while making you roll your eyes at the sudden stupidity of what is going on. The game is set slap bang in the middle of these fillers, at a time when Jean and Nadia have met up again with  Grandis' gang and Ayerton, giving the story writers plenty of characters to play with, and follows the exploits as they discover secret underground tunnels (similar to those in episodes 30 & 31), try to escape from Goblin (a Gargoyle lackey), meet a beautiful blonde who captures Jean's attention and face off with the threat of the Green Noah. *SPOILERS END* The game itself is a fairly typical digital comic format, with choices made from the menu, mostly consisting of look, speak, move etc, so it's easy for us non-Japanese speakers to progress without too much trouble. A couple of areas are a little labyrinthine, so you may find yourself wandering aeound longer than you wish, but aside from that the interaction is far more minimal. On the downside, the screen doesn;t have the usual ornate frame, instead a stark black background on which the pictures and test are displayed, however it does make up for this with some gorgeous artwork and that fact that it's fully voiced. Digital comics are a hard one to rate as it just depends on what you like. I really enjoyed The Secret of Blue Water both before and after watching the anime - the story is easy enough to follow, there's plenty to look at and it rarely slows the pace down. The plot is in keeping with the bulk of the series and would have been a far better choice that the block of fillers that ended up in the actual show. It's certainly one of the better sigital comics I have played, perhaps not as good as Ranma, but almost. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 這部動畫系列大體上非常精彩，但在製作單位決定延長集數、加入一批本質上屬於「補檔」的集數後，品質出現了下滑。這正好發生在鸚鵡螺號被摧毀、系列中最戲劇化也最黑暗的時刻之後，這幾集的調性與角色刻畫落差相當明顯。這些集數主要描述Jean和Nadia漂流到荒島的故事，完全沒有推進主線劇情，同時還讓人為突然變蠢的劇情翻白眼。本遊戲的時間點正好設定在這些補檔集數的正中央，此時Jean和Nadia又與Grandis一行人和Ayerton重逢，讓編劇有了不少角色可以發揮。劇情描述他們發現秘密的地下通道（類似第30、31集中出現的那些）、試圖逃離Goblin（Gargoyle的手下）、遇見一位吸引Jean注意的金髮美女，並面對Green Noah的威脅。*劇透結束*遊戲本身是相當典型的數位漫畫形式，從選單中做出選擇，主要是「看」、「說」、「移動」等等，所以對我們不懂日文的玩家來說也不難推進。有幾個區域有點像迷宮，可能會讓你比想像中多繞上幾圈，但除此之外互動性就相當低了。缺點方面，畫面沒有一般常見的華麗邊框，而是以純黑底配上圖片與文字，不過這由精美的畫面藝術與全程語音演出彌補回來。數位漫畫很難評分，完全看你喜不喜歡這類作品。我在看動畫之前和之後玩《The Secret of Blue Water》都很享受——劇情好懂、可看的東西很多、節奏鮮少拖沓。劇情和動畫主軸相當契合，比起實際播出的那批補檔集，絕對是好得多的選擇。這確實是我玩過的數位漫畫中較出色的一款，也許沒有《亂馬》那麼好，但也相差不遠。sunteam_paul
no_intro_name: Fushigi no Umi no Nadia - The Secret of Blue Water (Hudson) (Japan)

title_jp: 銀河婦警伝説サファイア
overview_en: One or two player shoot 'em up, one of the last big name shooters from Hudson Soft on the PC Engine. WARNING: There are many counterfeit copies of Sapphire out in the wild being sold as original or re-release/second edition. These are illegal bootlegs and you can full full information on identifying them here.
overview_zh: 一至兩人遊玩的射擊遊戲，是Hudson Soft在PC Engine平台上最後幾款大作射擊遊戲之一。警告：市面上流通著許多《Sapphire》的盜版，常被當作正版或再版/二版販售。這些都是非法盜版，你可以在這裡取得完整的辨識資訊。

overview_en: One of Masaya's earlier games, Schbibin Man in a fairly straightforward platform actioner. Playing either Tasuke (male) or Kyapiko (female), you have to make your way across many levels with just a sword to take down an army of robotic creatures while avoiding floating mines and lava pits. The game is not completely linear, as you start off on a map screen and have to decide which route to take to reach the final boss. This means that you don't have to play every level to win - although certain levels will allow you to obtain special power-up items. One of these (the most important) is the ability to fire a ball of energy from your sword - very useful when timed right as it can take out a whole line of enemies. The levels are basically of three types - a park, a city and an interior of a factory. Each level is also presented as day or night, giving a limited sort of variety to them and most are fairly short, ending with a boss. This is always either a giant robot (which just involves whacking it as fast as possible) or a flying dragon, which needs a little more skill to defeat. While the park and city levels are similar in structure, the factory tends to be a little more platformy, and requires better timing for all the moving platforms.
overview_zh: 這是Masaya早期的作品之一，《Schbibin Man》是一款相當直球的平台動作遊戲。玩家可選擇Tasuke（男）或Kyapiko（女），只能靠一把劍，穿越重重關卡打倒一群機械生物，同時閃避浮動地雷和岩漿坑。遊戲並非完全線性，一開始會進入地圖畫面，必須選擇通往最終魔王的路線。這表示你不必玩每一關就能通關——不過某些關卡會讓你取得特殊強化道具。其中最重要的能力是可以從劍中發射能量彈——只要時機抓得準，就能一次掃掉一整排敵人，非常實用。關卡基本上分三種：公園、城市和工廠內部。每一關也會有白天和夜晚的版本，提供有限的變化，而且大多關卡都相當短，結尾會有一個魔王。魔王通常不是巨型機器人（只要拚命砍就行），就是飛龍（需要更多一點技巧才能打倒）。公園和城市關卡結構類似，工廠關卡則傾向於平台要素更多，需要更精準的跳躍時機來應付所有移動平台。
comment_en: Graphically, Schbibin Man is a little rough around the edges, particularly compared with its sequels. Sprites are small and bright, but backgrounds are a little messy. Sound however is excellent. A great title tune and in-game music is made better with some typical Masaya sampled drums. There's also a few snippets of sampled speech. Despite the fact that this is a pretty simple and not particularly attractive platformer, I really quite enjoy this game. The levels don't spew forth random enemies, so it is possible to learn the enemy patterns and this gives you a certain satisfaction. But mostly, I think I play it for the music. It's not too hard too and worth completing if you can. I can see many people writing this game off at a glance, but don't be too harsh on it and give it a go. Two player simultaneous play is also a nice bonus. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 畫面上，《Schbibin Man》略顯粗糙，尤其是跟續作比起來更明顯。角色精靈又小又亮，但背景有點雜亂。不過音效方面則相當出色。動聽的主題曲和遊戲中音樂，搭配Masaya招牌的取樣鼓聲，效果更上一層樓。還有幾段取樣語音。雖然這是款簡單又不特別漂亮的平台遊戲，但我真的挺喜歡的。關卡裡的敵人不會亂出，所以可以記住敵人出現模式，這會帶給你一定的成就感。不過我想我最主要還是為了音樂而玩。難度也不算太高，如果你有能力通關的話很值得一玩。我可以想像很多人一眼就會把這款遊戲打入冷宮，但別太苛刻，請試著玩一下。支援兩人同時遊玩也是不錯的加分。sunteam_paul

title_jp: 改造町人シュビビンマン2―新たなる敵―
overview_en: If you were to take the first Schbibin Man and write a list of how to improve on it for the sequel, then you would probably come up with the game that is Schbibin Man 2. Developing  from the first game, you still get to play as either Tasuke or Kyapiko, but this time the swords are gone. Instead, you have the ability to shoot from a distance and throw a schbibin right from the start - no power up required! There is a continuous storyline that follows the action, although this time round the level order is pre-determined, but there are now  underwater shooting levels, upward scrolling levels and gameplay feels a lot faster than the original.
overview_zh: 如果你拿第一代《Schbibin Man》寫一份「續作該如何改進」的清單，最後大概就會做出《Schbibin Man 2》這款遊戲。在第一代的基礎上繼續發展，玩家一樣可以選擇Tasuke或Kyapiko，但這次沒有劍了。取而代之的是，從一開始就能進行遠距離射擊並投出schbibin——完全不用強化！動作劇情有連貫性，只不過這次關卡順序是固定的，並且新增了水下射擊關卡、向上捲動關卡，整體手感也比原作快上許多。
comment_en: Graphically, Schbibin Man 2 is a lot better than its predecessor - sprites and backgrounds are cleaner, better shaded  and there are some lovely designs in places. But something is wrong -  something is missing. On paper, this game sounds like a winner. However, when I come to play it, it seems somehow shallow and unrewarding in a way that is very difficult to pinpoint. Maybe the faster swordless gameplay takes a lot of the skill out as you find yourself just rushing along to complete the levels. Or maybe it's because it's more difficult and less well balanced than the first game. Whatever it is, I was disappointed with this game and consider it the weakest of the three. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 畫面上，《Schbibin Man 2》比前作好上不少——角色精靈和背景更乾淨、陰影處理更好，某些場景設計也相當漂亮。但總覺得哪裡不對——少了什麼。紙面上看起來這遊戲該是款佳作。然而實際玩起來，卻有種難以言喻的空洞、玩完沒什麼回饋的感覺。或許是沒有劍、速度變快的玩法讓技巧性大幅流失，你只是匆匆衝過關卡。又或者是因為它比第一代更難，平衡性也較差。無論如何，這款遊戲讓我相當失望，我認為它是三部曲中最弱的一款。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review

title_jp: 改造町人シュビビンマン3異界のプリンセス
overview_en: One of Masaya's better known series of games, Schbibin Man 3 finally takes our heroes onto CD-Rom. Still retaining the action platforming escapades of the previous installments, this one returns the close combat sword action from   the first game. Also, you now have the ability to partially guide your schbibin once fired by holding down the button and wrestling with the joypad. This is very useful and you can get some quite accurate hits in with practice. Being on CD, this game is far more varied this time around and levels change regularly. There are also some nice surprises, like being able to control a massive walking robot, or flying on a bug while pursued by a gigantic  dragon that breathes fire at you from behind.
overview_zh: 身為Masaya較知名的系列作之一，《Schbibin Man 3》終於將主角們帶上了CD-ROM。保留前幾作的動作平台玩法，這一代回歸了第一代的近戰劍擊動作。此外，現在發射schbibin後，按住按鈕並扭動搖桿還能做部分軌跡導引。這非常實用，練熟後可以打出相當精準的攻擊。因為是CD規格，這次遊戲的變化豐富得多，關卡變化頻繁。還有一些有趣的驚喜，像是能操縱巨型步行機器人，或是騎著昆蟲飛行，後面還被會噴火的巨龍追擊。
comment_en: Without doubt, this is the best looking game in the series. Fantastic parallax scrolling in places, some huge sprites - all a treat to look at and some quite lengthy and well constructed anime style intro sequences add tremendously. Music is generally pretty good throughout, with the opening intro deserving of a special mention. This is also a game well worth completing - not only do you get a great ending sequence, but this also opens up an 'omake' section which allows you to see fan art of the Schbibin Man characters! It may be as easy as breathing, but it's top fun and you'll come back to it again and again. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 這毫無疑問是系列中畫面最出色的一款。某些場景有絕妙的視差捲動、巨大的角色精靈——都賞心悅目，還有幾段相當長、製作精良的動畫風格開場，更加分不少。音樂整體都相當不錯，開場動畫的配樂尤其值得一提。這也是款非常值得破關的遊戲——不只有精采的結尾畫面，通關後還會解鎖一個「omake」區塊，能欣賞《Schbibin Man》角色的粉絲創作！雖然難度簡單得像呼吸一樣，但樂趣十足，會讓你一玩再玩。sunteam_paul

title_jp: 魔法の少女シルキーリップ
overview_en: Unfinished and unreleased anime style adventure using a system of icons as well as standard movement controls.
overview_zh: 未完成且未發售的動畫風格冒險遊戲，採用圖示系統搭配標準的移動操作。

overview_en: Fantasy action RPG that uses the Ys style combat system where you bump into enemies to attack them.
overview_zh: 奇幻動作RPG，採用《伊蘇》式的戰鬥系統，靠撞擊敵人來攻擊。

overview_en: Sequel to Chase HQ. Catch up with the criminal's vehicle and run them off the road or shoot them until they give up.
overview_zh: 《Chase HQ》的續作。追上歹徒的車輛，把他們逼離路面，或開槍打到他們投降為止。

overview_en: Comedy adventure game. The first digital comic style adventure game on the PC Engine.
overview_zh: 喜劇類冒險遊戲。是PC Engine上第一款數位漫畫風格的冒險遊戲。

overview_en: Shoot 'em up where you play as a robotic dragon with the ability to use your tail to deflect bullets and harm enemies.
overview_zh: 射擊遊戲，玩家扮演機械龍，能用尾巴彈開子彈並傷害敵人。

overview_en: Arcade conversion featuring alternate horizontal and vertical levels. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 大型電玩移植作，交替出現橫向與縱向的關卡。Turbo Views Review

title_jp: 三国志 英傑天下に臨む
overview_en: Territorial strategy game set in old Japan. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Box Front Cover • Box Back Cover • CD • Anime Front Cover
overview_zh: 以古日本為背景的領土戰略遊戲。Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Box Front Cover • Box Back Cover • CD • Anime Front Cover

overview_en: Samurai strategy battle simulation.
overview_zh: 武士戰略戰鬥模擬。

overview_en: Take on the alien hordes in this vertically scrolling shoot 'em up from the people behind Aleste. The power-up system in Spriggan relies on different coloured globes - you can have three of these in stock at any one time and the order they are in will vary what style of weapon you have. This allows for a certain degree of mix-and-match until you find your preferred combination. You can also eject these orbs, which act as a smart bomb in times of need.
overview_zh: 在這款縱向捲軸射擊遊戲中對抗外星大軍，由製作《Aleste》的團隊操刀。《Spriggan》的強化系統靠不同顏色的珠子——同時最多可庫存三顆，排列順序不同會變化出不同風格的武器。這讓玩家可以自由搭配，找出自己偏好的組合。你也能彈射這些珠子，在危急時當作全螢幕炸彈使用。
comment_en: Spriggan delivers in both the well drawn graphics and  non-stop gameplay. A few of the levels are little over-long, but this doesn't sour the experience, and it remains one of the best vertical shooters on CD. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 《Spriggan》無論是精緻的畫面還是源源不絕的流暢玩法都相當到位。有幾關稍嫌過長，但無損整體體驗，它仍是CD上最棒的縱向射擊遊戲之一。sunteam_paul

title_jp: 聖戦士伝承 -雀卓の騎士-
overview_en: Fantasy based mahjong. Visual Scenes
overview_zh: 奇幻風格的麻將遊戲。Visual Scenes

overview_en: I have scoured the net trying to find the actual back story to this game, and have come up short.  However, based on conjecture from the cutscenes and what little I’ve found, here is what seems to be going on. A dragon cult is rising in the land.  A young virgin named Lena has a child who is either to be sacrificed or used as a figurehead (as is evident in the cutscene where an expressionless older child sits on a thrown during a cult ceremony; I gather he is a puppet or the clip is a premonition to what Lena’s baby is to become.  Lena and her perhaps immaculately conceived child are in a separate, dark chamber). Lena steals away to the town of Yalem where she puts the infant at the doorstep of a church before herself becoming a spirit.  Four people will wander by the baby’s basket.  If players push the cry button, the person investigating will adopt him!  Depending on a choice between four potential parents, the child will be raised as a swordsman, thief, wizard or monk.  The child will grow from 5 years old to 10, then when 15 years old the adventure begins. I surmise the character is sort of a messiah who is to overthrow the demon taking control.
overview_zh: 我翻遍網路想找這款遊戲的實際背景故事，卻一無所獲。不過根據過場動畫的推測，和我所找到的一點點資訊，大概是這樣的劇情。一個信奉龍的邪教正在這片土地上崛起。一位名叫Lena的年輕處女生下一個孩子，這孩子將被獻祭或當作傀儡（從過場動畫中可以看到，一個面無表情的大孩子在邪教儀式中坐在王座上；我想他不是傀儡，就是那段畫面預示著Lena的寶寶未來的命運。Lena和她或許是純潔受孕的孩子被關在另一個陰暗的房間裡）。Lena偷偷逃到Yalem鎮，把嬰兒放在一座教堂的門口，接著自己化為靈魂。會有四個人路過嬰兒的搖籃。若玩家按下哭泣鍵，去查看的那個人就會收養他！根據四位潛在父母的不同選擇，孩子會被培養成劍士、盜賊、法師或僧侶。孩子會從5歲長到10歲，然後在15歲時展開冒險。我推測這個角色算是某種救世主，要推翻奪權的惡魔。
comment_en: I’ve seen Seiya Monogatari translated as “A Christmas Tale”, “A Christmas Eve Tale”, and “A Starry Night Story”.  It was to be the first act in a three part series, but unfortunately it became the last game Hudson published for their little Engine that could.  It’s sad that such a great game slipped into obscurity much like the great system for which it was designed.  It really is a showpiece in many ways, try it and you’ll see. The development team MASTERED the Turbo’s color palette and you will not find better tile work in an RPG on the system.  Amazing touches like falling snow, footprints left behind, and the ability to open or look inside practically anything show how much heart went into this production.  In battle scenes, characters run towards foes on a multilayered parallax-scrolling field that made me take a step back when I first saw it.  I just didn’t expect a Turbo RPG to have such an element.  When flipping switches or pulling ropes, you actually see the movement of the levers. Even though it’s in Japanese, one can tell the voice actors are of the highest quality.  You can hear the emotion and inflection in what they’re saying and the recordings are clearly of professional quality.  The music is top notch whether it’s the redbook or PCM which takes over in some buildings.  Catchy, memorable and classy. Weapons, items and stats have pictures coinciding to help the Japanese impaired.  Many items can only be used by their respective class of warrior and through the 17 areas you’ll eventually have four in your party. Unique to this RPG is the fact there is no levelling up!  Your stats update based on your battle performance, but there is no great and lofty number you have to work toward.  In fact this is more about exploration and finding the next path, battles only happen in specific areas and you can see the creature you’re about to get into it with (no random pop up).  Also unique is the “Holix” system.  Holixes are treasure items that aid magic, power and healing.  You have to mix and match Holixes to get the effect you’re looking for. From the first scene of snow falling on the hilltop church, I fell in love with this game.  As long as you “read” everything on shelves and talk to everybody, you shouldn’t hit roadblocks.  However, there is a wonderful walkthrough site here.  All PC Engine/Turbografx fans should rally behind this wonderful title. W. Eric Myers
comment_zh: 我看過《Seiya Monogatari》被翻譯為「A Christmas Tale」、「A Christmas Eve Tale」和「A Starry Night Story」。它原本是三部曲的第一部，但很遺憾地成了Hudson為他們那台小小引擎發行的最後一款遊戲。這麼棒的遊戲像它所設計的那套偉大系統一樣默默沒入歷史，實在令人難過。它在許多方面都堪稱展示品，試玩一下就知道。開發團隊徹底掌握了Turbo的色盤，在整個系統的RPG中，你找不到比這更優秀的圖磚美術。像是落下的雪花、留下的腳印，以及幾乎什麼東西都能打開或查看的設計，都展現出這款作品傾注了多少心血。戰鬥畫面中，角色會朝敵人衝去，背景是多層視差捲動，我第一次看到時簡直倒退了一步。我實在沒料到Turbo的RPG能有這樣的元素。當你扳動開關或拉繩索時，真的能看到拉桿的動作。即使是日文版，也聽得出配音演員的素質極高。你能感受到台詞中的情緒與語氣抑揚，錄音明顯是專業等級的水準。音樂也是一流水準，無論是CD紅皮書音軌，還是在某些建築內切換成的PCM都很動聽。琅琅上口、令人難忘又有品味。武器、道具和數值都搭配圖示，幫助不懂日文的玩家。許多道具只能由對應職業的戰士使用，走過17個區域後，你最終會有四名夥伴組隊。這款RPG獨特之處在於沒有等級系統！數值會根據戰鬥表現更新，但沒有你必須努力達成的巨大目標數字。其實這款遊戲更重視探索與尋找下一條道路，戰鬥只會在特定區域發生，而且你能看到即將要交戰的生物（沒有隨機戰鬥）。另一個獨特之處是「Holix」系統。Holix是能協助魔法、力量和治療的寶物，你必須搭配不同的Holix來達到想要的效果。從開場下著雪的山丘教堂那一幕起，我就愛上這款遊戲了。只要你「讀」過架上所有東西並和每個人對話，應該不會遇到瓶頸。不過這裡有一個很棒的攻略網站。所有PC Engine/Turbografx玩家都應該支持這款絕妙作品。W. Eric Myers

overview_en: Hex based  strategy based around the famous Japanese battle of 1600.
overview_zh: 以1600年日本著名戰役為主題的六角格戰略遊戲。

overview_en: Samurai-era strategy war game.
overview_zh: 武士時代的戰略戰爭遊戲。

overview_en: Feudal Japan Mahjong game.

title_jp: セクシーアイドル麻雀

title_jp: シェイプシフター魔界英雄伝
overview_en: In the Land of Krellion you are a Conan-esque warrior named Lykos.  Your world was protected by a group of wizards known as the Ring of Five.  The Dark Ones have infiltrated Krellion, enslaved the wizards, and it is up to you to…well you can guess the rest. You begin in the City of Treyhelm.  This is your base of operations for advice, weapons, healing, upgrades and the only place you can save your game.  At first you can only kick, but if you RPG a bit and earn the gold, you can buy an axe, mace or bow.  Each of these can then be upgraded 3 times.  Eventually you can also purchase 3 types of body armor. Delving deeper, each time you save a wizard, you gain the ability to change form (hence the name Shapeshifter) and unlock new areas.  Aside from being human, you can change into a panther, a psionic shark, a mighty golem and a golden dragon.  Each form uses collected gems to initiate, and then a timer counts how long you can sustain the form until more gems are used. An extremely unique idea that really works is the eclipse.  There is a small screen at the top showing a lunar cycle.  Each time the eclipse happens; lightning strikes and your health is regenerated.  This is great if you’re in a tight spot – just hang out and wait for the moon to go ‘round again. The map is sprawling for games on this system, 16 unique areas in all with 12 challenging bosses!
overview_zh: 在Krellion之地，你是一位名叫Lykos的蠻王風格戰士。你的世界原本由一群被稱為「五環」（Ring of Five）的法師守護。黑暗者（The Dark Ones）滲透了Krellion，奴役了法師，接下來就……你大概猜得到。你從Treyhelm城開始，這是你的大本營，可以取得建議、武器、療傷、升級，也是唯一可以存檔的地方。一開始你只能踢擊，但如果花點時間刷RPG賺金幣，就能買到斧、狼牙棒或弓。每種武器都能升級3次。最後還能買到3種護甲。越往深處走，每救出一位法師，就能獲得變身能力（因此取名Shapeshifter）並解鎖新區域。除了人形外，你還能變成黑豹、靈能鯊、強大的魔像，以及黃金龍。每種型態都要消耗收集到的寶石來啟動，接著計時器會計算你能維持該型態多久，直到消耗更多寶石為止。一個相當獨特又行得通的設計是月蝕。畫面上方有一個小視窗顯示月相週期。每當月蝕發生時，閃電劈下、你的生命值會恢復。若你陷入苦戰，這就非常好用——只要撐著等月亮再轉一圈就行。以這台系統的遊戲來說，地圖規模非常大，共有16個獨特區域和12個挑戰性的魔王！
comment_en: I love this game and place it alongside the original Legendary Axe (Axe II was crap comparatively) and Dracula X.  You can tell the folks at Icom put their hearts into this one, and I don’t say that lightly because Icom put out some awful shovel-ware (Ghost Manor, The Addams Family).  The graphics are clean and detailed, the music is catchy and each main character is voice acted quite well (no Last Alert here).  Adding to this is some wonderful parallax scrolling that many of the system’s side-scrollers lacked.  The Icom team even wrote the ending song, “Slipping Into Nowhere.”  Pretty cool to have a game with it’s own song back then. It isn’t a perfect title.  I’m not partial to the Americanized artwork in the cut scenes.  There are some blocky transparency issues and the microphones were too hot when the voices were recorded.  The music, while catchy sounds like a high-end department store synthesizer was used.  Also, while the voices were acted well, the main character’s voice is tenor when someone with more masculine bass should have been used. Some people say the game is very difficult.  But I remember beating it with no problem, and am not a particularly good gamer.  The controls are responsive, but in some character forms, you have to learn the quirks of the jumps otherwise you WILL cuss!  I beat Shapeshifter back in ’93, way before the internet hit and there were no gamefaqs. Try this game, get past its quirks and you’ll have a great time old-school style. W. Eric Myers Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 我很喜歡這款遊戲，把它和原版《Legendary Axe》（相比之下《Axe II》就是爛）及《Dracula X》並列。看得出Icom這次是用心製作的，我這樣說可不是隨口稱讚，因為Icom也出過一些爛透的濫竽充數之作（《Ghost Manor》、《The Addams Family》）。畫面乾淨細緻，音樂琅琅上口，每位主要角色的配音都表現得相當出色（這裡沒有《Last Alert》那種慘況）。再加上許多本系統橫向捲軸遊戲所缺乏的精彩視差捲動效果。Icom團隊甚至還寫了片尾曲「Slipping Into Nowhere」。在那個年代，遊戲有專屬主題曲可是相當酷的。它並非完美之作。我不太喜歡過場動畫中那種美式風格的畫風。有一些方塊狀的透明度問題，而且錄製人聲時麥克風音量過大。音樂雖然琅琅上口，但聽起來像是用高階百貨公司的合成器做的。另外，雖然配音演出不錯，但主角的聲線是男高音，其實該用更具男子氣概的男低音。有人說這款遊戲非常難。但我記得我破關時沒遇到什麼困難，而且我並不算特別厲害的玩家。操作反應靈敏，但在某些變身型態下，你必須學會跳躍的眉角，不然你會忍不住爆粗口！我是1993年就破了《Shapeshifter》，遠在網路普及之前，當時也沒有gamefaqs。試試這款遊戲，跨過它的小毛病，就能以經典方式享受到一段美好時光。W. Eric Myers Turbo Views Review

title_jp: サイドアームスペシャル
overview_en: CD version of Side Arms which contains the regular version and a special 'Before Christ mode'. In the standard version the control method allows you use the fire buttons to shoot in opposite directions, defending yourself from attacks from the rear. The power ups are selectable and if you collect an alpha symbol you combine with another ship for a super robot. Before Christ mode plays slightly differently, with weapons only changeable on pickup, and also the addition of a charge beam similar to R-Type. Gameplay has had a change with dying sending you back to a restart point, rather than you continuing where you were killed, but the most dramatic change is the graphics, which are more basic than those in the standard version of the game.
overview_zh: 《Side Arms》的CD版，收錄了標準版和特別的「Before Christ模式」。標準版的操作方式讓你能用射擊鍵朝相反方向開火，抵禦來自後方的攻擊。強化道具可選擇，若收集到α符號，還能與另一台戰機合體成為超級機器人。Before Christ模式玩法略有不同，武器只有在撿取道具時才會改變，並新增了類似《R-Type》的蓄力光束。玩法也有所調整，死亡後會送回重啟點，而非從陣亡處繼續，但變化最大的是畫面，比標準版本更為粗糙。

maker: MEDIA RINGS / THINKING RABBIT CO. LTD.
overview_en: Pushing around boxes in store rooms may not sound like ideal fodder for a video game. Well, they went and made one anyway. this is one of those brain melting puzzle games that some will love and some will despise. Each level you are presented with a room with boxes and spots, which are where the boxes should end up. You can push the boxes, but not pull them and you really have to plan in advance to stop getting, um...'boxed' in. If you feel you've taken a bit of a wrong turn, you can simply push a button and rewind your moves. But as well as countless levels of box-shoving there's also a level editor that allows you to create your own levels of fun and frustration.
overview_zh: 在倉庫裡推來推去的箱子，聽起來可能不像是電玩的理想題材。好吧，他們還是做了一款出來。這是那種會讓腦袋融化的益智遊戲，有人會愛死它，有人會恨透它。每一關你都會看到一個房間，裡面有箱子和目標點，目標點就是箱子該被推去的位置。你可以推箱子，但不能拉，所以必須事先好好規劃，免得把自己「箱」在死路。如果覺得自己走錯了，只要按一個按鈕就能倒退步驟。除了數不盡的推箱子關卡外，還附有關卡編輯器，讓你能自創樂趣（和挫敗）並存的關卡。
comment_en: I have to admit up front that I really don't enjoy puzzle games that require a lot of mental forethought (so I'd be pretty useless at chess no doubt). Presentation is good enough, with each set of levels in a different 'country' with some mini animations thrown in now and again. Graphics are obviously simplistic, but they aren't distractingly poor. The music is actually quite good - far better than I would have expected. I only can tolerate games like this up to the point where I get stuck, so it doesn't have a great amount of appeal for me. But on the plus side, at least there is no time limit. Basically, if you enjoy this kind of game then it's a decent enough version of Sokoban, if lacking in any imaginative flair. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 我得先坦白說，我其實不喜歡需要大量事前思考的益智遊戲（所以我下西洋棋大概也爛到沒救）。整體呈現還算不錯，每一組關卡都設在不同的「國家」，偶爾穿插一些小動畫。畫面當然很簡單，但也不至於差到令人分心。音樂倒是意外地相當好——比我預期的好上許多。我對這類遊戲的耐受度大概就到卡關為止，所以它對我吸引力不大。不過好處是至少沒有時間限制。基本上，如果你喜歡這類遊戲，這是一款夠水準的《倉庫番》版本，只是少了點創意火花。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review

overview_en: Another vertical sci-fi shoot ‘em up from the Hudson stable. Soldier Blade sticks to the tried and tested formula of Hudson’s previous games in the 'series', while throwing in some extra graphical effects. This time, the power up system involves collecting coloured pods - you can have three pods in stock at any one time, and the colour of the 'active' pod determines your weapon style. You also have the choice of ejecting a pod at any time, which results in a weapon-specific super attack.
overview_zh: 又一款來自 Hudson 門下的直向捲動科幻射擊遊戲。Soldier Blade 延續 Hudson 前幾款「系列」作品屢試不爽的公式,同時加入了一些額外的視覺特效。這次的強化系統改為收集不同顏色的能量球——你最多可同時保有三顆能量球庫存,而「啟用中」那一顆的顏色決定了你的武器類型。你也可以隨時選擇彈出一顆能量球,觸發該武器專屬的超級攻擊。

overview_zh: 以中國《西遊記》美猴王傳說為題材的可愛平台動作遊戲。

overview_en: Originally released the same year as the first Ys game, Sorcerian could easily have been an influence on what became Ys III, although it is a little more complex. You start off by creating a group of characters (either manually or automatically) and set them jobs which affect their income. You can then visit the local town to buy weapons and such, level up, or send one of your characters into training to improve their skills. It's worth noting here that in Sorcerian your characters age and eventually grow old and less effective before they die. Once you are all sorted, you select your group and begin the introductory scenario (which, like some scenarios, limits your group to 3 characters). Once you complete this scenario, the whole list of new quests opens up which you can choose to play and repeat in any order. The gameplay itself is uncommon for an RPG. The maps are all side scrolling and you control the lead character in your party while others trail along behind you, in very much the same way as Blue Blink. As a party is usually made from a combination of classes, one button activates melee attacks and the other casts whatever magic spells you have active. The select button switches the leader so you have some control over the positions of your party members and pushing up on the joypad makes you jump. Enemies in Sorcerian attack in simplistic patterns and most of them continuously respawn, although sometimes you have to re-enter an area to trigger this. Thankfully, finding a safe spot to stand and rest will recover your group's health and power. During the course of the scenarios, there are the usual role-playing conventions; you have to talk to a lot of people, find items to overcome situations, solve puzzles and ultimately defeat bosses.
overview_zh: Sorcerian 最初與第一代 Ys 同年推出,很有可能影響了後來的 Ys III,只是系統更為複雜一些。遊戲一開始你要先組建一支角色隊伍(可手動或自動建立),並指派他們的職業,這會影響他們的收入。接著你可以造訪城鎮購買武器等物品、升級,或是讓某位角色進入訓練提升能力。值得一提的是,Sorcerian 的角色會隨時間老化,最終會變老、戰力下降,直到死亡為止。當一切準備就緒後,你選定隊伍並開始序章劇本(和某些劇本一樣,隊伍人數上限為 3 人)。通關序章後,所有新任務就會解鎖,你可以自由選擇並以任意順序反覆挑戰。玩法本身在 RPG 中相當罕見。所有地圖都是橫向捲動,你操控隊伍中的首領角色,其他隊員則跟在後面,感覺就像 Blue Blink 那樣。由於隊伍通常由多種職業組成,一顆按鈕負責近身攻擊,另一顆則施放目前啟用中的魔法。SELECT 鈕可切換首領,因此你對隊員的走位有一定控制權,而向上推搖桿就會跳躍。Sorcerian 的敵人攻擊模式簡單,而且大部分會不斷重生,不過有時要重新進入區域才會再刷。所幸找個安全處站著休息,就能恢復全隊的生命值與法力。劇本進行中會有常見的 RPG 元素:要找很多人對話、收集道具解決各種狀況、破解謎題,最終打倒頭目。
comment_en: Sorcerian is initially a hard nut to crack. The main menu is full of Japanese and it can take a while to learn exactly what you need to to just to begin the game. Once you overcome these hurdles you will find a game that is both good and bad, requiring some patience if you do not speak the language. Visually, Sorcerian can be a treat with some beautifully drawn backgrounds that create a specific mood, although this is let down by more primitive design here and there. Sprites are small and functional however, with limited animation. Audio is without doubt Sorcerian's strongest point, with a large selection of superbly arranged music that sounds and feels like an extension of the soundtrack from the Ys series. One thing you have to remember is that Sorcerian is primarily a role-playing game and even though it pretends to be an ARPG, the action would be deemed extremely poor in any other title. Controls are awkward (jumping in particular is clumsy) and trying to aim a sword 3 pixels long at a fast moving enemy without sustaining some damage is pretty much a fruitless task. So in terms of action it fails. Where it does succeed is in the feel of story and exploration. It has a design to it that makes every scenario feel like a proper mini adventure, and this quality is probably its strongest point. Not being able to understand the stories does make things often a case of trial and error, and I feel that there is really a much better game locked in here if only I knew what was going on. This makes Sorcerian a really difficult game to rate. On one hand, you will enjoy the atmosphere and exploration, on the other you will most likely grow tired of the difficulties presented and shelf it, hoping for a translation patch someday. But at the very least, you will have a damn good audio CD to listen to. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Sorcerian 一開始真的很難上手。主選單滿滿都是日文,光是搞懂遊戲怎麼開始就得花一段時間。跨過這些門檻後,你會發現這是一款有優有劣的遊戲,如果不懂日文就需要相當的耐心。視覺上,Sorcerian 有些美麗的手繪背景,營造出特定氛圍,堪稱一大亮點,不過部分場景設計較為原始,稍微拉低了整體水準。角色精靈偏小、機能夠用但動畫有限。音樂毫無疑問是 Sorcerian 最強的部分,大量編曲精美的樂曲聽起來就像 Ys 系列原聲帶的延伸。不過要記得一件事:Sorcerian 本質上是一款 RPG,雖然它看似 ARPG,但其動作表現若放在任何其他同類作品中都算非常差。操作笨拙(尤其跳躍很蹩腳),要拿一把 3 像素長的劍去砍快速移動的敵人,還要不被打到,幾乎是不可能的任務。所以在動作方面它是失敗的。但它成功之處在於故事氛圍與探索感,設計上讓每個劇本都像一段精彩的小冒險,這大概就是它最強的特色。不懂劇情會讓遊戲變成不斷試錯,我覺得如果真看得懂,這遊戲會好玩很多。這也讓 Sorcerian 非常難評分。一方面你會享受氣氛與探索,另一方面又會很快因為重重困難而放棄,擺到架上期待哪天有翻譯補丁出現。但至少,你會得到一張超讚的音樂 CD 可以聽。sunteam_paul

title_jp: 卒業 グラデュエーション
overview_en: Graduation is a ‘classroom life simulation’ where you are in charge of a class of teenage students, and you have to manage their lessons and leisure time so they can successfully pass their exams and get a decent job. Your task is threatened by unruly behaviour and illegal activity, and it’s a fine juggling act to make it work. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back
overview_zh: 《卒業》是一款「校園生活模擬」遊戲,你要負責帶領一班青少年學生,安排他們的課業與休閒時間,好讓他們順利通過考試,找到不錯的工作。過程中會受到學生的叛逆行為與違法活動威脅,要平衡一切可說是一門藝術。圖片:封面・封底・書背・CD・註冊卡正面・註冊卡背面

overview_en: Classroom simulation sequel. You have to manage the lives of your class of girls, each with their own personalities. Set the classes they should attend to maximise their learning and keep an eye out for any bad behaviour outside of school. Only by balancing their statistics carefully will they be successful. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back
overview_zh: 校園模擬續作。你要管理班上女學生們的生活,每位都有獨特的個性。替她們安排該上的課以最大化學習成效,還要留意校外的不良行為。只有仔細平衡她們各項數值,她們才能出人頭地。圖片:封面・封底・書背・CD・註冊卡正面・註冊卡背面

overview_en: Classroom-based digital comic.
overview_zh: 以校園為舞台的數位漫畫。

title_jp: スペースファンタジーゾーン
overview_en: Take the graphics from Fantasy Zone and the gameplay from Space Harrier, mix them together and you get Space Fantasy Zone. This unreleased game has the basis of its gameplay in Space Harrier, but with some differences - you have an energy meter instead of one-hit-kills and you can upgrade your weaponry between levels in a shop.
overview_zh: 把 Fantasy Zone 的畫面加上 Space Harrier 的玩法,混合起來就是 Space Fantasy Zone。這款未發行的遊戲以 Space Harrier 為基礎,但有一些差異——你有能量條而非一擊斃命,而且關卡之間可以在商店升級武器裝備。
comment_en: This game was due out for absolutely ages and as far as anyone knows it was all ready to go, but never released (some say due to legal difficulties with Sega, others due to quality concerns). So have we been missing out on a gem all this time? Well, first impressions are not brilliant. Whereas you would expect it to surpass the HuCard of Space Harrier in both gameplay and graphics, it pretty much fails to impress. Sure, the graphics are pretty, but the scaling is no better (possibly worse) and there are rarely more than four background objects on screen at any one time, making it feel sparse. It’s harder to shoot things than in Space Harrier, and far easier to get hit as it’s often difficult to tell what is where - it's a fine line between success and failure with into-the-screen shooters, but Space Fantasy Zone is ultimately a disappointing and unsatisfying game, even for lovers of either of the originals and only gets by as a curiosity for collectors. The only plus side is that the arranged music  is great. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 這款遊戲原本拖了非常久,據大家所知其實都已經完成,只是始終沒發行(有人說是因為和 Sega 的法律問題,也有人說是品質考量)。那麼這段期間我們是不是錯過了一款珍寶?嗯,第一印象並不驚艷。原本你會期待它在玩法與畫面都超越 HuCard 版 Space Harrier,但它基本上沒能打動人心。畫面確實漂亮,但縮放處理並沒有更好(搞不好還更差),而且畫面上同時顯示的背景物件很少超過四個,整體感覺很空曠。射擊敵人比 Space Harrier 更難,又更容易被打中,因為常常看不清誰在哪裡——「衝向畫面」的射擊遊戲成敗就在一線之間,但 Space Fantasy Zone 終究是一款令人失望、不夠過癮的遊戲,連兩款原作的愛好者都難以滿足,只能當成收藏家的奇貨。唯一的加分點是編曲版音樂很棒。sunteam_paul

overview_en: One of the first of Sega's revolutionary 'super scaler' machines,  Space Harrier is set in a bizarre fantasy world very much influenced by movies such as 'The NeverEnding Story'. You control a lone warrior equipped with a flying cannon and your mission to defend the Fantasy Zone from pretty much everything in sight. Enemies come in all shapes and sizes: scaly wormlike dragons, rock heads, giant robots and bouncing octopus-like creatures, all out to get you and most willing to throw missiles or fireballs in your direction. Now and again the flying-into-the-screen action is split up with bonus stages where you ride on a dragon's back, trying to guide him into obstacles for points. Also, there are several levels where a ceiling drops down from above and you have to dodge wave after wave of increasingly fast pillars and other ground or sky based objects, which takes some skill as they can speed up to quite intense levels. Death is instant on contact with anything aside from low ground objects, but you are back into the action in seconds with no loss of progress.
overview_zh: Space Harrier 是 Sega 劃時代「超級縮放」機台的首批作品之一,背景設定在一個奇幻異想的世界,深受《大魔域》等電影影響。你扮演一名單槍匹馬的戰士,裝備會飛的加農砲,任務是保衛 Fantasy Zone 對抗眼前幾乎所有敵人。敵人形形色色:帶鱗片的蟲狀飛龍、石頭頭、巨型機器人、像章魚般彈跳的怪物,全都想幹掉你,而且大多會朝你發射飛彈或火球。偶爾衝向畫面的主戰鬥會穿插特殊關,你騎在飛龍背上,引導牠撞向障礙物換取分數。另外還有幾關會從上方降下天花板,你得閃避一波又一波越來越快的柱子以及地面或空中的物體,這需要一些技巧,因為速度會飆到相當誇張的程度。碰到地面低矮物以外的任何東西都會立即死亡,但幾秒後就能重返戰場,進度不受影響。
comment_en: Converting from a game that requires so much scaling is often a dodgy business, but NEC Avenue have pulled off this conversion with great success. Although the graphics are generally a little smaller than the arcade and a tad messy in places, the scaling is far better than expected for a HuCard and there is little or no clash to be seen. The distinctive checkerboard floor from the arcade has unfortunately gone, which is a big shame, and it is replaced by a far less interesting striped and colour-cycled ground pattern. Sound is generally good, but while the sound effects are very faithful to the original, the fantastic Space Harrier music is arranged a little too lightly at times and I dislike the white-noise drums that NEC Avenue insist on using in all their games. All the speech samples from the arcade are included too, albeit in a very scratchy manner. Space Harrier is simplistic blasting fun. And that, rather than a weakness, is where its strengths lay. Forget pretentious storylines, forget fancy power-ups, this is pure gameplay and this is heart pounding fun. The thrill from narrowly missing towers or rocks is just as powerful here as it was in the arcade and it rockets along at such a speed on later levels that you'll be lucky if your heart doesn't jump out of your mouth. For some people, they may get bored with it fairly quickly, but it's the kind of game that you can put on for a quick blast every now and again, and you'll be playing it for years to come and enjoying it just the same. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: 要移植一款需要大量縮放運算的遊戲往往相當棘手,但 NEC Avenue 相當成功地完成了這次移植。雖然畫面整體比大型電玩小了些,某些地方略顯雜亂,但縮放效果對 HuCard 來說遠超預期,幾乎看不到閃色問題。可惜的是大型電玩標誌性的棋盤格地面沒了,這是一大遺憾,取而代之的是遠不如前的條紋循環色地面。音效大致不錯,音效很忠於原作,但精彩的 Space Harrier 音樂有時編得太輕,我也不喜歡 NEC Avenue 每款遊戲都堅持使用的白噪音鼓聲。大型電玩的所有語音也都收錄了,只是音質很沙啞。Space Harrier 是純粹的爆破樂趣。這不是缺點,反而正是它的強項。拋開裝腔作勢的劇情、拋開花俏的強化道具,這是純粹的玩法,是讓你心跳加速的樂趣。驚險閃過塔或岩石的快感和大型電玩一樣強烈,後段關卡速度飆快到讓你心臟差點從嘴裡跳出來。有些人或許很快就會膩,但這是那種可以不時拿出來快打幾下的遊戲,你會玩上好幾年,樂此不疲。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review

title_jp: スペースインベーダーズ復活の日
overview_en: This updated version of the classic coin-op has a few new extras to offer, including souped up weapons that drop from the mothership and a variety of backdrops. There are also a few twists, such as the level where you have a limited field of vision. An optional choice is a fairly faithful version of the original arcade Space Invaders.
overview_zh: 這個經典大型電玩的更新版加了一些新要素,包括從母艦掉落的強化武器和多種背景。還有一些新花樣,例如視野受限的關卡。另外還可選擇相當忠於原版的大型電玩 Space Invaders。

title_jp: スペースインベーダー ジ・オリジナルゲーム
overview_en: Another version of Taito's classic shoot 'em up, featuring authentic versions of the original arcade cabinets, along with multi player modes with cutesy backdrops.
overview_zh: 另一款 Taito 經典射擊遊戲的版本,收錄忠於原作的大型電玩機台版本,以及搭配可愛背景的多人遊玩模式。

overview_en: This might look like a typical drop-the-block puzzle game, but there’s a twist (or spin) to it. Instead of just matching block colours, you also have to fill in the blocks by rotating their ‘full’ half so it matches the ‘empty’ half of the shape below. As levels progress, blocks represent different things like plants, animals etc to give  some variety. There are several modes of play, including a story mode and link-up.
overview_zh: 乍看之下像是典型的落下式方塊益智遊戲,但它有個「旋轉」的花樣。不只要比對方塊顏色,還要旋轉方塊,讓「實心」那一半對齊下方形狀的「空缺」那一半。關卡推進時,方塊會換成植物、動物等不同主題增加變化。遊戲有多種模式,包括故事模式與對戰連線。

overview_en: Space based adventure with Galaxy Force II style into-the-screen action sequences.
overview_zh: 太空題材的冒險遊戲,內含類似 Galaxy Force II 風格、衝向畫面的動作橋段。

overview_en: Action puzzle game for 1 or 2 players that places you in the role of a bouncing ostrich. The aim is to crack the floor tiles so that they go splashing into the water, killing any enemies on them. By cracking strategic tiles whole areas can be destroyed (much like ‘Pit Pot’ on the Master System). Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 一到兩人遊玩的動作益智遊戲,讓你扮演一隻彈跳的鴕鳥。目標是踩裂地板磚塊讓它們掉進水裡,順便把站在上面的敵人一起淹死。策略性地敲碎關鍵磚塊可以讓整塊區域一起崩落(很像 Master System 上的《Pit Pot》)。Turbo Views Review

overview_en: Rick and Jennifer, a boyfriend/girlfriend team of parapsychology majors set out to investigate West Mansion, a rumored hotbed of paranormal activity.  Urban legends purport that Dr. West involved himself with gruesome, occultist activities.  Rushing into the house due to an impending storm, Rick is rendered unconscious only to awaken hours later, transformed by a cursed mask into a powerful, but grotesque hulk.  Jennifer is missing, and his newfound strength gives him the wherewithal to search for her in the Splatterhouse. Though his gait is lumbering, Rick can punch, kick, low punch, low kick, and jump punch/kick in rapid succession.  Kicking when landing from a jump performs a powerful slide kick. Cleavers, rocks, wrenches, 2x4’s, spears and shotguns can be found to give Rick aid in rendering the hordes of evil into stew while he traverses the seven sometimes branching stages of Hell.
overview_zh: Rick 和 Jennifer 是一對專攻超心理學的男女朋友組合,兩人前往 West Mansion 調查傳說中的靈異熱點。都市傳說說 Dr. West 沾染了陰森的邪教儀式。因為暴風雨將至而匆匆衝進宅邸的 Rick 失去意識,數小時後才醒來,他被一張詛咒面具變成了強大卻怪異的巨人。Jennifer 失蹤了,新獲得的力量讓他有足夠的本事在 Splatterhouse 內尋找她。Rick 雖然步伐笨重,但能連續出拳、踢擊、下段拳、下段踢以及跳躍拳/踢。從跳躍落地時踢擊會發動強力的滑行踢。他可以找到刀、石頭、扳手、2x4 木條、長矛與獵槍等武器,在他穿越七關(部分關卡有分歧)宛如地獄的場景時,把一群群邪惡化為肉泥。
comment_en: Large, hand painted characters, gruesome creatures that turn to slush when you kill them, reanimated corpses vomiting and stereo chipmusic with eerie instrumentation.  I knew my $30 dollars of hard-earned summer job money hadn’t gone to waste.  (I didn’t know of the arcade version back then). (Spoiler Alert)  At first, the story sounded so simple, and the beginning scene of the mansion was on par with an NES title.  But, when the game started and all Hell literally broke loose, I was hooked.  Each level provided new demons and strange, surreal settings that didn’t overshadow the main interactions with too much detail.  I cringed the first time I saw the bag of flesh crawling towards me on the ground, and actually jumped when Rick’s doppelganger broke through the mirror. Though the game is not too difficult, it took many tries to learn the proper attacks to advance without dying.  I knew there was to be more story development when Rick entered an empty chapel with an uplifting tune playing, only to be left alone and empty handed.  This game was playing with my emotions.  Finally I reached the room where demons were performing a ritual around Jennifer and real digital voice (a rarity back then) had her helpless little voice screaming “Help Rick!” before she mutated into a demon.  I thought “YOU BASTARDS!  WHAT HAVE YOU DONE!?”  This all culminated in saving her soul, but holding her lifeless body as it dissolved in my arms…what…I mean Rick’s arms!  Then to find that the house itself is ALIVE and you have to go through its womb fighting screaming little Satan babies - what a ride. Therein lies the magic of this game.  It got to me in a way that games usually don't.  The build up and scripting of losing Jennifer got to me, though simplistic and through a video game.  It was just like a favorite character dying in a book or a movie.  I can think of two other times I went "NOOOOooooooo....!!" in a game, Nei in Phantasy Star II, and Aeris in FFVII. Play this game!  Turbografx/PC Engine owners owe it to themselves to play great games.  Most of the music does well to create atmosphere but a couple the songs are pure magic, especially the end stage and the saddeningly sweet minor lullaby that plays in the end.  In this era of emulators, I found and played the arcade version and am convinced the same character graphics were compressed and used, they look the same even though the backgrounds are very simplified and censored. W. Eric Myers
comment_zh: 大型的手繪角色、被擊殺後化為爛泥的恐怖生物、嘔吐的重生屍體,還有帶著詭異樂器的立體聲晶片音樂。我就知道我打暑假工辛苦賺來的 30 美元沒白花(我當時還不知道有大型電玩版)。(劇透警告)一開始劇情聽起來很簡單,宅邸一開場還只是 NES 等級的水準。但遊戲真正開始、地獄真的鬆綁之後,我整個人就陷進去了。每一關都有新的惡魔與奇異超現實場景,細節恰到好處,不會喧賓奪主。我第一次看到那袋肉在地上朝我爬過來時直起雞皮疙瘩,Rick 的分身衝破鏡子時我真的嚇到跳起來。遊戲難度雖不算太高,但要學會正確的攻擊方式才不會一直死,還是得試很多次。當 Rick 走進一間空蕩的禮拜堂,裡面播著振奮人心的曲調,結果卻什麼也沒有、空手而回時,我就知道還有更多劇情等著。這遊戲根本在玩弄我的情感。最後我抵達了惡魔圍繞 Jennifer 舉行儀式的房間,並聽到真正的數位語音(當時相當罕見),她可憐小聲地大喊「Help Rick!」然後就變成了惡魔。我當下想:「你們這些混蛋!你們到底做了什麼!?」最終我拯救了她的靈魂,卻只能抱著她在我……我是說 Rick 的懷中化為虛無的屍體!接著又發現整棟宅子本身是活的,還得穿越它的子宮跟尖叫的惡魔小嬰兒戰鬥——根本是一趟瘋狂旅程。這款遊戲的魔力就在這裡。它用其他遊戲很少能辦到的方式觸動了我。雖然手法簡單而且只是一款電玩,失去 Jennifer 的鋪陳與劇情仍然深深打動我,就像小說或電影中喜愛的角色死去那般。我還能想到兩次玩遊戲時大喊「不——!!」的經驗:Phantasy Star II 的 Nei,以及 FFVII 的 Aeris。快玩這款遊戲吧!Turbografx/PC Engine 玩家欠自己玩好遊戲的機會。大部分音樂都很能營造氣氛,其中幾首更是神來之筆,特別是最終關與片尾那首甜中帶哀的短調搖籃曲。在模擬器盛行的年代,我找到了大型電玩版來玩,我確信角色的美術是經過壓縮後原樣使用的,它們長得完全一樣,雖然背景簡化許多,還有部分被審查掉。W. Eric Myers

title_jp: スプリガンmark2リ・テラフォーム・プロジェクト
overview_en: This sequel takes a more story-based approach than the original and also switches to being a horizontal scroller instead of vertical.
overview_zh: 這款續作比初代更著重劇情,同時也從直向捲動改為橫向捲動。

overview_en: Science fiction role-playing game. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back • Addendum
overview_zh: 科幻題材的角色扮演遊戲。圖片:封面・封底・書背・CD・註冊卡正面・註冊卡背面・補充頁

overview_en: Zodiac themed  puzzle game where you have to pile up different weighted stars without upsetting the balance of the scales and dropping them all. Different colours have different weights and care must be taken to keep everything as level as possible.
overview_zh: 黃道十二宮主題的益智遊戲,你要把重量不同的星星堆疊起來,同時不能打亂天秤平衡讓它們通通掉下去。不同顏色代表不同重量,必須小心維持整體水平。

overview_en: As Parodius was a parody of Gradius, Star Parodier is a parody of Super Star Soldier. Choosing from either Bomber Man, a cute PC Engine or the Paro Caesar spacecraft, you blast your way through various themed levels and face a wide variety of interesting, amusing and sometimes familiar enemies. A NOTE ON THE TITLE: In Japanese, Super Star Soldier is spelt more phonetically, i.e. Supaa Sutaa Soruja. So as a parody, Paroja is a contraction of Soruja (Soldier) and Parodi (parody). The title is written as Star Parodier - an accurate representation of the intention, and as this seems to be the common spelling among PC Engine fans. All this confusion and word-play is probably why many import companies just settled on the less complicated Star Parody. Was due for release in the USA as Fantasy Star Soldier.
overview_zh: 就如同 Parodius 是 Gradius 的戲仿,Star Parodier 是 Super Star Soldier 的戲仿。你可以從 Bomber Man、可愛版 PC Engine 或 Paro Caesar 飛船中三選一,轟破各種主題關卡,面對形形色色、有趣、好笑、有時似曾相識的敵人。關於標題的說明:日文中 Super Star Soldier 更貼近音讀,寫作 Supaa Sutaa Soruja。作為戲仿,Paroja 是 Soruja(Soldier)和 Parodi(parody)的縮合。標題寫為 Star Parodier——精準反映了原意,而且這似乎也是 PC Engine 玩家之間通行的拼法。這一切混淆與文字遊戲大概就是為何許多水貨商乾脆統一用更簡單的 Star Parody。本作原本預計以 Fantasy Star Soldier 之名在美國發行。

title_jp: スタートリングオデッセイ
overview_en: Fantasy role-playing game.
overview_zh: 奇幻角色扮演遊戲。

title_jp: スタートリングオデッセイⅡ・魔境戦争
overview_en: Fantasy role-playing sequel.
overview_zh: 奇幻角色扮演續作。

overview_en: Sci-fi  vertical shoot 'em up where you pilot a choice of two ships over hostile enemy territory and blas everything in sight.
overview_zh: 科幻直向射擊遊戲,你從兩架可選機體中挑一架,飛越敵軍領空把眼前一切轟個精光。

overview_en: Board game where you have to conquer your opponent's troops by landing on them with a lower-numbered piece.
overview_zh: 桌遊,你必須以數字較小的棋子落在對手棋子上,逐一擊潰敵方部隊。

title_jp: ストリートファイターII'
overview_en: Very faithful conversion of Capcom's classic arcade beat 'em up.
overview_zh: 非常忠於原作的 Capcom 經典大型電玩格鬥遊戲移植作。

overview_en: Capcom's acrobatic hero comes to the PC Engine, complete with extra levels not in the arcade version.
overview_zh: Capcom 的特技英雄登上 PC Engine,收錄大型電玩版所沒有的追加關卡。

title_jp: ストリップ・ファイターII
overview_en: Wholesale (and unofficial) rip-off of Street Fighter II  with a difference - all the fighters are women and when you beat each one you see a bigger-than-full-screen picture of them naked, as you would expect of a release from Games Express.
overview_zh: 徹頭徹尾(且未經授權)山寨 Street Fighter II 的作品,但有個差別——所有戰士都是女性,而且打贏每位對手時會看到超過整個螢幕的裸體大圖,這正是 Games Express 作品會有的風格。

title_jp: Summer Carnival '93ネクスザールスペシャル
overview_en: Another one of those 'special' editions of shooters.
overview_zh: 又一款射擊遊戲的「特別版」。

overview_en: Every console has to have a selection of golf games, and Super Albatross is Telenet's take on the idea. It follows the standard setup of the genre, with a selection of modes to choose from. Training mode allows you to freely play the 18 holes without stress, Tournament lets you play against friends and Match Play sets you up against a variety of CPU controlled opponents while relaying a storyline between matches in a series of animated visual scenes. The in-game controls are fairly typical with shot strength determined by how long you hold the button (these is no meter to determine this, just the animation of your golfer, so timing is important).
overview_zh: 每部主機都得有幾款高爾夫遊戲,Super Albatross 就是 Telenet 的詮釋。遵循此類型標準配置,可選多種模式。練習模式讓你毫無壓力地自由打完 18 洞,錦標賽模式可以跟朋友對戰,而對戰賽會安排你對決各式各樣的 CPU 對手,並在比賽之間以動畫演出劇情。遊戲中的操作相當典型,擊球力道取決於你按住按鈕的時間(沒有力量計量表,只有高爾夫選手的動作,所以時機很重要)。
comment_en: To me, golf games are all very similar. Pick club, choose direction, make shot, get frustrated at putting, repeat. Super Albatross is nothing different, and so anyone who likes a bit of relaxation on a 2D golf course will probably find something to like here. Visually, I have to say that the graphics are fairly basic and the ropey animation of the golf ball is not what I would expect from a CD based game. In fact, considering this was released on CD some months after Hudson's Power Golf (on HuCARD), it's pretty embarrassing how bad this looks in comparison. It's just not very well polished. For players who want to add some stress into their life, the Match Play mode with animated story is a fairly nice distraction. You get to play against sexy women and cyborgs and really feel the pressure of making every shot perfect. And believe me, you really need to get the courses down to near perfection to get anywhere. All in all, it's not a bad golf game, it does what it sets out to do, but it's a pity it doesn't do it with a little more style. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 對我來說,高爾夫遊戲都差不多。選桿、選方向、揮桿、推桿推到抓狂、再來一次。Super Albatross 也沒什麼不同,所以喜歡在 2D 高爾夫球場放鬆的玩家大概會喜歡。視覺上,老實說畫面相當陽春,高爾夫球的動畫更是粗糙,這對 CD 遊戲來說並不合理。事實上,考量到它在 Hudson 的 Power Golf(HuCARD)之後好幾個月才以 CD 推出,兩相比較之下它真的尷尬得不行,完成度並不高。對想給自己增添壓力的玩家來說,帶動畫劇情的對戰賽模式倒是還算不錯的調劑。你要對上性感女郎和半機械人,真的會感受到每一桿都要完美的壓力。相信我,球場真的得打到近乎完美才能過關。整體來說算不上差,它做到了它想做的事,只可惜少了點品味。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Military hex based battle game.
overview_zh: 軍事六角格戰棋遊戲。

overview_en: A conversion of Taito's multi-screen arcade shoot 'em up, Super Darius  features a choice of paths through the game after defeating each giant aquatic-style boss. Gameplay is fairly traditional with power-ups increasing the damage of your forward shots and bombs. Being on CD, the music is from the original arcade version, and the game also feature a wider range of bosses.
overview_zh: Taito 多螢幕大型電玩射擊遊戲的移植作,Super Darius 在擊倒每隻巨型水生風格頭目後提供路線分歧。玩法相當傳統,強化道具會增加前方火力與炸彈的傷害。由於是 CD 版,音樂直接取自大型電玩原版,而且還收錄了更多種類的頭目。
comment_en: Nice, but drawn out, horizontally scrolling shoot ‘em up. Darius has always had a style of its own and that is much of where its appeal lays. The bosses are very original and have some quite impressive detail and the levels are generally  nice, if repetitive. The only trouble with the Darius games is that once you lose your weapons, you may as well kiss your whole game goodbye as it can be very difficult to recover. So one for the die hard shoot ‘em up freaks only. The choice to use the arcade music and not arranged versions is, in my mind, a good one, as the arcade sound has a strange feel to it that suits it perfectly. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 不錯但稍嫌冗長的橫向捲動射擊遊戲。Darius 一直有自己的風格,這正是它吸引人的地方。頭目設計相當原創,細節頗為令人驚艷,關卡整體來說不錯但略顯重複。Darius 系列最讓人頭痛的地方是一旦丟失武器,基本上整場遊戲就可以說再見了,因為非常難翻身。所以這是給鐵桿射擊狂熱者玩的。選用大型電玩原曲而非編曲版,我個人認為是好決定,因為大型電玩音樂有種詭異的氛圍,和遊戲搭配得天衣無縫。sunteam_paul

overview_en: CD conversion of Darius II.
overview_zh: Darius II 的 CD 移植版。

overview_en: Mahjong game in which you compete against a variety of historical characters including Napoleon, Nostradamus and Cleopatra.
overview_zh: 麻將遊戲,你要對戰一系列歷史人物,包括拿破崙、諾斯特拉達姆士和克麗奧佩脫拉。
comment_en: Like most Mahjong games, this one remains almost unfathomable to me - the basics of the game I understand, but the mass of Japanese text and subtle rules make it tricky to advance successfully. Graphically, it's functional and lacks any overly impressive presentation or artwork, although the little portraits can be amusing. The music is standard CD fare, with a theme playing at the beginning of a game which eventually fades into silence. I did kind of enjoy playing this with my limited Mahjong knowledge and winning a hand does give satisfaction. Just make sure you bring along a Japanese dictionary. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 跟大多數麻將遊戲一樣,這款對我來說幾乎是深不可測——基本規則我懂,但大量的日文和細膩規則讓我很難一路打上去。畫面上,功能性夠用但缺乏特別搶眼的呈現或美術,雖然那些小人像還蠻有趣的。音樂是標準的 CD 水準,開局時會有一段主題曲,之後逐漸淡出歸於寂靜。以我那點有限的麻將知識玩起來也算樂在其中,胡牌時也確實有成就感。只是記得帶本日文字典。sunteam_paul

title_jp: スーパーメタルクラッシャー
overview_en: Strategy game where you design a robot by allocating points to various stats, then let it scrap it out with an opponent while you watch.
overview_zh: 策略遊戲,你要分配點數到各種屬性上來設計一台機器人,然後在旁邊看它和對手互毆。

overview_en: Train themed board game featuring the Peachboy character from Japanese folklore.
overview_zh: 以火車為主題的桌遊,主角是日本民間傳說的桃太郎。

overview_en: Board game sequel, again featuring lots of trains.
overview_zh: 桌遊續作,一樣有許多火車登場。

overview_en: Board game sequel, again featuring lots of trains.
overview_zh: 桌遊續作,一樣有許多火車登場。

overview_en: A conversion of the classic arcade shoot 'em up, Raiden follows the conventions of the genre with coloured power up pods that give different weapons when collected.
overview_zh: 經典大型電玩射擊遊戲的移植版,Raiden 遵循本類型常見公式,收集彩色強化道具會獲得不同武器。
comment_en: Raiden is one of the all-time greats in the annals of shoot 'em up history. It’s not just the excellent graphics and sounds, but the engaging gameplay that keeps you addicted for ages. It’s also capable of throwing up some hair-raising moments, and bullet dodging skills are pushed to the extreme. Thankfully, despite its toughness, it doesn’t get too frustrating. This CD version has better sound effects than the HuCard, and also additional levels. It also contains brilliant arrangements of the music (similar in sound to Hellfire S). sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Raiden 是射擊遊戲史上的元老級經典之一。不只畫面與音效出色,引人入勝的玩法更是讓你玩上癮。它也能帶來各種讓人頭皮發麻的瞬間,把彈幕閃避技巧逼到極致。所幸雖然難歸難,還不至於讓人挫折到抓狂。這個 CD 版音效比 HuCard 版更好,還有追加關卡,另外收錄精彩的音樂編曲(音色類似 Hellfire S)。sunteam_paul

title_en: SUPER REAL MAHJONG P II.III CUSTOM
title_jp: スーパーリアル麻雀PII･PIIIカスタム
overview_en: Mahjong with anime girlie opponents. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD
overview_zh: 有動漫美少女對手的麻將。圖片:封面・封底・書背・CD

title_jp: スーパーリアル麻雀P IV カスタム
overview_en: Mahjong game featuring anime girls. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back
overview_zh: 登場動漫美少女的麻將遊戲。圖片:封面・封底・書背・CD・註冊卡正面・註冊卡背面

title_en: SUPER REAL MAHJONG P V CUSTOM
title_jp: スーパー リアル麻雀P. V カスタム
overview_en: Mahjong game against anime schoolgirls. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back
overview_zh: 對上動漫女學生的麻將遊戲。圖片:封面・封底・書背・CD・註冊卡正面・註冊卡背面

title_jp: スーパーリアル麻雀スペシャル　ミキ・カスミ・ショウコの思い出
overview_en: Mahjong against a trio of cute anime gals.
overview_zh: 與三位可愛動漫女孩對戰的麻將。
no_intro_name: Super Real Mahjong Special - Miki - Kasumi - Shouko no Omoide Yori (Naxat) (Japan)

title_jp: スーパーシュヴァルツシルト
overview_en: Epic Macross style space battle simulation game. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • CD
overview_zh: 史詩級的《超時空要塞》風格太空戰役模擬遊戲。圖片:封面・封底・CD

title_jp: スーパーシュヴァルツシルト2
overview_en: Epic Macross style space battle simulation game.
overview_zh: 史詩級的《超時空要塞》風格太空戰役模擬遊戲。

title_jp: スーパースターソルジャー
overview_en: Considered as a kind of unofficial sequel to the hit game Gunhed, Super Star Soldier follows the same formula, with a selection of upgradeable weapons and a variety of space and land-based landscapes to fly over. Smart bombs are achieved by collecting flashing power-up orbs, and these also give you an extra bonus - the ability to continue from the point of death for each one you collect. Once you run out of these, you are set back to a restart point earlier in the level.
overview_zh: 被視為熱門作 Gunhed 的非官方續作,Super Star Soldier 沿用相同公式,可升級的多樣武器搭配各式太空與陸上場景任你穿梭。完全屏幕清除炸彈由收集閃爍的強化道具獲得,每收集一顆還會附帶額外獎勵——死亡後可從原地復活。用完後就會被送回關卡中較早的重啟點。

title_jp: スーパーバレーボール
overview_en: Side-on volleyball game. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 側面視角的排球遊戲。Turbo Views Review

overview_en: Overhead RPG.
overview_zh: 俯瞰視角 RPG。

overview_en: Fantasy role-playing game with strategic turn-based battle scenes.
overview_zh: 奇幻角色扮演遊戲,戰鬥採策略性回合制。

overview_en: Shoot 'em up featuring a fairy heroine.
overview_zh: 以妖精女主角為主軸的射擊遊戲。

overview_en: One or two player cute 'em up from Konami.
overview_zh: Konami 推出的一到兩人可愛系射擊遊戲。

overview_en: Fantasy game.
overview_zh: 奇幻遊戲。

overview_en: Territorial power game.
overview_zh: 地盤爭霸遊戲。

title_en: TAKAHASHI MEIJIN NO SHIN BŌKEN JIMA
overview_en: This is, in essence, an almost total clone of the original Wonder Boy game, albeit with a few extra bells and whistles. You must run through the levels, jumping pits, avoiding or killing wildlife and collecting fruit to top up your ever-decreasing health. Breaking eggs can yield benefits - from a fast moving skateboard to a fairy that grants invulnerability for a time. Each stage is split into 4 levels, and each of these has a restart point in the middle - and you will need it as one hit spells death.
overview_zh: 本作基本上是初代 Wonder Boy 的近乎全盤翻版,只是多了一些小巧思。你得在關卡裡奔跑、跳過陷坑、閃避或擊殺野生動物,並收集水果補充不斷下降的體力。打破蛋可能拿到好康——從高速滑板到能短暫無敵的精靈應有盡有。每一區分成 4 個關卡,中段設有重啟點——你絕對會需要,因為被打中一下就直接死亡。

overview_en: Samurai era scrolling beat 'em up.
overview_zh: 武士時代的橫向捲動格鬥動作遊戲。

overview_en: Platform game based on a Disney TV series. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 改編自迪士尼電視動畫的平台遊戲。Turbo Views Review

overview_en: Tonkin House presents another cute platformer for the Engine. Armed with only a floppy hat and long stick, you must run, leap and poke your way through various levels filled with spiders, flying balls of fire and thug-types, no doubt all in the name of honour and justice.
overview_zh: Tonkin House 再為 Engine 推出一款可愛平台遊戲。你只裝備一頂軟帽和一根長棍,要跑、要跳、要戳過各種關卡,對付蜘蛛、飛行火球和惡棍角色,無疑都是以榮譽與正義之名。
comment_en: Tatsu no Ko Fighter comes from the Ghouls 'n' Ghosts school of thought - make the game damn hard and frustrating, make the player replay levels over and over until they do it and (thankfully) give them infinite continues so it's not THAT unfair. But while Ghouls 'n' Ghosts is visually interesting and has great music, this isn't and doesn't. Graphics are plain, though not as simplistic as a lot of games of this type and therefore moderately attractive, sound is average with nothing that sticks in your head, but there's something about the difficulty that just puts you off. Most games have a learning curve that starts off very easy then ramps up, but this is pretty tricky from the beginning. After the first few levels, you'll soon be cursing the screen and reaching for the power switch. It almost has a furious addictiveness to it, but not quite - the drive to get further is somehow missing. If you like very hard and annoying platformers, then you could do worse, but most people won't be willing to put the effort in as the rewards are just not there. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Tatsu no Ko Fighter 屬於 Ghouls 'n' Ghosts 那派作風——把遊戲做得超難、超讓人火大,逼玩家反覆重玩同一關直到通過,(幸好)給了無限 continue 所以不至於太不公平。但 Ghouls 'n' Ghosts 畫面出色、音樂精彩,本作這兩點都不行。畫面平平,雖然不像同類型許多作品那麼陽春,外觀還算中等,音效普通,沒有什麼會留在腦海的旋律,但那種難度就是讓你退避三舍。大部分遊戲的學習曲線是從很簡單慢慢上升,但這款從一開始就很棘手。過了前幾關,你很快就會對著螢幕飆髒話,手開始伸向電源鍵。它幾乎有種讓人抓狂上癮的味道,但又差了點——那種想要打更遠的動力就是不太夠。如果你喜歡超硬超煩的平台遊戲,它也不是最糟的選擇,但大多數人都不會願意花這麼多心力,因為付出與回報不成正比。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Conversion of this notoriously difficult space based shoot 'em up.
overview_zh: 這款以惡名昭彰的超高難度聞名的太空射擊遊戲的移植作。

title_jp: テクモ ワールドカップスーパーサッカー
overview_en: Soccer action game.
overview_zh: 足球動作遊戲。

overview_en: Cute adventure game.
overview_zh: 可愛風格的冒險遊戲。

overview_zh: 改編自熱門科幻/喜劇/戀愛動畫《天地無用!》的數位漫畫冒險遊戲。

overview_en: Fantasy role-playing game.
overview_zh: 奇幻角色扮演遊戲。

title_jp: 天使の詩II 堕天使の選択
overview_en: Fantasy role-playing sequel. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • Spine • CD
overview_zh: 奇幻角色扮演續作。圖片:封面・封底・書背・CD

title_jp: テラクレスタII マンドラーの逆襲
overview_en: Vertically scrolling shoot 'em up where you collect modules that can either combine with your ship or fly in formation with you to alter their effectiveness.
overview_zh: 直向捲動射擊遊戲,你會收集可與本機合體、或是保持編隊飛行的模組,藉此改變其效能。
no_intro_name: Terra Cresta II - Mandoler no Gyakushuu (Japan)

overview_en: A biological themed shoot 'em up featuring designs from the renowned Syd Mead, who worked on the movies Blade Runner, Aliens and Tron. Turbo Views Review �
overview_zh: 生物題材的射擊遊戲,由曾參與《銀翼殺手》、《異形》與《電子世界爭霸戰》等電影的知名設計師 Syd Mead 擔綱設計。Turbo Views Review

overview_en: A conversion of an old arcade game with updated graphics. Navigate 60 different mazes and uncover their mysteries while bopping the occasional slime on the head with your sword.
overview_zh: 老牌大型電玩的移植版,畫面升級過。穿越 60 個不同的迷宮、揭開它們的謎團,順便用劍砰地敲敲那些史萊姆的腦袋。

title_jp: ザ　ティーベィー　ショー
overview_en: Overhead action puzzler.
overview_zh: 俯瞰視角動作益智遊戲。

overview_en: Ambitious arcade conversion of Sega’s 3D helicopter game. The game is divided into two styles, firstly a familiar vertically scrolling overhead viewpoint which switches to an into-the-screen, Space Harrier style at certain points in the level. Your weaponry is limited to guns and air-to-ground missiles, which must be aimed with care to hit their target.
overview_zh: Sega 3D 直升機大型電玩的野心移植作。遊戲分為兩種風格,一種是熟悉的直向捲動俯瞰視角,一種是在關卡特定點切換為 Space Harrier 那類衝向畫面的視角。武器僅限槍砲與空對地飛彈,必須小心瞄準才能命中目標。
comment_en: It takes some guts to convert Thunder Blade to a console like the PC Engine. And considering the limitations, NEC Avenue hasn’t done a bad job, at least technically. Sure, the buildings are really jerky, but this is more the limitations of the hardware than lack of programming skill. But where the game does fall down is its gameplay. Even in the arcade it was quite poor, only the novelty of the moving chair to make you play it, and without the bells and whistles you can really see what a dull game it is. The helicopter controls feel very sluggish (in all versions), as though you are having to drag it painfully around the screen, and the 3D sections are more a matter of random dodging and firing than skill. That being said, the frantic nature of these scenes does give you a kind of thrill at getting through them. Music is reasonable - but again a step down from the classic tunes of Space Harrier and After Burner II. And that's what Thunder Blade feels like, one big step down from the classics. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 要把 Thunder Blade 移植到 PC Engine 這樣的主機得有點膽識。考量到硬體限制,NEC Avenue 做得還算不錯,至少技術層面是如此。建築物的移動確實很頓,但這更多是硬體限制,而非程式功力不足。不過真正讓遊戲栽跟頭的是玩法。即使在大型電玩上,它也不算特別好玩,僅靠那張會動的椅子噱頭撐場面,少了這些華而不實的裝飾,你就能看出這款遊戲有多無聊。直升機的操控感覺非常遲鈍(所有版本皆然),好像得很辛苦地把它硬拖過整個螢幕,3D 片段更多是靠隨機閃躲與開火而非技巧。話雖如此,這些場景的緊張節奏確實能帶來一種通關的快感。音樂尚可——但同樣比不上 Space Harrier 和 After Burner II 的經典曲目。Thunder Blade 給我的感覺就是這樣,和那些經典相比整整矮了一截。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Action platform game in a similar vein to Black Tiger or Son Son II. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 類似 Black Tiger 或 Son Son II 風格的動作平台遊戲。Turbo Views Review

overview_en: Unreleased pinball game featuring differently themed tables. The name was later used for the US version of Time Cruise II. Images Preview from  Gekkan PC Engine Magazine (thanks to Chris Covell)
overview_zh: 未發行的彈珠台遊戲,收錄多種主題台面。名稱後來被用在 Time Cruise II 的美版上。圖片:取自《月刊 PC Engine》雜誌的預覽(感謝 Chris Covell)

overview_en: Time Cruise II takes the pinball concept to new levels with a massive multi-screen play area, as well as a series of varied mini-games.
overview_zh: Time Cruise II 把彈珠台概念推向新高度,擁有巨大的多螢幕遊戲區域,還有一系列風格各異的迷你遊戲。
comment_en: Time Cruise II tries very hard to out-do Naxat’s Devil Crash but unfortunately it falls just short, despite the unique features. The play area is very large, but is also lacking in the moving targets that made Naxat's offerings so much more than just pinball. Without these, the primary gameplay is a little more bland, and the size of the table counts for nothing if the design is just not as much fun. The mini-games are where this game does shine, and unlike Devil Crash, these are more fun than the main table itself. There are many different games, from a caveman golf challenge to a tilt-the-table style maze, and these are primarily what you are aiming to play for. Music is nice, but lacks the exciting passion of the tune in Devil Crash and I expected a little better from Face. If you enjoy pinball games (which I do) then this is worth getting. It's the number 3 pinball game on the PC Engine (out of 3) and it does tend to go on for too long on occasion, but despite its flaws, it's nice to stick on now and again for the change of pace. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review �
comment_zh: Time Cruise II 很努力想超越 Naxat 的 Devil Crash,可惜儘管有它獨特的功能,還是差了那麼一點。遊戲區域很大,但缺少讓 Naxat 的作品不只是單純彈珠台的會動目標。少了這些,主要玩法就有點平淡,台面再大若設計不夠有趣也白搭。這款的迷你遊戲倒是亮點,和 Devil Crash 不同的是,這些迷你遊戲甚至比主台面本身還好玩。種類相當豐富,從穴居人高爾夫挑戰到傾斜迷宮應有盡有,這才是你主要會想玩的部分。音樂不錯,但少了 Devil Crash 那種激昂的魅力,以 Face 的水準我本來預期更好。如果你喜歡彈珠台遊戲(我就很喜歡),那這款值得入手。它在 PC Engine 彈珠台遊戲裡排第 3 名(總共只有 3 款),有時單場會拖得太長,但儘管有缺陷,偶爾拿出來換換口味還是挺不錯的。sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review

overview_en: A twist on the Breakout theme, Titan has you bounce one or many balls around a maze, nudging them to alter direction, to clear away all the blocks.
overview_zh: Breakout 玩法的變形,Titan 讓你在迷宮裡彈來彈去一顆或多顆球,輕推它們改變方向,把所有方塊清光。

overview_en: Vertical shoot ‘em up themed around going to the lavvy. The action involves both air to air and air to ground shooting, and contains a wide variety of loos, turds and other unmentionables.
overview_zh: 以上廁所為主題的直向射擊遊戲。動作包含空對空與空對地射擊,還有各式各樣的馬桶、便便和其他不可言說之物。

title_jp: USAプロバスケットボール
overview_en: Side-on basketball action game. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 側視角的籃球動作遊戲。Turbo Views 評論

overview_en: An enhanced remake of the original Valis game, released after Valis IV. A schoolgirl is transformed into a warrior, armed with a sword against the evil hordes of nasty things that are after you. Power-ups allow various ranged attacks to be performed.
overview_zh: 初代 Valis 的強化重製版,在 Valis IV 之後才推出。一位女高中生被變身為戰士,手持寶劍對抗追殺她的邪惡怪物大軍。透過能量升級道具可以施展各種遠距離攻擊。
no_intro_name: Mugen Senshi Valis - The Legend of a Fantasm Soldier (Japan)

title_jp: ヴァリスII THE FANTASM SOLDIER
overview_en: Although the first incarnation on the PC Engine, this is the second in the series of heroic schoolgirl platform games. It’s a very simple game at heart and the action is more focused on enemy patterns than intense platforming. Although your weapon is a sword, it is capable of firing energy bolts which can be powered up by collecting icons, as well as switched to alternative attacks such as two-way, homing missile and a nice wave attack that destroys enemy shots. There are a selection of minor bosses dotted around each level, with the primary boss encounter announced Darius-like at the end.
overview_zh: 雖然這是 PC Engine 上的第一款 Valis 作品,但其實是這個女高中生英雄平台系列的第二代。本質上遊戲相當簡單,重心比較放在敵人攻擊模式而非緊湊的跳台動作上。雖然武器是劍,但可以發射能量彈,透過收集道具還能升級,也能切換成雙向射擊、追蹤飛彈或能摧毀敵人子彈的波狀攻擊等替代武器。每關散布著幾個小魔王,關底則會像 Darius 那樣預告登場主要 Boss。
comment_en: Valis II is a very uneven game, in all respects. The graphics range from downright horrible to quite pleasing from level to level - sprites are merely adequately drawn and animated and as a package the game looks a bit shoddy and unprofessional. There are some nice tunes, but they use a range of terribly cheap sounding synths to produce them, and it’s only nostalgia that saves many of them for me. The gameplay is simple and controls are responsive enough, but the level design does let the game down, especially in later levels that slowly become over-long and a chore to play. But despite all this, there are moments of enjoyment to be had. As one of the earlier Telenet games, it’s typical of their output - lots of visual scenes, iffy graphics and slightly crummy gameplay, but strangely hard to actually dislike. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
comment_zh: Valis II 在各方面都是一款極不均衡的遊戲。關卡之間的畫面品質從爛到不行到相當賞心悅目都有——角色精靈繪製與動畫只能說堪用,整體看起來有點粗糙不夠專業。音樂有幾首很不錯,但使用的合成器聽起來便宜得可憐,對我來說也只有情懷能救回一些印象。遊戲性簡單,操作反應也算靈敏,但關卡設計真的拖累了整款遊戲,尤其後期關卡越來越冗長,玩起來像在做苦工。即便如此,還是有些片段能讓人覺得有趣。作為 Telenet 早期的作品之一,這款遊戲很有他們的典型風格——大量過場畫面、普普通通的畫面、略顯粗糙的遊戲性,但奇怪的是你很難真的討厭它。sunteam_paul Turbo Views 評論

title_jp: ヴァリスIII THE FANTASM SOLDIER
overview_en: The continuing adventures of Yuko, whose Sword of Valis gives her power to defeat evil. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: Yuko 的冒險故事延續下去,她手中的 Valis 之劍賦予她擊敗邪惡的力量。Turbo Views 評論

title_jp: ヴァリスIV THE FANTASM SOLDIER
overview_en: Fourth in the platform game series with multiple characters to choose from. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 平台遊戲系列的第四部作品,可選擇多名角色登場。Turbo Views 評論

overview_zh: 集結了 Valis II、III 與 IV 裡過場動畫的合輯,獻給那些覺得玩遊戲太過「互動」的玩家。

overview_en: More hex-based strategy wargaming in a science fiction setting.
overview_zh: 科幻背景下的六角格策略戰爭遊戲續作。

overview_en: Scrolling robot combat game. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 橫向捲動的機器人戰鬥遊戲。Turbo Views 評論
