overview_en: An early Out Run style driving game which allows you to strategically stock up on car parts as you race across continents. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 早期的 Out Run 風格賽車遊戲,你可以在橫跨各大洲的比賽過程中策略性地補充車輛零件。Turbo Views 評論
no_intro_name: Victory Run (USA, Europe) (Wii U Virtual Console)

overview_en: Left-to-right scrolling beat 'em up conversion. Set out on a mission to rescue your girfriend using only your fists and feet (and the occasional nunchucks) to defend yourself against the gang-types that are out to stop you. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 由左向右橫向捲動的格鬥遊戲移植版本。玩家踏上拯救女友的旅程,只能靠拳腳(偶爾有雙節棍)來對抗沿路想阻止你的幫派份子。Turbo Views 評論

title_jp: バイオレントソルジャー
overview_en: Horizontal shooter where your ship can open up its nose cone allowing for a greater spread of fire. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 橫向捲動射擊遊戲,你的戰機可以打開機首錐以獲得更大範圍的火力散射。Turbo Views 評論

title_jp: ヴァージン・ドリーム
overview_en: Cartoonish girly adventure game.
overview_zh: 卡通風格的少女冒險遊戲。

overview_en: Move your little ship around the screen, boxing off sections until a certain percentage is covered, all the while avoiding the nasties that will destroy you if you are caught in the process of making a box.
overview_zh: 操控你的小船在畫面上移動,圈出區塊直到覆蓋達到一定比例,同時要避開那些會在你圈地途中摧毀你的討厭東西。
comment_en: I like the concept of Volfied, but I find that the nature of the game puts an upper limit on how fun it can be. When I first played it, I found myself just rushing to fill the screen and that didn't work out too well. Carefully planning your boxes to get the special pods (in the hope of a time-stopper) while dividing the screen evenly soon became the most productive strategy. Volfied's difficulty is its stumbling block though. Once you get above level 6 or 7, it really becomes a problem to avoid the 'boss' craft and minions which almost seems to track you around the screen. This can cause long-term frustration with the game and puts into question its longevity - a password system would have worked wonders. But it can be fun in short bursts if you want something to play for a few minutes at a time. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 我喜歡 Volfied 的設計概念,但我發現遊戲本質對於它能有多好玩設下了上限。我第一次玩的時候,只想著趕快把畫面填滿,結果下場很慘。後來發現小心規劃圈地路線、盡量拿到特殊膠囊(希望能拿到時停效果),同時把畫面平均切開,才是最有效率的策略。不過 Volfied 的難度是它的絆腳石。一旦過了第 6、7 關,要避開那艘幾乎會在畫面中追著你跑的「魔王」母艦與小兵,實在是個大問題。這會讓你長期玩下來很挫折,也讓人懷疑這款遊戲能撐多久——如果有密碼存檔系統就好了。但如果你只想找個短時間打發幾分鐘的遊戲,它還是能提供一些樂趣。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Platformer with a squat robot, based on a popular anime series. Split into ‘village’ and ‘mountain’ stages (where most of the action is). Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 操縱一台矮胖機器人的平台動作遊戲,改編自高人氣動畫。分為「村莊」與「山中」兩種關卡(主要動作場面都在山中)。Turbo Views 評論

overview_en: Space-based shoot 'em up that puts you in command of a craft that increases its power by equipping a spinning ring that circles it.
overview_zh: 太空背景的射擊遊戲,玩家操縱的戰機可以透過裝備繞著自己旋轉的光環來提升火力。
comment_en: W-Ring isn't a game that is widely talked about which is a pity because I quite like it. While it doesn't do anything out of the ordinary, it has enough to make it one of those games that I have a soft spot for. The graphics are pretty nice, fairly varied from level to level - sure it's no R-Type visually, but the liberal use of colour cycling makes the whole game feel very active and alive. The water level is particularly cool. I also really like the music as well, which has a certain odd quality to it, almost Darius-like in places, which is really appealing. Playing through the beginner mode and completing the game is stupidly easy, but there are also Normal and Expert modes for those who want to test their reflexes. If you've not played this before, it's really worth giving it the benefit of the doubt. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: W-Ring 不是一款被廣泛討論的遊戲,這有點可惜,因為我其實滿喜歡它的。雖然它沒做出什麼特別突出的東西,但整體品質足夠讓我對它有種偏愛。畫面相當不錯,各關變化也夠多——當然視覺上不能跟 R-Type 比,但大量使用色彩循環的手法讓整個遊戲顯得活靈活現。水中關卡尤其酷。我也很喜歡它的音樂,有種獨特的氣質,某些段落有點 Darius 的味道,很對我的胃口。初學者模式簡單到笑,但另外還有 Normal 和 Expert 模式給想考驗反應的人挑戰。如果你沒玩過,真的值得給它一個機會。sunteam_paul

title_jp: わいわい麻雀　～ゆかいな雀友たち～
overview_en: Mahjong with crazy characters.
overview_zh: 搭配瘋狂角色的麻將遊戲。
no_intro_name: Wai Wai Mahjong - Yukai na Janyuu-tachi (Japan)

overview_en: Gambling game where you bet on wallaby races.
overview_zh: 下注沙袋鼠賽跑的博弈遊戲。
no_intro_name: Wallaby!! - Usagi no Kuni no Kangaroo Race (Japan)

title_jp: ウィンズ・オブ・サンダー
overview_en: Highly popular shoot 'em up from the people behind Gate of Thunder. Winds of Thunder allows you to choose your level and buy upgrades from a shop with cash earned in the form of crystals during gameplay. Instead of a spaceship, you control a kind of futuristic knight in flying armour - four types of which are selectable at the beginning of each level. Each type of armour grants different attacks, and by playing well you can upgrade the attack power  in various stages.
overview_zh: 由 Gate of Thunder 原班人馬打造的超人氣射擊遊戲。Winds of Thunder 讓你可以選擇關卡,並用遊戲中以水晶形式掉落的現金在商店購買升級。你操控的不是太空船,而是一位穿著飛行盔甲的未來風騎士——每關開始時可從四種盔甲中選一種。每種盔甲擁有不同的攻擊方式,玩得好還可以分階段升級攻擊威力。
comment_en: Winds of Thunder is a visually amazing shoot 'em up. Coupling fantastic music and some incredible parallax scrolling, it also provides intense shooting action to ensure it a place in shoot ‘em up history. It’s harder than Gate of Thunder and to my mind it doesn't quite hit the high bar that that game set before it, but it looks amazing, is incredibly inventive and varied, and is one of those games you really must own. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Winds of Thunder 是一款視覺上驚豔絕倫的射擊遊戲。搭配精采的音樂與極為出色的視差捲動,再加上激烈的射擊動作,足以在射擊遊戲史上留下一席之地。難度比 Gate of Thunder 高,以我個人來說覺得沒有完全達到前作設下的高標,但畫面真的超讚、創意十足又變化多端,是那種你絕對該擁有一片的遊戲。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Overhead golf game.
overview_zh: 俯視視角的高爾夫遊戲。

overview_en: Fantasy dungeon crawling RPG.
overview_zh: 奇幻風格的地城探索 RPG。

overview_en: More 3D dungeon crawling in this pair of sequels.
overview_zh: 這兩部續作帶來更多 3D 地城探險。

overview_en: More 3D dungeon-based adventures. Images Front Cover • Back Cover •  CD
overview_zh: 更多 3D 地城冒險。圖片:封面・封底・CD
no_intro_name: Wizardry V - Heart of the Maelstrom (Japan)

overview_en: Taking a break from the usual kidnapped princess/aliens attacking plotlines, Wonder Momo is set in a school play! You control schoolgirl Momo, the female super-hero character and have to defend yourself on-stage from various monstrous/robotic nasties. Starting off as a normal girl, kicking enemies increases your 'wonder' gauge - you can transform into Wonder Momo either by facing forward and tapping the attack button or by moving into a whirlwind that occasionally whisks past the stage. As Wonder Momo, you have a super hoop that you can throw (all very exciting), but as soon as your wonder gauge hits zero, then it's back to plain old Momo. If your vitality runs out from contact with bullets, monsters or school photographers(!) then it's game over. Once you've cleared the required enemies on stage you are taken off to the next level.
overview_zh: 跳脫一般綁架公主或外星人入侵的老套劇情,Wonder Momo 的舞台設定在一場校園話劇中!你操縱女高中生 Momo——劇中的女超級英雄,必須在舞台上抵禦各種怪獸與機器怪物的攻擊。一開始她只是個普通女孩,踢擊敵人可以累積「wonder」能量條——當能量滿後,你可以讓她面向前方按攻擊鍵,或讓她走進偶爾掠過舞台的旋風中變身為 Wonder Momo。變身後的她能丟出超級呼拉圈(超刺激),但一旦 wonder 能量條歸零就會變回普通的 Momo。如果她被子彈、怪獸或校園攝影師(?)打到體力歸零就遊戲結束。清掉舞台上指定的敵人後,就會進入下一關。
comment_en: Converted from a Namco arcade game, this is pretty basic stuff. Graphics are colourful but very simplistic, aside from some great occasional pictures. Sound is pretty basic too, with jolly buzzy tunes that aren't particularly memorable and squeaky sound effects. The size of the stage is limited and gameplay involves just kicking, jumping and kicking some more and although this sounds enough for many games, in Momo it just doesn't satisfy. Maybe because you are on a small play area, you just feel that this is a very 'light' game with little substance. Hardly one of the Engine's classics. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 這款遊戲是由 Namco 的大型電玩版本移植而來,內容相當陽春。畫面色彩繽紛但非常簡陋,只有偶爾出現的精美插圖還不錯。音效也很簡單,嬉鬧嗡鳴的曲子並不特別令人難忘,音效也有點刺耳。舞台場地範圍有限,玩法就是踢、跳、再踢——雖然這對很多遊戲來說夠用,但在 Momo 身上就是不夠過癮。也許是因為場地太小,你就是會覺得這是一款非常「單薄」的遊戲,沒什麼內涵。這絕對算不上 PC Engine 的經典之作。sunteam_paul

title_jp: ワールドビーチバレー
overview_en: Cute and colourful volleyball action game. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 可愛又色彩繽紛的排球動作遊戲。Turbo Views 評論

overview_en: Overhead Formula-1 racing game.
overview_zh: 俯視視角的一級方程式賽車遊戲。

title_jp: プロテニスワールドコート
overview_en: An update of Namco’s Family Tennis, World Court  Tennis adds a Dragon Quest-style RPG  “Quest Mode” to its predecessor’s simple, cutesy tennis gameplay. In the quest  mode, the player is tasked with defeating the evil tennis king. This will require  leveling up the player’s racket, shirt, and shoes, as well as collecting pearls  to trade for a “magical ball” which can neutralize the evil king’s tennis powers.
overview_zh: Namco《Family Tennis》的強化版,World Court Tennis 在前作簡單可愛的網球玩法上,加入了勇者鬥惡龍風格的 RPG「Quest Mode」。在冒險模式中,玩家要打倒邪惡的網球王,過程需要升級球拍、球衣與球鞋,並收集珍珠以換取能夠剋制邪惡網球王力量的「魔法球」。

overview_en: Conversion of a Neo Geo beat 'em up.
overview_zh: Neo Geo 格鬥遊戲的移植版本。

overview_en: Horse racing game.
overview_zh: 賽馬遊戲。

title_jp: プロ野球ワールドスタジアム
overview_en: Baseball game with very dumpy players.
overview_zh: 棒球遊戲,球員都畫得非常矮胖。

title_jp: プロ野球 ワールドスタジアム'91
overview_en: Cutesy baseball sequel.
overview_zh: 可愛風的棒球續作。

title_jp: レッスルエンジェルス ダブルインパクト
overview_en: All female wrestling game in an anime style.
overview_zh: 動畫風格的全女性職業摔角遊戲。

overview_en: Overhead fantasy role-playing game.
overview_zh: 俯視視角的奇幻角色扮演遊戲。

overview_en: Fantasy overhead action role-playing game.
overview_zh: 奇幻俯視視角的動作角色扮演遊戲。

title_jp: ゼビウス ファードラウト伝説
overview_en: Arcade shoot 'em up with both air and surface attacks.
overview_zh: 結合空中與地面攻擊的大型電玩射擊遊戲。
comment_en: Xevious may be a classic arcade game, but nothing can disguise the fact that it’s just boring to play. This isn't helped by the basic graphics which should have had a significant update for this release. It's only good for nostalgia, and then only for a few minutes. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Xevious 也許是經典的大型電玩,但無法掩蓋玩起來就是無聊這個事實。陽春的畫面也幫不上忙,本來應該為了這次移植做個像樣的更新才對。這款遊戲只剩情懷價值,而且也只撐得了幾分鐘。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Take control of a skilled samurai warrior as you confront all manner of evil spirits in an oriental setting. The gameplay involves running into the screen, much like Space Harrier, but with the freedom to stop and run back. But it isn't just running and slashing wildly with your sword - there are also sections where you can (or must) jump onto floating platforms as you progress (particularly stage three where contact with the water below diminishes your health. Along the way there are various statues to destroy, each leaving a present behind which gives you health or those essential shurikens that allow you to hit enemies from a distance.
overview_zh: 操縱一位武藝高強的武士,在東方風格場景中對抗各式各樣的邪靈。玩法是往畫面深處奔跑,類似 Space Harrier,但可以自由停下或往回跑。不過這可不只是狂奔亂揮刀那麼簡單——過程中有一些段落你可以(或必須)跳到浮空平台上前進(特別是第三關,碰到水面會扣血)。沿路有各種石像可以破壞,每座石像都會留下禮物,能補血或提供必備的手裏劍,讓你能遠距離攻擊敵人。
comment_en: Trying to be   Space Harrier crossed with Ninja Spirit, this game is an unique concept but  fails on all counts. The action is often confusing and messy, forcing you to keep stopping and starting which seems very counter-intuitive. But you soon learn that this is the only way to make any progress. Making hits on the enemies when you don't have a shurikens seems more like a matter of luck than anything else, so you will probably spend much of this time just avoiding everything rather than getting in on the action. Unfortunately, the game just doesn't work. You have to give them some credit for the interesting idea, but it needs to be a whole lot slicker than this to be successful. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: 這款遊戲試圖融合 Space Harrier 與忍者龍劍傳,概念很獨特,但各方面都失敗了。動作常常讓人一頭霧水、手忙腳亂,逼得你不斷停下再繼續走,感覺非常反直覺。但你很快就會發現,這是唯一能推進遊戲進度的方法。沒有手裏劍時要打中敵人,看起來比較像在碰運氣,所以你大部分時間可能都花在閃避而不是正面迎擊。很遺憾,這款遊戲就是不成功。設計出這麼有趣的概念值得一些肯定,但要做得成功,它得比現在俐落得多。sunteam_paul

overview_en: Strategy space battle game based on the anime series, played over a set of story based scenarios where you have to command the bridge crew in real-time.
overview_zh: 改編自動畫的策略太空戰鬥遊戲,透過一系列劇情關卡進行,玩家必須即時指揮艦橋上的船員。

title_jp: 山村美紗サスペンス金盞花京絵皿殺人事件
overview_en: Adventure game written by author Misa Yamamura.
overview_zh: 由作家山村美紗編寫劇本的冒險遊戲。
no_intro_name: Yamamura Misa Suspense - Kinsenka Kyouezara Satsujin Jiken (Japan)

title_jp: 闇の血族遥かなる記憶
overview_en: Digital comic mystery adventure  featuring a girl with supernatural power.
overview_zh: 以擁有超自然力量的少女為主角的數位漫畫懸疑冒險作品。

overview_en: Digital Comic taken from the manga and anime about Yawara, a 'fashionable judo girl’. You play Matsuda, a photographer for a local sports paper who is keen to get a good story when he sees one. Featuring the voice talents of the original cast.
overview_zh: 改編自漫畫與動畫《Yawara》的數位漫畫,講述「時尚柔道少女」Yawara 的故事。你扮演本地運動報的攝影記者松田,他只要看到好題材就不會放過。由原作聲優陣容配音。

overview_en: In this sequel, the story concentrates far more on Fujiko - another judo wannabe, and you play the game from her point of view rather than photographer Matsuda's. Yawara herself is very much in the background here and not nearly as prominent as in the first game. There are a selection of bonus extras for added value. These include a quiz, character information, a cookery lesson, an unlockable game of othello and an arcade style judo battle game.
overview_zh: 在這部續作中,故事更聚焦在另一位柔道少女 Fujiko 身上,你是從她的視角進行遊戲,而不是前作那位攝影師松田。Yawara 本人在這一作退居幕後,戲份遠不及第一作。遊戲包含一系列附加內容提升價值,包括一個小測驗、角色資料、烹飪教學、可解鎖的奧賽羅(黑白棋)遊戲,以及一款大型電玩風格的柔道對戰遊戲。
comment_en: Yawara! 2 suffers more than the original in terms of repetition, as very little takes place outside of either the judo hall or training room, meaning that unless you can understand the plot then it gets very samey. It is also quite short compared to other digi-comics and somehow feels less interactive, with many long sequences that run on auto without barely a touch of the pad. The extras are a nice touch, but  it's all in Japanese and I can't really comment on the judo game as after fiddling around for ages I still couldn't work out exactly how to play it. If you're hankering for another digital comic and have the first, then you could do worse than pick this up for cheap - the artwork is still very good but you may get less out of it than you would like to. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Yawara! 2 在重複感方面比前作更嚴重,幾乎所有場景都發生在柔道場或訓練室之外就沒別的地方了,意思是如果看不懂劇情,整個遊戲玩起來會非常單調。與其他數位漫畫相比,本作也相當短,而且不知為何感覺互動性更低,許多漫長的片段幾乎不需要按一下搖桿就會自動播放。附加內容是個不錯的巧思,但全都是日文,柔道遊戲我搞半天還是搞不懂到底怎麼玩。如果你想再找一款數位漫畫玩,又擁有前作的話,便宜入手這片還算值得——美術依然很棒,但你得到的樂趣可能不如預期。sunteam_paul

overview_en: US made skateboarding action game. Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 美國開發的滑板動作遊戲。Turbo Views 評論

aka: TALES OF THE MONSTER PATH / TALES FROM THE MONSTER PATH
overview_en: Cute and demonic platform game. With only a yo-yo like energy weapon to protect you (that can be powered up by holding down on the control pad), you must navigate the spooky and monster-filled levels, stopping occasionally at a shop or gambling parlour.
overview_zh: 可愛又帶有惡魔風格的平台遊戲。你只有一把類似溜溜球的能量武器(按住方向鍵可以蓄力強化),必須在充滿鬼怪的陰森關卡中前進,偶爾還能在商店或賭場稍作停留。

title_jp: 横山光輝 真・三国志 ～天下は我に～
overview_en: In-depth hex-based strategy game set in feudal Japan, based on the Yokoyama Mitsuteru's manga retelling of Romance of the Three Kingdoms.
overview_zh: 以封建時代日本為背景的深度六角格策略遊戲,改編自橫山光輝重新演繹《三國演義》的漫畫作品。
no_intro_name: Yokoyama Mitsuteru - Shin Sangokushi - Tenka Wa ga Ni (Naxat) (Japan)

overview_en: Esteria is a land falling into shadow. The land of Ys has long risen into the sky and the two goddesses who protect the world have vanished with it. But evil is spreading, monsters walk the land, beasts are going mad and attacking people. From local stores, items made from the magical metal of Cleria have been stolen. In Darm Tower, the evil Dark Fact is growing in power, his plans for domination falling into place... And so begins the story of Ys, with the hero Adol Christin arriving in the port town of Minea. Viewed from an overhead viewpoint, Ys follows many of the standards of role-playing games, such as killing for money and experience points, buying weapons, items and armour and so on. But the battle system is fairly unique. Instead of slashing with your sword, you bump into enemies to attack them. Positioning is important - if you bump head on, there is more chance of a parry or counter attack, whereas if you make contact from the side, or slightly offset, you stand more chance of a successful hit. As you progress, the grand story takes you to mines and temples, and crosses seamlessly over into Ys II, where magic items are introduced that allow abilities such as shooting fireballs or transforming yourself into a monster to avoid attention. All this draws to a dramatic conclusion where you must face the ultimate evil and destroy it. Note on pronunciation: Ys is pronounced like EEsss (much like the end of the word 'geese'. It is not pronounced ‘ease’ or 'wise'. Comment (US Version) OK, let me just get this over with at the beginning. Ys I.II is my favourite game of all time (Space Harrier a close second as my favourite arcade game). Timing has a lot to do with this. I had played and loved Ys I on the Sega Master System, so experiencing the game with the amazing step up in technology that was the PC Engine CD-Rom was like picking me up and placing me in a little bit of heaven. Seeing the opening to the game for the first time was enough to make me work towards buying a CD unit of my own. But it goes beyond that. There is something indefinable about the Ys story and setting that just feels far more compelling than the usual fantasy scenarios, even though there is actually little to differentiate it from the many others out there. Basically, Ys just has it right. Of course, the music plays a massive role in the appeal of the game - Ys I and II contains some of the finest game music ever composed and it is all arranged with great skill by Ryo Yonemitsu. Graphically, it's relatively simplistic, but looking beyond that is a carefully designed and crafted world that has far more worth than a few extra background tiles. The pacing of the game is flawless. I feel that many modern role-playing games are just too long, which can often distract you from following the storyline, particularly if you take a break for a few days and forget what was happening. Ys has a plot that is simple enough to understand, although there are underlying depths, and the game moves at a speed that keeps you busy - it builds up the tension to the first dramatic encounter in Darm Tower with great skill, and the lead-up to the final climactic battle in Ys II is so perfectly planned that you really do feel the importance of your actions and the joy at the superb ending sequence afterwards. The translation for the US market is probably the best on the PC Engine, particularly the voice acting, which is extremely well done and features professionals, and not members of staff reading off cards as is the norm with these things. For the most part, the names have been translated faithfully with some minor exceptions, and not dumbed down for the western market. It's just a shame that the same care did not go into Ys III or Dragon Slayer. So there you go. This is a game you must have, and it's a game that I keep coming back to complete time and time again, even after all these years. In fact, despite all the advances in technology, I cant imagine a time where I won’t want to play it again. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: Esteria 是一個正逐漸被黑暗吞噬的國度。Ys 之地早已升入天空,守護世界的兩位女神也隨之消失。邪惡正在蔓延,怪物在大地上橫行,野獸失去理智攻擊人們。當地商店裡用魔法金屬 Cleria 打造的物品被偷走。在 Darm Tower 裡,邪惡的 Dark Fact 力量正不斷增長,他稱霸世界的計畫正一步步成形……於是,Ys 的故事就此展開,主角 Adol Christin 抵達港口城鎮 Minea。Ys 採用俯視視角,遵循許多 RPG 的標準設定,例如擊殺敵人獲得金錢和經驗值、購買武器道具盔甲等等。但戰鬥系統相當獨特——不是揮劍砍敵,而是撞上敵人來攻擊他們。位置很重要——如果正面撞上去,比較容易被格擋或反擊,但如果從側面或稍微偏移一點撞上去,命中成功的機率就更高。隨著遊戲進行,宏大的故事會帶你進入礦坑與神殿,並無縫銜接到 Ys II,引入了可以發射火球或變身怪物避開注意等能力的魔法道具。這一切會帶向戲劇性的高潮,你必須面對終極邪惡並將其擊敗。發音備註:Ys 的讀音像「EEsss」(類似英文 geese 的結尾),不唸成「ease」或「wise」。評論(美版)好,讓我在一開始就把話說清楚。Ys I.II 是我心目中最棒的遊戲(Space Harrier 則緊追在後,是我心中最棒的大型電玩)。時機對這份情感影響很大。我之前玩過、也愛上了 Sega Master System 上的 Ys I,所以在 PC Engine CD-ROM 這個科技大躍進的機台上重新體驗這款遊戲,就像被抱起來放進了小天堂。第一次看到遊戲的開場,就足以讓我下定決心要買一台 CD 主機。但這不只是如此。Ys 的故事與世界觀有種說不上來的魅力,比一般的奇幻設定更令人沉迷,雖然細究起來其實跟其他眾多作品沒什麼差別。簡單說,Ys 就是做對了。當然,音樂在本作魅力中也扮演了重要角色——Ys I 與 II 的音樂可說是史上最棒的遊戲配樂之一,全都由 Ryo Yonemitsu 以高超技巧編曲。畫面相對簡單,但如果看得更深,會發現這是個精心設計與打造的世界,遠比多幾塊背景圖塊更有價值。遊戲節奏完美無缺。我覺得許多現代 RPG 就是太長,很容易讓你偏離主線,尤其是如果中間休息幾天,常會忘記劇情進展到哪。Ys 的劇情夠簡單易懂,又有底層深度,遊戲進行的速度讓人停不下來——它以高超技巧把張力推升到 Darm Tower 的第一場戲劇性戰鬥,Ys II 最終高潮的鋪陳更是安排得天衣無縫,你真的會感受到自己行動的重要性,以及破關後那段絕美結尾帶來的喜悅。美版的翻譯大概是 PC Engine 上最出色的一次,特別是配音,做得極為精良,找的都是專業配音員,而不是業界常見的工作人員對著稿子念。大部分名稱都忠實翻譯,只有少數例外,也沒有為了西方市場而刻意弱智化。可惜 Ys III 和 Dragon Slayer 就沒得到同樣的照顧了。就是這樣。這是一款你必須擁有的遊戲,也是一款我這些年來一再回頭重新破關的遊戲。事實上,即使科技已經有了這麼多進步,我無法想像自己有一天會不想再玩一次這款作品。sunteam_paul Turbo Views 評論

title_jp: イースIIIワンダラーズフロムイース
overview_en: A vast divergence from the gameplay of the previous two episodes, Ys III bears more resemblance to Sorcerian, with its side-view action. Control of Adol involves a button to jump and another to slash your sword - yep, no bumping into enemies any more. Naturally, as the game progresses, you obtain greater armour and weapons, and also rings with magical properties which is similar to the magic system in Ys II - although here you have a limited 'ring power' to use them. Comment (US Version) Reviewing this from the viewpoint of the US version, the first thing that strikes you about Ys III is the terrible voice acting. The second thing is the dreadfully jerky simulated parallax scrolling, seen briefly in Ys II and also in Ninja Ryūkenden. But setting aside those minor issues, Ys III delivers a very different but still compelling episode of this highly regarded action role-playing series. Sure, the side-on viewpoint makes the game feel far more linear than the first two, but it retains the quality that holds you and keeps you coming back until it is completed. This is in no small measure due to the masterful arrangements of the music by Ryo Yonemitsu. It has a slightly harder edge this time around and justifies the purchase of the CD in itself. As mentioned before, the US version suffers a little from poor acting, especially compared to the bang up job they did with Ys I and II. Throughout the game the acting is stilted and very unprofessional, and nothing is worse than the narrator at the beginning who sounds like he’s got a permanently bunged up nose. The whole essence of the opening story is lost too - the US version describes it as the fight Adol has with 'Demanicus', as though you’ve already completed the game whereas the Japanese version is describing a past legend of a fearless warrior that defeated Galbalan and sealed him away - only for him to return now. It makes much more sense, especially as the warrior shown is golden haired, and Adol’s mop is red! But it's a small price to pay for being able to understand what is going on, and without knowing the story, any RPG is just a case of going through the motions. But Ys III delivers. It's addictive, it sounds fantastic, and the graphics are pretty enough in places despite the scrolling. It's not the most challenging game on the system but it's essential for fans of the series. sunteam_paul Turbo Views Review
overview_zh: 玩法與前兩代天差地別,Ys III 更像 Sorcerian,採用側視角動作玩法。操控 Adol 時,一個按鍵跳躍、另一個揮劍——沒錯,不再是靠撞擊攻擊敵人了。當然隨著遊戲進行,你會取得更強的盔甲武器,以及擁有魔法屬性的戒指,類似 Ys II 的魔法系統——但在這裡使用時會消耗有限的「戒指能量」。評論(美版)以美版的角度來看,Ys III 最先讓你震驚的就是慘不忍睹的配音。第二件事則是在 Ys II 和忍者龍劍傳中短暫出現過的那種難看的頓挫式模擬視差捲動。撇開這些小毛病,Ys III 提供了這個備受好評的動作 RPG 系列中非常不同卻依然引人入勝的一篇章節。當然,側視角讓遊戲感覺比前兩作更線性,但它仍保有那種讓你沉迷、不破關不罷休的品質。這點很大程度要歸功於 Ryo Yonemitsu 大師級的音樂編排,這次風格稍微更硬派一些,光是這張 CD 就值回票價。如前所述,美版在配音上比 Ys I & II 大不如前。整款遊戲配音都顯得僵硬又不專業,最糟糕的是開場的旁白,聽起來像永遠鼻塞。整個開場故事的精髓也蕩然無存——美版講的是 Adol 與「Demanicus」的戰鬥,好像你已經破完遊戲了,但日版則是在敘述一段過去的傳說,一位無畏的戰士打敗 Galbalan 並將其封印——而他如今即將歸來。這樣的鋪陳合理得多,尤其那位戰士是金髮,而 Adol 可是一頭紅髮!不過能聽懂劇情已經是小小的代價——不理解故事的話,任何 RPG 都只是在走流程。但 Ys III 交出了漂亮的成績單。它讓人上癮、音樂超棒,畫面即使有捲動問題也夠漂亮。難度在本機台上不算最高,但對於系列粉絲來說絕對不可錯過。sunteam_paul Turbo Views 評論

title_jp: イースIV -ザ・ドーン・オブ・イース
overview_en: More a  true sequel to Ys I & II, rather than Ys III, this reverts back to the same overhead style with the familiar bump-the-enemies attack system. Ys IV takes Adol to new lands and locations, but also back to places such as Minea and Darm Tower. Ys fans will be glad to know the music is again arranged by Ryo Yonemitsu. Ys IV has received a full fan translation and fan dub of all the in-game dialogue. The patches can be found here.
overview_zh: 比起 Ys III,本作更像是 Ys I & II 的正統續篇,回歸相同的俯視視角以及大家熟悉的撞擊敵人戰鬥系統。Ys IV 帶 Adol 前往新的土地與地點,但也會回到 Minea、Darm Tower 等熟悉場所。Ys 粉絲會很高興得知音樂再度由 Ryo Yonemitsu 編曲。Ys IV 獲得了粉絲翻譯與所有遊戲對話的粉絲配音補丁,這裡可以找到這些補丁。
comment_en: Ys I & II is a hard act to follow and Ys IV does its best to live up to the legacy. The graphics are of a higher standard, there are a lot more mini visual scenes and the music, once you get used to it, is very good - not as good as the previous games perhaps but certainly worthy. But despite all this and the longer overall quest, there's something that just doesn't gel perfectly with me. The story is somehow less interesting and the pacing and flow of the game seems less natural than Ys I & II. But don't let that put you off too much as it's still a decent ARPG, even if it fails to eclipse its predecessors. sunteam_paul
comment_zh: Ys I & II 是很難超越的經典,Ys IV 盡了最大努力來延續其傳奇。畫面品質更高,小過場動畫多了不少,音樂習慣之後也相當不錯——也許不如前幾作,但絕對夠格。不過就算這些加上整體更長的流程,就是有些地方沒能完全打動我。故事不知為何沒那麼有趣,遊戲節奏與流暢度也比 Ys I & II 來得不自然。但別讓這些點讓你打退堂鼓,它仍是一款不錯的動作 RPG,即使沒能超越前作。sunteam_paul
no_intro_name: Ys IV - The Dawn of Ys (Japan)

title_jp: 幽☆遊☆白書 闇勝負！！暗黒武術会
overview_en: Combat game based on the anime series. Aim your target to launch energy balls at your fast moving opponent. There are a limited number of special attacks, but you can charge your shots for greater power by holding down the button.
overview_zh: 改編自同名動畫的對戰遊戲。瞄準目標,向高速移動的對手發射能量彈。特殊攻擊次數有限,但你可以按住按鈕蓄力讓攻擊更強。

overview_en: A ‘Game of Life’ style board game that the Japanese seem fond of. You and either computer or real players take it in turns to ‘roll’ the spinner (dice) and make your way around the game board. Certain squares allow you to gamble, others let you take out insurance, and others let you get money from the bank. As you progress, your character gets married, has kids and goes through life experiences. It can be played without knowledge of Japanese but very much relies on it to enjoy the game in any way.
overview_zh: 一款日本人似乎很喜歡的「人生遊戲」風格棋盤遊戲。你和電腦或真人玩家輪流「轉」指針(骰子),在遊戲板上前進。某些格子可以讓你賭博、另一些可以買保險、還有些可以從銀行領錢。隨著遊戲進行,角色會結婚、生小孩、經歷人生種種。不懂日文也能玩,但要享受遊戲樂趣就非常仰賴日文能力了。

overview_en: Samurai based strategy war game. Images Front Cover • Back Cover •  Spine • CD • Reg Card Front • Reg Card Back
overview_zh: 以武士為題材的策略戰爭遊戲。圖片:封面・封底・書背・CD・註冊卡正面・註冊卡背面

overview_en: Horizontal shoot 'em up where you can suck in enemy craft and either use them as a shield or fire them off for extra damage.
overview_zh: 橫向射擊遊戲,玩家可以吸入敵機,既能當作護盾使用,也可以發射出去造成額外傷害。

overview_en: Drag racing style driving/adventure game.
overview_zh: 直線加速賽車風格的賽車冒險遊戲。

overview_en: Street racing action/adventure game. Images Front Cover • Back Cover • CD
overview_zh: 街頭賽車動作冒險遊戲。圖片:封面・封底・CD

overview_en: Action block puzzle game, known in another guise as Solomon's Key. You have to obtain the key and get to the exit by creating and destroying blocks and avoiding various monsters and obstacles. A password save allows ease of continuing..
overview_zh: 動作方塊益智遊戲,也就是所謂的《Solomon's Key》另一個版本。你必須取得鑰匙抵達出口,過程中創造並破壞方塊、閃避各種怪物與障礙物。提供密碼存檔讓遊戲續關更便利。
